Innova - pupsiren

Parsed: Innova — username pupsiren
Resolved: Siren (id: 383401310994694146)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1508172525484638239
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
📝 NCRP CHARACTER SHEET TEMPLATE
Name
Innova
Age
34
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Netrunner
Psychological Profile
True neutral, Inno is very aware theres no such thing as right and wrong anymore in Night City, theres only biz. Make eddies, run the net, and keep his head attached to his shoulders at all costs. At least… before the cyberware drove him to the egde. The chrome. Its just a little more, he can take it. He’s gotta get better, he’s gotta be the best to make money and get bigger, more chrome, more money, more power, more security. Thats how it goes. You hear that…?
Physical Description
He’s tall, standing at a solid 6’10” after so much body modding and enhancements. A dragon-like exotic human, he’s covered in tattoos of the stars and the night sky before the air pollution in the city blocked it out. He’s a stocky guy with decent musculature, its plain he works out or at least has enough physical activity he doesn’t have to.
Chrome / Implants
Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): None Auditory System: None Circulatory & Immune Systems: None Hands & Feet (2 slots): None Integumentary System: None Legs & Mobility (1 slot per leg): None Neural: Netrunner Suite 3 - 5 points Ocular System: None Skeleton & Torso Musculature: None Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): None Miscellaneous: ICE Layer - 1 Point
Total Cyberware Points
6 Points
Skills / Talents / Abilities
As a netrunner he’s hyperaware, an excellent surveillance, recon, or overwatch provider. Too many years helping facilitate black market deals and bringing down competition for money has earned him some amount of skill with firearms, negotiations, and a handy social skillset for making business partners.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
He rarely carries any but he does own a simple handgun. He mostly relies on his ability to fuck with tech as a weapon instead of direct confrontation. List all weapons, caliber, limitations, etc.
Backstory
Inno grew up in Night City, a middle class son of a Corpo laborer, poor choom never made quite enough to get them out from under Arasaka but was a hard enough worker to be asked for… overnight shifts. He never really knew what happened while his Dad was there but he always came back looking a little worse for wear, and, it just kept going for years. As he grew up he gained a fascination with chrome and netrunning, hearing stories of some hotshot chrome junkie inventing a new virus or hack that could make your toaster rip an exec’s face off, or turn a normal cctv camera into a ticking time bomb from the other side of the city. His dad kicked him out after two years of gig-work when he finally started doing real work, said he couldn’t risk being associated with a cyberpyscho in the making. He started doing any job that came across his path, moving cargo, providing overwatch and logistics for ops, anything. Then came the mods. The exotic implants and sculpting, the paranoia, the access, the weapons, the danger, the fear, the sex, drugs, and shit blowing up in your face, the running for your life just to make a quick eddie. He would make it big, if the fucking toaster would stop calling his neighbor Mrs. Nightly a rogue AI…
Known Affiliations
None
Reference Images
Art, screenshots, etc.
RP Hooks
He’s always looking for work, trying to make another score happen or get paid. Doesn’t matter for who or what, a steady gig or a one off money shot, if you need something he’s down to try.

Acier Batallie- abendroth1994

Parsed: Acier Batallie — username abendroth1994
Resolved: LordAbendroth (id: 180064987924922368)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1508169287792332870
Name
Acier Batallie.
Age
22.
Pronouns
They/Them/He/Him.
Occupation
Arasaka Intelligence.
Psychological Profile
A nepo-baby through and through, with an attitude to match. A pathological liar and a high self esteem, they often act aloof and uncaring to most situations but are much sharper than they appear at first. Has a bent towards the sadistic at times.
Physical Description
Short, thin, feminine. A total Femboy, with scales, horns and a tail for aesthetic purposes. Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: Cyberarms (Dexterous). Ocular System: SmartEyes. Miscellaneous: Ghost Tag. Bio-Monitor.
Total Cyberware Points
6.
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Stealth, smooth talking, lockpicking, torture, assassination.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Dagger, Overture Revolver, Bullet Resistant Clothing.
Backstory
Born to two high ranking Arasaka Intel operatives in the Paris branch, they moved to Night City when their parents were redeployed there. Growing up in the life of luxury as befitting an Arasaka nepo-baby made them a very spoiled child, but eventually they were forced by their parents into Arasaka University to ensure they got a proper education. Following in their parent's footsteps upon graduation, they made quick work of establishing a place for themselves. Leveraging their parent's position when able to give themselves a boost in their career, silently removing rivals through various means (typically assassination), and proving they could walk the walk along with the talk. With so much strange activity around East Side in recent months, Arasaka Intel will be deploying Acier to keep an eye on things and report any findings.
Known Affiliations
Arasaka Intel.
RP Hooks
Spying, info-brokering, blackmailing, nepo-baby corpo fun.

52
Pronouns
she/her
Occupation
Merc
Psychological Profile
Copes with trauma with dark humor and has a fiery and bombastic personality but is most of the time in a calm state due to being in a drunken stupor
Physical Description
Around 6ft3, 200lbs, curvaceous build with one cybernetic arm, leg and cyber lines on her body from cosmetic surgery. Black hair, blue glowing cybernetic eyes and elf ears.
Chrome / Implants
Name the mods, what they do, and note any tradeoffs. Note: Custom chrome and implants must be approved befor use Slots, 1 Cyberware Implant per slot EXCEPT Miscellaneous which is unlimited: Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): Auditory System: Circulatory & Immune Systems: Hands & Feet (2 slots): Integumentary System: Subdermal armor2 Legs & Mobility (1 slot per leg): Subdermal grip 2 Neural: Ocular System: Smart Eyes 2 Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Miscellaneous:

Skills / Talents / Abilities
A skilled marksman and logistics operator. And a engineer when the skill is needer though this is not a primary skill. Is prolific with grenade throwing and or grenade rifles.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
.45 automatic smg , quadra type-66. Grenade rifle, 20 mm grenades. Five frag grenades. A guitar (Gibson Les paul hollow body).
Backstory
Born in Santo Domingo, at the time called South Haywood in 2023, Howitzer grew up in the streets of NC, during the time of red after the night city Holocaust, originally as a merc, making a name for herself and working her ass off for it. She joined Millitech and fought in the unification war, solidifying her name sake after a howitzer exploded perminantly damaging her spine, leg and arm leading to her current prosthesis. After that she continued to work as a merc for a few years, spending what amouts of eddies she could save up to keep her in the work force, and looking good while she did it. In recent years she has gotten more intense augments to keep her in fighting form.
Known Affiliations
Former millitech, no known affiliation.
Reference Images
Art, screenshots, etc.
RP Hooks
Old school merc with a lot of stories and inventive ways of handling issues. Good for tactical knowhow and logistical shit. Street kid that knows the city like the back lf her hand.

Parsed: M+I-R~I^S= (Holo Tag: @The_Doll_Maker) — username waffies
Resolved: waffies (id: 310504104407465984)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1508166480351723641
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
📝 NCRP CHARACTER SHEET TEMPLATE
Name
=M+I-R~I^S= (Holo Tag: @The_Doll_Maker)
Age
Unknown, Possibly in her 50's
Pronouns
She/her/it
Occupation
Black market chrome dealer, Underground Ripperdoc, and "Information extraction" for hire.
Psychological Profile
Disassociated, melancholy and quiet, She will do ANYTHING for the right sum. This makes her great at black market dealing and ripperdoc work. She is not a sadist, however doing her job is one of the few things she takes satisfaction in. It is likely she suffers from extreme depression and emotional detachment.
Physical Description
She is an FBT, 2 meters in height, her build is slender and stringy, Her highly exposed internals, such as nerves, tubes, and skeletal structure is her main noticeable feature, She is human, though her appearance makes her look more like a ghost/corpse, She is Generally seen and highly unsettling but dependeble. She has an Infamous record of being impossible to flip/buy out. Once she is hired for something she will not stop until it is done, and cannot be persuaded otherwise, except by the original customer.
Chrome / Implants
Cyberarms (Dex): Used for surgery, chrome installation. (Hers are known to make unsettling bone cracking and popping sounds) -Cost: 2 SmartEyes: Thermals, NV, Zoom, etc. (Here eyes look dead, she stares at people for uncomfortable amounts of time, as if she is deconstructing them) Cost: 2 Cybernetic Claws: INCREDIABLY SHARP, she uses these rather than a scalpel when cutting. (Her claws are always stained slightly with blood) (I would like to propose having her claws be able to heat themselves, so that she can cauterize wounds) Cost: 1 TOTAL: 5
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Non-cyber skills — Stealth, she moves unnaturally quietly, She is good at black market work and business dealings, despite her unnerving presence. HIGHLY talented ripper doc, is able to triage and assist in medical support in dangerous and life threatening situations. She is also a decent shot with her signature Overture, she likes to damage a target as little as possible, damage devalues product after all. Though she prefers others to do the shooting for her.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Malorian Arms .42 caliber Overture medical supplies, stimulant inhalers, pain suppressants.
Backstory
Miris is an enigma, not even her exact age is certain, she is likely in her 50s (OOC her biological remains are 53). She has been in the underground chrome and ripperdoc culture for the majority of her life. She is responsible for installing illegal chrome in nearly every gang in NC. She holds no allegences and no conections outside of her work. She works purely for profit and everything, from flesh, to emotion, to life and death has stopped mattering to her. When she became an FBC, and why is also unknown, but ask anyone who knows her and they will say they've always remember her as an FBC. She is notorious for being impossible to buy out, once she has been paid, she cannot be flipped or called off, except for by the original customer. Its possible her obsession with using work as a distraction makes her ignore the politics of it, as she just wants to do her job.
Known Affiliations
Has worked for: Militech, Arasaka, Biotechnica, Maelstrom, 6th Street, The Animals, The Syndicate, other various businesses and one time jobs Black market connections IMPORTANT TO NCRP: She is one of the doctors who saved Scoundrel's life after being hired by Vance. 🖼️ References: WIP https://i16ya8.booth.pm/items/8222327
RP Hooks
Chrome Purchases Ripperdoc Appointments Hiring her for medical work, or Interrogation Digging into her emotional turmoil and past. Her Appearance, which is connected to her emotional problems

Diego Serrano - j3llyvox

Parsed: Diego Serrano — username j3llyvox
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1508163236317499615
! Username "j3llyvox" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
Diego Serrano
Age
late 20s
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Solo - Freelance Mercenary
Psychological Profile
Diego is the kind of person who moves first and thinks while he’s already in motion. But he doesn't freeze nor hesitate, he fully commits. To most people, that looks like recklessness but in reality, it’s experience. He’s been in enough bad situations to know that overthinking gets you killed faster than a wrong decision. He has a strong sense of what’s right and wrong, even if he’d never explain it out loud.He doesn’t like bullies, doesn’t tolerate people abusing power, and won’t stand by if something feels off. That said, he’s not trying to be a hero. He just reacts instinctively. He can be loyal, but only after trust is earned, and that takes time.
Physical Description
Diego has a solid, athletic build thanks to years of constant movement. He carries himself in a relaxed way, almost casual, even when things are tense, as if he already accepted how things might go.His hair is one of the first things people notice, split between teal, white and black, styled in a messy undercut with longer strands falling forward. He usually wears tinted glasses. His face is sharp, with light stubble, and there are cyberware lines along his neck and face, nothing flashy, just enough to show he’s been through upgrades. 🦾 Chrome / Implants Skeleton & Torso Muscolature: Dense Marrow (2 CWP) – Increases body weight and striking power. 20% Heavier. Integumentary System: NanoStitch Skin (2 CWP) – Automatically seals small wounds. Used to counter tech weapons that puncture small but deep holes into soft tissue. Less effective against powered weapons. Neural: ICE Layer (1 CWP) – Detects incoming hacks instantly—early warning. Miscellaneous: GhostTag (1 CWP) – Your face is automatically blurred in security cameras. Higher chance to be unidentifiable in camera footage.
Total Cyberware Points
6 CWP
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Strong Combat Instinct Weapon Handling Situational Awareness Quick talk & Multilingual Tough guy

Nixie - shaemlyss

Parsed: Nixie — username shaemlyss
Resolved: ShaemLyss (id: 1347797724094795797)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1508161795167092737
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
Nixie NIX-13 ARASAKA DESIGNATION ARASAKA 荒坂
Age
24
Pronouns
She / Her
Occupation
High-end Exotic / Joytoy Covert Arasaka Counter-Intelligence Operative PSYCHOLOGICAL PROFILE Nixie is quiet and shy at first, using synthetic speech, holo-text, and expressive gestures to communicate. Once comfortable, she becomes teasing, affectionate, and playfully mischievous. She is highly observant and remembers every detail. Beneath her soft demeanor lies a lonely, hypervigilant young woman conditioned by Arasaka who struggles with the fear that her personality is more performance than reality. TRAUMA: Lost her voice after a traumatic event in childhood. Conditioned by Arasaka to use affection as a tool. Fears abandonment and becoming obsolete. BEHAVIORAL QUIRKS: Tail flicks reveal her mood. Tilts her head when curious. Uses holo-emojis and cute stickers in conversation. Remembers small personal details about everyone. EMOTIONAL TONE: Warm, playful, and mysterious on the surface; anxious, introspective, and conflicted underneath. PHYSICAL DESCRIPTION Petite (5’2”), with a succubus-inspired appearance. Small decorative horns and bat-like wings, both purely cosmetic. Long black hair with crimson streaks, often worn tousled and wild. Her glowing red eyes, subtle under-skin lights, and sleek face mask enhance her otherworldly allure. Her movements are graceful, playful, and almost dreamlike—like an illusion you can’t resist. CHROME / IMPLANTS AUDITORY SYSTEM (2 CWP) Enhanced Ears Enhanced hearing, audio amplification, directional sound filtering. OCULAR SYSTEM (2 CWP) SmartEyes Zoom, threat vision, tactical AR HUD. CIRCULATORY & IMMUNE SYSTEMS (1 CWP) Detoxifier Filters toxins from her bloodstream, protects against drugs and poisons. Side Effect: Constant thirst; requires frequent hydration. MISCELLANEOUS (1 CWP) VoiceWeaver Synthetic speech, voice modulation, accent mimicry. Side Effect: Voice can glitch when stressed; may sound artificial. AESTHETIC CYBERWARE (0 CWP) Decorative Horns (cosmetic only) Bat Wings (cosmetic only) Decorative Tail Mount (cosmetic only) UnderSkin Lights (red) Purely aesthetic, no functional benefit.
Total Cyberware Points
6 / 6 MAX 6 AT CHARACTER CREATION SKILLS / TALENTS / ABILITIES Exceptional eavesdropping & intelligence gathering Reading body language & emotional cues Seduction & social engineering Stealth & discreet surveillance Nonverbal communication Data broker & information handling Basic self-defense EQUIPMENT / ARMOR / WEAPONS Stylish face mask with holo display support Designer clothing suited for high-end venues Agent device & encrypted comms link Concealed data shards Pepper spray / small holdout weapon (if permitted) BACKSTORY Born in Night City’s underbelly, Nixie lost her voice after a traumatic event. Arasaka took her in, healed her, and saw potential beyond her silence. Trained as a covert intelligence asset—NIX-13. She now uses charm, playfulness, and her unnatural grace to gather secrets from those who never see the threat behind her smile. She dreams of discovering who she would be without the mask, the chrome, and the code. KNOWN AFFILIATIONS ARASAKA Various luxury clubs and braindance lounges across Night City.

ECHO - newbiebunny

Parsed: ECHO — username newbiebunny
Resolved: ǝᴉqʍǝu (id: 249918804895727616)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1508160670540234772
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
NCRP CHARACTER SHEET – ECHO
Name
Echo
Age
24
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Underground DJ, Ripperdoc, Tech Scavenger. PSYCHOLOGICAL PROFILE Echo comes across as calm and hard to read most of the time, usually speaking in a dry, sarcastic tone that makes it difficult to tell whether he’s joking or insulting someone. He enjoys teasing people during conversations and has a habit of making smart remarks even in dangerous situations. Underneath the sarcasm, Echo is observant, serious, and far more intelligent than he lets people assume. He tends to study people quietly before deciding whether he trusts them. He dislikes emotional vulnerability and usually hides concern behind teasing comments or deadpan humor. Echo is obsessed with music and constantly has something playing through his headphones or speakers while he works. He mixes tracks, edits audio, and samples random city sounds into experimental music projects under his alias “ZERO.” He also has a bad habit of stealing useful tech components whenever he spots them. Wires, chips, processors, broken electronics, audio equipment — if something looks salvageable, there’s a good chance Echo already slipped it into his bag. PHYSICAL DESCRIPTION Height: 6’1 Build: Slim and agile General Appearance: Echo has layered teal-and-black hair, pale skin, glowing glasses, and rabbit-ear styled headphones that are part of his signature look. He wears oversized black techwear hoodies with dangling straps and utility belts filled with tools, wires, and stolen components. CHROME / IMPLANTS Noise Dampener (Auditory System)- Higher chance to filter out harmful sonic frequencies. Trade off: Temporary deafness if overwhelmed. Cyberarm (Dexterous) (Arms & Arm Attachments) - Precision tool use. RP lockpicking, surgery, mechanical hacking. Trade off: Shakes when under pressure. Doesn't enhance Stamina Cyberleg (Runner) (Legs & Mobility) - Jump farther, run faster, land silently. Parkour beast. Trade Off: Loud stomp at full speed. Doesn't enhance Stamina
Total Cyberware Points
5/ 6 SKILLS / TALENTS / ABILITIES Cyberware repair Audio engineering DJ mixing Stealth and scavenging Fast close-quarters combat Knife fighting Dodging and evasive movement Braindance editing EQUIPMENT / ARMOR / WEAPONS Primary Weapon: SMG Secondary Weapon: Pistol Melee Weapon: Mono Knife Misc Equipment: - Portable toolkit - Audio equipment - Stolen chips and wires - Modified speakers - Data shards - Repair kit BACKSTORY Echo grew up around the underground club scene of Watson, surrounded by loud music, black-market braindances, and scavenged technology. During the day he trained under local ripperdocs, learning how to repair and install cyberware for mercs and gang members. At Instead of focusing on raw strength or military-grade chrome, Echo trained himself to fight with speed, agility, and unpredictable movement. He relies on fast reflexes, quick strikes, and evasive combat techniques to overwhelm opponents. Outside of work, Echo constantly scavenges electronics and steals useful tech components to improve his equipment, music gear, and workshop. KNOWN AFFILIATIONS - Underground clubs in Watson - Independent ripperdocs - Black-market tech dealers - Local scavenger crews RP HOOKS - Always looking for rare tech parts - Offers discounted cyberware repairs - Performs at underground clubs - May steal unattended electronics - Interested in experimental sound technology

Lixoriah - voillah_

Parsed: Lixoriah — username voillah_
Resolved: ᲼᲼ש๏เɭɭคђ᲼᲼ (id: 1036430700859109406)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1508159056555151470
Name
Lixoriah (last name, unknown)
Age
Early to mid 20s
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
Street rat, Accepting any low tier job she can.
Psychological Profile
Already a little crazed due to her borgware. Often finds threatening someone rather amusing. She had stomach cancer that had spread throughout her digestive tract. She's rather light hearted, dispite her situation. 🧍 Physical Description (Height, Weight, etc): 5'3. Lighter than someone of her age and size due to her stomach, womb, intestines, kidney, liver, pancrease. Are all missing. 🦾 Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: Her right arm is replaced with a silver plated one, having long metallica talons. Auditory System: Standard human. Circulatory & Immune Systems: Standard Human Hands & Feet: Cybernatic Claws (one hand only) Standard Human Integumentary System: Legs & Mobility: Cyberleg (runner), Neural: Standard Human Ocular System: Smart Eyes Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Borgware (not actually on list, but she's not human there) Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Standard Human Miscellaneous: DollChip
Total Cyberware Points
6
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Good with knives, petty theft. Due to her childish nature and taking advantage of her birth gender, she manages to worm her way into social groups (sometimes with less success than she realises)
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
A gravity blade (just a switch blade that the handle opens, and when spun. It uses gravity to release the blade)
Backstory
She never knew, or had any parents. She always knew life on the streets. Her knife skills started with opening packets of food with a rusted blade, to stabbing other street rats who tried to get their dirty mits on her meal. After a couple years, she had gotten pretty good at carvin up runts who tried to steal from her. This got attention from fixers trying to find grunt work some corpo's weren't willing to bother with. This lead to her knife skills becomming second nature. However due to her life in the dirty streets, eating godknows what. During a checkup she was told she had stomach cancer which had spread through most of her digestive tract. This left her with three options. Die like a pathetic pile of meat to a desease. Medical treatment which she couldn't afford in this life. Or find some sketchy ripperdoc to remove the problematic parts. This lead her to option 3. Replacement. This lead her to coming across a ripperdoc called selene (agreed upon by mystic_moony) who agreed to do the surgery, but this put her in quite a bit of debt. But it was still cheaper than the alternative. During the proceedure since Selene didn't fully know Lixoriah or trusted the girl to not work off her debt. She had looked around for any chip she had on hand to have atleast some control over her, which ended up being a DollChip. Now on some nights when she doesn't meet her qouta, Selene uses the DollChip to have her pay... In other ways. To help with her paying off her debt, if in the job descriptions for the work she recieves doesn't say to keep the body intact, she often ends up cutting out small chrome to stuff in her pocket. Stuff like eyes, fingers and anything else she can stuff in her pockets.
Known Affiliations
Any bums or fixers she can find grunt work for. Like 'handling' a problem. Or hacking into some low-class person's bank account. (a player ripperdoc, not sure who yet)
Reference Images
Not neccesarily reference images. But this a moodboard I'm compiling of the avatar to work on her https://mood.site/XsPiekFh?edit=E8VjzRuu Which I'll be doing tomorrow.
RP Hooks
Her body is rather unique, since a third of her human body is missing, when she isn't hiding it. This could peak someone's interest.
Additional Notes
(not yet been made)

Artyom "Pryvyd" Raizov - palantheir

Parsed: Artyom "Pryvyd" Raizov — username palantheir
Resolved: Palantheir (id: 228114308150722560)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1508158149088251944
Name
Artyom "Pryvyd" (Pronounced Pray-Vu-wid) Raizov
Age
27
Pronouns
He/ Him
Occupation
Mercenary
Psychological Profile
Quiet for the most part, but Friendly and supportive to most. will show aggression to those who threaten the weak.
Physical Description
Height 5 feet 9 inches, Slightly Tone, Sprinter's build Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: Mantis Blades (Sharp. Scary. Neat-o. Have weird Sharp Arms.) Auditory System: Circulatory & Immune Systems: Hands & Feet: Integumentary System: Optical Camo ( Semi-Invisible when activated. Still shimmer and aren't anywhere near fully invisible.) Legs & Mobility: Neural: Ocular System: Smart Eyes (Zoom, Thermal, Night Vision, Facial ID, AR HUD. Eyes Glow, Sometimes Blink Asynchronously) Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Miscellaneous:
Total Cyberware Points
6/6 (0 free points)
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Social: Prefers to investigate matters, tends to notice small details and use info for later. Will try to negotiate if opportunity presents itself. A little bit of a silver tongue. Combat: Prefers range, but will try stealthy approach first. Take enemy down while making as little noise as possible.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Overture Revolver (Medium Power Level, 6 round Mag of .38 Special)
Backstory
Orphaned alongside his sister Naomi when he was 14, Artyom tried his best to find a way to support himself and his sister. Taking on simple jobs such as package delivery or cleaning up shops until one day, he returned to his shelter only to find the place was ransacked and his sister was gone. He tried to go to NCPD, but they stated that "People go missing all the time and we can't find them all." He was nearly at his end when he was brought into The Night Watch. Like minded individuals who wanted to help, but like most if all other groups, they wanted help in return. Since then, he has been doing everything in his power to make sure what happened to him doesn't end up the same way.
Known Affiliations
The Night Watch.
Reference Images
https://docs.google.com/document/d/13-z3DxlEERwuzHoJaX7z929XLCkKwEUM1pvqkuaMPgM/edit?usp=sharing
RP Hooks
Infiltration Specialist, Some Investigation and Negotiation Skills. Quickdraw and somewhat good with his hands.
Additional Notes
Tends to be a bit of a soft heart, Will be hostile to members of Maelstrom and Scavs.

Rafael “Rafi” Alvarez (Ring Name: Smiles) - vinnybot<3

Parsed: Rafael “Rafi” Alvarez (Ring Name: Smiles) — username vinnybot<3
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1506778550038958091
! Username "vinnybot<3" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
** Rafael “Rafi” Alvarez (Ring Name: Smiles)
Age
** 26
Pronouns
** He/Him
Occupation
** Underground MMA fighter, boxer, sparring partner, and occasional gym coach based out of Vista del Rey. Rafi earns money through local fight circuits, exhibition matches, training newer fighters, and occasional security work, though he avoids gang employment whenever possible.
Psychological Profile
** Rafael Alvarez is a friendly but somewhat nervous man outside of combat, often shy around new people until he becomes comfortable. Once relaxed, he’s energetic, enthusiastic, and openly passionate about fighting culture, frequently fanboying over respected fighters, solos, and athletes he admires. Rafi genuinely loves competition and sees combat as a form of self-improvement rather than cruelty. He actively seeks stronger opponents, believing struggle and adversity are necessary to grow stronger both physically and mentally. In the ring, he’s known for smiling during difficult fights, adapting quickly under pressure, and respecting opponents regardless of victory or defeat. However, if someone becomes openly disrespectful or forces violence outside agreed competition, his demeanor changes immediately. The excitement disappears, replaced by focused aggression.
Physical Description
** Rafi is a tall, athletic exotic with a lean fighter’s build shaped by years of training rather than heavy cyberware. He has dark green fur with tan striping, bright teal eyes, expressive ears, and prominent horns. His hands are almost always wrapped. He typically dresses in casual athletic clothing like tank tops, hoodies, joggers, and worn sneakers, carrying himself with a relaxed but balanced posture that immediately gives away his combat experience.
Chrome / Implants
** * Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): Gorilla Arms - 2 * Auditory System: * Circulatory & Immune Systems: * Hands & Feet (2 slots): Subdermal Grip - 1 * Integumentary System: * Legs & Mobility (1 slot per leg): Cyberleg (Runner) - 2 * Neural: Netrunner * Ocular System: * Skeleton & Torso Musculature: * Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Reactive Muscle Fibers - 1 * Miscellaneous:
Total Cyberware Points
** 6

27

Physical Description

Chrome / Implants

false softness quiet observation information profiling data recovery and reconstruction hyperfixation (will disregard pain regarding her hands)
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
[Pistol] Unity Type: Power Power Level: Medium Mag Size: 8
Backstory
(age 1 - 18) born and raised in Las Vegas, Nevada. was a bright, social and smart child growing up. (age 18 - 24) moved to Night City to attend college. became obsessed with information systems, hacking, and neural technology. was tasked with constructing a project for a science fair but lead to an accident where her hands were completely burnt. hospitalized for several weeks. (age 24 - 27) after being discharge, chose to drop out from collage and disappeared into the outskirts beyond Night City, taking her equipment with her and living alone for years in isolation. began to live in the net and adopted the name 'Xofie'. lived off of remote net jobs under the handle 'Xitrine'. slowly, the constant neural exposure left her deranged, becoming a timid individual. after years alone, Xofie finally chose to return to society in hopes of rediscovering herself and reconnecting with humanity.
Known Affiliations
[Acquaintance] Nicole [Acquaintance] Aurora [Acquaintance] Dawn [Acquaintance] Julian

gives out random variety of small candies pillow sleeves clumsiness

Mirage (Jasmine Badawi Al-Sayid) - bigmommalion

Parsed: Mirage (Jasmine Badawi Al-Sayid) — username bigmommalion
Resolved: Me-Ow (id: 395415733841952770)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1506777215352832061
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
Mirage character sheet
Name
Mirage (Jasmine Badawi Al-Sayid)
Age
40
Pronouns
They/them
Occupation
Assassin, Mercenary, and Corpo
Psychological Profile
Cold, Calculating, and an overtly vicious huntress. Speaks very little, and knows she has nothing to prove to anyone.
Physical Description
White hair, tan skin, purple-pink eyes. Weight: 160 lb Height: 5’9 Chrome: Optical Camo (2) Ghost tag (2) Smart eyes (2) [Post character creation chrome] Silent step soles (2) Reinforced tendons (2) Recoil dampeners (1) Non cyber skills: Multi-lingual (Mandarin, Arabic, English) Trained Marksman Proficient in hand to hand combat Adept Spy
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Prism— A unique, mysterious gold mask passed down from warrior to warrior. Delivers targeting data for long distance shots. Readouts for wind, humidity, range finding, and bullet drop. Has a distinct aggressive will of its own. Djinn or 恶魔— Custom bodysuit designed by Kang—tao. Provides the wearer with minimal ballistic armor protection, designed mostly to protect from hazardous environments or materials. Blended synthetic weave helps the wearer move quietly, and with dexterous motion. Nemesis— 50.Caliber Bolt action sniper rifle. Light weight aluminum body. Chromed 1/12 grooved barrel with a right ward spin. Weighs 25 pounds. Every piece is a custom designed, and meticulously made part. Down to the bolts. (Post character purchase) Silence— Fiendishly designed suppressed pistol.
Backstory
Born in old Dubai. Child of street urchins, and scum. Mirage started life, and expected it to be abruptly ended at the end of a gun from early on. However in an unfortunate fate she would fall into the clutches of criminal organizations diabolical in their machinations. Trained in the schools of artful long range death. Her life became only that. A whisper followed by the percussion of a bullet impact. Then the ever sweet snap of nothingness. She is an expendable tool designed to deliver the shot to change fates. The silent headsman, and maker of the noose. Her talents were recognized, and was soon adopted into the fold of one of her employers who favored her. The corporate entity known as Kang-tao kept her as a retainer, and employee. A magnanimous reward for a decade of her quiet, discreet, and ever loyal service. A mercenary for hire turned corporate Assassin. Mirage hunts down any, and all that she is assigned to eliminate. Firing twice, and then disappearing. Her greatest accolade? Joining the Pacifica clean up operation. Eliminating any, and all civilians or gang members who tried to escape. She is now hunting the remnants. One by one.
Known Affiliations
Kang-tao (BinaryRogue) RP-Hooks: Mirage is a foil. A boogeyman sent by a company to eliminate all targets she can find with extreme prejudice. Her mission is the end of all threats to corporate expansion, and will do anything to achieve it. She is also quite skilled, and will make for an excellent long ranged sniper/scout for teams on jobs. She will however not openly state her intentions as a corporate enforcer. Nor will she be outwardly aggressive to others. She believes in hunting worthy prey, and will only loose her fury on those deserving. Her initial interaction with the players will be more altruistic to gain trust, and gather information for her true prize. The last of the VDB, and their associates.

Psychological Profile
Bad childhood, because of a mom that had a new boyfriend of the month Spinning 6 years in a Nomad life she will put family first even if it conflicts with what she wants Because of her past she's doesn't warm up to new people right away But when she does find herself comfortable enough she struggles to feel useful usually putting herself in bad situations
Physical Description
Human 5.5f small frame tan skin one green and one orange eye and raven black hair with orange highlights. Usually trying not to be noticed (kinda shine)
Chrome / Implants

Backstory
She started her life on the east coast living with her mom and her mom's new boyfriend of the month. When she turned 18 she ran away from home and joined up with the nomads. Where she lived 3 years of her life. She spent the next 3 years with her adopted nomad mom in the nomadic tribe of Snake Nation. She ended up at night city on a mission that was supposed to be simple but didn't go so simply she got attacked by Raffens and left for dead. After a few hours after the attack, she woke up she slowly made her way into night city. Her dreams when she comes to the realization, she wants to make a name for herself as a netrunner and as a tech specialist (netrunner name thorn)

Being the quiet one that normally listens to everything else.

Dart Kobichenko - dartkobichenko

Parsed: Dart Kobichenko — username dartkobichenko
Resolved: YamiDaBun (id: 1088566340572426394)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1506775646511038514
Name
Dart Kobichenko
Age
32
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Nomad/Edge Runner
Psychological Profile
Quiet, hard-headed, and fiercely independent. Dart carries himself with an old-school Texan mentality despite growing up in the Nomad packs outside Night City — respect is earned, words matter, and weakness gets people killed. He prefers simple truths over polished lies and has little patience for corpos, manipulators, or people who hide behind status. Not openly hostile, but difficult to approach. Dart avoids attachments because most people in Night City either die, betray you, or sell you out for eddies. Despite that, he has a strong protective streak toward Nomads, drifters, and people trying to survive honestly in a dishonest city. He believes; A handshake means something. Never draw unless you intend to kill. Debt should always be repaid. Family is chosen, not inherited.
Physical Description
Tall and lean with a wiry Nomad build shaped more by survival and long-distance travel than gym chrome culture. Dart carries himself with the relaxed posture of someone always ready to move, fight, or leave at a moment’s notice. He has pale skin lightly weathered by years spent outside Night City’s walls, with long black hair usually tied back into a rough ponytail while loose bangs hang over part of his face. His eyes are a striking icy blue, enhanced with subtle optical cyberware that glows faintly in low light. Thin blue cybernetic interface lines are visible near his right eye and temple. Dart’s style is practical and understated compared to most Edgerunners. He favors dark clothing, durable fabrics, fitted black jackets or work shirts, tactical belts, and reinforced boots rather than flashy neon fashion. Most people mistake him for a mechanic, drifter, or convoy hand until they notice how observant and armed he really is. His cyberware is intentionally low-profile. The Monowire systems hidden in his arms remain invisible unless activated, where glowing filament lines briefly become visible beneath the skin. 🦾 Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): Monowire Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Neo Fiber (arms/Legs) Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Reactive Muscle Fiber
Total Cyberware Points
6
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Combat Skills: Close Quarters Combat, Precision Monowire Techniques, Revolver, Vehicle Combat, Ambush Tactics Survival Skills; Desert Navigation, Vehicle Repair, Smuggling Routes, Tracking & Hunting, Camp Setup & Survival Technical Skills; Basic Electronics Bypass, Jury-Rigging Soft Skills; Intimidation, Negotiation through Presence, Reading Bad Intentions, Calm Under Pressure
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Weapons; Heavy Revolver nicknamed “Swords Bane”, MonoWire Armor; Reinforced Nomad duster with ballistic lining, Lightweight armored vest beneath clothing Gear; Portable toolkit, Signal scrambler, Old metal lighter engraved with a cattle skull, Customized holo-radio scanner, Nomad survival pack Vehicle Vehicle; A heavily modified Thornton pickup known as “Kajira's Hunter.” Reinforced suspension, Smuggling compartments, Sand filters, Hidden weapons mount, Manual driving override because Dart distrusts fully automated systems

Kyatchi "Mirror" Norunobu - thereviewsprime

Parsed: Kyatchi "Mirror" Norunobu — username thereviewsprime
Resolved: Prime (id: 232402367482429440)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1506773636781178983
Name
Kyatchi "Mirror" Norunobu (Kya - pronounced like Kaya - for short)
Age
19
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
NUSA Agent / Professional Driver
Psychological Profile
While not the brightest, she tries to be helpful when she can even if it means getting her hands dirty. She's quick to react, much like an anxious rabbit, but that's one of the main reasons she's so good at what she does. Sometimes, she may be clueless or impulsive (especially when it comes to purchases on useless items she likes such as toy cars or plushies), but other times she can be rather serious - namely when it comes to her work. She isn't good at picking up on social queues but tries to make the best of situations when she can. Being so new to the agency, she hasn't had any super traumatic experiences as of yet but has seen her fair share of awful scenes - especially after a bad crash during her races. She does, however, tend to be slightly distant at first just due to her awkwardness and lack of social cues. To combat this, she's usually listening to her eurobeat playlist in her headphones.
Physical Description
Sitting at a comfortable 4'9", she's...rather short. It doesn't help she lacks any real strength. But what she lacks in strength, she makes up for in dexterity...when her body isn't getting in the way. She's rather blessed in the asset department with a large chest and thighs to balance it out. She has long hair and looks like your typical human, just shorter. She is the definition of a shortstack in this regard.
Chrome / Implants
Mr. Studd™ - Boosted stamina, modular sensations, vibe modules - Malfunctions in awkward moments. Buzzes audibly if overused. Combat Wired Reflexes - Always-on reflex boost for high-performance combat. Its very hard to sneak up on you, you are fast and react almost instantly - Always alert. Hard to relax or stay calm. GhostTag - Your face is automatically blurred in security cameras. Higher chance to be unidentifiable in camera footage. - Your face is automatically blurred in security cameras. May make law enforcement suspicious. Slots, 1 Cyberware Implant per slot EXCEPT Miscellaneous which is unlimited: Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): Auditory System: Circulatory & Immune Systems: Hands & Feet (2 slots): Integumentary System: Legs & Mobility (1 slot per leg): Neural: Ocular System: Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Combat Wired Reflexes Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Miscellaneous: Mr. Studd™, GhostTag
Total Cyberware Points
6
Skills / Talents / Abilities
High-Mobility on foot, Decent stamina, Trained in hand-to-hand for disarming/arresting purposes, Top-Tier racer/driver (namely on curved roads), Good under pressure, Trained with SMGs and pistols along with combat knives, Good at spotting dangers around her when she's on the clock
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Militech-Made P90 - 5.7×28mm cartridge - Must be manually reloaded Apollo 650-S - Customized for additional speed/handling - If driver is distracted, may lose control more easily. Lord John Phallustiff - A two-handed version of the Sir equivalent, it makes for a rather entertaining fight - Bludgeons enemies but can be cut easily by bladed weapons due to being made of rubber Government-Issued Agent - Used as a modern-day smartphone - Must get app downloads approved through the agency beforehand Inline Skates - Built into her shoes, it allows for her to skate around a little faster than walking - Hard to walk normally in them Dakai Soundsystems - Headphones used for music connected to the Agent, typically playing Eurobeat - Hard to hear surroundings if the music is too loud Aviators (Sunglasses) - Look stylish and protect the eyes from bright lights - Cannot see if they're on in dark places

Lillian Cardinal - lilredpanda

Parsed: Lillian Cardinal — username lilredpanda
Resolved: LilRedPanda (id: 224344384819167232)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1506772303709470751
Name
Lillian Cardinal | also called “Little One”
Age
Roughly 25
Occupation
Mercenary / Netrunner
Psychological Profile
Lillian is a very quiet woman, having seen a lot of loss and death at the time of her coming into the RP. Lillian will react badly to death and injuries when it comes to those closest to her. If someone gets heavily injured in front of her or incapacitated, she may freeze or go into a panicked frenzy state… it really depends on what’s happening at the time. Lillian tends to stare off into space and get quiet when there’s yelling, almost like shutting down emotionally. She often listens to music as a distraction from her own mental issues.
Physical Description
Lillian has cybernetics used for netrunning as well as SmartEyes that glow orange. She has long hair, normally in a braid, with red highlighted ends. Lillian has various scars from working with her father and the mercenary group… gunshots, slashes, a small burn or two as well. She has a few tattoos and will get more done over time as her story progresses… the tattoos showing how far she’s come!
Chrome / Implants
Netrunner Suite lvl 2 (3) ICE Layer (1) Smart Eyes (2)
Total Cyberware Points
6
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Netrunning, Hacking, and Stealth! She’s also a decent cook and likes to make meals for people.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Aside from her cybernetics, she doesn’t have anything after her stuff got stolen by the other Mercenary Group.
Backstory
Lillian’s parents were part of a mercenary group when they had Lillian. She was raised with the mercenary group, all of them acting as aunts/uncles to her as she grew up. Lillian’s mom died during one of the jobs when Lillian was about 16 years old. Lillian’s dad stayed with the mercenary group, ensuring Lillian was safe and learned how to netrun and defend herself, even if she doesn’t use a gun. Now roughly 25, Lillian, her dad, and the mercenary group went on a job and ran into another mercenary group, and a fight broke out. Both sides faced losses, but Lillian’s father died trying to protect Lillian and get her away after she’d been injured. The rival mercenary group took Lillian and her father’s items, assuming Lillian was dead after the fight. Injured, Lillian played dead until they were gone, ripping her shirt to use as a way to stop the bleeding of her wounds until she could find something to crudely stitch herself up. Now she wanders, lost in the cloud of dread surrounding her thoughts.
Known Affiliations
None currently.

Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
🪪 Character Sheet — Tussaint Louverture “Shango”
Name
Tussaint Louverture “Shango”
Age
37 — Born 2042
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Voodoo Boy Netrunner, Smuggler, Escort through Dogtown 📍 Current Location: Dogtown, Night City
Psychological Profile
Proud, intense, self-serving, deeply spiritual. Tussaint carries himself with the certainty of a prophet and the ego of a warrior prince. He believes Shango walks beside him in every action he takes, fueling his rage, driving his lust, and entrancing him through drug and dance. Though he genuinely protects Haitian refugees and members of the Fanmi, he views outsiders as expendable tools unless they prove worthy through strength, conviction, or usefulness.
Physical Description
A towering full-body conversion styled after a lion exotic frame. His body is both broad and lithe, with digitigrade cyberlegs, and a long armored tail. His faceplate resembles a lion skull, with glowing amber optics and synthetic dread-like cable bundles cascading from the back of his head. 🦾 Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: Auditory System: Circulatory & Immune Systems: Hands & Feet: Integumentary System: Legs & Mobility: Neural: Netrunner Suite Lvl 3 - 5 CWP Ocular System: Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Miscellaneous: ICE layer - 1 CWP

📝 NCRP CHARACTER SHEET TEMPLATE
Name
Nicole Laurin
Age
24
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
General Merc/ Car Mechanic
Psychological Profile
Personality: Tries to keep the peace, easy going, loyal to a fault and playful. Trauma: Once got captured by Raffen Shivs when her car broke down, debating on cutting her up for her chrome or enslaving her, only freed by chance when a party of Dog-Soldiers from the Aldecaldos. Has a deep fear now of being strapped down and cut up or being used as a slave. Behaviour quirks: Stress eats, hates when people mistreat cars or guns. Emotional tone: Steady and reliable friend, got that southern drawl.
Physical Description
Height: 5 foot 7 inches Build: Hourglass/Pear with some chubbiness Notable features: Unique Smart Eyes design Species/exotic mods: Horse ears and tail General vibe: Southern Cowgirl/ Haha Uma
Chrome / Implants
Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): Auditory System: Circulatory & Immune Systems: Hands & Feet (2 slots): Integumentary System: Sub-Dermal Plating Pros - Flexible armor weaves beneath the skin. Better against blades and low powered projectiles. Requires less maintenance than Dermal plating. Legs & Mobility (1 slot per leg): Cyberleg (Runner) Pros - Jump farther, run faster, land silently. Parkour beast. Cons - Loud stomp at full speed. Doesn't enhance Stamina Neural: Ocular System: Smart Eyes Pros - Zoom, thermal, night vision, facial ID, AR HUD. Cons - Eyes glow. You sometimes blink asynchronously. Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Miscellaneous:
Total Cyberware Points
6
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Nomad Jury Rigging - She can get most things functional again with duct tape if they’re not too badly damaged. Car Mechanic - Anything with wheels and an engine is her bread and butter, able to easily find any faults and knowing how to fix them.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
DR5 Nova - 500 Magnum, 6 shots, jams frequently but can be cleared easily.
Backstory
Hailing from Arizona with the Chenery Clan, a small band of close knit Nomads, Nicole grew up with a loving family, travelling across the lands, doing odd jobs here and there and learning vital survival skills along the way. At one point, several raids from Raffen Shivs had diminished the Chenery Clan’s strength and the conversation of joining one of the Seven Nomad Nations cropped up, the younger, more stubborn members flatly refused, Nicole amongst them. During one of their jobs at Illinois, the Chenery’s elected to help the Jodes with the reconstruction of Chicago, repairing a few of their locomotives. Many members believed in The Jodes’ plan of reconstruction and decided to join up with them. Nicole felt like this was abandoning the clan’s identity and refused, electing to go her own way and drifted back West, at one point even being captured by Raffen Shivs only being freed by Aldecaldos attacking the compound, allowing her to escape and eventually make her way to Night City.
Known Affiliations
Chenery Clan of Nomads
Reference Images
Art, screenshots, etc.
RP Hooks
Raffen Shivs might come along one day, survivors from the compound attack and might recognize her and her car, wanting to reclaim what they see as rightfully theirs.

RP Hooks
The goal with Cole is to eventually have him forcefully turned to Maelstrom. I have spoken to both <@122199279447048192> | Toro and @Vinny Russo/Vanessa Bitch and both have agreed to this happening down the line. For now, I'm playing him normally as a Valentino, getting him engrained with everyone, getting to know people with him so they learn what kind of person he is and make some sort of attachment to him, so that when the Maelstrom bit happens, it'll hit harder and show players just how awful Maelstrom can really be.

Kael Mercer - revv

Parsed: Kael Mercer — username revv
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1506766954000683019
! Username "revv" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
KAEL MERCER
Age
24
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Freelance Courier & Mechanic Location: Santo Domingo, Night City Psychological Profile Kael is quiet, cautious, and emotionally guarded. He keeps conversations short unless he trusts someone and prefers to avoid attention whenever possible. He is not ambitious in the traditional Night City sense — he is not trying to become a legendary mercenary or climb corporate ranks. His focus is survival. Years of unstable work, debt, and stress have left him exhausted and detached. Despite this, he still has a difficult time ignoring people in trouble, even when helping them creates more problems for himself. He handles pressure unusually well, often becoming calmer the worse a situation gets. Unfortunately, that same mindset causes him to bottle up stress until he eventually disappears for days at a time. His biggest issue is money. Kael constantly borrows from dangerous people, convinced each job will finally let him catch up. Physical Description Height: 5’10” Lean build Messy long black hair, usually tied loosely back Brown eyes with cheap amber-tinted cyberoptics Visible exhaustion around the eyes from poor sleep Faint cybernetic lines near the neck and temples Usually seen in dark hoodies, worn bomber jackets, cargo pants, gloves, and combat boots Overall appearance: A tired Night City courier who blends into crowds until you look closely. Cyberware & Implants Neural NeuroPort Interface Plug Basic shard access and device interfacing. Tradeoff: Frequent headaches after heavy use. Ocular System Budget Kiroshi Optics Low-light vision and basic zoom functions. Tradeoff: Minor visual static and delayed focus occasionally. Hands & Feet Sub-Dermal Grips Improved grip strength and handling. Tradeoff: Reduced sensitivity in fingertips. Miscellaneous Burner communicator Personal holo-tag Cheap encrypted storage shard Total Cyberware Points 3 / 6 Skills & Talents Motorcycle repair City navigation Handgun handling Basic lock bypassing Fast driving Street negotiation Route memorization Basic first aid Equipment Unity 9mm pistol Combat knife Light armored jacket Portable mechanic toolkit Old Yaiba motorcycle Burner phones Disposable data shards Backstory Kael grew up in Santo Domingo surrounded by factories, rolling blackouts, and gang violence. His mother worked maintenance jobs while he spent most of his teenage years running errands and small deliveries to help keep food on the table. He stayed independent rather than joining a gang or corporation, building a reputation as someone reliable enough to trust with deliveries but quiet enough not to ask questions. A failed courier job a few years ago left him in serious debt after valuable cargo disappeared during a firefight between local boosters and private security. Kael survived, but the people expecting payment did not care whose fault it was. Since then, he has spent most of his time taking increasingly risky jobs trying to stay ahead of what he owes. Every month he gets a little closer to paying it off — and every month something else goes wrong. Kael is not famous, dangerous, or important. He is simply another Night City resident trying not to drown under the weight of the city. Known Affiliations Independent courier circles Local mechanics Small fixer contracts No official gang loyalty RP Hooks Owes money to dangerous people Frequently accepts questionable delivery jobs Knows hidden routes around Night City Can repair bikes and basic tech Often gets caught in situations larger than himself Additional Notes Kael works best in grounded social RP, fixer interactions, street level stories, slow burn character development and relationship focused plots rather than high power combat.

Robert Locket "Specter" - specter

Parsed: Robert Locket "Specter" — username specter
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: vinnybot • Thread id: 1500460787427315926
! Username "specter" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
Specter (Real Name robert Locket but keeps it secret)
Age
26
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Techie / Drone Engineer / Underground Mechanic
Psychological Profile
Specter is defined by Survivors Guilt and Cold Pragmatism. He is generally quiet, preferring the company of machines to people. He hates the cold (ironic given his design) and seeks warmth constantly. He has a hatred for "sloppy code" and acts of hubris. While he tries to be a "ghost" and stay unnoticed, he has a soft spot for the "broken things" of the world—be they machines or people.
Physical Description
Height: 5'7" (170cm) Build: Lean, wired, runner-build. Species/Exotic Mods: Exotic Biosculpt. He resembles an anthropomorphic Arctic Fox. His fur is stark white with natural-looking grey vein patterns. Notable Features: His left eye is a visible cybernetic optic (glowing faint blue). Subdermal circuitry creates faint, geometric patterns under his fur that glow when he interfaces with tech. He usually wears a high-collar tech-jumpsuit or a combat suit
Chrome / Implants
Ocular System: Kiroshi Optics (Basic) – The "Cybernetic Eye." Allows for HUD overlays and scanning. Neural level 1: Interface Plugs / Neural Link – Essential for a Techie. Allows direct connection to computers/guns. Arms: Cyberarm (Left) – The "Prosthetic." Replaces the limb lost to frostbite. Standard industrial strength. Hidden under a prosthetic skin Body: Underskin Lightshow - the patterns on the character
Total Cyberware Points
[Estimate: 6 ]
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Engineering/Robotics: Can repair drones, fix simple machinery, and modify weapons. Stealth: Learned to move silently to avoid the "Eradicators" and scavengers. (see story) Kentic/Blades: Proficient with his specific loadout.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Weapon 1: Purple Katana. Flavor Name: "Nyx's Claw". A standard katana with a purple glow coating. Weapon 2: Militech Legionar - Side arm, used as main side arm in the Militech compound. Armor: Armored Tech-Jumpsuit with a HUD Visor (purely cosmetic/visual aid for the Kiroshi optics).

Aurora Martinez - reverie9677

Parsed: Aurora Martinez — username reverie9677
Resolved: 🎀Revy🎀 (id: 109129914036256768)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: vinnybot • Thread id: 1500458218063794196
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
I do apologize for the lateness on this. I was just struggling with things.
Name
Aurora Martinez.
Age
Twenty-seven.
Pronouns
She/her. Occupation/Role in Night City: She/her. Joy Toy and potential brain dance peddler. Psychological Profile: She puts up a mask that involves her being goofy, innocent, and a total sweetheart. But she does that so she can manipulate people to get what she wants.
Physical Description
Five foot six with an average build. Notable features, her cat ears, cyber spine, and cat tail. She is human just has them for aesthetic purposes. Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): Not applicable. Auditory System: Circulatory & Immune Systems: Not applicable. Hands & Feet (2 slots): Not applicable. Integumentary System: Not applicable. Legs & Mobility (1 slot per leg): Not applicable. Neural: Not applicable. Ocular System: Not applicable. Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Cyberspine. Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Cat tail. Miscellaneous: Underskin Lightshow and Midnight Lady.
Total Cyberware Points
4 points. Skills/Talents/Abilities: She is good at persuading people to buy her brain dances due to her charismatic nature. Equipment/Armor/Weapons: I don't plan on playing her as a combat role. So, she will not be carrying. [If I need to change this. Please let me know.]
Backstory
Aurora grew up as an only child in a small town south of Night City where she had a pretty decent childhood. She wasn't sure if that was due to the fact that her parents were simply trying to make it up to her for not being around the house as often as they used to be when she was younger due to their jobs as pharmaceutical researchers for BioTechnica. The older she got it seemed that they were around a whole lot less. Really throwing themselves into their work and always giving the excuse that they were working so much to try and secure her a future job at the same branch of BioTechnica they worked for. When she hit eighteen that's when things really changed for Aurora. Sure she had worked odd jobs when she was a bit younger like working at any restaurants or clubs in her city that would hire someone on the younger side. Because she needed to fend for herself most of the time. When she turned eighteen. She started to dabble in starting to sell brain dances because it helped her make Eddies. But she also started to dance at the clubs that she had used to serve food for. Unfortunately, even though she felt as if her parents were purposefully distancing themselves from her as she got older. Once they found out what kind of profession she had they were livid. It resulted in a rather heated argument between the three of them. They went with the same old excuse of how they were working so hard in order to give her a good life. And how doing what she was doing was just throwing her life away. So, after the argument she instantly went to her room and started to pack up some of her essentials. She didn't have a whole lot of money saved up. But she prayed that she could at least make it to the bigger city. Aurora had a feeling that if she got there. She would be a lot better off. Upon her arrival to Night City. She had managed to snag a job as a Brain Dance peddler once more as well as being a Joy Toy/Dancer as a side gig.
Known Affiliations
None.
Reference Images
Not available at this time.

Benedict O’Ryan Breaker-B0B -ELSNightcore

From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1500454682038894713

Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
Benedict O’Ryan Breaker-B0B Solo/Street Merc 05/01/2054 (25 Years Old) Human Male 205.74 CM 350 pounds Metallic Gray VRChat Name:ELSNightcore Discord Name:ELSNightcore Medical grade full-body convert. Skills/Talents Upstanding Bodybuilder B0B has spent the better-half of six years building up his physique, he has gone through the painstaking process of destroying and repairing his muscle fibers through extensive and intensive training methods. He is Stronk, He is BIG and most importantly, He is ƬΉΣ BЯΣΛKΣЯ Amateur Fighter B0B is not the most competent fighter, he is still relatively new to fighting, however due to his extraordinary Strength due to his Borg’d body and metal skin, most ordinary individuals must watch themselves within a fight with him. All Bite No Struggle B0B has a-lot of Strength and durability to him, this makes him a powerhouse of a man, however with that comes the drawback of being tired out much easier than most, he is a Power-lifter after-all, and with that comes Fatigue to his body. SWING, BATTER BATTER SWING! Due to watching lot’s of baseball as a kid and playing for a team during his school years and even some in college he has gained a lot of skill when it comes to the handling of ball and bat. RP HOOKS Blank just here for fun and a story with you lot. 🙂 WEAPONS/EQUIPMENT Overture Revolver - 6 cylinder - 44. magnum. Cybernetic points used. (10 points in) Gorilla Arms - 2 points total Spicyhands - *custom cyberware enhancement, in reference to shockpalms and cryogrip though deals heat damage. 2 points total Dermal Plating - 3 points total Dence Merrow - 2 points total Reactive Muscle Fibers - 1 point used 2054 Birth Year - Grew up at the end of the “Time of the Red” an era where radiation in the atmosphere from the 4th corporate war was still in the sky above Night City. His childhood was an age of red sunrises, red sunsets, and blood red night skies. Childhood Corpo Brat - Parents worked for Budget Arms, middle managers. Born with giantism, parents chose to let it play out to at least full maturity before seeking full body conversion as a means of keeping him alive. After getting Full body conversion surgery from parents, rebelled against expectations, chose to become a Night City Merc, with hopes to become a legend. Been doing low tier merc work for a few years. Haven’t made a name for themselves yet. He is from Charter Hill, middle class apartment blocks, some greenery, decent, comfy living for those who could afford it. That said, since he spurned his upbringing, he lives somewhere in Japan Town.

Elias "Delta" Kade - mangoesf

Parsed: Elias "Delta" Kade — username mangoesf
Resolved: MangoESF (id: 1042964962970189834)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: vinnybot • Thread id: 1500454577156259840
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
NCRP CHARACTER SHEET TEMPLATE
Name
*** Elias “Delta” Kade
Age
*** 28
Pronouns
*** He/Him
Occupation
*** NCPD
Psychological Profile
*** Officer Elias “Delta” Kade demonstrates strong psychological resilience and disciplined emotional control under extreme stress. He is a tactical thinker who remains calm in chaotic situations, often prioritizing the safety of fellow officers and civilians over personal risk. While the Watson depot incident left him with lingering survivor’s guilt, it strengthened his determination to lead responsibly and prevent similar losses. Delta shows a deep intolerance for corruption and reckless policing, preferring controlled, strategic responses over unnecessary force. His leadership style is protective, grounded, and dependable, making him well suited for maintaining stability in volatile environments like BeastSide.
Physical Description
*** Elias “Delta” Kade stands with a solid, athletic build shaped by years of tactical training and active duty within the NCPD. His posture is disciplined and alert, reflecting someone accustomed to operating in high-risk environments. Delta carries himself with a calm, controlled presence, often scanning his surroundings out of habit. Subtle scars and wear from past engagements mark his experience in the field, while his movements remain precise and efficient. His overall appearance gives the impression of a seasoned officer, someone hardened by Night City but still composed enough to lead when situations turn chaotic. It was the only thing that saved him before coming to Beast District.

Name
Yoko Hayashi
Age
29
Pronouns
She/They
Occupation
netrunner/engineer/techie
Psychological Profile
She is very paranoid, very anxious, has difficulty speaking under pressure. Autistic.
Physical Description
Lanky, full body convert. Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: Auditory System: Circulatory & Immune Systems: Hands & Feet: Integumentary System: Subdermal armor Legs & Mobility: Neural: Netrunner suite level one. Ocular System: Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Miscellaneous: Bio Monitor, Ghost tag

Skills / Talents / Abilities
Basic Netrunner, Cyberneticist and computer engineer/ robotics.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons

Backstory
Yoko Hayashi grew up as a dirt poor streetkid in the slums of Tokyo Japan. At a young age got into tech and cybernetics interested in how they functioned. Started stealing tools from the local shops and ripperdocs to expirement on cybernetics. When she got older she started working with the yakuza as a netrunner to save up enough eddies to get a full body conversion. Eventually acheiving her goal by taking on dangerous jobs that nearly got her killed on several occasions. This got her in deep trouble with the yakuza when she accidentally did a job for a fixer that unknowingly caused her to kill a high ranking member of the Yakuza Family. She took what remained of her money and smuggled herself to night city to escape assassination by the hands of the yakuza in Japan. Fleeing one hell to enter another.
Known Affiliations
Former Yakuza.
Reference Images
RP Hooks
Experienced techie and thinks of off the wall solutions to enhance cyberware in different ways. Like adding a small jet engine to gorilla arms to increase punch force.

Astrid Pearce, Alias "Saturn" - ratatoskr

Parsed: Astrid Pearce, Alias "Saturn" — username ratatoskr
Resolved: Ratatoskr (id: 172170355543113728)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1487894215529599087
Name
Astrid Pearce, Alias "Saturn"
Age
26
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
Unemployed
Psychological Profile
Flighty, A little spoiled, sheltered, naive to the world. Relatively easily intimidated in meatspace. Would fold to torture before it even began. Pain-averse. Good at lying. Oftentimes overconfident, getting herself into trouble.
Physical Description
A little below average height, and not in the best of shape. Blue eyes, humanoid appearance - Usually dyes their hair all manner of colors. Has a single Exotic mod, shifting their ears to be more animalistic. Chrome / Implants Neural: Netrunner Suite (Level 3)
Total Cyberware Points
5
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Netrunning, Cracking ICE, jailbreaking chrome, consuming snacks.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Jack shit.
Backstory
Astrid came from money, and showed some extreme promise in the field of Netrunning. Arasaka actually scouted her from a fairly early age, and she managed to get herself fast-tracked into higher education to, eventually, end up as a proper Arasaka Netrunner agent. A combination of laziness, overconfidence and general richkid syndrome had them fall behind fairly quickly in their studies. In an attempt to keep ahead, she successfully managed to cheat her way through several major tests, and ended up at the top of her class. Life was pretty good. Being not actually that good, though, eventually catches up with you. She eventually got caught attempting to penetrate Arasaka servers to adjust some of her grades to keep herself on top - and in doing so, prompted an investigation into her entire academic career. Needless to say, she was expelled in shame. Her family essentially disowned her, and she used most of what little cred she had to get herself a small apartment for a couple of months. And, like so many others who need a fresh start, she ended up in Night City. All thats left now is to get a damn job and hopefully not get scav’d for her extremely nice Arasaka chrome - which she, at the very least, managed to not ping as Arasaka tech. Still, best not to let anybody not trustworthy get too close a look.
Known Affiliations
Arasaka (Derogatory)
Reference Images
RP Hooks
-Ex Arasaka Student -Has never held a gun in her life -Carries Arasaka implants -Nebulously in debt to keep herself alive until she manages to get a job. -Probably hacking things to get herself enough scratch to keep herself off the street.
Additional Notes
I built this character to intentionally be a little barebones, so that I could build them into something more fitting into the setting - or build a different character once I was more comfortable with the RP. I figure the best way to get involved and learn the ropes it to play a character that also has no idea what the hell they’re doing. ADjusted backstory - Changed stuff to Arasaka, removed allusions to leaving the country, and switched the handle/alias to something much easier to just say in passing.

stats

portrait

Ronan Vance - "Stray" - binaryrogue

Parsed: Ronan Vance - "Stray" — username binaryrogue
Resolved: BinaryRogue (id: 262434049862270976)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1482470236711030854
Name
Ronan Vance - "Stray"
Age
33
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Independent Netrunner
Physical Description
A hyenid/jackal-class exotic with sharper features and an athletic build
Chrome / Implants
Circulatory & Immune Systems - Chemical Analyzer Miscellaneous - ICE Layer Neural - Netrunner Suite (Level 3) Ocular System - Smart Eyes
Total Cyberware Points
9
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Militech Lexington, Militech Ajax, Netrunning Suit
Known Affiliations
None
Backstory
Ronan grew up in Night City, learning early that survival depended on information as much as firepower. While others kicked down doors, Ronan found his niche behind a deck—slipping into security systems, looping cameras, cracking locks that weren’t meant to be opened. For a while he ran with a small crew that called themselves a pack: smugglers, runners, and street mercs scraping out a living job by job. Ronan handled the Net, keeping eyes on the grid while the rest handled the physical side of things. It worked for a while... until it didn’t. The jobs got bigger, the risks got worse, and eventually the pack fell apart. Some disappeared into the city, others didn’t make it out of a job alive. Ronan walked away with a working deck, a handful of scars, and the realization that in Night City, loyalty only goes so far before survival takes over. The exotic mods came later. At first it was practical—biosculpting and cyberware that made him harder to overlook and harder to intimidate. But the changes kept going. Digitigrade legs, reinforced claws, enhanced senses—the kind of modifications that give him a presence most runners don’t have. The result is something unusual in the city: a netrunner who looks like he belongs on the front line instead of hiding behind a chair in some safehouse. Most runners stay off-site. Stray runs in the field. His handle started as a joke from another runner—someone noticing he never stuck with a crew for long. The name stuck. Ronan didn’t bother changing it. These days it fits too well. Now he works the streets of Night City as an independent operator. Sometimes that means cracking corporate security for a merc crew. Sometimes it means ghosting through a system so a fixer’s job goes smoothly. He’s done work for all kinds—mercs, clubs, the occasional gang that needs someone who can break into a network without asking too many questions. He keeps his circle small and his alliances temporary. Ronan carries himself with a quiet confidence—cocky enough to know he’s good at what he does, but smart enough to remember the city is full of people who’d love to prove him wrong. In the Net, his presence is subtle but unmistakable: systems failing quietly, access doors opening at the right moment, cameras going dark just long enough for someone to slip through.

Curtis Ashburn - knuckson

Parsed: Curtis Ashburn — username knuckson
Resolved: Knuckson (id: 797182391030513745)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1469974176528990280
Name
Curtis Ashburn
Age
28
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Crackpot Inventor/ Engineer
Psychological Profile
Somewhat manic even without his Implants, and very curious, even at the risk of others safety, but developed a tick that makes him more abrasive and aggressive unless he's brought back around.
Physical Description
A bit over 5 feet tall with a very slight body, not much in a fight without his hydraulic Gauntlets, has a soft face and more feminine appearance. Chrome: * Hands and feet: Cyber hands (Both hands), 2 points What it does- hidden tools in fingers, USB, lockpick, small blade. Side effect - constant low level clicking or twitching in fingers * Neural: Netrunner Suite Lv3, 5 points What it does - Net access, Quickhacks, Control systems, Full cyberwarfare, backdoor exploitation, Interface jack for Terminals, Vehicles, ect. Side effect - Your body stutters. You speak to invisible things. You are a priority target for Corps. * Miscellaneous : ICE layer, 2 points What it does - Detects incoming hacks instantly --- early warning. Side effect - Emits weird static
Total Cyberware Points
10 Skills/Talents/Abilities: Skilled in engineering, Hacking without his suite, and most importantly a near sixth sense for explosives and making them. Good at hitting people below the belt unless it's a real fight, or if he has his Gauntlets on. Equipment/Armor/Weapons: * Rock-em and Sock-em: A pair of Robotic gauntlets that act like oversized arm cyberware, They can be used only if the user has a Cyberhand but are a bit more clunky and can't be very dexterous, but are great for punching due to a pair of hydraulic assisted plates that extend when punching. * Construction helmet: A pretty basic helmet with straps and a flashlight, great for avoiding concussions.
Backstory
Originally from Toronto Canada, Curtis would spend most of his life tinkering, even as a child he'd mess with whatever sparked his fancy, quickly finding a special place for explosive due to him uncovering an old stash of fireworks. He was by himself for a long time after his mom left and dad was killed but he managed well on his own with help, when his height and shortcomings came into focus as he got older, he'd find more of a interest in Cyberware, then he modified himself to fix his weak arms and hands. With this first taste, he'd go a bit wilder than most, adding in a few extra mods made him break, thankfully, just right to develop a tick that made him more abrasive and aggressive when angered. Overtime this mixed with a mild Delirium from his mods, he'd start to get into his head that he needed to help people, and would often end up breaking into nearby homes to upgrade things, that sometimes went well, or blew up in his or his neighbor's face. He'd rack up a number of property damage charges, but would always manage to dodge getting booked, until one day after an intense argument with a rather noisy neighbor, he'd bomb their bathroom in a rage, but knowing he'd not have many chances left, he decided to leave Canada. Before he was as gonked out as he was, he had gotten to know a friend who called herself Blue on an Anime forum over the Net, and had at one point learned that she had planned on living in Night city, so in a mix of cyberware confusion and a vague recollection of that fact, he left to go find her to crash for a while, but since he didn't tell her about it, and didn't know where she lived, he got himself lost in Pacifica for a time only to finally stumble his way to Eastside trying to find her.
Known Affiliations
"Blue" - Met on an anime Forum. Dad - Arasaka factory worker that got killed by a corp for his rough attitude, not favored fondly enough for Curtis to care about his death. Mom - Boitechnica scientist who met Curtis' dad on a joint business venture, had Curtis, then left both him and his dad shortly after, despised by Curtis.
