📝 NCRP CHARACTER SHEET
Name
Saburō Shigeru Ryuu
Age
30
Pronouns
He / Him
Occupation
Former Arasaka close-combat instructor → Traditional melee specialist & contract combat advisor 🧠 Psychological Profile Saburō is disciplined, reserved, and deeply traditional, shaped by corporate Japan’s rigid hierarchy and an old warrior mindset. He values restraint, respect, and efficiency, but he is not naïve—he understands power, obedience, and survival. Night City represents a cultural shock: chaotic, loud, disrespectful, and violently informal. Rather than reject it outright, Saburō consciously studies the city’s social codes, slang, and unspoken rules, knowing adaptation is the only way to survive without losing himself entirely. He suppresses emotion in public, showing little reaction even under provocation. Internally, however, he constantly evaluates whether his principles are liabilities or assets in this new environment. Behavior quirks: Observes before speaking Avoids unnecessary confrontation, but never backs down once engaged Maintains personal rituals (weapon care, breathing exercises) Emotional tone: Coldly calm, controlled, with a quiet sense of underlying tension. 🧍 Physical Description Height: 200 cm Build: Broad-shouldered, powerful, athletic Species / Exotic Type: White Tiger Exotic Notable features: White fur with Black striping Feline digitigrade legs claws (cosmetic) General vibe: A silent apex predator wearing human discipline—intimidating without theatrics 🦾 Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): None Auditory System CWP: 2 Enhanced Audio Processor – Higher chance to Hear whispers through walls, filter sound, pinpoint origin. Circulatory & Immune Systems: None Hands & Feet (2 slots): None Integumentary System CWP: 2 Subdermal Plating – Resistant to blades, blunt trauma, Pistol Caliber Legs & Mobility (1 slot per leg): None Neural CWP: 1 Netrunner Suite (Level 1) – Basic Net access. Ability to quickhack. Comes with Interface Jack to connect to Terminals/Vechicles/etc. Ocular System CWP: 2 SmartEyes – Zoom, thermal, night vision, facial ID, AR HUD. Skeleton & Torso Musculature CWP: 2 Combat Wired Reflexes – Always-on reflex boost for high-performance combat. Its very hard to sneak up on you, you are fast and react almost instantly Universal Muscular: None Miscellaneous CWP: 1 GhostTag – Your face is automatically blurred in security cameras. Higher chance to be unidentifiable in camera footage.
Total Cyberware Points
10 / 10 🧰 Skills / Talents / Abilities Corporate close-combat instruction Blade combat (traditional techniques adapted for modern threats) Hand-to-hand combat (Exotic physiology advantage) Tactical discipline & threat assessment Cultural literacy (corporate Japan) Rapid situational adaptation Intimidation through presence 🧱 Equipment / Armor / Weapons Traditional Katana and Wakizashi (custom) High-frequency edge Weapon maintenance kit

Jonah Pike - Jonah Pike

Parsed: Jonah Pike — username Jonah Pike
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1464766222892793906
! Username "Jonah Pike" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
**Wanting this to become my Primary character instead of Vox, as Vox was transferred over from Metaverse and I would rather be an original NC character for this RP**
Name
Jonah Pike
Age
33
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Solo (Merc)
Psychological Profile
Physical Description
A large bear of a man, built from years of hard work and fighting Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear): Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: Gorilla Arms (Shock Variant) Integumentary System: Dermal Plating Skeleton & Torso Musculature: NeoFiber Miscellaneous: BioMonitor, GhostTag
Total Cyberware Points
10
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Mechanic, Weapons Training, Barghest Tactical Training, Nomad Route Knowledge
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Old Barghest jacket and tactical vest, Militech Achilles, Tsunami Nue
Backstory
Jonah's first memories were of a Nomad convoy cutting through the Badlands—engines humming, dust clouds trailing behind family rigs, voices crackling over shortwave. The clan wasn’t rich, but they were tight. Everyone had a role. Everyone mattered. Survival wasn’t individual; it was shared. That belief didn’t survive Night City. The clan took a corporate transport contract they couldn’t afford to refuse. Sealed cargo, armed escort, no questions. Halfway through the route, the deal collapsed. Corporate forces reclassified the convoy as hostile, citing a breach that never existed. The clan was wiped out in the chaos. Those who lived learned fast: the corps needed scapegoats, not partners. He was one of the few survivors. Alone, he drifted toward the city’s worst gravity well—Dogtown. Hunger made decisions simple. Morality was a luxury he no longer had. Barghest found him there. They didn’t care where he came from. They cared that he could take orders, hold a weapon steady, and keep his mouth shut. They offered food, training, and structure in exchange for obedience. For someone who had lost everything, it felt like purpose. Barghest stripped him down and rebuilt him. Urban combat drills. Crowd suppression. Close-quarters dominance. Fire discipline in zones where civilians blurred into acceptable losses. They replaced Nomad loyalty with doctrine, family with unit cohesion, questions with commands. And it worked. He became reliable. Efficient. Dangerous. Years later, he was attached to a quiet operation in Pacifica—a blacksite extraction overseen by unmarked corporate observers. The mission brief was familiar: secure the asset, eliminate witnesses, leave nothing behind. It was a netrunner. Young. Terrified. Plugged into something that connected megacorps, Dogtown, and black-budget operations in ways no one wanted exposed. Something in him broke through the conditioning. He hesitated. That hesitation sealed his fate. The kill order updated mid-mission—this time, on him. His squad pulled out without argument. The blacksite was firebombed. Internal records marked him as operationally unreliable. Officially deceased. He survived anyway. Burned chrome. Scar tissue. No clan. No unit. No flag left to stand under. Now he works as a freelance Solo in Night City. He carries Nomad instincts—watching his crew, honoring deals, protecting those who don’t deserve to be crushed. But beneath that runs Barghest steel: discipline, efficiency, and a ruthless understanding of how violence is organized. He doesn’t trust corporations. He doesn’t believe in blind loyalty. And he knows exactly how quickly “family” becomes expendable. If he chooses to fight beside you, it’s not because of contracts or colors. It’s because he decided you were worth not leaving behind.
Known Affiliations
Barghest (Previously)
Reference Images
*Attached (Still working on the model, just gotta get the outfit on him)*

Backstory
https://docs.google.com/document/d/1QbGx8AxJsx0FDu6IeU3Vo6JuZFgugLF0w8SlMSSgizU/edit?usp=sharing Johnathan was born on the East coast of the NUSA and became a trauma team medic at 20. he became skilled in the medical field but hated how the Trauma team company treated folks who werent high priority. he saught revenge by blowing up his crew's ship mid flight and killing his team leader that survived the crash. he sustained wound durig the crash but was able to bandage himself. after a few weeks he met a Exotic nomad clan called the "Silver Hogs". The Silver hogs Leader was wounded and Johnathan helped him recover. the clan was very greatful and let him ride with them for a short while. they gave him a choice to either go exotic and join the clan or go separate ways. John went under going exotic and became a West Virginian Opossum. He'd be the clans ripper doc for years until the group separated due to Snake Nation Disputes. He now enters Night city for a better life and to rebuild what he once called Family.

Ayami Sakurai - dartkobichenko

Parsed: Ayami Sakurai — username dartkobichenko
Resolved: YamiDaBun (id: 1088566340572426394)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1454710614285881590
Name
Ayami Sakurai
Age
24
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
Edgerunner/Netrunner.
Psychological Profile
Outwardly: rebellious, energetic, self-willed Inwardly: observant, calculating, defensive Trauma & Defense Mechanisms Primary trauma: group assault, social neglect, Being controlled or confined — symbolic of her Texas upbringing Defenses: Dissociation through escapism (fiction, games), Physical avoidance and concealment, Humor and rule-breaking
Physical Description
thick female build. Height, build, notable features, species/exotic mods, general vibe.
Chrome / Implants
Exsotic mods: bunny ears implants, and eyes replacement. Name the mods, what they do, and note any tradeoffs. Note: Customer chrome and implants are allowed, but they must be approved for use Slots, 1 Cyberware Implant per slot EXCEPT Miscellaneous which is unlimited: Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): Monowire Auditory System: Enhanced Ears Hands & Feet (2 slots): SilentStep Soles, Cyberfingers Neural: Netrunner Suite (Level 1) Miscellaneous: GhostTag, SmartLink
Total Cyberware Points
10
Skills / Talents / Abilities
hacking, stealth, Gun Trained.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
cyberdeck, 9mm revolver, nanowire List all weapons, their usage, limitations, etc.
Backstory
Ayami Sakurai was born in Belton Texas, the youngest of two older brothers, with parents who tried to keep order in a lively household. She often felt overlooked, restless under the weight of expectations. Her mother’s extended family, the Uchiumis, offered a rare connection. Her cousin Jurian, though not technically her full cousin, visited frequently. To Ayami, he was the only one who mattered. With him, she could be loud, untamed, and unconcerned with rules. From a young age, she carried an insatiable hunger, not just for food, though she could eat two to five large fish a day but for freedom and space to act on her impulses. Growing up, her energy clashed with the rigid rhythm of small-town life. She loved manga, losing herself in its pages for hours, and video games that let her escape. She disliked large dogs, melodrama, and anyone who scorned fishing, small rules she lived by to protect her peace. Bullies tested her limits. Six boys once cornered her alone, she fought, but she couldn’t win in sheer numbers. After that, she learned to disappear. She could slip into bushes, crouch under stairwells, or hide in quiet corners for hours until danger passed. She became patient. Her cousin was away during those moments, but help came in unexpected ways. The Ryudo Family noticed her and helped her get away a few times. She admired their loyalty and discipline, even if she rejected their criminal ties. Their world fascinated her. She carried her own joys quietly the taste of fresh sushi, the rhythm of casting a line into water, and the rare moments when she could curl up with manga. Backstory Continued: After moving to Night City with Jurian, Ayami found that being an exotic made everyday work harder. Her bunny ears drew attention she didn’t want — comments, stares, assumptions. Meatspace demanded conformity she had never liked. So she looked for work that let her stay unseen. She started small: organizing data shards, tagging archives for others, cleaning corrupted files, mapping virtu's for people who didn’t have the patience to do it themselves. These weren’t glamorous jobs, but they paid, and more importantly, they kept her out of the spotlight. Over time, she learned how data flowed. How security thought. Where systems assumed no one would bother looking. She wasn’t reckless enough to brute-force anything — that wasn’t her nature. Instead, she slipped through gaps the same way she once slipped into bushes or under stairwells. Slowly, carefully, she crossed the line from data handler to netrunner.

*Rockerboy/Merc*
Psychological Profile
*Vox is a volatile but deeply empathetic individual whose identity is built on defiance, self-expression, and survival. He thrives on intensity—loud environments, emotional extremes, confrontation—and uses performance as both armor and therapy. Outwardly abrasive and provocative, he uses his voice to challenge authority and protect those he sees as vulnerable, even if he refuses to admit it. His distrust of institutions and hypersensitivity to control or silence stem from a history of instability and unresolved trauma.* *Despite his chaotic exterior, Vox is driven by a fierce moral streak and a need to stay visible, relevant, and unrestrained. He spirals when isolated, struggles with emotional regulation, and often sabotages himself through impulsivity. Yet in high-pressure situations, he becomes sharply focused and surprisingly loyal, grounding his identity in the community he builds around him. Vox is not inherently dangerous—only reactive, and only to those who try to cage him.*
Physical Description
Tall, athletic build with a green mohawk and wild eyes. Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear): GuitarAxe/Flamethrower (All-In-One), Smart SMG, Malorian Arms 3516 (Replica) Chrome / Implants Neural: *Impulse Slicer* Ocular System: *Smart Eyes* Skeleton & Torso Musculature: *Sub-Dermal Plating* Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): *Recoil Dampers* Miscellaneous: *Smart Link, Mr. Studd, Voiceweaver*
Total Cyberware Points
*10*
Skills / Talents / Abilities
*Powerful voice & stage presence — commands crowds, projects emotion, and grabs attention instantly. Improvised musician — skilled vocalist with solid instincts for rhythm, sound, and DIY gear repair. Crowd reading & emotional influence — quickly senses tension and can hype, calm, or provoke groups. Street smarts — good at navigating danger, spotting threats, and reading people’s intentions. Basic tech skills — can jury-rig electronics, fix audio equipment, and handle light hacking tasks. Fast, dirty fighter — relies on reflexes, improvisation, and whatever’s in reach as a weapon. High stress tolerance — performs best under pressure, chaos, and confrontation. Unshakeable defiance — very hard to intimidate or manipulate; won’t back down easily.*
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Backstory
Known Affiliations
N/A
Reference Images
*Attached*
RP Hooks
Gear Fixer: *Jury-rigs broken amps, synths, or comms for fixers or gangs. Streetwise Guide: Knows alleys, safe routes, and vulnerable spots—useful for discreet travel or smuggling. Improvised Heist Partner: Can help break into abandoned buildings or corpos’ low-security locations. Unexpected Ally: Gets dragged into trouble by past connections or street conflicts. Signal Jammer / Distraction: Uses sound, electronics, or chaos to aid a team in risky operations. Survival Jobs: Takes on small, unpredictable gigs to stay afloat—sometimes dragging others along.*
Additional Notes

Job after job ended in failure, was a set up, or worse. If something could go wrong on a job, it did, and it broke her team apart. She quit, became a substance abuser, and stayed off the grid for a while. Now she needs money, debts need to be paid. So she is back in the game.

From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1416783623457083464
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
## 📝 **NCRP CHARACTER SHEET TEMPLATE**
Name
** * Shinohara Risa
Age
** * 18
Pronouns
** * She/Her
Occupation
** * Exec ~~Corpo???~~
Psychological Profile
** * A whiny spoiled songbird too innocent and pretty to stay mad at for too long. She will do very dangerous and risky things in order to keep up appearances, wear nice clothes, and have the luxury of refusing kibble or sleeping in the streets. She has a habit of looking down on people that she first meets, only giving respect when earned or at her weakest moments. When things go wrong, they become disastrous. If someone helps her out of a bind, she'll show humility.
Physical Description
** * 5’2”, slim, human, dressed in materials far more expensive than practical, a calculated cross between innocence and brattiness.
Chrome / Implants
** * Arms & Arm Attachments (2 slots): * Auditory System: * Circulatory & Immune Systems: * Hands & Feet (2 slots): * Integumentary System: * Legs & Mobility (2 slots): * Neural: **”Arasaka Mk.5 Shadow” Netrunner Suite (Level 3)** Full cyberwarfare, backdoor exploitation. * Ocular System: * Skeleton & Torso Musculature: * Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): * Miscellaneous: **”SureCare” Biomonitor:** Tracks all vital signs. Can auto-alert partners when you're in danger. * Miscellaneous: **ICE Layer:** Detects incoming hacks instantly—early warning.
Total Cyberware Points
** * 8/10
Skills / Talents / Abilities
** * Novice Hacking Skills * Fluent Social Skills, especially in high society
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
** * A bank account set by her family. An allowance is still periodically deposited.
Backstory
** * An heiress to a lofty Arasaka seat, Shinohara Risa has lived a life of luxury up until the day she was cut off from her family’s legacy. She would excel in classes, at work events, but then spent the rest of her time scrolling. Despite the many opportunities her family had prepared, Risa often showed malicious incompetence to get out of work. Squandering funds, projects unfinished, and lazing about, it was commonplace to think of Risa as nothing more than a future trophy wife. Less people bothering her while she focused on her own interests. Wanting to find something to put her heart and soul into, but flitting out of an idea moments after committing. The young lady became prone to bouts of programmed perfectionism. The family was rife with discontent, and something had to be done before Arasaka forced a bad hand. Risa was their only child after all, and despite her shortcomings they loved her dearly. * On a fateful evening, Miss Shinohara would be accosted during an outing with a friend. Her travel plans and security detail leaked to the letter. She would be held for ransom, either monetarily or for information, and her parents would refuse to pay, citing whatever was needed to crush her spirit, and leaving her at the whims of cyberpunks and their fixer. An unspoken invisible order that would be painfully driven: if she would be the one to inherit the family seat, then Risa would return to them under her own power with something to better their position in the corporation. For the sake of the family. For a bright future together.
Known Affiliations
** * Arasaka
Reference Images
** * Art, screenshots, etc.

Vanessa Belmonte - Vinnybot<3

Parsed: Vanessa Belmonte — username Vinnybot<3
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1410103810646478968 • archived
! Username "Vinnybot<3" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
This will be a Player Character.
Name
Vanessa Belmonte ||aka Silvia Knox (Publishing name. Faceless and unknown.)||
Age
mid 20s
Pronouns
she/her
Occupation
Tide joytoy and member ||Undercover, boots-on-the-ground reporter for Network News 54||
Psychological Profile
External Persona Bubbly, ditzy, unassuming. Plays into “airhead” stereotypes. Chatty, wide-eyed, harmless. Disarms people, slips under the radar. People see her as decoration, not a threat. Internal Psychology Calculating & observant. Reads people while pretending not to. Compartmentalized. Mask vs. real self kept sharply separate. Lonely, driven, strained. Few genuine connections; truth is her fuel.
Physical Description
She is a busty and striking shark exotic with white hair and a great white color palette. She has cybernetic green eyes, and often wears revealing or lewd clothing. She loves jewelry, and has lots of piercings, with her favorite metal being silver. 🦾 Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: Auditory System: Enhanced Ears (2 CWP) Circulatory & Immune Systems: Hands & Feet: Integumentary System: Legs & Mobility: Neural: Memory Bank (2 CWP) Ocular System: CUSTOM - Eye cameras, take pictures with complete and total secrecy. Shown as smart eyes on scans. (2 CWP?) Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Recoil Dampers (1 CWP) Miscellaneous: Internal Storage (1 CWP) Modded Mandibles (1 CWP)
Total Cyberware Points
9
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Street Chameleon – Masters playing harmless, blending into scenes without drawing suspicion. Ear to the Ground – Extracts secrets, gossip, and intel from people who underestimate her. Scrappy Survivalist – Quick thinker in chaotic situations; knows how to improvise escapes, distractions, or fast talk when cornered.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Desert Eagle - When things go south, she likes something that speaks loud.
Backstory
Vanessa Belmonte grew up on the Night City docks, daughter of a laid-off longshoreman. From a young age she learned survival meant listening, playing dumb, and collecting secrets. In her late teens she hustled into Network News 54, briefly appearing on-screen before vanishing from the public eye. She began publishing under the byline “Silvia Knox,” exposing corpo smuggling, bribery, and gang deals. To protect herself, Vanessa underwent exotic sharklike surgery, erasing her old face. Now only a few higher-ups at N54 know Silvia’s true identity. To everyone else, Silvia Knox is just a ghostwriter with no face. Within Tide, Vanessa plays the role of a bubbly, ditzy exotic—harmless, underestimated, perfect cover. They think she’s comic relief, but every secret spilled around her finds its way into a Silvia Knox expose. She’s underestimated until the moment she draws her Desert Eagle, handling its brutal recoil with unnerving control. At 25, Vanessa lives two lives: Vanessa, the harmless Tide hanger-on, and Silvia Knox, the feared underground reporter. If either mask slips, she’s dead—but until then, she thrives in the danger, smiling with teeth just a little too sharp.
Known Affiliations
Tide ||Network News 54|| ||Militech (proxy)||
Reference Images
RP Hooks
- A corp fixer hunts for “Silvia Knox,” unaware she’s Vanessa. - A Tide member starts noticing she’s sharper than she pretends. - An old N54 coworker recognizes her voice after surgery. - A Silvia Knox story gets too close to Tide’s operations.
Additional Notes
- She is not explicitly interested in just Tide. Any gang or corpo info is juicy to her. - Being from N54, she explicitly stays away from Militech, as her higher ups allow her to continue publishing as long as it does not affect the megacorp. - Has no real friends - Constantly questions who she really is - In some cases, she cares too much - N54 gives her money to keep up the appearance of her doing Joytoy work, but she rarely ever actually does so

From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1497589298357211196 • archived
Name
Skie Valentine
Age
31
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Bartender
Psychological Profile
Easy going, snarky, naturally friendly, honest. Scratchs at his neck when nervous or uncomfortable.
Physical Description
Height, build, notable features, species/exotic mods, general vibe. Skie is 5'9" and a decently fit coyote exotic
Chrome / Implants
Name the mods, what they do, and note any trade-offs. Note: Custom chrome and implants must be approved before use, Slots, 1 Cyberware Implant per slot EXCEPT Miscellaneous which is unlimited: Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): N/A Auditory System: N/A Circulatory & Immune Systems: N/A Hands & Feet (2 slots): N/A Integumentary System: N/A Legs & Mobility (1 slot per leg): N/A Neural: N/A Ocular System: N/A Skeleton & Torso Musculature: N/A Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): N/A Miscellaneous: Biomonitor, Mr. Studd™, Custom DollChip
Total Cyberware Points
4 MAX 6 at character creation See our cyberware system here: https://shorturl.at/LdkiG
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Drink mixing, social networking, business management, mechanical engineering.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
RSh12 - 12.7x55mm revolver Crowbar, Ka-bar knife
Backstory
Born and raised a nomad in a small unimportant tribe, grew up with their mother as a key figure in their life. Their mother was the only exotic in the tribe who also carried the appearance of a coyote. His mother passed when he was near the end of his teenage years, roughly 18 years old. His mother's passing spurred a rebelious streak in Skie against his tribe in wanting to follow his mother's footsteps; becoming an exotic. And this drove him to leave the tribe and make his way to Night City, set on proving them wrong by prospering and sending back money to help them survive. When he first arrived in Night City he bounced around through different odd jobs; mechanic work, labour, and anything to keep his head above water. During one such a job, covering for the previous bartender of The Den, he met the owner of the bar. (Buddy) Buddy took an interest in the temporary bartender and through various conversations he made a deal with Skie, offering a contract to cover the cost of his operation to become an exotic. Being overzealous and excited, Skie signed without reading it through. Signing the contract would lead to his indentured service to "Buddy", acting as his personal Doll, leading to his experience in serving guests. Skie, ever the optimist, after an offer from "Buddy" to sell Skie the bar on a line of credit which he accepted sight-unseen, as he figured that he could use the profits from the bar to pay off both sets of debt that he owed.
Known Affiliations
Kina Mazushi

"Pain has never been a bad thing, It a warning, its a pleasure, its pure. to a person spicy food can be pleasurable. getting bitten, slapped, punched can be a bliss. Pain is so much more." When Selene got older Selene watched her father bust through the apartment door with a carnage shotgun he bought with the money he stole from her mother. He yelled "you fuckin bitch!!!" and shot her head of with a 4 gauge shotgun close range. the mother sat on the couch and her brain was splattered all over the kitchen behind her he aimed his shotgun into Selene's face and said "i should blow the living shit out of you too you worthless piece of shit" he spat on Selene and left. This was the last time Selene ever saw him Selene sees this scene playing in her head every day.

Joshua "Breaker" Reyes -trinidad_demon

Parsed: Joshua "Breaker" Reyes — username trinidad_demon
Resolved: Trinidad Demon (id: 174606587724300288)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1497588159981158490 • archived
Name
Joshua "Breaker" Reyes
Age
36
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Solo
Physical Description
Well built, has a right arm prosthetic supplied from Army injury, Height 7'0 Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): Gorilla Arms Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Combat Wire Reflexes
Total Cyberware Points
6
Skills / Talents / Abilities
discipline, effective communication, adaptability, and technical expertise
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Weapon - Custom KAC ChainSAW 7.62x51mm IHE [Incindiary High Explosive]
Backstory
Born and raised in the shadow of the El Coyote Cojo, Joshua Reyes was Valentino royalty in the making. By nineteen, he was a "Soldado" known for two things: a silver tongue that could de-escalate a Militech standoff and a relentless devotion to the neighborhood. He wasn't just a gunman; he was a fixer for the people, ensuring the local vendors weren't squeezed too hard by outside interests. To the Valentinos, Joshua believed that he was a great fit for the gang as he was a man who understood that loyalty to Santa Muerte was measured in blood and brotherhood. Everything changed during the Unification War. When the NUSA pushed its recruitment quotas into the independent territories, Joshua found himself caught in a sweep. To protect his younger brother from being taken, Joshua "volunteered," trading his gold-trimmed street leathers for the drab, tactical nylon of the NUSA Army. He was shipped to the scorched outskirts of the Free States, serving as a frontline infantryman. For five years, Joshua saw the ugly side of "unification." He traded urban skirmishes for drone-choked trenches and chemical storms. During the final months of his tour, his unit was tasked to breach and clear out an area within the Alaskian state. When breaching and clearing what should have been an abandoned site, a shotgun took his right arm, leaving his squad to neutralize the threat inside while bleeding out on the cold ground. Joshua returned to Night City two months ago, not as a hero, but as a "reintegrated veteran" with a discharge paper and a cheap, government issued prosthetic that jitters when the humidity rises. But the Heywood he left isn't the one that he once grew up in. Some of the Valentinos he once knew have shifted. Some new, younger leaders see him as "federalized" or a "Militech puppet" because of his time in the NUSA greens. His right arm, once used to grip the hands of his brothers in solidarity, is now a literal cold reminder of his absence, which has him wondering if he can ever find his way back into what gave him a purpose in this city.
Known Affiliations
NUSA Army, Formerly Valentinos

Name

27

underground fighter and racer
Psychological Profile
slightly unstable big risk taker Personality:laidback thrill seeker
Physical Description
thin body type lean build 5'11 red hair scars on his face
Chrome / Implants
Arms & Arm Attachments none Auditory System:none Circulatory & Immune Systems:none Hands & Feet (2 slots):cryo grip/shock palms Integumentary System:opticnone Legs & Mobility:none Neural:none Ocular System:target optics Skeleton & Torso Musculature:none Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail) none Miscellaneous:none
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Non-cyber skills — close combat specialist(boxing mma jiu jitsu) mechanics Equipment / Armor / Weapons Light weight ballistic suit. two 9mm silenced pistols. Wrist mounted taser
Backstory
Connor Cestus, a talented fighter raised in a nomad clan, becomes a rising star in Night City’s pro fighting scene. He’s approached by secretive fixers to throw a match so they can keep another fighter profitable, and he agrees for the money. But during the fight, his pride takes over, and he wins instead. Angered, the fixers demand repayment—an amount Connor can’t afford. To protect his clan, he flees to Night City and disappears, living behind a mask. He survives by fighting in underground matches and street racing, trying to earn money and track down the fixer chasing him so he can settle the debt and reclaim his life.
Known Affiliations
animals/slum racers
RP Hooks
he’s abit mysterious but talented loves fighting and racing.
Additional Notes

Harry Lunaire - leocercops

Parsed: Harry Lunaire — username leocercops
Resolved: Leo (id: 178838659607298048)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1497585029562368090 • archived
Name
Harry Lunaire
Age
28
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Yaskawa Customer Success Agent
Psychological Profile
Laid back, calm. Generally apathetic to the state of the world. Far more interested in people than in politics. Likes to find out what makes others tick. Very intense when one-on-one, otherwise near impassive. Vastly more interested in living discreetly and privately than pushing any major ambitions.
Physical Description
Tall, slender, nothing more than the most basic of chrome, stylish but not particularly flashy clothing, regular human.
Chrome / Implants
Essentially, the equivalent of a smartphone installation in his head and neck. The basic implants someone needs to interface with Night City technology.
Total Cyberware Points
Couldn’t see this basic setup listed anywhere, so I guess 0.
Skills / Talents / Abilities
He can do his job reasonably well and has a way of smoothing things over with corporate clients. He cooks great ramen. His dad taught him to fire a pistol at one stage. He has a good grasp of mechanics from his father’s tuition and is an enthusiastic but still far from professional roboticist.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
He has a basic 9mm Glock equivalent for self-defence.
Backstory
Harry comes from a family that was torn apart by gangs and gang violence. The child of a mechanic, he was estranged from his mother due to a burglary at a young age. Whilst he now works for a corp, he doesn’t really consider himself a corpo. He simply prioritises staying “safe” as best that he can. He was drawn to robotics through his studies, but he was never quite good enough or expensively educated enough to make the cut on the engineering floor. He settles instead for a client-facing position where he works as best he can with the hope of one day being able to score a sponsorship with which to complete his studies.
Known Affiliations
Yaskawa.
Reference Images
Still WIP, trying to get this in as I’ve been told there will be a cut-off soon. The avatar is being built, though!
RP Hooks
Malleability: I seek to provide a relative grounding or normalcy in a setting that is profuse with mad stories and characters. He is very disenfranchised, and the goal will be to motivate him through the stories and connections he makes with others. He’s very interested in why other people think how they think and do what they do. I very much like making people who are malleable and react and grow based on the story that naturally unfolds.

Resolved: Valin (id: 344284777257500673)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1464762929080565882 • archived
Name
Marcus Felix Alarin, M.D.
Age
58
Pronouns
He/Him/Threat
Occupation
Doctor, Combat Medic
Psychological Profile
Grumpy Old Fuck, Caring, Gruff, Veteran
Physical Description
Elderly but still muscular, grey hair, cold blue eyes, old western style
Chrome / Implants
Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm):Cyberarm (Dextrous) [2] Auditory System: Circulatory & Immune Systems: Hands & Feet (2 slots): Integumentary System:Dermal Armor [3] Legs & Mobility (1 slot per leg):Reinforced Tendons [2] Neural: Ocular System:Targeting Optic [2] Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Recoil Dampeners [1] Miscellaneous:
Total Cyberware Points
10
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Surgeon- While he was in the NUSA Army, he got his doctorates, Surgery and Rippersurgery. Combatives- Marcus started as a combat medic, meaning he is as good with a rifle as he is with his surgical gear. Hardened- Doc Marcus has seen so many firefights that gunfire is white noise to him. Only a gun inches from his face will cause him to balk.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
.44 Custom, Tech AR Custom, personal Plate armor.
Backstory
Doc Marcus was always a patriot, his dream job being to be a soldier. The second he turned 18, he joined up with the NUSA Army. Not much is known about his childhood, only that he was a decent student with a penchant for violence. After his first contract, Marcus got his Bachelors in surgery, going through OCS to become a Mustang Officer. He then spent the rest of his career being good to his soldiers and protecting them from idiotic commanding officers. Near the end of his career, he had a far younger officer, a Colonel named Asha, and had some respect for her. But he hit his 30 year mark and retired, spending the next 20 years working at hospitals across the NUSA, now making his way into night city find the thrill he had had in the Army.
Known Affiliations
NUSA Army, Asha [Arsons Soldier]
Reference Images
RP Hooks
Nusa Army, Ripperdoc

Lucio “La Garra” Cortez - vrchie

Parsed: Lucio “La Garra” Cortez — username vrchie
Resolved: archie (id: 124290893799882756)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1485359023586017311 • archived
Name
Lucio “La Garra” Cortez
Age
56
Pronouns
He / Him
Occupation
Sicario / Hitman
Psychological Profile
Beware the old who thrive in a young man’s game–Lucio is a consummate professional shrouded in the guise of an older, chilled man; a prize for those he is loyal to, and a staunch enemy to those who they deem a problem. His allegiance is as simple as his word–if you are his people, his very existence is at your disposal; indeed, to be half-hearted in what matters to you is as much an insult to your own person as those around you. Much has changed around him, and at times he feels as though he is having difficulty adapting–after all, the chrome is sleeker, and the faces smoother than the halcyon days of his youth; but, with experience comes wisdom, and one ought not mistake a meager acknowledgement of the state of the world around him with resignation. He knows he still has a few tricks up his sleeve yet, and many more to learn.
Physical Description
A perennially imposing, 6’5” frame veiled by age’s softening touch and a taste for junk food, Lucio is a striking image of his exotic-work–a burly black-bear pock-marked with scars and old, paved-over cyberwear.
Chrome / Implants
Dermal Plating - 3 Smart Eyes - 2 Gorilla Arms - 2 Neo Fiber - 2 Ghost Tag - 1
Total Cyberware Points
10
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Knowledge in street politics born from years of experience. Competent close-quarters fighter with a strong, well-suited body. Easy-going disposition. Overall excellent hitman and street enforcer with a flair for the dramatic in execution.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Budget Arms Carnage Tsunami Nue
Backstory
For years, Lucio “La Garra” Cortez was a furtive whisper in the ears of those who’d see the Valentinos lesser–a hitman of preternatural determination and steely will whose inclination for spectacular executions earned him pride of place among the variegated legends of 2050s and early 2060s Heywood. His origins, unremarkable–the middle son of a large, extended family resident to Heywood’s poorer parts, saw the inchoate sicario exploiting his ample frame as muscle to back-up the district gangs’ own issues. Jobs supplanting and building, as they do, on one’s reputation, Lucio’s work shifted from simple shakedowns and smuggling to surreptitious hits demanded by the Valentinos’ most illusory–work which the fledgling sicario was all-too-happy to sew, seeing the gang as his sole support network in a world of backstabbers. The eddies rolling in as they did, and his reputation growing increasingly broad and grim among the underbelly of Heywood, Lucio saw to supplant his broad but plain visage with that of a fierce black-bear–an imposing image of strength and territory befitting the sundry nature of his loyalties and work. But, as all fortunes fade, and all legends are choked to gasped breaths by father time, so too did Lucio’s ambition and, indeed, legend, get cut down in its prime–the ardours of the Molto Cielo bloodbath, a harrowing coup against Campo Orta in the early 2060s, demanded retribution. La Garra was to be its grim executor, in an act which would ultimately see the sicario in jail for a lengthy fifteen year sentence. Tasked from on-high to dispose of the coup’s twin masterminds, Lucio was caught and–following a protracted legal battle under the tending of lawyer Jesus Costazeulla–Lucio was consigned to a ten year stint in prison. A sentence promptly extended by five years after his execution of a sixth-streeter following the onset of the Valentino/Sixth-Street conflict. Now, with no parole, no remaining home, and no eddies, Lucio is at last free from the confines of prison–intending to make up for lost time, with change.

Vora - azureshinigami

Parsed: Vora — username azureshinigami
Resolved: Azureshinigami (id: 283622018346123264)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: vinnybot • Thread id: 1497582719599775906 • archived
Name
Vora Alias: "Hollow-Point" / "The Iron Maiden" / "The Siren of Steel"
Age
29 (Estimated)
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
Maelstrom Ritualist & Heavy Ordnance Specialist Affiliation: Maelstrom (Totentanz Chapter) I. PSYCHOLOGICAL PROFILE Personality: Sultry, obsessive, and dangerously captivating. Vora views her body as a masterpiece in progress, a "sensory altar" built from cold iron and raw nerve endings. She is a profound masochist who finds a dark, erotic charge in the "ignition spark" of combat. She doesn't just fight; she seduces her environment and her enemies into a dance of mutual destruction, thriving on the edge of system failure to feel the "heat" of her own existence. Trauma: The H12 Fracture. Vora’s sanity was permanently recalibrated at the age of 3 in Mega Building H12. She witnessed her drug-addicted father murder her mother before she even had a firm grasp on language. Because the trauma occurred during her most formative years, she has no concept of a "normal" or "safe" world. Her older sister Selene (then 10) became her surrogate mother, protector, and eventually, her god. To Vora, the searing pain of Selene’s surgical lasers is the only "caress" she has ever known, leading to a deep, pathological association between agony and maternal security. Behavioral Quirks: Vora possesses a hair-trigger temper; she reacts to minor technological glitches or verbal slights with sudden, industrial-scale violence. Yet, when she encounters a target she finds "intriguing," her rage cools into a magnetic, hungry presence. She becomes a playful but lethal stalker, "wooing" her chosen prey with agonizing slowness and deliberately exposing her own weaknesses to invite them to strike her—relishing the sensory feedback of their desperate struggle before the final, breathless violation. Emotional Tone: Sultry and digitized. Her voice is a low, purring reverb that sounds like silk sliding over gravel. When discussing her sister Selene or her "upgrades," her tone shifts into a heavy, breathless reverence that borders on the ecstatic. II. PHYSICAL DESCRIPTION Height: 7' 9" | Build: Heavily armored, industrial, and imposing. Exotic Features: Massive obsidian-colored horns (glowing red tips), digitigrade "talon" feet, with a cyber spine (No function yet) General Appearance: Matte-black and crimson plating. Fiber-optic silver-white "hair" cables that pulse with "Infernal" red light when she enters combat mode. Distinguishing Marks: The flesh hidden beneath her external plating is a dense, intricate topography of Selene's "affection." It is covered in perfectly symmetrical surgical scars, ritualistic keloids, and fine-line laser brands that map out every incision ever made by her sister. These marks are often still tender or inflamed, as Vora intentionally irritates them to III. CHROME / IMPLANTS maintain the sensory connection to Selene's past handiwork.[Neural]: _________________________________________________ [Optical]: ________________________________________________ [Internal]: Dermal Plating (Reinforced dermal Mesh) [Skeleton]: _______________________________________________ [Arms]: Gorilla Arms (Oversized Industrial Actuators) [Legs]: ___________________________________________________ [Exotic/Utility]: Reactive Muscle Fibers (High-Twitch Synthetic Bundles for Explosive Speed)

Needle - buns4193

Parsed: Needle — username buns4193
Resolved: Buns (id: 608632308874084362)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1485021480407400739 • archived
Name
Needle
Age
24
Pronouns
She/They
Occupation
Ripper Doc
Psychological Profile
Shy and Soft Has seen the slums of Australia and survived. **Needle’s Personality:** Perhaps soft isn’t the right word. She’s still definitely shy, oftentimes very reserved. Growing up on the streets taught her to be untrusting and cautious. Skills that allowed her to survive until TASR picked her off the streets and put a medkit in her hands. Her relationship with the members of TASR was strictly professional. She was just a cog that helped things move smoothly and in exchange she was given food and lodging. The only person she had any kind of closeness with was her overseer, Derry Harris, the head ripper doc of TASR. While still strictly a professional relationship Needle still respected him. Unfortunately, he along with everyone else from TASR, was killed in the assault from the Jackels. To add onto this Needle comes off as a bit of a pushover. Taught to not cause any issues or she’d be back on the streets without resources. She was mostly kept away from any fighting during her time as a member of TASR. Though she still saw value in seeking out basic melee practice and was taught by her overseer to load and fire a gun. But beyond tumbling with a few street kids and a few tense moments with other gangs she was mostly kept isolated from violence. Her skills as a ripper doc keeping her off the front lines of any turf disputes or smuggling missions. As a gang member she’s “soft” in the sense she's weak physically compared to other war hardened members.
Physical Description
Short, lithe, fox ears/tail.
Chrome / Implants
Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): Right Arm - Cyber Arm (Dex) (CP: 2) Auditory System: Circulatory & Immune Systems: Hands & Feet (2 slots): Integumentary System: Dermal Plating (CP:3) Legs & Mobility (1 slot per leg): Neural: Ocular System: Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Miscellaneous: GhostTag (CP:1), Medical-grade Ears and Tail.

She will never talk unless promted, and will be a full bodyguard and loyaltist for the sinclairs. Sorta Roid rage gorila that they send to anything they need done. Keeps the Sinclairs safe. Off duty she is a different person. When in combat she will prefer to punch them hard enough to shove her hand through them instead of using a gun. Over time she may develop more verbally but from the start (now) she speaks only in small short and efficient sentences. She Trust The Sinclairs unconditionally. Especially the upper echilon of them. She has cyberphycosis when she gits 15cwp. so she focus only on security and only does that. throwing her into combat is bassicly throwing a dynamite stick into a furnace.

Cotton Fox - valerie_437

Resolved: Kiana (id: 1291633252515450965)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: vinnybot • Thread id: 1496080777367126056 • archived
Name
Cotton Fox
Age
26
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
Looking to be a courier
Psychological Profile
She is easy going. A it is what it is kind of person
Physical Description
on the short side fox ears and tail, right arm is cybernetic and both legs that are covered up Chrome / Implants Auditory System: Enhanced ears 2 Hands & Feet: Cybernetic claws 1 Ocular System: Smart eyes 2 Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Reactive Muscle Fibers 1
Total Cyberware Points
6
Skills / Talents / Abilities
good talker,
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
pistol, knife, katana
Backstory
She was born in Night City, in the district of Kabuki. Her parents were small time hustlers. Not powerful, not important just visible enough to get stepped on. When they died over debt with the Tyger Claw and nobody investigated. Nobody cared. She learned early if you can’t rely on people, you rely on movement. She started parkour rooftops running, climbing, slipping through alleys and scaffolding. Parkour wasn’t just a skill it was survival. It kept her ahead of gangs, cops, and anyone who thought a lone girl was easy prey. On one of her days on the roof tops she lost a arm and legs parkouring falling off a roof and lost all her money getting a new arm and legs As Maelstrom tightened their grip on Watson, Kabuki changed. The streets got meaner, the chrome got heavier, and the cost of staying independent went up. So she made the call most street kids eventually face she chose to leave Watson. And after seeing her best friend get killed by Maelstrom she now both hates and fears them. Known Affiliations: NA

30

-MedTech (Both Flesh & Chrome) -Owner of the Sakura Moon Cafe
Psychological Profile
Personality - Kind, Protective, Ambivert Trauma - someone moving their hand(s) very fast towards her, people yelling at her in anger Behavior Quirks - Quiet but Kind Emotional Tone - Sounds Kinda Sad
Physical Description
Build - Curvy Height - 1.82m (6'2”) species/exotic mods - none
Chrome / Implants
Name the mods, what they do, and note any tradeoffs. Note: Custom chrome and implants must be approved before use Slots, 1 Cyberware Implant per slot EXCEPT Miscellaneous which is unlimited: Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): Cyberarm (Dexterous) 2 -Precision tool use. RP lockpicking, surgery, mechanical hacking. -Weak to EMPs. Shakes when under pressure. Doesn't enhance Stamina Auditory System: NA Circulatory & Immune Systems: NA Hands & Feet (2 slots): NA Integumentary System: Legs & Mobility (1 slot per leg): NA Neural: NA Ocular System: SmartEyes 2 -Zoom, thermal, night vision, facial ID, AR HUD. -Eyes glow. You sometimes blink asynchronously Skeleton & Torso Musculature: NA Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): NA Miscellaneous: DollChip 2 -Hardware-bonded collar with encrypted owner ID. Can be issued commands by chip owner. Does not remember anything in-session -If the owner is removed or dies, you're stuck in 'orphaned asset' mode—confused, depressed, glitchy.
Total Cyberware Points
6
Skills / Talents / Abilities
MedTech (Flesh & Chrome) Cooking
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
pistol, 9m, tracer bullets(just colored) hidden blades
Backstory
Mochi came from a family in japan that would only accept someone being a doctor cause that is what their family was. mochi got her first tanto. mochi wanted to own a restaurant and was taught by her mom how to cook but when her dad learned of this he told her that if she didnt go to school to become a doctor she would be disowned. with no help from family she set out to become a medtech and took a loan to pay for school. tho even after becoming a medtech she still received no help from family with her loan money and after being forced into becoming a doll her father disowned her anyway as that was no what their family was about. she then was sold off to an owner who thought she would be to much work and sold her to a corpo guy named jerry. jerry took her tanto and sold it to make sure he was safe from her. mochi gave into the beatings and abuse for years as she waited for the opportunity to escape. one day she took the chance when she saw it. she ran into night city to hide away from him. after walking around for days she ended up in heywood where she met some new friends. she talked with people and got to know a bleeding heart named diesel who offered to buy her off her owner. after buying her, diesel told her to do whatever she wants. she was confused and then he asked her what she wants to do. she said her dream is to own a japanese style restaurant but is currently made and set up for being a medtech. he told her she can do both and encouraged her to do what makes her happy. she in now opening up a Japanese style restaurant called "Sakura Moon Café" in Heywood. she wishes to just be known as a good cook and her shop to be known while being able to help people. she just wants to help feed and heal people. eventually get her tanto back but is okay with potentially never finding it.
Known Affiliations
Diesel, Cupid

Attached to message

Optional -- What might draw others to interact with this character? She is Loving & Kind
Additional Notes
Optional

Age
22
Pronouns
She/Her

Psychological Profile
Raised as a soldier her emotions are hard to read. She can adjust her behavior to her benefit. Act cute when she needs something, act seductive to attract a target, heartless when the situation ask for it. Having death around her from a young age to her its just part of life. No tears will be spend. Knowing death can come for her and the people around her at any moment she has a hard time to make true connections. Her believes makes her selfish. If she has to chose between helping a begger or a drink in the bar, she will pick the drink. If it doesnt benefit her its unlikely she will do anything.

Height, build, notable features, species/exotic mods, general vibe. 1.58m Female curvy exotic build, Chrome arms, legs, tiara and torso. all to emprove her mobility.

Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear): Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: Auditory System: Circulatory & Immune Systems: Hands & Feet: Integumentary System: Legs & Mobility: Neural: Memory Bank 2 Neural Store perfect audio/visual recall. Experiences brief confusion episodes if overloaded. Ocular System: Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Miscellaneous: 1 custom doll chip ( A Positivity filter left in on accidentally when being fired from the corporation Internal Storage 1 Miscellaneous Stash a weapon, chip, or vial inside your body. Have to dig into yourself to retrieve. Looks sketchy as hell.
Total Cyberware Points
4
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
a walking cane
Backstory
Quinn was a middle tier level customer service employee at Nippon Daily living a fairly good life. Go to work, deal with customers that should just zero themselves, coworkers who should not be able to talk, lastly a boss that is always trying to find scapegoats for their problems. A good life in Night City. Until one day during a normal day of work, Quinn was working a high tier level account with the chance of being prompted if everything went well. Their prized Optical cyberware was hacked thus most if not all of the info of the account got leaked and since it was the cyberware was owned by Quinn, he was given the blame for the leaked info and the loss of the account. From losing the account, Quinn was fired. With that Quinn was sent in a spiral downfall of both finance and mental well being. Quinn lost faith in trusting people who say they have his back and in optical cyberware having them get removed and replaced with medical cyberware but the hacker left a fun surprise. During the surgery to replace the cyberware bug was left corrupting the original chrome and causing damages to the implant area making sure no new cyberware can be installed. Now living on the street he once mock, working to find the hacker that got him fired or regain his former life.
Known Affiliations
Reference Images
RP Hooks
recovering from surgery and been out of a job for about a month now
Additional Notes

Parsed: Julia [D3M0N] — username little_demonic

From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1462556099684339862 • archived
Name
** Julia [D3M0N]
Age
** 22
Pronouns
** She/They/It
Occupation
** Netrunner
Psychological Profile
** - Universal "Older Sister Figure" - Sweet as honey and blunt as a rock - CAN and WILL hold a grudge to her grave - Avoids Romance, Still Flinches at raised voices, Checks her exits
Physical Description
** Height: *5'2* Build: *Slim/Fit* Exotics: *Demon horns and tail, Spiral eye optic [cosmetic]* Notable Features: Blue Hair, Missing Right Iris, Cyberwear from her Torso down to her ankles
Chrome / Implants
** * Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): ***1** Monowire [Right Arm]* * Integumentary System: *Sub-Dermal Plating* * Neural: *Netrunner suite (Level 2)* * Ocular System: *Smart Eyes*
Total Cyberware Points
** 9
Skills / Talents / Abilities
** Hacking, Stealth, Observant
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
** - Dual M1911 - Monowire [Right Arm]
Backstory
** D3m0n grew up a slum kid, grew up in a city that didn't matter, scraped by like any other, parents were mostly absent so she had to grow up fast. Around 20, she met Rafe, ran with a low-tier gang who thought he was hot shit. to her he felt like safety, protection, and belonging. until toxicity slowly crept in and made it like walking on eggshells in hell she ended up getting wrapped up in his gigs, either got hurt or scarred for life. Rafe had a habit of stealing D3m0n's money, used it to buy her "gifts" one of them being a single monowire during a gig she met Julian, got left behind by Rafe and Julian kept her alive, they got close and he showed her the ropes on how to netrun, got her chrome, helped keep her alive. but it didn't last long, eventually Rafe caught on and began isolating her further, from telling her that Julian's Corpo trash that shouldn't be trusted, to checking messages, to smashing things. While D3m0n thinks they drifted, Julian was ordered back to base. she kept netrunning anyway, things got worse, one day, she had enough, she needed to disappear, what better place to disappear than Night City? secretly got a lease on an apartment and once it was approved, she gathered whatever she needed and left in the middle of the night, took the first train to Night City.
Known Affiliations
** Julian
Reference Images
** [Attached]

Sandy - rainincarnate_01

Parsed: Sandy — username rainincarnate_01
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1496074512071131197 • archived
! Username "rainincarnate_01" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
Sandy
Age
27
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
Antique Library Owner and Historian
Psychological Profile
Sandy is a shattered woman who has lost confidence and direction, she is supremely insecure in nearly all aspects besides her fairly robust education and unique skillset.
Physical Description
Short, dark skinned with black hair and a general look between librarian and punk. Miscellaneous:
Total Cyberware Points
N/A
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Sandy has no cyberware, no firepower, and about as much muscle as a thin sheet of paper. What she does have is an advanced education far surpassing the average citizen, little reliance on technology, and funds from various historical societies and other museums who she works for.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
None
Backstory
Sandy was once a proud, boisterous and hypocritical member of a gang in Detroit. An anarchist movement governed by popular consensus. Born an orphan and adopted into a rich family, Sandy was always a firebrand and a loud mouth. Calling out hypocrisy, shitty attitudes, and unnecessary violence. But eventually, her loud mouth and insecurity drove her to pick a fight she couldn't win. After being punched by one of her fellow anarchs, she attacked back with vicious ferocity she was nearly beaten to death in a coma that left her paralyzed for several months. A wealthy middle class family kept her alive out of distant affection, and when she woke up she made a vow to leave it all behind. She zeroed out her accounts, had her cyberware ripped out and replaced and took over the properties in the night city she had inherited from her family.
Known Affiliations
None
Reference Images
RP Hooks
Sandy is designed to be relatively self contained, since I'm not looking to be drawn too much in local plots due to my limited hardware.
Additional Notes

Psychological Profile
Personality, trauma, behavior quirks, and emotional tone. Hyper-vigilant: Always scanning threats, exits, intentions Controlled aggression: Violence is calculated, not impulsive Moral inversion thinker: Questions who defines justice, not just what is right/wrong Attachment-resistant: Wants connection but sabotages it before it can fail him (does not believe he deserves people's admiration and respect). Anti-ideological: Rejects symbols( Hates what people do to symbols out of blind devotion) Secret Sweetheart: Acts all tough but is honestly deeply touched, starved, and emotionally muted, yet holds nothing back from true friends and is big old soft at his core.

Icara Gwenyth - floweringzaeli

Parsed: Icara Gwenyth — username floweringzaeli
Resolved: Flowering Zaeli (id: 304048734344577025)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: vinnybot • Thread id: 1494323154062151770 • archived
Name
Icara Gwenyth
Age
23
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
Nomad/Smuggler
Psychological Profile
A resourceful and crafty girl who is used to not having what she needs and making due anyways. Despite her morals being a bit flexible, she is firmly loyal to her beliefs and allies, being more than willing to walk into fire to do best by them, even if doing so is a terrible idea. Certainly a bit stubborn in certain regards, especially with her anti-monarchy mindset, and with that anti-corpo, she is capable of admitting when she does fucks up. Unfortunately getting her to realize that, might take something similar to a bullet.
Physical Description
Shorter snow white hair, piercing cyan eyes. Subtle fashionware with a slim yet athletic build. 🦾Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: Auditory System: Circulatory & Immune Systems: Hands & Feet: CryoGrip Integumentary System: Legs & Mobility: Neural: Netrunner Suite (Level 1) Ocular System: Smart Eyes Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Miscellaneous: Biomonitor
Total Cyberware Points
6
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Amateur Netrunner, basic mechanics and engineering, Close quarters combat, Stealth and scouting, Negotiation.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Thermal Katana, Militech Lexington.
Backstory
Originally hailing from the United Kingdom controlled Scotland, Icara and her family lived nomadic lives, typically traveling from one industrial city to another. Officially their trade was in the transport of goods, though that was used as a way to hide the more illicit items they carried. The family was very much involved with many of the anti-royalty groups in the UK, and they peddled and sold weapons, munitions, and other supplies to these groups. While not directly in the line of fire, it certainly was a dangerous gig, but one that Icara continued after her parents passed.

Felix Dunlap aka “Bogart” - phoolery

Parsed: Felix Dunlap aka “Bogart” — username phoolery
Resolved: Phoolery (id: 122199279447048192)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1494322722958741505 • archived
Name
Felix Dunlap aka “Bogart”
Age
63
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Poser/Detective
Psychological Profile
Felix is a Humphrey Bogart Poser. So, he’s not exactly sane or normal.
Physical Description
A medical grade full body convert that dresses like a Detective from the 1940’s.
Chrome / Implants
Enhanced Ears - 2 Chemical Analyzer - 1 Sub-Dermal Plating - 2 ICE Layer - 1 Scent Scanner - 1 Net Runner Suite Lvl 1 - 1 Smart Eyes - 2
Total Cyberware Points
10
Skills / Talents / Abilities
A skilled detective thanks mostly in part to being an Ex-Cop. Knows his way around a handgun. A skilled burglar and decent hacker. Can be oddly charming in the way only a Poser can.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Arasaka Tama Pistol Burglary kit with lockpicks, glass cutter, and suction cups. Zetatech Agent (Smart Phone) with on board Med-Scanner. A knife.
Backstory
Felix grew up in Cleveland, Ohio. He spent most of his life there. Eventually he became a cop, and then he became a Detective. A rather troubling case involving a city councilman resulted in Felix having a hitman sent after him. The guy nearly killed Felix. Nearly. Just made him a paraplegic. Felix went with a FBC transplant to solve that issue. He sort of lost his mind after that though, so as a coping mechanism he installed a Copycat soft of his favorite old movie star, Humphrey Bogart. From that day forward Felix became a poser. He’s been doing it for over 30 years now. Felix, now “Bogart,” took up work in the southern NUSA, specifically in the Alabama area. Taking on investigative work for Mr. Gold. He didn’t work exclusively for Gold however. He stuck to freelance Private Eye work, often being called out to the far corners of the country on all kinds of jobs. Bogart oddly enough has never been to Night City in all his 63 years. Given his favorite employer’s return to the city, Bogart followed suit at Gold’s request. If only because business is slow for him right now and he could use new avenues to explore.
Known Affiliations
Mr. Gold

Roach 'Nail' Morel - dragonlegend

Parsed: Roach 'Nail' Morel — username dragonlegend
Resolved: DragonLegend (id: 236291999844532245)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: vinnybot • Thread id: 1494320908892901496 • archived
Name
Roach "Nail" Morel
Age
30
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Tech, Nomad, Mechanic, Runner
Psychological Profile
Sarcastic, Stubborn, Minor "Get 'Er Done" energy, trauma of being left for dead, mental "Glitches"
Physical Description
A roughly 6ft tall FBC, a black and orange mechanical head with green lights, entirely cyber limbs and legs, body is mostly chromed, typically wears a tech jacket and undershirt/shorts, Kang Tao logo on the side of the head. 🦾 Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: Auditory System: Circulatory & Immune Systems: Cyberlungs (3points) Hands & Feet: Integumentary System: Legs & Mobility: Cyberleg (2 points) Neural: Ocular System: Smart Eyes (2 points) Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Neofiber: Legs and Arms (3 Points) Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Miscellaneous:
Total Cyberware Points
10 points
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Mechanical knowledge with both hardware and automotive, construction, Demolition, repair skills, knowledge on how to operate in hazardous environments, at least competent in a fight.
Backstory
Native to Night City, and originally trying to make ends meet, Roach suffered crippling debt to Kang Tao due to both high end cyberware purchases as well as being caught in the illicit dealing of cyberware. Upon this debt coming to light, most of his old cyberware was taken from him as collateral towards his debt, but much of his prior debt still remained. He was, however, offered an alternative way to pay off his debt. The arranged agreement was that a chunk of his debt would be removed if he underwent a Full Body Conversion, and new chrome, after which he would then work hazardous jobs to pay off the rest of his debt. Out of options and desperate to be free of his debt to the corporation, Roach agreed to undergo the procedure, and take on the work afterwards. However, the standard of his new body left much to be desired. The tech was rusty, and he very quickly missed his old body, but no return now. Installed with Cyberware to help fulfill his role, he worked jobs to start paying off his debt, undergoing grueling conditions that wore on him both physically and mentally. The work inevitably began to weather away at his mind and body (even to the point he started calling his immunosuppressants "Hope"), but the work was inescapable. Eventually, however, he would come face to face with a job more hazardous than the others, retrieving a piece of tech from a hazard zone in the badlands. He would find the tech, but was knocked unconscious when a stray beam fell on him. Upon waking up he discovered that he had been left for dead, and was alone. He survived however, and long enough to run into a group of nomads; who would then take him in. Eventually properly becoming a part of snake nation, Roach earned the nickname "Nail" for the "Hammering Kang Tao gave him", and found a new life and community amongst them. Though much of this came about from his desire to distance himself from Kang Tao( and other Corps) in fear of what would happen to him if he was discovered alive. Now he seeks to try and rekindle some form of life in this new body of his, hoping that maybe things can start to change for him.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Lever action Rifle, Wrench, Cyber Limbs, Helmet like Head, His "Hope" juice (Immunosuppresant Syringe).
Known Affiliations
Nomads (Snake Nation), Kang Tao(Debt)
Reference Images
RP Hooks
Capable of mechanical work and repairs, knows about work in hazardous enviorments, knows his way around a fight, and has some beef with Corps (Kang Tao Specifically)
Additional Notes
Between his FBC and events, though he isn't Cyberpsycho, his mind has definitely frayed at least some from what it once was, especially if he lacks suppressants.

Name
Sebastian Weaver
Age
32
Pronouns
He
Occupation
Special Agent for Arasaka (Recon/Info-Gathering - taking care of low to medium important street "Problems")
Psychological Profile
Sebastian is a calm and disciplined Person. He is fully indoctrinated into the Corporate world and believes that only hard and loyal work for a Corporation will result in him becoming rich. He believes 100% that people not working for a Corporation are below him. They can serve his or rather Arasaka's Goals tho. But the Limbo between often being on the Streets forced to interact with them instead of his corpo brethren and Sisters leaves him often Feeling alone.

Sebastian looks like a regular guy, Maybe a bit skinny. He seems like a rather weak person. Someone who would be a typical Netrunner… Implants: Mantis Blades (2 Points), MonoWire if Avi can't be made to fit - (mostly)Concealable melee weapon. Ghost Tag (1 Point) - Face is automatically blurred in Security Cam footage / draws Attention from whoever runs security SilentStep Soles(2 Points) - Complete Silence while Walking / unable to make noise with feet such as stomping Internal Storage (1 Point) - Body internal compartment, big enough for a weapon, chip or vial / Need to reach inside, Looks sketchy Total CP: 6

Nova Makron - funniguy

Parsed: Nova Makron — username funniguy
Resolved: FunniGuy (id: 486355381522792461)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1494318368138727575 • archived
Name
Nova Makron
Age
18
Pronouns
He/Him Occupation / Role: Crystaljock/Wannabe Netrunner (he’s NOT good at it)
Psychological Profile
Nova is a recent Arasaka throwaway. As such, he struggles a lot with his own self-worth. He has a desire to prove himself, which pushes him to destructive tendencies. He’s a people pleaser with a desire to be known. He also has a generally good-natured personality and an “officially” clean criminal record. NCPD officers who know him, go easy on him. Especially if they’re close with his father, who is a relatively high ranking officer.
Physical Description
Black hair, blue eyes, generally frail body type, and a pair of converse. Looks like he could be chewed in half by The Animals, and probably will be. Chrome / Implants Circulatory & Immune Systems: N/A Hands & Feet: N/A Integumentary System: N/A Legs & Mobility: N/A N/A Neural: Ocular System: N/A Torso Musculature: N/A Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): N/A Miscellaneous: Biomonitor, Internal Storage
Total Cyberware Points
2
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Netrunning, Quickhacks, Data Analysis + Code-Cracking
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
(Stolen) Tetronika, and (Stolen) Liberty Pistol
Backstory
“Deemed unfit for onboarding.” Four words that threw away his entire life. A throwaway. Nova attended Arasaka Academy for 13 years, K-12. He aced every test he could, he studied hard, he kept pace with his classmates but the one thing that set them apart from him, is that out of his entire 22 student class, he was the only one with no corporate background. There was a single position open for an internship, and it was stolen out from under him by a classmate who spent the most of her free time “studying” with his teacher. Now, he’s on the street. His father’s a BD junkie NCPD officer, his mother walked out after getting a job in the NUSA with militech, and it’s left him stuck in the middle to fend for himself. He was gifted in the mental suite more than the physical, and would have made a talented netrunner if he could get over his fear of mental cyberware. Luckily, those skills worked better for him on a cyberdeck than they did in his head. He didn’t have the scratch for a gun of his own, so he lifted one from a NCPD crime scene when nobody was looking.
Known Affiliations
Arasaka: Present in all Arasaka databases, and facial recognition software. Arasaka has access to his father’s residential address at the push of a button. NCPD: His father is a high ranking NCPD officer, a distant man with a somewhat negative reputation in the corporate plaza precinct. The NCPD knows Nova pretty well, since it was common for his father to bring him into work when he had to work in the office. There is a CHANCE that if Nova is arrested for a minor crime, petty theft, etc, the officers might take pity on him. Plot Hooks: Arasaka Academy Classmates - He had a small class, but it was a large school. He could easily know people in arasaka, or know about his fellow classmates who have moved up the corporate ladder. NCPD: He knows plenty of officers, and is a generally good-natured person.

From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1494319420544123040 • archived
Name
Rosa
Age
26
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
Ex-Gang member, now trying to find her place in Night City, takes odd jobs here and there.
Psychological Profile
Calm and collected woman, can be standoffish, doesn't trust people easily, but is respectful to most she meets. Doesn't partake in any drugs or alcohol due to past trauma of being forced to consume hard drugs. Hates feeling parented due to never meeting her parents and being abandoned by her elder sister.
Physical Description
Height: 5’8 Build: Fit, no noticeable muscle, but has very obvious, fully cybernetic legs. Green eyes. Orange and brown patterned fur. A long, fluffy tail, which usually gets in the way. Chrome / Implants Name the mods: Total Cyberware Points: 5 Exotic Mod: Full-body mod changing her entire appearance Current species appearance: NovaBeast -Many are not fond of exotics yet. Sub-Dermal Grip: Let's her hold objects tighter than human limits - Sometimes crushes fragile stuff by accident. Ghost Tag: Her face is automatically blurred in security cameras. Higher chance of being unidentifiable in camera footage. - May make law enforcement suspicious. CyberLegs: Jump farther, run faster, land silently. Parkour beast. - Loud stomp at full speed. Doesn't enhance Stamina, but she’s built and maintained a higher stamina level. Netrunner Suite (Level 1): Basic Net access. Ability to quickhack. Comes with Interface Jack to connect to Terminals/Vehicles/etc. -She’s always a little distracted.
Skills / Talents / Abilities
-Very social, easily approachable. Bubbly personality. But easily flips and can be rude or standoffish depending on how she reads a person. Semi-open. -Carrying one Millitech Lexington and a bladed Katana with her, she refuses to use her gun unless necessary. -Her fully cyberetic legs are incredibly strong and quick. Making her move very fast and kick hard. Though continuous long and extraneous use of the legs can cause pain and discomfort in the remaining portion of her knees.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
-Rosa carries a Millitech Lexington pistol on her hip daily, never leaving her residence without it. As well as a bladed saber, a Katana specifically.
Backstory
Rosa "Miss Pendulum"
Known Affiliations
-Previous involvement with Tide, left before coming to Night City. Refuses to be involved again.

Eugene 'Doc' House - seanhoff

Parsed: Eugene 'Doc' House — username seanhoff
Resolved: SeanHoff (id: 248463923362136064)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: vinnybot • Thread id: 1494318926572814407 • archived
Name
Eugene House Handle: Doc
Age
31
Pronouns
He/him Role/Occupation: Merc/Medic for hire, attempted-philanthropist. Psych Profile: Likely suffering from some form of recovering psychosis, Eugene is conditionally social but usually is unintentionally standoffish or cautious of other’s intent or actions, as a result preferring to keep to himself to avoid insults or awkwardness. But in the event of a firefight or active medical emergency, Eugene ’s medic training kicks in, allowing him to be more social, physically outgoing, and visibly more active and attentive.
Physical Description
Height 5’6 Lean Short black hair, often tasteless facial hair due to lack of personal grooming Typically dresses in a blend of clothing styles ranging from Neo-Militarism to street trash. Almost always found with rare prescription glasses. Active Chrome/Implants: Dermal Armor - Gained during the unification wars and one of the few pieces of cyberware not replaced due to it being incapable of being hacked or turned against Eugene , Eugene kept this for survivability's sake alone as it has saved him and others many times
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Close combat proficiency, has experience in breaching and holding rooms. Cool under pressure/fire, doesn’t get psyched out by other’s wounds when in the moment, battlefield medical treatment (he can’t install your chrome, he can treat basic wounds and attempt to stabilize major/critical wounds)
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Old school Beretta M97P - Reliable 9mm pistol. No target linking or smart weapon systems, honestly kind of an old workhorse at this rate. Extremely reliable and one of the first of it’s kind to use caseless ammunition… which shows how damn old it is. Mustang Arms “Raider” shotgun - an older model of semi-automatic shotgun used in older days, most (in)famous for an assembly process that allowed a magazine fed shotgun to be stored (with some assembly acquired to fire comfortably) inside a coat. FN-FAL - A dinosaur of a weapon from wars even older than Eugene, last “popular” in the hands of wannabe revolutionaries and scene-changers in NC all the way back in 2020. Now adays it exists for young edgerunners to marvel at in terms of why anyone would willingly carry such a heavy, difficult to modify, and clunky piece of shit. Truth is, it’s archaic, but unhackable, reliable, and unaffiliated with any corp still standing, made back when governments still mattered to anybody at all. Not concealable. Survival surgery kit - Despite the impressive name, this is less of “emergency room in a bag” and more “congratulations, your hand is back on kinda”. In practical terms, this can’t replace going to a ripperdoc, but can stabilize someone alive long enough to actually make it there. Useful only a few times without restocking (dependent on DMs discretion of the wound being treated) Basic medical supplies - Staples, bandages, alcohol and prayers, enough to stop the bleeding of something that isn’t serious so you can heal up at best, or limp to an actual Ripperdoc at worst

26

Backstory
Domino was born and raised in Japantown in Westbrook. She grew up on Gacha games, pachinkos, and other arcade enviorments to drown out the dismal life of Night City. She makes a living as a streamer, live streaming games and other entertainment to viewers. The games range from Boomer Shooters, Platforms, Horror, and even visual novels on the occasion (If the characters are hot enough). On the rare occasion, she does streams of her going to live arcades, though this has led to some "creep encounters" before with stalkers. She lives a pretty simple day to day life. She's not a merc, or a medic, or some kind of crazy tech junkie. Just a Bunny playin' video games. RP Hooks?: Stream Stalker/Kidnapper but situational and requires ooc discussion? Witnesses something she shouldn't while IRL live streaming
