Dixie Crow - miathefloof

Parsed: Dixie Crow — username miathefloof
Resolved: Mia (id: 857312303031517246)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1494314499316912218 • archived
Name
Dixie Crow
Age
24
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
Looking to be a gunsmith/work at gun store
Psychological Profile
She is a bubbly, fairly friendly country girl who likes meeting new people but is skeptical around heavily chromed individuals, often being hesitant around them or straight up avoiding them. She has a deep fascination for firearms, specifically mechanical (power), preferring those over the more electronic (Tech, Smart) ones and will often offer her clients mechanical firearms over electronic ones.
Physical Description
Height 5'6", long mid back length ginger hair tied in a braid, pale freckled skin, green and brown heterochromia eyes, curvy hourglass figure Chrome / Implants None
Total Cyberware Points
0
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Gunsmithing, Sharpshooting, Charisma, Physically strong, Perception
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
US era Barretta 9mm pistol family heirloom, synth weave jacket, flannel shirt, cowboy hat, jeans, leather work boots, US era double barrel 12 gauge shotgun family heirloom
Known Affiliations
Vesper; Customer/Friend
Backstory
Dixie is just your average Nomad from outside of Night City. She was born to a caring family, a rarity nowadays. Her family, like most Nomads, traveled and wandered a lot. Her early years were taken up by riding along with her parents, teaching her how to fend for herself and survive if anything ever went south. Her father taught her how to build and clean firearms from random materials and parts found on supply runs. She got pretty good at it, and started helping her father put together new guns out of old and useable materials. A botched trip to gather supplies ended as a bloodbath. A cyberpsycho with too many augments to count, had hunkered down in some ruins. The psycho beat back and murdered a large majority of her pack, including her mother and father, causing a deep-seated fear of intentionally, heavily augmented individuals. Dixie's family has never been very big on augments, they always thought they were unnatural. There were a few people in her pack that had one or two, but never enough to ever go full cyberpsycho. Her pack thought her dead along with her mother and father in the carnage, abandoning her, the cyberpsycho chasing after them all. She watched as they all drove away in a panic, trying to get away from this monster. Once she thought it was far enough away, she grabbed her fathers old shotgun and pistol and went to Night city in hopes of a better life, finding a suitcase to put the shotgun in along the way. She hopes to be able to put her skills to use in Night City. She doesn't care if the stuff she makes kills people, she knows what people do here. Robberies, gang shootings, all kinds of immoral and horrible stuff. She's just of the mind that; so long as she can make money, and build a new life for herself, then maybe she'll be alright.

Pronouns
She/ Her
Occupation
Netrunner
Psychological Profile
Leona feels trapped in her own skin, compelled to perform for others. She views her body more like a "meat suit"—something she possesses only out of necessity. She remains quiet for as long as possible, speaking only when necessary. Her helmet serves as her means of communication; without it, she feels exposed. When interacting with others, she struggles to trust their sincerity, as years of pretending to be close to others have taught her to be cautious in order to survive.
Physical Description
A young woman with purple hair and bright, glowing blue tattoos along her body. Her bright, glowing pinkish-purple eyes have deep grey sclera. She also wears metal adorning her neck and from beneath her breasts down to her stomach. She is usually wearing a helmet with a blue screen and red projections.

Lena "Cal" Calder - britilly

Parsed: Lena "Cal" Calder — username britilly
Resolved: britt (id: 269314789270880257)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1494303137828442154 • archived
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
NCRP CHARACTER SHEET TEMPLATE
Name
Lena "Cal" Calder
Age
24
Pronouns
She/her
Occupation
Independent Medical Assistant / Unofficial Apprentice Ripperdoc
Psychological Profile
Quiet, observant, eager to please, and deeply empathetic. Shaped by early abandonment and prolonged isolation, will prioritize others' needs over her own. Forms intense attachment bonds once trust is established, showing extreme loyalty to a chosen individual or group. Motivated primarily by survival, helping other people, and wishing to understand the circumstances surrounding her guardian's death. Struggles with survivor's guilt surrounding guardian's death, internalizing the belief that hesitation equals failure. Prone to anxiety in chaotic situations and will avoid direct conflict. Displays strong fawn/freeze response under stress and often attempts to appease rather than confront. Emotionally she is soft-spoken and gentle, carrying a persistent undercurrent of sadness. She softens quickly around those who show vulnerability. Her kindness is sincere and her trusting nature could find her in hot water as she believes the best in all who frequent Night City. Keeps her hands busy - will frequently clean things even if something doesn't belong to her, watches people more than she looks at them, hesitant with using names, light-sleeper, can fall asleep almost anywhere, avoids ownership language.
Physical Description
5'2, Softly athletic, reinforced spinal line visible along back, subtle facial cyberware near eyes - faint enough to be mistaken for scars, gray-ish hair worn loose, just past the shoulders. Human - no exotic mods. Quite unassuming, like she's practiced going unnoticed.
Chrome / Implants
• Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): N/A • Auditory System: N/A • Circulatory & Immune Systems: Detoxifier + Higher chance to filter toxins from blood effectively. - Frequent thirst, constant hydration needed • Hands & Feet (2 slots): N/A • Integumentary System: NanoStitch Skin + Automatically seals minor wounds such as small knife wounds. Skin occasionally ripples oddly, unsettling observers. • Legs & Mobility (1 slot per leg): N/A • Neural: N/A • Ocular System: N/A • Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Custom Medical Cyber Spine: (if approved) - + Structural spinal stabilization implant. No enhancement benefits. Requires routine maintenance and causes intermittent pain and stiffness. • Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): N/A • Miscellaneous: Biomonitor + Tracks all vital signs. Can auto-alert partners when you're in danger Can trigger false alarms. You get "pinged" constantly when anxious.
Total Cyberware Points
1+2+1+ (custom cost) 4 + ? *general chrome all over from various test trials and general health maintenance of her body - nothing that really adds any value
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Medical assistance & surgical support, medical technology literacy, basic data handling and record management, caretaking & logistics, situational stealth and avoidance, observation & pattern recognition
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Doesn't carry any standard weapons or firearms. Likely equipped with medical or utility gear (medkit, disposable PPE, data shards of medical reference.) May also carry limited non-lethal deterrents (chemical spray or stun device) for self-defense.

Name
Aurelia Vantress
Age
26
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
Pop-Idol turned ethereal socialite & high-value info broker
Psychological Profile
Aurelia Vantress exists somewhere between reality and performance—and she prefers it that way. Soft-spoken, but captivating. Speaks like everything is slightly poetic or rehearsed. Emotionally distant, almost untouchable. Sees people as constellations of value, secrets, and influence. Deep fear: being forgotten, not hated—forgotten. She doesn’t beg for attention. She lets silence make people lean closer.
Physical Description
Long, flowing hair that shifts between pastel blues, pinks, and iridescent hues depending on light. Skin with a subtle galaxy-like sheen—soft gradients and micro-glitter embedded beneath the surface. Eyes resemble nebulae—multi-tonal, glowing faintly with star-like specks. Glittering freckles that resemble constellations across cheeks and shoulders. Movements are slow, fluid, almost zero-gravity in grace. Her entire presence feels like augmented reality… even when it isn’t. Nyx Ardent - j3llyvox

Parsed: Nyx Ardent — username j3llyvox
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1487531223743074386 • archived
! Username "j3llyvox" not found in guild (unclaimed)
! Only 0 labeled section(s) parsed
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
Nyx Ardent Role: Inventor & Netrunner (Experimental Tech Specialist) Affiliation: Independent (Occasional Work with Fixers & Scavs) Location: Badlands (Primary), Watson (Operations) Background: Nyx never cared much for Night City, its gangs, its corpos, or its constant noise. While others fought to survive or climb the ladder, she focused on systems, structures, and anything that could be understood, broken, and rebuilt. From a young age, she spent most of her time scavenging broken tech in Watson, learning how to repair, modify, and eventually redesign devices far beyond their original purpose. At age 17, while working through a batch of corrupted data shards purchased from a scavenger group, Nyx recovered a partially damaged file labeled only as “L-Program // Phase 2.” The shard contained fragmented orbital calculations, propulsion schematics, and an incomplete AI-assisted trajectory system. The metadata was heavily scrubbed, no corporation tag or author ID. Instead of discarding it, Nyx began reconstructing the file. Over several months, she rebuilt the missing sections by running simulations through her own custom scripts. The results were consistent: the system described a compact single-occupant launch vehicle designed to reach the moon orbit using unconventional routing, relying on real-time trajectory correction rather than pre-calculated flight paths. The design wasn’t theoretical. It was functional. From that point forward, Nyx shifted her entire focus. She began developing what she now refers to as the L.E.S. (Lunar Exit System), a hybrid project combining physical engineering and netrunning. The concept is simple in theory: A lightweight launch pod capable of vertical escape A guidance system powered by a custom AI-assisted cyberdeck Continuous real-time hacking of external infrastructure (traffic grids, satellites, defense systems) to dynamically adjust trajectory and avoid interception To support this, Nyx built her own cyberdeck, later named LUNAR//CORE, specifically optimized for adaptive intrusion and live-system manipulation. Unlike standard decks, it constantly rewrites its own exploit chains based on incoming data, making it extremely effective but also unstable, which makes it really hard to evolve.

Caesar - fire_fox

Parsed: Caesar — username fire_fox
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1492100130374156338 • archived
! Username "fire_fox" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
Caesar
Age
25
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Corpo Broker
Psychological Profile
Cold, calculating, and efficient, doesn’t make emotional connections well with others, and usually comes off as a stone cold husk of a person who just focuses on his business and what is needed. Might have a form of psychopathy as he doesn’t show compassion to others at least not easily.
Physical Description
Short, 1.5 meters and average build exotic, with a robotic right arm/hand, with many religious markings dotted around about his body from his time around some maelstromers and other religious groups 🦾 Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: Gorilla Arms, his right cyberarm is designed to be as strong as his actual left arm (his cyberarm is simply a fancy gorilla arm and is aesthetic) Auditory System: None Circulatory & Immune Systems: None Hands & Feet: None Integumentary System: Dermal Plating Legs & Mobility: None Neural: Netrunner Suite Level 2 Ocular System: None Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Dense Marrow Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): None Miscellaneous: None
Total Cyberware Points
10
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Is proficient in hacking and knowing what to say to get others to cooperate, even if fully lying, or just saying things to rile people up, and being a lethal combatant in CQC despite his, "short," nature, who is anything but scared to get his hands dirty, in fact prefers fighting with his fists and making a mess
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Is armed with a nue pistol and a armored jacket, used to help block some knife wounds and blunt weapons
Backstory
Born and raised in NC to a rich and prosperous family with an older sister who his parents were determined to make great, while he was left with the scraps to make due with while she was glamourized and shown the spotlight from an early age. Getting this, “Forgotten Little Brother,” treatment had only gone and made him more cold as he realized that nobody is truly your friend or family, and the real goal in life is to step on others to get your way. He learned especially young about how he was extremely envious of others having more than him. However, he used his parent’s connections and his ability to be so close and forgotten by them to his advantage, recording blackmail and stealing private files that they had that was rather incriminating to certain corporate ties they had and sold it off for a price to Night Corps, that price being to become an agent for them, this ruined the rest of his family but in return he got the life he thought he always deserved. But he still craves more, and even though he does like to consider himself a freelance corpo, or a Corpo Broker for brokering deals between the corporations and fixers or gangs, truly he works for Night Corps fully, and they cycle between keeping this, “dog,” on a tight leash or letting him loose to indulge in whatever business he desires. So long as he doesn’t harm their name and reputation, he takes great pride in not doing so or fixing it before it becomes an issue. Using his connection to them as a bargaining chip to strike deals wherever he sees fit, acting as a broker, though from time to time he does get overzealous about his job.

Richard Kovac - puffymystery

Resolved: PuffyMystery (id: 463088295837171742)

Taller and Larger build, no excessive visible cyberware Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: Auditory System: Circulatory & Immune Systems: Hands & Feet: Integumentary System:Sub-dermal Plating Legs & Mobility: Neural: Ocular System: SmartEyes Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Recoil Dampeners Miscellaneous: Biomonitor

Backstory
⁠character-creation-puffymystery⁠
Known Affiliations
Snake Nation
Reference Images
RP Hooks
Trying to make a decent living as a ripperdoc, and expand his network of connections via the afterlife. He was raised in Texas, got his Cyberware Engineering education on scholarship at Texas A&M. Richard wanted to be a ripperdoc because of a pipedream he had with his childhood friends- he always was the level headed one in his group. His friends were the wannabe cyberpunks. However, they had a shared opinion on what Richard should do with his life, His friend group from Texas is also where he got his practical experience- patching up and installing chrome on those thugs. He became a Ripperdoc for them, and they all found out the hard way that they aren't cut out for being edgerunners. A hot joytoy was one of his clients as a doc, she talked about how there was this biotechnica exec that is one of her clients that had a pimped out Quadra, absolutely raving about the car. Him being an immature ripper, and a gentleman (he was down bad), Planned to steal the ride while his client kept the exec busy, he got caught in the process and rode the car out to Amarillo before ditching it. This is when he found the Snake Nation while he was laying low. He eventually met some junkie (Zevra Uhilna) in the badlands and ended up becoming their dedicated ripper (shes is in debt). Currently he is arriving at Night City through the Snakes and is attempting to start his practice here.

Lareina Soto - chisanaki

Parsed: Lareina Soto — username chisanaki
Resolved: Chīsana悲 (id: 900905647749603369)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1492097646347816960 • archived
Name
Lareina Soto (Pronounced La-REH-na)
Age
23 Occupation/Role: Basic Enginner/Tinkerer + Part-time RipperDoc
Psychological Profile
A quiet woman who is usually seen keeping herself busy. Not being very talkative, she comes and goes with menial and handy tasks that some people don't even realize she's doing. Simply fading into the background as she enjoys the simple work, she finds time rather quickly for those she cares about though. Even if it's just leaving a drink on your desk without a word and disappearing without a trace. (It's not even on purpose someone needs to put a bell on this bitch.) It's easy to tell just by a glance if you can catch her that sinking into her work is more her strong suit than people..
Physical Description
Sweetly tanned skin, piercing yellow eyes (with maybe a slight RBF), and being rather tall for her lineage at 6'2. She holds her interests on her sleeves, literally, sporting a couple centipede tattoo's wrapping her body while some linked to assumedly cybernetics show themselves off with their silver sheen. Chrome/Implants - Arms & Arm Attachments: N/A Auditory System: N/A Circulatory & Immune Systems: N/A Hands & Feet: CyberFingers (+1) Integumentary System: Pressure Sensor Skin (+1) Legs & Mobility: N/A Neural: N/A Ocular System: SmartEyes (+2) Skeleton & Torso Musculature: N/A Universal Muscular: N/A Miscellaneous: Spasm Drone Port (+2)
Total Cyberware Points
6 - Monthly Or Bi-Monthly RipperDoc Maintainence Skills/Talents/Abilities: Basic Engineering/Robotics and RipperDoc knowledge, better than average aim with no required scope (enhanced by SmartEyes and Spasm Scout Drones) Equipment/Armor/Weapons: Low Caliber Sniper Rifle, Basic Maintenance Tools

Zevra Yuhilna - cade3945

Parsed: Zevra Yuhilna — username cade3945
Resolved: Cade (id: 685221908953956372)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1492098361329713343 • archived
Name
Zevra Yuhilna
Age
25
Pronouns
She/her They/them
Occupation
Merc, Smuggler, Hacker, Info Gatherer
Psychological Profile
Calmer demeanor a little on edge at times
Physical Description
slightly heavy set trans female, darker skin, white hair, tattoos across the body 🦾 Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: Auditory System: Circulatory & Immune Systems: Hands & Feet: Integumentary System:UnderSkin Light Show Legs & Mobility: Neural: Netrunner Suite (Level 3) Ocular System: Flash Visor Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Miscellaneous: Ghost Tag,ICE layer
Total Cyberware Points
8
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Skilled With Electronics, quiet and quick on her feet, Trained moderately in muay Thai but nothing to crazy just to protect herself
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Will be gained IC only thing she has is a knife
Backstory
Grew up in London with a life of crime, stealing, tagging, fighting, you name it. Never really fitting in when she was younger she tended to test her legal limits, started off with simple scamming people for money or dealing drugs. eventually she ended up getting addicted to stealing and drugs (Specifically Pain killers) becoming what most would call a kleptomaniac doing whatever she could past even just getting by she got greedy, she went so far as to learn coding, creating viruses, etc. She would hack into small businesses, phones, banks and steal all she could, if she wasnt sleeping or eating she was stealing in some way. During all of this she stole from the wrong person and ended up getting jumped and hurt pretty bad and to get away one of the only friends she had took her to the bad lands meeting a shady doc and 'Fixing her up" with one of his experiments implanting a Net runner suite into her head (Level 1 at the time) after she eventually recovered she made her way out into the bad lands, taking odd jobs and continuing her Kleptomaniac tendencies, eventually finding her way into the nomads with her jobs still finding her way back to the ripper doc, getting more implants for the net runner suite and buying drugs with all the money she had. On top of all that she found herself in a weird situation taking estrogen and becoming almost addicted to the way that it changed her body, sometimes taking it to far and mixing it with drugs. It wasn't an unwanted change but and odd one for them, still continuing her life of partying, work, drugs, sex, you name it she got lost in the thrill of it all and eventually Overdosed almost losing her life with all of the substances not interacting well with each other. It was a scare for sure and for the next few years of her life she calmed down, still reliant on drugs and still has a slight want to steal that she fights off constantly but calmer for sure. Learning to protect herself, get better at her job and focusing on life, meeting a woman and building a strong connection (Rena) taking her jobs and chroming up a bit more and finding herself troubled with where she was. getting her past coming back to haunt her old faces and trouble showing up she decided moving to night city to hide away for a bit was a good place to start and finding her way in with the Snake nation nomadic group Wishing to get clean and live a more eventuful life outside of drugs and partying, she wishes to be able to become known in night city and her abilities to be known.
Known Affiliations
Nomad (Snake Nation)
Reference Images
Will get soon im actively working on the model ill attach when it gets to a normal point
RP Hooks
Isn't afraid to get her hand dirty and is very outgoing willing to do any odd jobs that may come her way or just go spend some eddies in a bar to get to know some new people
Additional Notes

Dr. Logan Ledger "L.E.D.G.E.R." - luv_thewolf

Parsed: Dr. Logan Ledger "L.E.D.G.E.R." — username luv_thewolf
Resolved: 𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐖𝐨𝐥𝐟 (id: 267423433145450506)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1492095184371187753 • archived
Name
** Dr. Logan Ledger "L.E.D.G.E.R." (Data Recorder: Logistical Extraction & Data Gathering Entity Relay)
Age
** 28
Pronouns
** He/Him
Occupation
** Private Journalist
Psychological Profile
** Calm, attentive, socially adaptive, approachable.
Physical Description
** 6'5 (2.00m), Mesomorph, Anthropomorphic Medal Bespoke Bioexotic Variant
Chrome / Implants
** Netrunner Suite (Level 1): Quickhacks, control systems - 1 Memory Bank: Store perfect audio recall - 2 Smart Eyes: Zoom, thermal, night vision, facial ID, AR HUD - 2 Sub-dermal Plating: Resistant to blades, blunt trauma, Pistol Calibers - 2 Enhanced Ears - 2
Total Cyberware Points
** 9
Skills / Talents / Abilities
** Psychological analyzer, audio recording capabilities, oddly humane behavior, quick learner
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
** Dual Akimbas (Classic M1911s) {Suppressors available}
Backstory
** With a body created under a subordinate organization to Biotechnica, this experimental project was built under intermediately stressful conditions. Within Collective Labs, the subsidary vageuly known under Biotechnica's belt, Experimental Biosculpt & Bioexotics-Grade Conversion methods often begun with robotic mannequins or live-like sculptures to act as test dummies before being brought to organic bodies in order to preserve as many human lives as possible. Cybernetic tests were reserved exclusively for fully prepared robotic creations as a first-time use before they were shelved for further use in the future. Most robotics were left in the dust after experiments were deemed successful, especially on a one particularly animalistic patient that had been more commonly abused of his volunteered body. However, long after being abandoned when the programs within Collective Labs were much too visible, and deemed too dangerous to be continued without problems, one particular scientist found himself lost without this job. He loved to study the ways of this laboratory's experiments, journal his thoughts and find new things...and had nothing more to offer himself. Days before the mannequins scraps were disposed of, Dr. Logan Ledger begged the Ripper Docs of Collective Labs to help him use this body's parts for his own with deals under the table. Before he knew it, the entirety of the robot had been remastered as individual chrome and implantations that they'd merge with his body. Later, he found himself twitching to life again; a wandering personality with desire to explore and become something different with this new body. The more Ledger would feed into his own explorationally-motivated curiosity, the more he would discover himself journaling information about other lives across the grounds he wandered. Eventually, Ledger would find himself exploring the dangerous streets of Night City on his own, simply enjoying speaking to other people around him, regardless of the potential risks. When deeming himself proud enough of his self-taught Data Recording abilities, he labeled himself with a proper acronym to fit his modern life: "Logistical Extraction & Data Gathering Entity Relay." (Dr. L.E.D.G.E.R) With the last of his savings, he purchased a pair of pistols for safety, then allowed thrill and curiosity to lead him to continue recording, jounraling and adapting more with the streets of the City's most interesting inhabitants. Where there is information, there is desire to transfer, share, and learn even more. **Known Past Affiliations:** Biotechnica's "Collective Labs"
RP Hooks
** “Dr. is a designation. Not an academic credential.”
Additional Notes
** - Dr. Ledger's story correlates heavily alongside of character "Q'tarr Warrian." and takes place only a few years before the initial release of "The Wolf" known as the unstable Q'tarr that then associated with M.R.C after the event of Biotechnica's Collective Labs discontinuing.

Adam Willows - o0deusvult0o

Parsed: Adam Willows — username o0deusvult0o
Resolved: o0DeusVult0o (id: 197731735683858433)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1492093864708804680 • archived
Name
Adam Willows
Age
33 (09/21/2046)
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Solo/Nomad
Psychological Profile
Riddled with PTSD, has a tendency to zone out, Tends to stay near his Nomad comrades, Has trouble meeting new people, A Switch seems to flip when he's in combat scenarios and causes him to focus.
Physical Description
Tall Male Build, Long Dark Hair, Visible Cyberware 🦾 Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments:N/A Auditory System:N/A Circulatory & Immune Systems:N/A Hands & Feet: Silentstep Soles, Subdermal Grip Integumentary System:N/A Legs & Mobility:N/A Neural: Neurofilter Ocular System: Targeting Optic Skeleton & Torso Musculature:N/A Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Recoil Dampeners Miscellaneous: ICE Layer
Total Cyberware Points
9/10
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Automotive mechanic skills, Gunsmithing, Militech Training
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Militech Ajax (5.56)
Backstory
Adam grew up in the NUSA to a middle class military family. It was expected of him to join the NUSAF but he had different plans. In 2064 at the age of 18 he signed a contract to join Militech. He went through his training, specializing in special warfare tactics and turned out to be a model corporate soldier. He was granted access to cyberware due to his achievements in training. Afterwards years went by and he was eventually promoted to a sergeant. Once 2069 rolled around, and the Unification war started; he was assigned to a unit that was sent on several high priority missions through the Free states. Eventually his unit was sent to Ridgecrest, California, where everything went to shit. His unit was hit hard and sustained heavy casualties, eventually losing contact with their command unit. Despite this they decided to keep on moving through the fog of war and came across a neighborhood to hold out in. During night watch Adam, and a fellow soldier spotted a group of what they thought to be hostiles. Following protocol they alerted their comrades to get up. Unfortunately, the group of people heard some of the commotion and decided to investigate the area Adam was in. One of Adam's fellow soldiers shouted "GUN!", the unit proceeded to open fire on the group that was approaching them. When the gunfire calmed down and the unit realized they didn't get shot back at a horrendous realization set in...civilians. No one knew what to do, they have cemented themselves as war criminals. After an hour or so of arguing amongst the unit, Adam had the idea to plant weapons on the bodies and to wound himself and some of his own men to make it believable. The unit agreed as it seemed like the best option at the time. They got lucky. Adam's unit made it out of Ridgecrest and linked back up with command, no one spoke a word of what happened. His unit would eventually be pulled out of the area due to Arasaka's intervention. After making it home, Adam broke. The things he witnessed and took part in made him sick. He was discharged from Militech after the war ended, he didn't know what to do, he didn't know where to go, he just wanted to forget. After stumbling through life he found a band of Snake Nation nomads with a ripperdoc. Adam decided to use the money he earned to purchase his last piece of cyberware for a long time...a neurofilter. After slotting that in he decided to stay with those nomads to have some sort of purpose. Eventually he would end up near Night City and maybe the city will help him forget his past.
Known Affiliations
Snake Nation, Ex-Militech Soldier
Reference Images

Because of this she will HATE specific kinds of Employers and Pities any who may be in those situations because they have nothing else. * Emotional Tone is Happy go lucky with dark undertones.

Chrome / Implants
** * Slots, 1 Cyberware Implant per slot EXCEPT Miscellaneous which is unlimited: * Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): Gorilla Arms (2) - Looks a bit Bulky or too Heavy * Auditory System: Enhanced Ears (2) - Overwhelmed in Noisy Spaces and Startles easily * Circulatory & Immune Systems: * Hands & Feet (2 slots): Subdermal Grip (1) - Sometimes crushes Fragile stuff by Accident * Integumentary System: Supra-Dermal Weave (1) - Skin feels Rigid and Leathery * Legs & Mobility (1 slot per leg): * Neural: * Ocular System: SmartEyes (2) - Eyes Glow, You SOMETIMES Blink Asynchronously * Skeleton & Torso Musculature: * Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): * Miscellaneous: Voice Weaver (1)(PUREPLY AESTETIC)

Equipment / Armor / Weapons

Backstory
** * She grew up in Night City on a scholarship to an elite school, but when her parents died the crushing debt became hers, pushing her into life as a joytoy to survive. What started as necessity turned into dependence as she augmented herself heavily with cyberware, chasing the control and numbness it gave—until one night she lost control and seriously hurt her boss. Terrified of retaliation, she fled into the Badlands, eventually joining a nomad pack that became part of Snake Nation. Now she lives far from the city’s grip, determined to never again be trapped in the corporate cycle of selling her body and identity, even if the chrome she relied on is something she can never fully escape.
Known Affiliations

Backstory
Rosa was born blind into a middle class family in santo Domingo. She was born blind but her father saw this as a weakness she needed to overcome, which lead to her only getting her first set of eyes when she moved out at 24. Rosa is still heavily adjusting to vision as a whole but knows that she wants to become a Ripperdoc and maybe one day even work for trauma team. But for now, survival is what matters most

OOC I don't have the ability to do much combat as a forewarning [RGNT], Medusa (Shadow the Edgehog) — 4/7/2026 4:52 PM Can you send pictures of the avatar and the stats from within vrchat? [RGNT], Medusa (Shadow the Edgehog) — 4/7/2026 4:53 PM Why did she want to become a ripper doc? Why did she move out? Why does she want to work for trauma team? Why is she terrified o fire? Why does she care so much about others? Buffsquishy | Rosaline Helner [RGNT], — 4/7/2026 5:04 PM Yes and yes! Just gimme a few minutes to finish up some homework :hnnnnnnnn: Buffsquishy | Rosaline Helner [RGNT], — 4/7/2026 6:06 PM 1) she wants to be a ripper doc because she believes that's the best way to help people in need (she's delusional) 2) She felt like she was a burden to her family and wanted to make a name for herself 3) She believes that joining the trauma team will enable her to help even more people without issue (again, delusional) 4) She's burned herself a lot throughout her life and once she was finally able to see she immediately connected all the prior pain to fire (even though 99.999% of the time when she was burned it was not because of an open flame) 5) She cares so much about others due to a very naive and childlike mindset that everyone is good (delulu) and if she cannot help those around her, she in turn won't have any sort of protection from the "bad people" (bad people to her are just anyone who attempts to do something to her or her friends)

Backstory
Zuri is a man who was born in night city to parents who were not good people to say the least, they were in debt to many people and by the time he turned 14 that debt caught up to them and both of his parents were killed by debt collectors which caused the debt to fall to him. Over the next 10 years he would spend his life selling his body in order to pay off the debt but some point along the it stopped being gor the money and more for the pleasure, as he continued down his path of addiction he would end up not asking for money at some point which obviously left him with nothing in no time to which he had a sort of wake up call to continue asking for money but it was already too late, by that time he had already started racking up debts and he would ended up having to leave the city after making too many enemies to be able to safely sleep at night, out in the dirts he ended up joining a group of nomads called the snake nation after falling into debt with them after being caught stealing their food. He is against people with anthropomorphic qualities because he believes that if you choose to take on animalistic qualities then you should be treated as an animal.

Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
NCRP CHARACTER SHEET TEMPLATE
Name
Dilandian Von Wyld
Age
35
Pronouns
He/Him/They/Them
Occupation
Driver
Psychological Profile
A listener absolutely will not interrupt someone else. Lives by the adage “Better for them to wonder if you’re an idiot than open your mouth and remove all doubt”. Habitual snacker, constantly looking for something to munch on or snack on. Will not drink and is reluctant to submit the wheel to auto-drive even on long rides or drives.
Physical Description
2.08 meter tall “Wingless Dragon”. Medium build, forked tongue, glowing scale outline, absolutely an exotic. Intimidating until he opens his mouth to speak and whatever words he’s about to proclaim come out.
Chrome / Implants
Name the mods, what they do, and note any tradeoffs. Note: Custom chrome and implants must be approved before use Slots, 1 Cyberware Implant per slot EXCEPT Miscellaneous which is unlimited: Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): Auditory System: Circulatory & Immune Systems: Hands & Feet (2 slots): Claws (1) Integumentary System: Luminescent Scales/Skin (1) Legs & Mobility (1 slot per leg): Neural: Ocular System: Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Miscellaneous: Mr. Studd (1) Tail (1)
Total Cyberware Points
4 Mr. Studd (1) Tail (1) Luminant Skin/Scales (1) - Aesthetic choice, no advantage over regular skin. Sheds like reptiles/itchy. Claws (1)
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Driver, transports people or things from one location to another utilizing a variety of ground based vehicles. Prefers simple hand cannon. Can substitute his tail for either a hand, or foot while driving.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Malorian Overture Owns a simple Makigai MaiMai P126
Backstory
Originally from the Northeast of the NUSA usually drove freight and cargo, a load of equipment brought him into Night City however legislation, red tape, and improper paperwork keeps him in Night City on a more permanent basis. Pretty much lives out of his car, keeps a camping kit on-hand for showers and lives off of road snacks and camping food. Short term goal is to purchase a large van and upgrade living conditions. Long term goal is to obtain pilots license and fly cargo unfit for drones.
Known Affiliations
Keeps most transactions on the down-low. Will move anything for anyone within limits.
Reference Images
Art, screenshots, etc.
RP Hooks
Optional -- What might draw others to interact with this character? Glowing patterns, and literal jingly keys Loves crunchy snacks, always looking for good vending machines and cheap food. Will absolutely get a bag of chips stuck on his head trying to get those last little crumbs in the bottom of the bag.
Additional Notes
Likes to snack, voraciously, always looking for something crunchy or savory. Not a big fan of sweet things unless it’s a special occasion, but loves crunchy and savory snacks. Not a big fan of Pretzels or plain Potato Chips/Crisps however. Image

From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1477672235853418617 • archived
! Only 0 labeled section(s) parsed
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
Picture :] Gwen “Maple”. She/Her, 23 Gwen, an immigrant from Ontario, Canada, is a brash, outgoing merc lost in a world that left her for dead. Roles. Merc, Ammunition Craftswoman Psychology. Gwen has healed from some serious trauma close to a year back. She has emotionally stabilized, even though her life is still rushing down the shitter. She has had to sell many of the things she loves in order to keep herself afloat, which now ultimately prevents her from making any money at all. She is on borrowed time until she’s out on the streets, but she will do almost anything to prevent that from happening. She knows what she needs to succeed, she just doesn’t have the money, resources, or connections to get there. Height. 173cm Weight. 195lbs Build. Fit Stance. Confident. Chrome. Chippin’ in. 6/10 CWP. Monthly RipperDoc Maintenance. Cyberarm (Right). 2 CWP Sub-Dermal Plating. 2 CWP. GhostTag. 1 CWP. Subdermal Grip (Right). 1 CWP. Internal Agent. An internal phone. Skills & Abilities. Equipment & Armour. Ammunition Crafter. Gwen has an intimate understanding of crafting ammunition from base components, including custom ammunition types (Hollow-Point, Incendiary, Acid, Taser, etc.) Long Arms Proficiency. Having used large, heavy, two-handed firearms for most of her time on the streets, Gwen has learned the dos and don'ts of combat with heavy, oversized, and unwieldy long arms. Swordplay. Gwen commandeered an uchigatana off a mercenary she fought in the past. She keeps it on her left hip, such that her cyberarm could unsheathe it straight into a strong, quick slash to end an engagement before it even starts. M249 Blueprints. A series of modern American-made LMG schematics and design documents. It’s a shame she came into possession of these after she had sold her machines… Saiga 12. A 12 gauge mag-fed shotgun from the “commies to the east”, as Maple puts it. Though she hates all things firearms from anywhere outside of North America, she has ceded to this “magnificent manhunting motherfucker”. Uchigatana. An uchigatana of unknown origin. It has served Gwen reliably throughout her time in Night City.

Noah Calloway - jesmge

Parsed: Noah Calloway — username jesmge
Resolved: Jesmge (id: 383489547108876290)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1487534130332958800 • archived
Name
Noah Halloway
Age
27
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Yaskawa Robotics Employee
Psychological Profile
Calm, supportive, big viber. Has daddy issues. Momma’s boy. Despite his appearance he’s very pleasant. Unlike his brother he takes after his mom a lot, along with her lack of emotional vulnerability and firm opinions.
Physical Description
Two meters, and bulky. The visual definition of fluffy. Canine biosculpts. Heavily gothic appearance.
Chrome / Implants
Slots: Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): Auditory System: Circulatory & Immune Systems: Hands & Feet (2 slots): Integumentary System: Legs & Mobility (1 slot per leg): Neural: Netrunner Suite Level 1 Ocular System: Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Miscellaneous: Biomonitor
Total Cyberware Points
2
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Cryptography, Drone Piloting, Boxing, Tarot, Sidearms Training
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Tsunami Nue, Techgogs, Archer Quartz
Backstory
Noah was born and raised in Night City, primarily in the City Center where he and his family still reside. His early life was extremely normal, with a firm hand guiding him and a far better than average lifestyle. At the age of 14 his mom let up on him, giving both him and his brother much more freedom but instilling responsibility and consequences for every mistake they made. At 18 he immediately went to a corporate college after high school, choosing to pursue an analytics degree. Not long after enrolling he got his first cyberware, paid for by his mother, he had a basic netrunner suite installed so he could access the web, run various apps for college and interact with his hobbies and friends. He graduated with his Bachelor’s in data analytics and moved straight to Yaskawa, entering the company into a desk job. It took a couple years, but eventually the spot opened up and he moved up to the position of Data Analyst where he’s been since.
Known Affiliations
Yaskawa Robotics.
RP Hooks
Varied interests means he has reason to talk with people, and if his mom’s around they’ll stick together which will spark conversation. May occasionally fly his drone around, mostly just observing people.

Parker Pepper - ghosted_stoner

Parsed: Parker Pepper — username ghosted_stoner
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1491226695812911218 • archived
! Username "ghosted_stoner" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
Parker Pepper
Age
25
Pronouns
They, she, them
Occupation
Bodyguard in the Mox and Suzie's right hand
Psychological Profile
Bit of a mouthy bitch, can’t hold her tongue, especially when something she doesn’t like is happening. She’s strong on her views, and her hate for Tyger claws.
Physical Description
5’8 intersex black, white and gold Chimera exotic.
Chrome / Implants
Integumentary System: Sub dermal plating Ocular System: Smarteyes Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Reactive muscle fibers Miscellaneous: Voiceweaver, scentscanner, ghosttag
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Close combat, best with axes or swingable objects.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Fireaxe and her guitar; which is also an axe.
Backstory
Alice grew up with her older sister and mother in the Midwest, Michigan. They lived in poverty, her mom working most days while Sarah, her sister, took care of her. Alice was born intersex, mostly just making it so she was bullied due to her lack of a chest, making her slowly despise being a girl and being in school. When she turned twelve and her sister was sixteen, her mother met a man. Her mom had been a single mother for her entire life, and the promise of someone who would support them blinded their mom. He wasn’t from Michigan, he was from Night City, on what he called a ‘business trip’. He moved fast with their mom, and only after a month. He offered to move them in with him, he’d give her a car, the girls would go to school and she wouldn’t have to work anymore. Sarah tried to convince her mother this might be a bad idea, barely knowing anything about him really and moving across the country? Into such an unsafe state, but her mother wasn’t hearing it. The move felt rushed, twelve years of her life packed up in one day. Sarah took it harder than Alice, quickly growing suspicious of this guy. Not that it mattered, they still ended up moving to that Hellhole. It was too good to be true honestly, a corporate man showing interest in a single mother with kids, and it was. Not long after moving to Night City, really only after two weeks, Sarah and their mother got into a very bad fight, just for her to go missing a few days after. Alice was torn, her sister was all she had, her best friend. But, a runaway note was found in Sarah's room but Alice didn’t believe it, her sister wouldn’t run away. She wouldn’t leave her. So she looked for her for months. Her mom didn’t help, angry at Sarah and fully believing she did just run away and that man always kept her moms attention. After two years Alice finally gave up, Fourteen and now in high school. She didn’t try for friends, just made sure her grades were passable. On her Fifteen birthday, she ran away. Though, if her mother even noticed, she’d never know. Now on the street, it was harder than she expected. She would've thought anywhere was better than home but that just wasn’t true and just after a few days she wanted to take it back and go home. She was sleeping in any alleyway for a week, she never cared for learning much about Night City and now she regretted it. Yet, on her eighth night, someone found her. It was Sarah, her sister was alive, but she was different. She had become an exotic, a cat. But Alice could’ve cared less, she had her sister back. Sarah brought Alice home with her, a small but nice apartment. Soon in, Alice learned her sister was a joytoy, and to her horror she found her hurt- and the man was still there. Blindly, Alice attacked him,

Violet Liebert - shatteredcafe

Parsed: Violet Liebert — username shatteredcafe
Resolved: ShatteredCafe (id: 294557532486107136)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1491226029447053402 • archived
Name
Violet Liebert
Age
21
Pronouns
She/Her Occupation / Role: Amateur Netrunner
Psychological Profile
She often meets new people with suspicion, though she craves the kind of close connection she had growing up. Antsy from both nerves and anticipation at new people, gets "foggy" under pressure.
Physical Description
A young woman with strawberry red hair that fades to a light glowing magenta, softly glowing "golden" tattoos along her body, and piercing violet eyes with a deep grey sclera to them, which glow with the others described. Chrome / Implants Circulatory & Immune Systems: N/A Hands & Feet: N/A Integumentary System: N/A Legs & Mobility: N/A Neural: Netrunner Suite (lvl 1) Ocular System: Targeting Optic Skeleton & Torso Musculature: N/A Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): N/A Miscellaneous: Aesthetic Cyberware (Tattoos on body / Glowing Eyes / Glowing Hair)
Total Cyberware Points
3
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Netrunning (weak), Quickhacks (weak), swordplay
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Sword
Backstory
She grew up in Night City itself, being the younger of two daughters to mildly neglectful parents. Her father was always more caring for results, being a narcissist with anger issues & sociopathic tendencies, he tried to establish a connection to his daughters but could never quite figure out the disconnect. Her mother, was a neat freak and could not properly handle being alone or difficult times passing, instead going into her own little "wonderland" where nothing was wrong, aside from the times she couldn't keep it up and would go cry in the closet. Her sister, Eleanor (called Ella for short), protected Violet from it all for a good bit of their childhood, until Violet was entering High School, and she went off to a smaller university on scholarship. When she entered HIgh School, she was split up from her small friend group, being in a different school zone for that level. From there, she tried to meet and get along with new people, and ended up in a rather extravagant group of "upper middle-class" people, whose parents all worked for the same corp, her dad having just been poached to work there as well. The group seemed okay for a while, before they started to get her in on their "activities" - bullying the kids who were of poorer families, pressuring her that they'd get her dad fired if she didn't. So she did. As she was brought into this, her grades started to slip, her dad putting more pressure on her - her mom letting him, never standing up for her, then acting like nothing happened mere minutes after. She kept word of her situation from her sister, keeping acting like everything was fine, even lying when asked if her parents were treating her well. Things kept amping up in the friend group with her pushing back more and more on them, until late in their senior year, when they were picking on one of the little "geniuses" of the group. They wanted her to push him off a smaller bridge, into the river. She refused, and they kept their word, getting her dad fired. He started to lash out a lot more, until he started to get physical. After he hospitalized her mother, she finally told everything to her sister, who came home to confront him. There was a lot of yelling, things got blurry as they moved fast, her dad pulled a gun but her sister pulled one quicker. Her dad was gone, her mother having died in the hospital weeks later - her sister fled the city, trying to hide from what she did. She went to join the Nomads, aiming to find her sister. There, she met her mentor among other people, learning the basics of Swordplay, Netrunning and Quickhacks, getting eye implants to help in her search, before finally returning to Night City, hoping to find traces of her.
Known Affiliations
Snake Nation, Zevra Uhilna (Netrun Mentor)
Reference Images
(images attached)
Additional Notes
She has Synesthesia, is a lil flavor thing since I (the player) do as well

Morning Helen Sanderson - hdmg

Parsed: Morning Helen Sanderson — username hdmg
Resolved: HDMG (id: 263488306321293312)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1491224808178843729 • archived
Name
Morning Helen Sanderson
Age
29
Pronouns
She/Her They/Them
Occupation
Mercenary/Bodyguard
Psychological Profile
Stoic and forward thinking in high stress situations, inquisitive, dirty minded, due to prior experiences she’s afraid to lose her limbs and does have nightmares on occasion about such, Body dysmorphic with an imposter syndrome mindset, prone to obey only if it makes sense, tendency to argue, jokes very often.
Physical Description
6’4”, Light build, Cyborg.
Chrome / Implants
Gorilla Arms, Enhanced Ears, Subdermal Plating, Luminescent skin, Ice Layer, Smart Eyes.
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Combative brawler, Knowledgeable on weapons and use, CQC, crafting, Cooking, able to drive, car knowledge. Photography.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Large oodachi, Sekikou Sword, Rifle
Backstory
Having nearly had a near death accident during combat, Morning had suffered injuries beyond regular repair, a fixer they had close ties to by the name of Mark Taylor had turned traitor in one of the jobs he provided the family setting up the Sanderson’s against other rivals he had planted for an ambush, a bunch of thugs with guns, Morning fought for her life against this small army of gangsters, and for the crime family she was born and raised into, only to be dismembered piece by piece, somehow managing to stay alive long enough before a trauma unit arrived. A miracle it seemed to be. The only way in saving her was through cyberware, she initially attested to the idea, maintaining non use of metal and chrome, but she did have a willingness to continue living, however she did miss her human self as she was very fond of her parts. She never looked the same as she did, she never felt the same as she was. Her family after hearing about her bodily betrayal had casted her away, being heavily against the use of cyberware as it was seen as “cheating at life” and “spitting in the face of god”, the family outwardly saying that she should have died in combat, also said family being the reason why she nearly died in the first place, protecting the Sanderson name as it were. The Eddie balance for her surgery and new parts cost her quite an amount, so she continued to take up odd jobs of mercenary work and a personal bodyguard, slowly paying off her debt as they went along. She would then find more opportunities in Night City, being a good home to stay in for the time being.
Known Affiliations
Eliza Stern.
Reference Images

Psychological Profile
Socially awkward, tends to be quiet
Physical Description
6 Ft, Male, No Chrome, White ethnicity, Shaved Head Chrome: None, not even a head chip. Full organic. (Had the bones in his left arm replaced with titanium after the accident, no actual benefit as the bones simply mimic real ones in weight due to being partially hollow)
Skills / Talents / Abilities

Equipment / Armor / Weapons

Backstory
Born and raised in Night city, scraped together enough money to attend college where he learned Mechatronics, Graduated top of his class (tied with 2 others), after which he got scouted by several corpos but declined due to "not wanting to be tied down", is now dirt poor living in a refrigerator box. Met Julian who offered to help him find a job in Eastside.
Known Affiliations
A few classmates from College, but otherwise not much else Reference Image: Don't have one, but I am using the Heywood Citizen model for my character because I can't afford a custom model.
RP Hooks
I don't know what to put here
Additional Notes
Known to perform risky experiments with the stuff he makes which is how he got 6 breaks in his left arm causing it to need the bones to be replaced.) @Medusa (Shadow the Edgehog) Here it is, please don't bully me, I'm not all that good at making a backstory Medusa (Shadow the Edgehog) — Yesterday at 8:03 AM Okay a couple questions for the backstory Where are his parents? Why is he living in a refrigerator box? Why Mechatronics? How did you meet julian? Why did he agreee to help you? Bobbywyatt26/Jacob — Yesterday at 8:08 AM His parents raised him until he was 16, and got into college where they then said you're on your own because they didn't have a lot of money. He spent all of his money on said college therefore leaving him dirt broke. Mechatronics, mostly because it seemed cool, and he had an aptitude for it. He met Julian at the onsen where he chat with him about being broke. I don't know, you would have to ask him.

Dr. Rebecca Hellebore - andemix

Parsed: Dr. Rebecca Hellebore — username andemix
Resolved: Andemix (id: 1097241237087600691)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1490460174496960562 • archived
Name
** - Dr. Rebecca Hellebore
Age
** - 28
Pronouns
** - She/Her
Occupation
** - Procurement Officer for Biotechnica
Psychological Profile
** - Extroverted, yet has a methodical approach to life and circumstances. - Extremely devoted to her corporate associations. Will do anything so long as the ends justify the means. - Arrogant. Distrusting of other's work. Chooses to rely on her own solutions.
Physical Description
** - 5'10", green hair, green patterned skin
Chrome / Implants
** - **Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm):** Phantom Limbs* (2) - **Integumentary System:** Sub-dermal plating* (2)
Total Cyberware Points
** - 4
Skills / Talents / Abilities
** - Biological Engineering. - Basic medical knowledge. 🧱 **Equipment / Armor / Weapons**: - Ranged Taser - Gas mask - Miscellaneous research props (i.e. syringe, test tubes, scanner)
Backstory
** - With Biotechnica's new regional HQ in Night City, they have been bringing their best and brightest to further their scientific inquiries there, at least, thats what Dr. Hellebore was told. Dr. Hellebore was a prized employee at Biotechnica's HQ in Berlin. Graduating with a PhD in Biology from Heidelberg University, she quickly climbed the corporate ladder and became one of the leading faces of their research into biological engineering. However, this shining star was put under tight scrutiny by her superiors when it was discovered she and her team had caused the mysterious deaths of a community in the boonies. Dr. Hellebore was suddenly reassigned to Night City, stripping her access to Biotechnica's facilities in Berlin. While it may have been intended as a punishment, Night City may be the perfect opportunity to redeem herself, and more importantly, her work.
Known Affiliations
** - Biotechnica
RP Hooks
** - Dr. Hellbore may take some less than legal liberties if it means furthering her research.
Additional Notes
** - *Dr. Hellbore is technically fully organic, achieving similar results of cyberware using genetic augmentation instead. Mechanically, this will still work the same as it would in the cyberware system. - "Maintenance" of her augments may be done by herself or another Biotechnica specialist.
Reference Images

From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1490458140163051520 • archived
Name
** Lance "Iron" Kiro
Age
** 23
Pronouns
** He/him
Occupation
** Edgerunner/Former Nomad
Psychological Profile
** Lance is a bit of a shut-in before he gets to know you, but once he does, he tends to be a bit of a joker. He will casually tease and pull pranks on those he likes. And he is doggedly loyal, almost to a fault. He’s also sometimes too trusting for his own good.
Physical Description
** 6’4”, clad in armor most of the time. Stocky/lean-buff build. Generally the Gentle Giant sorta vibe.
Chrome / Implants
** * Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): (2) Gorilla Arms - Lift heavy shit. Overpower people. Physical domination. +50% strength/Always looks bulky or a bit too heavy. No fine tactile sense. Doesn't enhance Stamina * Auditory System: N/A * Circulatory & Immune Systems: N/A * Hands & Feet (2 slots): (1) Cyberfingers - Hidden tools in fingertips—USB, lockpick, small blade./Constant low-level clicking or twitching in fingers. * Integumentary System: N/A * Legs & Mobility (1 slot per leg): N/A * Neural: N/A * Ocular System: (2) SmartEyes - Zoom, thermal, night vision, facial ID, AR HUD./Eyes glow. You sometimes blink asynchronously. * Skeleton & Torso Musculature: N/A * Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): N/A * Miscellaneous: N/A
Total Cyberware Points
** 5/10
Skills / Talents / Abilities
** Mechanical prodigy due to his time in his Nomad Tribe, Takes apart and repairs cars, guns, you name it. Prefers ranged combat. Likes to get to know people, but is too trusting at times.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
** * Steel Armor Set - A full set of steel armor, providing decent protection against blades and projectiles. Good luck with stealth, because that shit is heavy. * XBR-72 - A 7.62x54 NATO Battle Rifle, built by Lance to be full-auto only. Hits hard, but the recoil and weight is… unwieldy sometimes. * JKE-X2 Kenshin - Arasaka Semi-auto Electromagnetic-Rail Pistol, chambered in 10mm. Stolen from some poor, dead Arasaka guy. * Sabre - Steel short-sword. That’s really it
Backstory
** * Born in Colorado with a Nomad Tribe known as the Paladins, Lance Kiro had a bit of an odd growing up. At the young age of 5, he was taking apart guns and cars to figure out how they work, and improving small things like fuel economy or better alignment. After he hit his teens, he was a full-blown workaholic, repairing cars, guns and anything else he could get his hands on. His obsession and hobby slowly, but surely became his job. However, one day his Tribe got a little too handsy with some Arasaka stuff, primarily some cyberware they stole off a convoy, and was attacked. Luckily, the Tribe barely survived by bartering with some Arasaka bigwig, but at 20 years old, Lance decided to go his own way, not feeling secure or safe with his own tribe anymore. His tribe was later wiped out due to Arasaka wanting payback. He eventually made his way to Night City, as he had heard of good opportunities there .. but was stopped and his car impounded due to “Suspicions”. Now, with no car and no way back home, he tried to start an auto shop, but it ultimately failed because of his reputation being non-existent. He now stays in NC as a Merc-for-hire. Though not very well known, he hopes to get his car back one day.
Known Affiliations
** * Paladins Tribe from Colorado (Past)
Reference Images
**

Synthia Bennett - itisluna

Parsed: Synthia Bennett — username itisluna
Resolved: It is Luna (id: 253825880831295488)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1490456198623789176 • archived
Name
Synthia Bennett
Age
27
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
Part time Meat Wagon Paramedic, odd jobs in between to make ends meet.
Psychological Profile
Synthia is usually easygoing and laid back, but quickly gets irritated and testy when provoked. She isn't afraid to stand for something when she wants to, but will back down when she knows she's been outmatched. She doesn't have much care for family and tries to avoid discussions involving it, as only fleeting and hurtful memories remain from abuse.
Physical Description
A toned, lean, and relatively short exotic with the chosen semblance of a wolf. Her chosen fur is white with grey accents along the shoulders and back, with the back of her ears blending into black. She grows her silver-sh white hair past her waist, and she sports body-modded eyes to have illuminated red sclera and silver colored irises.
Chrome / Implants
Hands & Feet (2 slots): Cybernetic claws (Her claws tap loudly) Ocular System: Retinal projector (Results in her red-illumated sclera, as is her desired effect)
Total Cyberware Points
2
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Trained in emergency medicine, semi-proficient with small arms, proficient in hand to hand combat, proficient in driving land vehicles
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Malorian Arms branded .357 revolver (Too large to be concealed overtly, has to be hidden under a jacket)
Backstory
(See below) Synthia was born from two veterans of the Fourth Corporate war. She was an accidental child, being raised in the capitol of the NUSA, Washington D.C. Her early life was well provided for, receiving a slightly above average education thanks to benefits provided from her parent's service in Militech. She was a troublemaker though, finding herself ending up being disciplined at school more often than not, and getting grades much below average, especially for the prestige of not attending a public school. She was a bully through and through, as a result of her troubled home life with her physically abusive father. She never told her mother about it, for fear of retaliation from her father. The benefits from her parents service only stipulated for grade school though, so after graduating highschool, the idea of furthering her education was almost assuredly never going to happen. Her mother, who was working for Trauma Team at the time, was able to pull some strings and get her into a class for paramedicine. Synthia initially didn't want to do it and had no interest in medicine, but finding her best friend overdosed in the bathroom of a club they were both attending changed that. She could have saved her, if she had the knowledge to do so. Her time at class wasn't easy, pock marked by the conflicting feelings of her father being killed in the crossfire of a police shooting on his way to work. On one hand, her abuser was gone, but on the other, it pained her to see how it affected her mother. She finished her class and was fully certified as a paramedic, shortly before her mother met a grizzly end as well in a cyberpsycho attack.
Known Affiliations
Snake Nation nomads
Reference Images
(See attached)

Abel "Deimos" Montez - deathgripsfanx3

Parsed: Abel "Deimos" Montez — username deathgripsfanx3
Resolved: gay420gay (id: 290615050060693504)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1490453525254246634 • archived
Name
Abel "Deimos" Montez
Age
23
Pronouns
They/them, She/Her
Occupation
Ripperdoc
Psychological Profile
They're quite timid, as growing up within Santo Domingo didn't treat them the best. The dangerous streets of Night City have molded them into a very paranoid person. An unfortunate run in with some Tyger Claws only strengthening their distrust in people.
Physical Description
5'8 They usually sport an old tech coat along with some combat boots and cargo pants. Wearing some sort of random band T-shirt to work, with a tube top underneath when it's time to Rip. Their face is a bit cut up from some sort of event they like keeping to themselves. Their hair shaggy, and layered quite unevenly, put into an unkempt pony tail. Brown Eyes, with some pretty heavy bags underneath. They talk quite low, a bit of rasp in their speech
Chrome / Implants
Cyberarm (Dexterous) - Precision tool use. RP lockpicking, surgery, mechanical hacking. Weak to EMPs. Shakes when under pressure. Doesn't enhance Stamina ICE Layer - Detects incoming hacks instantly—early warning. Emits weird static. Netrunner Suite (Level 2) - Quickhacks, control systems. Twitchy eyes, nosebleeds. You flinch at screen flickers. Recoil Dampeners - (Arms) Absorbs recoil for stable firing. Absolute stability for small arms, less as the caliber increases. Joints audibly click after sustained use.
Total Cyberware Points
7/10
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Deimos is a Ripperdoc by trade, ambigously certified. They aren't exactly a licensed physician Though their day job doesn't exactly keep all the lights on. They've studied different subroutines and have a decent cyberdeck implanted to defend themselves against malicious Netrunners, and strike back with some nasty Daemons. Employed only by close associates for some basic Netrunner jobs. They're somewhat of a sharpshooter, having handled a gun before, yet not as proficent as your average solo.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
They're armed with Militech's latest M-10AF Lexington. Chambered in 9mm rounds.
Backstory
Abel "Deimos" Montez was born in 2056, in Santo Domingo, while Night City had just been getting it's bearings again after the time of Red. They lived a pretty hectic life, a bit of household drama, and the streets being even more hectic, they naturally became a street punk. Their early life doing a bit of dirty work, peddling whatever they could for the Valentino's, and shaking down whoever the Cartel pointed a finger at. Though this didn't come without some consequence, after a little run in with the Tyger Claws had definitely put quite the stop in their edge running days. On the brink of death, a ripperdoc came to their aid, and helped get a young Deimos back on their feet. Inspired by this act of kindness, he became an apprentice to the good doctor, studying under him, and learning the trade, a new view into Night City's lucrative cyberware industry, and the underbelly that comes with it. They left Night City for a short while, to study in Chicago, getting a few certifications as a somewhat fully legal Ripperdoc, returning in 2079 to finally plant their roots, and make a decent living for themselves. Their only goal now is to stay alive, and make a name for themselves as most people do in this shit hole.
Known Affiliations
Valentino's
Reference Images
WIP (Trying to make/find a good AVI)
RP Hooks
Deimos is a timid character that tends to open up about their life once acquainted with. Avoidant at first, but a loyal choom willing to put their foot on the chooh if need be. Their background adds a bit of an edge to them, a humble Ripperdoc at first, yet a vicious solo when need be, with skill to boot. Their skill set is versatile, with an affinity for firearms, and a bit of Netrunner know how, on top of being pretty knowledgeable on all Ripperdoc needs.

Resolved: luna_paradox (id: 295447452658565130)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1490454761231745204 • archived
Name
kamiya
Age
56
Pronouns
she/her
Occupation
drifter
Psychological Profile
a kind woman often lends a hand to those in need. though seems to have some trauma that she is solving herself
Physical Description
milf
Chrome / Implants
Arms & Arm Attachments:GorillaArms 2 Lift heavy shit. Overpower people. Physical domination. +50% strength Auditory System: Circulatory & Immune Systems: Hands & Feet: Integumentary System:Dermal Plating 3 Resistant to blades, blunt trauma, Rifle Caliber (7.62 and below) Legs & Mobility: Neural: Ocular System: Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Miscellaneous: ICE Layer 1
Total Cyberware Points
6
Skills / Talents / Abilities
[skills]: she seems to have some tactical knowledge and experience She is also a tinkerer...but her knowledge is outdated. [talents]: generally skilled in a few different things as she had many different jobs (she is favors being a cook though) [abilities]: is patient.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
old cyberdeck. (A hand held cyberdeck made for netrunners of the olden days) Armor:old mercenary gear (a biker helmet filled with older technology that was taken from different jobs and a normal leather jacket with a slider to put a cyberdeck in on the wrist. Weapons: a stun baton and a pistol. (Lexington)
Backstory
In the year 2040 there were many kinds of mercenaries, the brutes the techies the Solo's... And the quiet ones. She was one of those. Those that focus on their own security above anything else. No one knew her face nor her voice... Not even the fixers that hired her and oftentimes they didn't want to know. Her alias is Nimue named after the clear water she ordered from the afterlife. she was decent at her job, and did things without question, her biggest claim to fame was taking care of a target known as Kaelen Vane A Junior Data Auditor of the arasaka logistics division. It was originally meant to be an extraction job however she took things into her own hands once when she attempted to handle the target alone and her helmet was forcibly removed. The target was eliminated And the data was extracted. But that wasn't what people clung too. People wanted recordings of the incident because they wanted to know who was behind the mask. Unfortunately for them she personally wiped the recording of the incident and the fixer working with her made sure that no external recordings could resurface. It took a while for her to be hired for another job after that... But not too long. Her last recorded and most popular job was from a mysterious client who sought her out personally, they wanted a woman kidnapped but not just any woman... Julianna Sterling. Known more commonly by her alias. The jewel, She used to be the head of public relations for microtech. The reason? Well rumors say that microtech was developing a new ICE-breaker software that could even bypass Arasaka's legendary black ICE. And to prevent digital theft the last lines of the source code weren't encoded on a server, but instead onto Julianna's biomonitoring system, She was a human encryption key. No one knows what happened during that job. But Nimue vanished afterwards, and no one had seen her ever since. If she were to appear now...I don't know if anyone would even remember her.
Known Affiliations
none Appearance

Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
NCRP CHARACTER SHEET: AKANE KURODA
Name
Akane Kuroda Alias: "The Vulture"
Age
25
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
Bio-Technical Salvage Specialist (Arasaka "Black-Site" Contractor) Affiliation: Arasaka (Status: Officially Deceased / Off-the-Books Asset) I. PSYCHOLOGICAL PROFILE Personality: Clinical, detached, and unsettlingly calm. Akane views life as a series of biological equations. She doesn't "hate" people; she simply categorizes them as "Assets" or "Expendables." Trauma: Total desensitization. The "Sacrifice Play" five years ago didn't break her—it convinced her that human life is fragile and replaceable, while technology is eternal. Behavioral Quirks: Often speaks to her suit's AI as if it’s a person. When stressed, she methodically cleans her Scalpel Vibro-blade even if it’s already spotless. Emotional Tone: Flat and professional. She rarely raises her voice, even when performing "Aggressive Stabilization" on a screaming teammate. II. PHYSICAL DESCRIPTION Height: 6' 1" | Build: Slim, athletic, and precise. Exotic Features: High-end biosculpting including functional cat ears, a sleek cat tail, and ivory-colored devil horns. General Appearance: Long, flowing purple hair that matches her deep violet eyes. Outside of the suit, she favors "waifu-inspired" tech-wear with a dominant purple and charcoal color palette. Distinguishing Marks: Intricate, glowing violet tattoos that serve as sub-dermal sensors to compensate for her lack of traditional cyberware. III. CHROME / IMPLANTS
Total Cyberware Points
8 Status: She relies entirely on external hardware and the Aegis-7 interface. IV. SKILLS / TALENTS / ABILITIES Stealth & Infiltration: Expert at moving through high-security environments undetected. "Hot Zone" Deployment: Specialized training for survival and navigation in CBRN (Chemical, Biological, Radiological, Nuclear) environments. Combat Triage: Surgical-grade medical assistance performed under fire. Tech-Smithing: Proficient in maintaining complex machinery and specialized firearms (SDI-style training).

From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1479854825343811759 • archived
Name
James Russell
Age
24
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Merc/Bounty Hunter/ Contractor
Psychological Profile
Mentally Stable but at times lost of Empathy for certain types of people
Physical Description
5'10 in height with a kind of macular athletic build. Has physically altered himself to look like a coyote Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear): Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: Auditory System: Circulatory & Immune Systems: Chemical Analyzer Hands & Feet: Subdermal Grip Integumentary System: Dermal Plating Legs & Mobility: Neural: Ocular System: Skeleton & Torso Musculature: NeoFiber (legs and Arms) Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Recoil Dampeners Miscellaneous: Scent Scanner
Total Cyberware Points
10
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Gunslinger, tracker, and marksman
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Power Pistol Tech Rifle with changeable parts (K-techs rifle also has a under barrel flame thrower as well. Let me know if needs change) Protective suit that covers most of the body to protect against rifle threats but does have gaps. (ill explain further in detail if needed) Helmet with built in night vison and thermals (adding this separately just in case it needs changing but planned to use only the approved hud system yall have) Combat casualty medical items: one like bio foam from halo to act like a spray in sealant and quick colt, bandages, and other basic ifak items
Backstory
James grew up in central Idaho with his family in the city of Berchtesgaden. His early life was spent being trained and taught the ways of the group of Neo-Nazis that ran the James grew up in central Idaho, in the city of Berchtesgaden, with his family. His early life was spent being trained by a group of Neo-Nazis that controlled the town, with the aim of turning everyone into a weapon for a paramilitary force. As time passed, he began to learn about the outside world and found faith in God. This revelation allowed him to recognize the horrific activities he had been part of and witnessed. Consequently, around age 17, James ran away, initially heading deeper into southern Idaho. Using the survival skills he had been taught, he eventually became a bounty hunter in the Western Corporate States. Over the years, he took various jobs for individuals and the two corporations that dominate the three states, Biotechnica and Meta Corp. Most of his assignments were straightforward: locating missing assets or providing security for towns and job sites. However, after spending years gathering his equipment, gear, and weapons, James decided to begin a personal crusade. His goal was to take on as many jobs as possible to hunt down anyone from Berchtesgaden or Nazis in general, either turning them in or killing them if they appeared within the Western Corporate States. Eventually, the Neo-Nazis discovered that he was a defector and began hunting him down, which led him to put a target on his own back.

Zuki - shyzuki

Parsed: Zuki — username shyzuki
Resolved: Shyzuki (id: 352598809357975572)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1452247980735201321 • archived
Name
Zuki
Age
26
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
(Not to sure what to put here atm)
Psychological Profile
Confident, Sassy, Impulsive, Focused
Physical Description
Exotic 🔧Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear): 🦾 Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: Auditory System: Enhanced Ears (2) Circulatory & Immune Systems: Hands & Feet: Integumentary System: Legs & Mobility: Neural: Netrunner Suite (1) Ocular System: SmartEyes (2) Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Miscellaneous: GhostTags (1)
Total Cyberware Points
(6)
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Tech, Netrunner
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Senkoh LX/Cyberdeck
Backstory
Zuki grew up in westbrook, as a only child. Her father worked as a ripperdoc for many years and specialized in exotic modifications. Zuki's mother worked as a netrunner doing odd jobs for fixers. Growing up zuki wanted to be a exotic like her parents, Her father made her wait until she was 18 and when that day came did the surgery for her. She was always fascinated with netrunning, And with her mothers help got cyberware to help her progress her abilitys aswell as teaching her important information on the risks she would be undertaking as a runner. Zuki and her mother worked on runner gigs together for a few years before she became more independent and found gigs of her own. Later on she had a gig that needed her to steal a car, that car being a Mizutani Shion MZ2 she of course took the gig thinking it would be pretty easy. While attempting to steal the car she didnt know it had a secondary alarm system, As she drove to the drop off she was tracked by the NCPD and ended up in a police chase. It took her a bit to shake the police, She checked the car and found the second alarm then disabled it and brought the car to the drop off. Talking to the guy at the drop off she told them what happend and said it was a adrenaline rush that she enjoyed. The man told her about the NC street racing scene and gave her locations and information on how to join. She boosted a few cars with her abilitys as a runner and used the stolen cars in races for a couple years, saved up some money and got herself her own car a Mizutani Shion MZT a similar model the the one she stole years back but she doesnt race this car its more of a memory of the past. Now she just wonders the streets of NC just doing odd jobs as a runner.
Known Affiliations
No current affiliations
Reference Images
(can grab some once on vrc)
RP Hooks
(Thrill seeker) Street Racing, High risk hacking jobs.
Additional Notes
