Eliza Stern - thekillingchick

Parsed: Eliza Stern — username thekillingchick
Resolved: TheKillingChick (id: 163460107592663040)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1487896744510357608 • archived
Name
Eliza Stern
Age
33
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
Ripper Doc (Chiropractor/Physiotherapist)
Psychological Profile
Calm, collected and caring, Strong Motherly Instinct an WILL play on words to make question whether she talks about her medical work or about sex…. Mostly to deflect any personal questions and does not like to talk about her past.
Physical Description
Tall with short hair, very pronounced feminine figure and curves. She most likely wears simple contouring clothes that she can easily remove for medical treatments
Chrome / Implants
-Smart Eyes: X-Ray Visions, Thermal Vision and medical scans to detect wounds and bone displacements -Cyberarms (Dextrous): Medical oriented for pressure point and bone setting -Micro-Vibration generator: Used to Replace muscles, nerves and bones back in place. -Thermal Control Skin: Used to warm her arms for treatments and keep any part of her sterilized -Neofiber: Enhanced Legs and Arms Muscles to help her stay standing longer and use more force to re-place bones and muscles
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Even though she has the medical knowledge as a RipperDoc, Eliza focuses on the internal functions of Skeletons, Muscles and Nerves of a body. She knows where to push when and how to replace nerves and bones that are displaced in a body to alleviate pain and reestablish lost functions. This knowledge allows her to do the other way around too, she can inflict great pain and make temporary loss of functions by displacing nerves , bones and pulling muscles , she will mostly use these technique in self defense She surprisingly knows how to dance. Like… lap dance style, though she does not venture into that part of her past. And she has a calm and demanding tone that makes most people inclined to listen to her Good cook and baker, for personal pleasure other and having an odd enjoyment out of causing pain and restricting others.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Portable Medical equipment for emergency procedures Cyber Katana for self defense Data pad to record medical history of her patients
Backstory
Eliza is French Canadian by birth, coming from a community where Cyber Augmentations were rare and expensive causing a rift and segregations between fully organic people and Chrome augmented people. She decided to become a medical professional in Chiropractic and Physiotherapy to allow her peers to heal and reestablish lost functions without needing cybernetic or biomechanic augments. Her desire to become the most efficient at her profession, she used her income to augment herself and further her skills into the title of RipperDoc. This goal became a double-edged blade in her past, as the people she augmented herself to help now saw her as someone who turned their back on ‘’Normal people’’ even though her moto was ‘’I augmented Myself so you don’t have to’’ , her friends and family did not see it that way, they saw her as someone flaunting her skills and wealth through augments to show herself to be ‘’better than them’’ . Seeing this bigot-based ostracization, Eliza took her skills, augments and left without looking back. During her travels she eventually became an on call/ Non-Affiliated contractor as Ripper Doc for a Canadian Military base where she befriended a clumsy, yet promising soldier named Julian. She kept the poor boob alive and in one piece in between his missions to fund her own maintenance. ((Me and Classic have been IRL friends for about 9 years, it’s affectionate trolling at this point)). After his departure, she remained an independent RipperDoc for this military base until the conflicts became too close for the liking , she took her stuff and became a traveling ripper doc for a couples of years… Until she sneaked and smuggled her way to Night City… and suddenly a Ping popped in her pad… ‘’Julian is in phoning range’’

Aurora Marie Calloway - sailor_bun

Parsed: Aurora Marie Calloway — username sailor_bun
Resolved: 卂尺丂ㄖ几 (id: 658448164306812988)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1487895613583654942 • archived
Name
Aurora Marie Calloway Birth Name: Victoria Marie Whitmore Work Names: Mama Bear / Big Mama Past Work Names: Fenrir's Ghost / The Veiled Hound Online Handle: @SleepyMama
Age
48
Pronouns
She/They Occupation in Night City: Secretary at Yaskawa
Psychological Profile
Personality, trauma, behavior quirks, emotional tone. Psychological Profile Aurora is a woman built on control, observation, and restraint but beneath that is someone who feels everything very deeply and has simply learned to hide it well. She was shaped to be perfect in systems, and when she broke away, she didn’t lose that structure, she internalized it. Even now, she runs her life like a quiet algorithm: measured, efficient, always three steps ahead. Core Personality Warm but guarded: She feels approachable, nurturing even, but there’s always a layer you can’t quite reach. Hyper-perceptive: Constantly reading tone, posture, implication. She notices what people don’t say. Slow-paced by design: Her calm, almost lazy cadence is intentional. It disarms people and buys her time to think. Quietly dominant: Not loud or forceful, but she naturally takes control of conversations and situations without people realizing. Emotional Tone Soft-spoken, steady, grounding presence Carries a constant low-level tension beneath her calm Rarely shows anger, when she does, it’s cold. Her affection is subtle: protective gestures, remembering small details, positioning herself between danger and others. Internal Conflict Mother vs Operator: She wants stability for her children but knows she is fundamentally built for a dangerous world Control vs Freedom: She escaped corporate control, but now controls herself even more strictly Attachment vs Detachment: She loves deeply, but keeps emotional distance to avoid loss or leverage Trauma & Scars Corporate Conditioning: Struggles to fully relax; always feels like she’s being watched, evaluated, or used Moral Fracture Point: The moment she discovered corporate disposability still defines her worldview

From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1487530084171649195 • archived
! Only 0 labeled section(s) parsed
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
[Name] Maximilian Avero [Age] 32 [Pronouns] He/Him [Occupation] Hitman/Recon [Personality] While usually initially reserved, the introversion and perceived "Edgy Loner" vibe goes away when presented with a decent social engagement and is surprisingly friendly [Physical Description] An exotic made into a cross between a jackal and wolf with coat of various greys and distinct crimson markings. Typically wears a red longcoat [Chrome List] (9 Points) -Smart Eyes -Drone port -Scent Scanner -Optical Camo -Enhanced Ears [Skills] -Tracking -Marksmanship -Booby trap crafting [Loadout] -.338 hybrid Rifle -Shortsword -Suppressed Magnum -Ballistic Vest+Upper arm plates+Helmet -placeable camera -Small IED charges (2 per mission) [Basic Lore] Originally from Italy and growing up there, he'd be in the military for a few years once he turned 18 until moving onto contract work in a small and specialized PMC called Falchi Crimesi, focused on intel gathering and precision removal of targets, weather it be dropping specific people, assisting others involved in direct fights or planting explosives in a critical spot. Max would be often sent into Russia as the PMCs owner had a lot of contacts there until the company got bought out, so he formally quit as he wasn't keen on being fully under a bigger corp if it wasn't a freelance contract. He'd use his savings to live in the pacific north west for a while and even undergo his exotic operations. Eventually when the savings started getting low, he suited back up and made his way to night city as the demand for his skillset and rifle would be high there.

! Username "disgruntle" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
Quinton “Quaggan” Wells
Age
34
Pronouns
He / Him
Occupation
Quaggan is a Militech Street Vendor, a boots-on-the-ground field sales representative responsible for directly marketing and selling Militech weaponry. Think less “corporate office” and more “corporate enforcer with a pitch.”
Psychological Profile
On paper, Quaggan is a corporate success—a walking advertisement for Militech. In reality, the exotic conversion left his brain slowed and emotionally distorted. He’s easy to manage, difficult to predict, and constantly stuck in “sales mode.” Danger is just another opportunity to demonstrate a product. Personality: Friendly and approachable, with a deeply unsettling undertone. He struggles with complex decisions but excels at persuasion, networking, and passive intimidation. Behavior Quirks: Refers to himself in third person (“Quaggan recommends…”) Smiles during violent encounters Treats combat like a feature demonstration Trauma & Conditioning: Identity overwritten for corporate branding Cognitive degradation from neural adaptations Emotional conditioning tied to performance Emotional Tone: Artificial warmth layered over something fractured.
Physical Description
Standing at 6’1”, Quaggan is heavy, reinforced, and semi-bulky, a walking mascot engineered for comfort and consumer appeal—but placed in extremely dangerous situations. He has a whale-like, rounded head with a wide jaw and visible teeth, a smooth rubbery skin texture, and a stylized swirl on his forehead—a remnant of corporate branding. Thick limbs and a broad torso make him imposing yet oddly approachable. Chrome & Implants: Gorilla Arms Dense Marrow Targeting Optics Cyberlungs Modded Mandibles Skills & Abilities: Quaggan blends combat and corporate utility: Militech firearms training Assault rifle and sidearm proficiency Close-quarters combat (especially with Gorilla Arms) Persuasion, product pitching, and street-level networking Passive intimidation
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Militech M251s Ajax – Standard assault rifle, stable and reliable, synced with targeting optics. Militech M-10AF Lexington – Lightweight sidearm, ideal for “closer” sales interactions. Armor: Reinforced Militech tactical jacket provides medium protection while signaling corporate ownership.
Backstory
Quinton Wells was once a capable Militech militant: reliable, disciplined, and unremarkable. Everything changed when Militech selected him for a live marketing initiative, transforming operatives into exotic, consumer-friendly brand ambassadors to appeal to younger buyers. The physical transformation succeeded—Quinton became Quaggan. The neural adaptation did not. Cognitively dulled yet behaviorally compliant, he now walks the streets of Night City as a field-deployed sales unit, demonstrating and selling Militech weaponry directly to the public. He is not retired. He is not free. He is still on the clock.

Name
Flavia Daleno
Age
26
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
Netrunner/Edgerunner
Psychological Profile
Hardened Sweetheart, though suffers emotionally when witnessing harm dealt to ‘closer friends’. In stressful situations, she will resort to clear and concise, reasonable methods, if that fails, she'll fall into old habits via bullet between eyes. She frequently will squeak when interacted with physically or when communicating to people passively, reserved in her tone but will apply ample inflection when necessary. Her weaknesses are few, though she has an aversion to any mentions of The Metal War; disassociation, zones out. She's self-conscious of her tattoos, tries her best to hide them. Hard to warm up with if you're a Greenhorn.
Physical Description
6’3, Toned, Well-Endowed, her tattoos and eyes define her from a crowd, She is a Red Panda, relaxed & ‘motherly’.
Chrome / Implants
Monowire | A Hyper-thin retractable filament—stronger than steel, sharper than a scalpel. SilentStep Soles | Shock-dampening foot mod. Complete silence when walking. | You can’t run loud even if you wanted to. No warning stomps. Biomonitor | Tracks all vital signs. Can auto-alert partners when you’re in danger. | Can trigger false alarms. You get “pinged” constantly when anxious. Combat Wired Reflexes | Always-on reflex boost for high performance combat. It’s very hard to sneak up on you, you are fast and react almost instantly. | Always alert. Hard to relax or stay calm. Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): Monowire Auditory System: Circulatory & Immune Systems: Hands & Feet (2 slots): SilentStep Soles Integumentary System: Legs & Mobility (1 slot per leg): Neural: Ocular System: Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Combat Wired Reflexes Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Miscellaneous: Biomonitor

Harlequin - pupsiren

Parsed: Harlequin — username pupsiren
Resolved: Siren (id: 383401310994694146)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1485362005685829763 • archived
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
📝 NCRP CHARACTER SHEET TEMPLATE
Name
Harlequin
Age
28
Pronouns
Any/All
Occupation
Future business owner, he hopes one day to own a bar or club but for now, anything works. He just needs to work and wait.
Psychological Profile
Chaotic neutral, he’s a paranoid person but fighting to keep his cool and trust. No one is inherently evil, at least, not by his choice. They are, but, he chooses not to believe it. Most of the time. Often… right? He keeps his cool, plays the neutral field where he can, but will protect the space he can establish for all within his owned space. Doesnt matter who you are, you’re welcome until you aren’t. Guarded about his personal life and history, mostly because he doesn’t trust easily. His business is his business and you’re not a part of it for a long time. Though he does have a tendency to jump at small sounds, whip around suddenly at nothing, and spook at the wrong thing. The moment its actually there though, he’s locked in and ready.
Physical Description
He’s about 5’9”-5’10” ish, toned build, broad shoulders and generally average looking body. He’s covered in tattoos from head to toe, red and blue against his dark fur. He’s a biomodded human made to look like an anthropomorphic cat, some minor aesthetic additions from this include a tail, ears, etc. (Im a furry okay) Two pairs of horns protrude from his head and he’s got an aetheric glow from them and his hair. He appears a mix of sabretooth, lion, and nondescript feline.
Chrome / Implants
Name the mods, what they do, and note any tradeoffs. Note: Custom chrome and implants must be approved befor use Slots, 1 Cyberware Implant per slot EXCEPT Miscellaneous which is unlimited: Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): None Auditory System: Enhanced Ears (2 Points) Circulatory & Immune Systems: None Hands & Feet (2 slots): Cybernetic Claws (1 Point) Integumentary System: None Legs & Mobility (1 slot per leg): None Neural: None Ocular System: SmartEyes (2 Points) Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Combat Wired Reflexes (4 Points) Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): None Miscellaneous: Glowing tattoos and horns
Total Cyberware Points
9 Total Points
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Former military/mercenary for a large corp, he has combat training and augments designed specifically for infiltration and single target close-range combat. Melee weapons are his forte, knives, blades, staves, etc. His passion now is music, spinning songs together fluidly to create music to set the mood, crank the speakers, or make ears bleed, he's sure to get bodies moving somehow.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
He has a variety of melee weapons kept around him, though, he really doesn’t travel with any. Primarily he relies on claws or hand to hand combat even up against other melee weapons. Simple combat knives are his preferred, though, he’s been known to stash an old single-edged steel katana-esqe sword nearby.

Backstory
[ Gina is a relatively new Solo hoping to find her fortune on the streets of Night City. She was born in NC, but due to her family's debts, she was forced to leave the city at a young age. Now she is back, ready to live out the dream of becoming an NC legend. To make a living, she is trying to take on daring merc gigs and commit petty crimes, all the while capturing her best moments on her braindance chip. Her goal is to go viral in the braindance space and win over the hearts of fans with her bubble-gum-pink charm and eccentric flair. ]
Known Affiliations
None
Reference Images
[ Picture of avatar attached below ]
RP Hooks
[ Gina would do almost anything to go viral, sometimes to her own detriment. She is constantly trying to seek out notable street figures in NC to feature on her BDs for the added clout. She is also willing to take on gigs from fixers at a lower cut/price if they let her BD capture her experience. She has a particular distaste for netrunners after one leaked some of her BDs on the net, so she will always take on hits on netrunners if requested, out of principle.

Name
Michelle Bloodson
Age
30
Pronouns
She/her
Occupation
Ripperdoc is her main job, Netrunner is her side job to go on gigs 🧠 Psychological Profile Data : Michelle is a kind person but become a bit wierd/crazy when she smells blood but this never stoped her from doing her job. It only makes her work more enjoyable in her book.
Physical Description
🔧Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear):
Chrome / Implants
Netrunner Suite (Level 3) 5 Neural Full cyberwarfare, backdoor exploitation. Your body stutters. You speak to invisible things. You are a priority target for Corps. Cyberfingers 1 Hands & Feet Hidden tools in fingertips—USB, lockpick, small blade. Constant low-level clicking or twitching in fingers. Vampyres 2 Miscellaneous Teeth that can inject people with various things that fits in a vial. Sharp Teeth, watch your tongue, it will hurt. Enhanced Tastebuds 1 Miscellaneous Taste chemical compositions—higher chance to detect poisons, substances. Intense dislike of strongly flavored foods; easily overwhelmed. Scent Scanner 1 Miscellaneous Track people or chemicals by smell. Smell blood, oil, etc. Overwhelmed in clubs, alleys, combat. Sometimes gags from sensory overload.
Total Cyberware Points
10
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Average Ripperdoc, Passable Netrunner (tier 2)
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Militech Ajax, Militech Lexinton 📜
Backstory
Michelle served in Militech for most of her adulthood seeking good money but never understood what it truly was to work under them until it was too late. She learned to be a Ripperdoc for them and was sent on mission often as a field medic. During one such mission she encountered an operative named Julian and bounded with him during the short time she had with him. During the mission Julian got badly injured and had to replace one of his organs by a medical grade one. When the mission was done she was relived that he did not die for the corporation. Years later she learned that Julian had manage to leave Militech. This embolden her spirit and he quest of freedom from this corporate hell. Soon after she resigned, most of her belonging taken away from her. Her bank account frozen but she did not really care, she was already owning the bare necessities to live, her cyberware that she spent money on to make sure she was the one owning it and her weapons and so she went to night city in hope that opportunity's would open itself to her not really knowing what kind of city it was.
Known Affiliations
Julian, Ex-Militech
Reference Images
RP Hooks

Aether Van Buren - ghosted_stoner.

Parsed: Aether Van Buren — username ghosted_stoner.
Resolved: Ghost (id: 589945853364666379)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1485025951464292462 • archived
Name
Aether Van Buren
Age
23
Pronouns
She/her
Occupation
Psychological Profile
Meek, scared of her own shadow. Struggles speaking, and has some speech impediments, has a very very strong sense of self preservation.
Physical Description
A blind unicorn half exotic, a 4’9 midget. Cyberware: 6 points Hands & Feet: Silentstep soles (2 points) Neural: “Unilocation Antenna; an extremely sensitive mental antenna connected into the frontal lobe and the occipital lobe, allowing the brain to process and react to what the device senses. The cyberware is not to be touched, having complete feeling in it, and can cause extreme pain. The cyberware has a high detection mode that lets minuscule to micro-level movements be picked up, but this causes headaches and can cause injuries if it is overwhelmed in this mode. It is sharp enough to be used as a weapon, but should not be and will most likely cause the user injury as well.” (3 points) Miscellaneous: Biomonitor
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Equipment / Weapons:
Backstory
Being born and raised in Charter Hill was a life of pure luxury for most, especially if you were referred to as a “1%er”. But for Aether? It was a prison. She had been born blind, but instead of fixing that for her? Her father decided it’d be best if she was blind, less problematic. Her mother had died giving birth to her, leaving her with a CEO father who didn’t have time to raise a daughter. He had wanted a son anyway. Her Nanny was pretty much all she had, and all her braille books. She loved reading, it was her own world, just like music was. No one really spoke to her, not in school and barely at home. She was just a little thing that no one paid any mind to, either that or she was treated like a porcelain doll. That made escaping easier. Her father would have bodyguards often watching over her, tyger claws who really didn’t watch her like they were supposed to, but all it took was for her to stay quiet enough that they didn’t notice she had slipped away. Being extremely curious, the eleven year old managed to crawl her way outside of Charter Hill. Once out, she got up, blindly crossed the road and slipped into the huge ditch or area due to it being wet. She remembered hitting her head and laying there for a few minutes before she had started crying. She heard the hurrying steps and for a second worried she had been caught before a boy's voice called to her. “Hey! Are you blind or somethin’! The wash-” “Yes.” She responded sadly and he was quiet. “Oh.” Then more awkward silence before she felt him picking her up, and started to carry her. She could feel raindrops, for the first time. He was saying something, but she wasn’t paying attention until she heard the word “Pretty”. She didn’t know if he had been directing that at her, but he continued talking, “Your eyes.” She felt herself smile uncontrollably, almost at a loss for words. “No one’s ever complimented my eyes before. I always thought they must’ve been..ugly.” She could feel him huff at that and started walking faster. After a few minutes, she could feel the rain really starting now, soaking her back. He had set her down at a point, putting what she could guess was his jacket around her and started carrying her in the front and started hurrying. She heard him open a door, and clumsily explain how he found her to someone in the room, and she stayed quiet. She got a shower,

she likes getting info, she hates corpos with trauma as a kid her sister was taken by Arasaka. has a temper problem.

red hair, cybernetic arms and legs, 6 cybernetic eyes, flying maelstrom colors and logo. Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear): DR5 pistol, pump shotgun, short sword, bat. Skills / Talents / Abilities
good at netrunning good with getting up close for the kills
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Backstory
** When Viper was a kid, she had a sister. When she was in her teens, her sister was taken by Arasaka. Viper thought it meant her sister had been taken against her will, but it was actually her sister’s own choice. She just wanted to leave her old life behind, leaving Viper as well. Viper became a solo netrunner who would do jobs for anyone, no questions asked. She was at the bottom of life and just needed eddies. A few years back, Maelstrom approached her looking for new netrunners. Viper said, “I’ll do jobs for eddies, but that’s it. I’m just trying to make some eddies.” During a job breaking into a corpo’s house, an explosion went off and she was hit by it. The other Maelstrom members on the team dragged her back to one of their hideouts. Knowing they could use this to keep her with them and continue using her, they got her back on her feet in exchange for a deal: she would join Maelstrom and work only for them as a netrunner. They told her, “Here’s how it will work. We want people like you. We can fix you up and you will live, but you’ll work for us.” She took the deal and started working for them. Now, though, she’s looking for an out. She was never fully on the same page as them, but she plays the part, feeling like she still needs to pay them back.

Backstory
Rachel was a promising, if incredibly sullen, undergraduate working in Biotechnica. They put her in an agricultural research lab, expecting her to optimize synthetic fertilizer for their greenhouse farms. Instead, Rachel got incredibly bored. She started using corporate resources and lab equipment to synthesize designer combat stims and HEAVY party drugs on the side. When a middle-manager caught on and tried to blackmail her for a cut. She laced his morning synth-caf with a prototype paralytic, wiped her records clean, stole a portable chemical fabricator, and walked out. She set up shop in the back of a failing adult boutique, the previous owner "mysteriously" stopped breathing. she since moved places around before finding this niche little place with Guinea pigs, lab rats, sex addicts and more, her little oasis
Known Affiliations
Old ties to biotechnica and malstrom
Reference Images
Art, screenshots, etc.,
RP Hooks
Optional -- shes a drug dealer, a lab girl, and a sex toy seller and a lesbian goth punk. theres ALOT that can go with that

Resolved: chyver (id: 156880917351104513)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1482821179663188119 • archived
Name
Orso Vex
Age
25
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Valentino Enforcer
Psychological Profile
Hot blooded young gangster from Vista Del Rey, fancies himself a soldier whose fiercely loyal to the Valentino cause. He’s extremely ambitious and wants the Valentinos to abandon some of their old ways to push out into more of the city.
Physical Description
Wolf exotic; Tall, muscular build; Covered in scars from poorly installed implants
Chrome / Implants
Dermal Plating: 3 Mantis Blade (left arm only): 2 Ballistics Co-Processor* (Smart Link): 1 Smart Eyes: 2 Reactive Muscle Fibers: 1
Total Cyberware Points
9
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Street-war fighting experience from years of fighting Sixth Street Boxing and wrestling from years of bar-fights and scraps
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Tsunami brand Power Pistol Tsunami brand Power Assault rifle (Heavily modified BR-404 with no grenade launcher attachment)
Backstory
Heywood born and raised, Orso never had ambitions to be anything other than a Valentino, seeing them as the protectors of his family and neighborhood from sixth street and the NCPD. Eight years ago, Orso joined the gang under the recruitment of a Valentino boss named Emilio, a young and particularly blood-thirsty lieutenant who rose to power during the war with Sixth Street. He slowly earned enough money to get his exotic surgery and his first cyberware upgrades, and continued to earn favor with Emilio by fighting bravely against sixth street, earning him more cyberware upgrades and eventually becoming one of his top enforcers.
Known Affiliations
Emilio’s faction of the Valentinos: A more expansionist wing of the Valentinos interested in expanding into Santo Domingo, comprised of only young recruits that know nothing but war.
Reference Images
RP Hooks
Civil Conflict: Orso represents a faction of the Valentinos that is opposed to Toro’s crew and the other Valentino PCs. Although they aren’t outright hostile, there’s also no love lost between them, and Emilio and Orso have already gotten into heated disagreements about Emilio’s expansionist ambitions.
Additional Notes

Skills / Talents / Abilities
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
📜
Backstory
Jeanne Worked her soul and bones to the service of night city, seeing countless atrocity, her childhood friend die to the violent street of night city, the corruption of the system, the corporation getting in the way of investigations and much more but she kept going believing that the little difference she could do was more then enough. That was until while on the job she had to stop mercenaries from getting there and on confidential tech of night corp. In the chaos of that event she ended up shooting her younger brother that was a mercenary and ended up having to end his life by accident without realising it was him at first. This event caused Jeanne to lose motivation, started to drink, her face became more cold and looks tired. None the less to be sure she was going to remember him she chose to have Implants that remind her of him. Now her goal is to find who is responsible for her brothers death without getting herself killed and avoiding to paint a target on her back. She does not want to make the same mistake her brother had done after all.
Known Affiliations
NCPD
Reference Images
RP Hooks
What may draw the others to interact with her would be to have a good and Reliable contact with the NCPD
Additional Notes

Psychological Profile
Physical Description
she is a FBC black outer shell with cat ears Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear): no weapons. has a broom. Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: Auditory System: Enhanced Ears CP 2 Circulatory & Immune Systems: Cyberlungs CP 3 Hands & Feet: Integumentary System: Sub-dermal Plating CP 2 Legs & Mobility: Neural: Ocular System: SmartEyes CP 2 Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Miscellaneous:

Backstory
Prior to her full body conversion "Eve" or her real name Niki Monroe was born and lived in the UK. She got into hard crimes like murder. not because of lack of money or lack of resources just for the thrill of hurting people and killing. But eventually it all caught up to her she was in prison sentenced to life. After being in prison for 7 years a rich businessman got a hold of her and a few other criminals files and made her and them an offer a new life, undergo a full body conversion and memory wipe in turn full pardon and new identity only catch should have to serve the businessman. After thinking on it she took the deal "must be better than rotting in prison" she thought. After the conversion she would spend the next 4 years serving under the rich man. With her memory wipe she grow a new personality. But one day the rich man got killed in a deal gone wrong and she fled. with this new identity she and a memory of only the past four years she just left not knowing who she really is. only knowing the name Eve and that she once was somebody else. But she never wants to find out who she was out of fear of what she may find out.

Name

Age
51.
Pronouns
He/Him.
Occupation
Gang Member/Leader.
Psychological Profile
Loud, boastful, prideful, quick to violence. Has something to prove.
Physical Description
A huge, muscular Exotic styled after a Husky. Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear):
Chrome / Implants
Arms & Arm Attachments: Gorilla Arms. Lift heavy shit. Overpower people. Physical domination. +50% strength. Always looks bulky or a bit too heavy. No fine tactile sense. Doesn't enhance Stamina. Hands & Feet: Subdermal Grip. Lets you hold objects tighter than human limits—great for weapons or grappling. Sometimes crushes fragile stuff by accident. Integumentary System: Dermal Plating. Resistant to blades, blunt trauma, Rifle Calibre (7.62 and below). Feels cold to the touch. Looks synthetic. Scanners flag you. Skeleton & Torso Musculature: NeoFiber. Synthetic muscle fibres for increased strength. 30% strength gain, Can be applied to 2 out of three: Arms. Occasional muscle stiffness and unnatural posture. Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Reactive Muscle Fibres. Short bursts of heightened strength. (e.g., a single punch at +50% power). Muscles spasm after use, visibly twitchy.
Total Cyberware Points
10.
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Combat skills, Leadership Skills, Intimidation.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Budget Arms Carnage Shotgun.
Backstory
Husk was once a regular member of the Animals gang, but he became disillusioned with the practices of the gang over time. The eventual abandonment of Exotic body mods, the lack of permanent turf in Night City, and the usage of Juice severely damaging the health of its members, it was too much for Husk. He left the gang in disgust. But when the Animals were largely wiped out Husk saw an opportunity to bring back the old ways, to form a new Pack and build a new future for the Animals.

Resolved: Valin (id: 344284777257500673)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1482457928135999588 • archived
Name
Jared Castorian (False Identity: Ochita Meiyo), Aka Moonfox
Age
32
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Corpo Ninja/Spy, Edgerunner,
Psychological Profile
Emotionless and cold when working, Outgoing and open when hiding his work identity
Physical Description
Short and Femboyish, Violet eyes and Scarlet hair. Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear): Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments:N/A Auditory System:N/A Circulatory & Immune Systems:N/A Hands & Feet:N/A Integumentary System:N/A Legs & Mobility:N/A Neural:N/A Ocular System:N/A Skeleton & Torso Musculature:N/A Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail):N/A Miscellaneous:N/A
Total Cyberware Points
0
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Stealth- Being a corpo Ninja, Jared is a terror in the shadows, known to kill his enemies with swift, precise efficiency. His steps are beyond whisper quiet, his allies describe him following them as "Being stalked by a living shadow." (Edgy and corny I know) Lockpicking- Be it electronic or mechanical, no lock is able to stand against his skills and tools Bow- Being his primary ranged weapon, He is as precise with his bow as a sniper would be with their rifle. Throwing Weapons- While not his most skilled weaponry, he is capable of putting a shuriken in someones back at a good distance Katana- This one is obvious, his Vibroblade Katana is his best melee weapon
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Bow, Tazer Kunai, Shuriken, Vibro Katana, Tanto, Flashbangs (3 per mission) Duracloth Shinobi Outfit (protects up to medium pistol calibers), Cloak Field Generator (10 minute use, 5 minute recharge, 1 extra battery for quick reuse. I will track this, no worries), external facetag, semiuniversal translator (translates languages to english in his ear, allows him to speak english and it translate to the language of the listener.)
Backstory
It is unknown where Jared Originates, even to himself. Years and Years in the corporations training facilities, and the brainwashing needed to make him into a killing machine has led him to lose those memories. Jared is glad to be this killing machine though. It grants him freedom to do as he pleases until called upon by his Corporation to kill for them. His past is shrouded in mystery, his records forged to present a completely normal man, but in reality this is far from the truth. Jared is a skilled tactician and killer, capable of killing anyone he so pleases. However, he is far from a solo. If need be, he will opt to use a team of Mercenaries to reach his target, giving them the Eddies to do so. It can be noted that his profile provides little true backstory, instead giving descriptions of his capabilities, as there is little to tell. How does one seperate the truth from the lies, reality from falshood, when one does not even remember it themselves, and all the corporation gives is Blacked out files and after action reports.
Known Affiliations
Whichever Corporation fixers deign appropriate, corporate contact in town
Reference Images
(Will add after school)
RP Hooks
Corporate, Shinobi, Unknown origin, Shrouded in mystery from players perspectives, Records are forged. Potentially Saburo??? Ill talk to him about a story binding

Parsed: Cameron Ray AKA “Screen” — username chyver
Resolved: chyver (id: 156880917351104513)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1467635827525025993 • archived
Name
Cameron Ray AKA “Screen”
Age
32
Pronouns
Any/All
Occupation
Valentino Lietenant
Psychological Profile
Takes a long time to acclimate socially. They’re outwardly nervous and have a nail-biting tendency. They’re ambitious and willing to put themselves at risk when there’s something to gain, but never recklessly. They always avoid physical confrontation when possible.
Physical Description
Short king with a dark brown raccoon exotic implant.
Chrome / Implants
ICE Layer - 2 Optical Camo - 2 Netrunner Suite (Level 3) - 5 GhostTag - 1
Total Cyberware Points
10
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Accounting ‘Creative’ accounting Netrunning skills from work in Juarez Cartel
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Tech Pistol Bubble gun (shoots bubbles) His old Cyberdeck (barely worth anything anymore. Outdated and unmaintained.)
Backstory
Born in Heywood, Cameron spent most of his life in Night City where he worked as a small time freelancer until he saved enough money to buy his first netrunner suite. In his younger years, he built strong ties to the valentinos, doing jobs for them without ever fully joining them. When he was 23, he got a contact with the Juarez Cartel through the Valentinos and moved to Mexico to work for them as a cyber security netrunner and accountant. He met Manolo Costazuela (Toro) during his time working for the Cartel while he was in Mexico as a contact for the Valentinos. All roads lead back to Heywood. After seven years in Juarez, Toro returned to Night city to run the Valentino chapter and invited Cameron as a tech he can trust.
Known Affiliations
Juarez Cartel: Recruited by the cartel from Heywood seven years ago. Worked for them in Mexico for that time before being recruited into the Valentinos. El Toro de Sangre: Personal assistant to the boss
Reference Images
(avatar under works.)
RP Hooks
Old Ties: No one leaves the Juarez Cartel. Though they let him leave to help Toro willingly, he’s still an asset to the cartel. If they need a netrunner to do a job in Night City, Cameron might get a job offer he can’t turn down. Ambitious second in command: Cameron doesn’t have the same tendency toward stability and friendly relations as Toro and will be trying to influence the Valentinos to be expansionist.
Additional Notes

Brad ‘Silverback’ Burke - ranulf

Parsed: Brad ‘Silverback’ Burke — username ranulf
Resolved: Ranulf (id: 140083483073576960)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1480214616335450235 • archived
Name
Brad ‘Silverback’ Burke
Age
41
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Bouncer/Brawler/Enforcer
Psychological Profile
Proud, stubborn, focused. Age and experience has evened out his temper when compared to the infamous attitudes of the Animals. Even so, he is willing and able to throw his weight around to prove himself as a different breed. Is all or nothing when it comes to getting the job done.
Physical Description
An eponymous example of the philosophy of the NC Animals. Enormous knotted bundles of muscle, thickened limbs built up by chemicals and surgery to the point his fists are good for little more than being hammers. Bones and joints heavily reinforced to keep them from buckling under raw pressure. All under rough, scarred and calloused skin that strains to contain it. Age and chemical cocktails have faded his hair to a grey, but he proudly displays a thick wild beard. Sharp eyes prone to staring down anyone who locks gaze. Enlarged canines to reflect his bestial leaning.
Chrome / Implants
-Gorilla Arms 2cwp /arms -Dense marrow 2cwp /skeleton -Subdermal armor 2cwp /Integumentary -Subdermal Grip 1cwp/ Hands and Feet -Reactive muscle fibers 1cwp /Universal muscular -Reenforced Tendons 2cwp / Legs
Total Cyberware Points
10
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Animals MMA - Wrestling, Streetfighting, and boxing styled to maximize bioware enhancements. Specific pharmaceutical knowledge - centered around performance enhancement drugs the Animals use.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
-Custom knuckle dusters: Adds some weight as well as armor to his fists and arms. -Silverbacks Street Sweeper (Lever action Power shotgun): His grossly overgrown fists can’t manipulate anything but this clunky Frankenstein iron made from a tweaked Tectronyka shotgun platform.
Backstory
Born from an alleged pairing between a Nomad and Night City native, the tumultuous nature of the affair left him fending for himself in Night city at a young age. The harsh upbringing drove him to focus on surviving and thriving through becoming strong by any means he could manage; making him prime initiate material for the NC Animals who drew him in with the promise of being something far more than your typical street scrapper. Whether it was his stubborn focus or a body sturdy enough to take the consistent strain of Juice and surgery he grew to be a formidable Animal. After a decade or two of membership the changing attitudes in the gang began to affect the younger members of his pack. The disagreement came to a head, but instead of the standard duel he was jumped and overwhelmed; all but left for dead outside of his territory. Essentially an exile, he turned his back on Pacifica and ventured elsewhere in Night City to keep surviving as he’s done all his life, with his bare hands.

From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1480211779039658035 • archived
Name
Cristoff
Age
30
Pronouns
He/Him/They/Them
Occupation
Works undercover as a Corpo Boogeyman for Zetatech- collecting experimental Zetatech chrome from cyberpsychos post-mortem under the guise of body disposal/crime scene cleanup.
Psychological Profile
Initially seeming as another quiet head in the crowd, after some time around him you would find that he’s somewhat too reliant on quippy sarcasm, often too dry to be understood as anything other than insulting, even though he (sometimes) doesn’t mean to insult people undeservedly. Otherwise he’s a calm and collected individual who tries to keep things civil and friendly. He absolutely hates being referred to as a scav or a ganger and will react immediately if called one even as a joke, often angrily. When agitated or nervous, he tends to scratch around his head or pace around, or stand in an otherwise relaxed environment (such as around a campfire when everyone else is sitting).
Physical Description
He stands at 6’1 at the top of his head (not counting ears) and has a husky but visibly muscular body. He has been entirely turned exotic from head to toe and made to look like a pitbull with orange fur and white patches on the head and chest. Often holds a relaxed or “lazy” pose, frequently leaning on things or sitting.
Chrome / Implants
Arms & Arm Attachments: Mantis Blades Miscellaneous:ICE Layer, GhostTag,
Total Cyberware Points
4
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Moderately skilled Ripperdoc, knowledgeable about Chrome side effects and treatments, can apply or even downgrade common and some uncommon chrome. Decent quickdraw and a middling gunfighter, prefers to avoid combat if possible or let others do the dirty work. Non-cyber skills — Trained Ripperdoc and emergency medical worker (Trauma team), trained in exfiltration and infiltration/rescue tactics, as well as deescalation communication and a penchant for convincing seemingly unhinged parties to his will, even if only for a short time.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Custom bodied Power Revolver, fires .42 rounds Wears lightweight armored undergarments rated for light backalley stabbing and small clibres, useless against most serious weaponry. Mantis Blades

Nyx - phoenixkitsu.

Parsed: Nyx — username phoenixkitsu.
Resolved: Geo kitsune (id: 1219620870633291806)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1459519103965597839 • archived
Name
** Nyx
Age
** 34
Pronouns
** Don’t care
Occupation
** Illusionist, Hustler, Black-Market Courier, JoyToy
Psychological Profile
** Playful, charming, always down for a good time, always reading the room
Physical Description
** 5 ft 7 in / small, slightly toned / yeen / female body 🔧 **Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear):** None explicitly listed 🦾 **Chrome / Implants** **Arms & Arm Attachments:** * **Cyberarm (Dexterous):** Precision tool use. RP lockpicking, surgery, hacking. Weak to EMPs. Shakes when under pressure. Does not enhance stamina. **Auditory System:** * None listed **Circulatory & Immune Systems:** * None listed **Hands & Feet:** * **Cyberfingers:** Hidden tools in fingertips — USB, lockpick, small blade. Constant low-level clicking or twitching in fingers. **Integumentary System:** **Legs & Mobility:** **Neural:** * **Netrunner Suite (Level 1):** Basic Net access. Ability to quickhack. Comes with Interface Jack to connect to terminals / vehicles / etc. Always a little distracted — like you’re only 95% in the room. **Ocular System:** * **SmartEyes:** Zoom, thermal, night vision, facial ID, AR HUD. Eyes glow. Sometimes blinks asynchronously. **Skeleton & Torso Musculature:** **Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail):** **Miscellaneous:** * **Mr. Studd™ / Midnight Lady™** Boosted stamina, modular sensations, vibe modules. Malfunctions in awkward moments. Buzzes audibly if overused.
Total Cyberware Points
** 6
Skills / Talents / Abilities
** * Non-cyber skills — magic tricks, sleight of hand, illusions
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
** None explicitly listed
Backstory
** Nyx was born in Night City and never really left it. Her parents were small-time performers and runners who moved often, always one job away from trouble. When they disappeared—no body, no answers—Nyx learned fast that asking questions didn’t keep you fed. She survived by copying what she’d seen growing up: street shows, card tricks, cheap illusions. Crowds meant safety. Applause meant food. While people watched her hands, she learned how easy it was to take a little extra without being noticed. As a teen, she got picked up by a smuggling crew that used performers as cover. Nyx wasn’t muscle or brains—she was the distraction. She carried packages, slipped through checkpoints, and entertained while deals happened behind her. It paid better than busking, and it didn’t ask for loyalty. Her first chrome came after a job went bad. A guard grabbed her mid-act, and she barely got out. The cyberarms she took afterward weren’t upgrades—they were insurance. Precise, cheap, and unreliable under stress, but good enough to keep her alive. She started working Corpo gigs later—private parties, exclusive clubs, quiet rooms where execs wanted entertainment and discretion. That’s where the JoyToy work came in. Nyx treated it like any other role: controlled, professional, and temporary. She learned how to make people feel seen without giving them anything real. The netrunner suite was added when she needed to start moving data instead of objects. It opened doors and systems, but it also made her distant—half-focused, always listening to something no one else could hear. Now, Nyx lives job to job. She keeps things easy, fun, and low-risk. She avoids deep ties, big promises, and dangerous ambition. Because everyone she ever saw reach too high in Night City didn’t come back.
Known Affiliations
** Street performers, smugglers, and Corpo execs who love a good show (or need something moved off the record)
RP Hooks
** * Street performer who always knows more than they let on * Courier who can move sensitive items quietly * Corpo-adjacent entertainer with access to restricted spaces
Additional Notes
** * Subtle implant malfunctions are a recurring RP flavor * Distraction and nervous tics are visible tells under stress

Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1447901026026782771 • archived

Name
Zavara 🎂
Age
20 🏳️
Pronouns
She/It 💼
Occupation
Joytoy? (Following in Momma Arson's footsteps) 🧠
Psychological Profile
it's sane I guess, definitely fucked up from all her alterations and implants 🧍
Physical Description
tall and slender, thin digit grade legs with a curvy bodice, black mesh grafted over limbs/ 🔧 Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear): her horns, if they count, not magical but definitely will impale you with a single headbutt. 🦾 Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: nothing, her arms are organic except for her makeshift claws Auditory System: speaks with a normal voice or an altered one, depending on the situation. Circulatory & Immune Systems: lungs and voice box replaced completely. Hands & Feet: legs have been taken off and replaced with hooved implants for better speed and asethetic look. Integumentary System: She inserted metal into her nailbeds, and the tissue grew around it. Filing it down, she formed them into claws. Legs & Mobility: legs have been replaced with steel skeletal implants with ball jointed digit-grade design for better flexibility and moving around into small areas better Neural: normal brain and blood going to its organic parts Ocular System: eyes have been replaced with synthetic implants, capable of scanning Skeleton & Torso Musculature: steel legs and hip replacements, all joints have been replaced with steel ball joints for more flexibility. Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): long sllcone tail with a flexible metal bone structure, easily breakable and needs to be replaced often Miscellaneous: 💉
Total Cyberware Points
Cybernetic Claws : 1 CyberLungs: 3 Cyberlegs (runner): 2 Smart Eyes: 2 Scent Scanner: 1 Tail Mount: 1 -# Like this??? 🧰
Skills / Talents / Abilities
flexible as fuck and almost silent when she sneaks around, good lil spy bitch 🧱
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
horns, thats it, literally her horns 📜
Backstory
```Zavara grew up overlooked — quiet, observant, invisible. People talked around her, ignored her, forgot her. When her family died, she fell in with rough crowds not because she was rebellious, but because they were the only ones who didn’t forget she existed. She became obsessed with adrenaline — the only sensation that cut through the numbness. She started modifying herself, first out of desperation, then obsession. She replaced her lungs, eyes, legs, joints — anything that made her faster, sharper, harder to ignore. Some mods were pro. Most were botched DIY attempts. By the time she realized she was becoming an Exotic, it was too late to turn back. The city stopped seeing her as a person. JoyToy clients treated her like a fantasy. Fixers treated her like a tool. People on the street stared or avoided her entirely. So she made a decision: If nobody would respect her, she’d earn fear instead. She stabbed, fought, clawed and carved her name into the world just to feel real. Now she’s in Night City — the one place where reputation is currency. She wants respect, and she’ll do anything to get it. She’ll take any job, fight anyone, cross any line. She’s quiet, fast, and absolutely ruthless. Someone people overlook once. Never twice.``` 🏷️
Known Affiliations
N/A, none yet 🖼️
Reference Images
🤝
RP Hooks
idk broooo this is my first one 📎
Additional Notes
I ain't good at this shit, criticize me please.

Reiga - nyasix

Parsed: Reiga — username nyasix
Resolved: NyaSix (id: 405871228323102721)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1479962717631676559 • archived
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
Basic Info
Name
Reiga
Age
35
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
Mercenary (Solo) Personality: Protective, loyal, and caring. Reiga is a heroic individual. If someone is in danger and needs help, she’s the first to rush over to help. “Why should you care?” people ask her. She says that “This world of ours is based on people taking advantage of kindness. Nonetheless I want to make the world kinder so I’ll happily put the work in to help make that happen despite the consequences for myself. A kinder world equals a kinder future for all.” Is what she believes in.
Physical Description
Reiga is a 6 '11 exotic, her body completely modified to look like an anthropomorphic hyena. Her body is covered in the modification markings. Her fur color is a dark cyan blue while her hair’s tips glow bright blue, her eyes a blue with a green tint. She wears a simple shirt and shorts casually but when in combat or out and about she wears a combat jacket and combat pants with a cute top. Her casual shirt and combat jacket has the mox logo on them, she is a big fan and wants to eventually join and help with their efforts. Chrome / Implants (Weakness are italicized) Gorilla Arms - 2 points Lift heavy shit. Overpower people. Physical Domination. +50% strength Always looks bulky or a bit too heavy, no fine tactile sense, doesn’t enhance stamina. Midnight Lady - 1 point Boosted stamina, modular sensations, vibe modules Malfunctions in awkward moments. Buzzes audibly if over used. Neo Fiber - 3 points Synthetic muscle fibers for increased strength. 30% strength gain. Occasionally muscle stiffness and unnatural posture. CyberLeg - 2 points Jump farther, run faster, land silently. Parkour beast. Loud stomp at full speed. Doesn’t enhance stamina. Scent Scanner - 1 Point Track people or chemicals by smell. Smell blood, oil, etc. Overwhelmed in clubs, alleys, combat. Sometimes gags from sensory overload. Total points = 9

Jessica “Quinn” Cortez - chromia

Parsed: Jessica “Quinn” Cortez — username chromia
Resolved: Chromia (id: 266134413153140737)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1479870137074192456 • archived
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
Basic Info
Name
Jessica “Quinn” Cortez
Age
29
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
Net/edgerunner. Solo Personality: Quinn is a little bit of a quiet sort, being a type to stick to herself or closer friends who she can relate or enjoy company with. Otherwise, she's usually a quick wit and relaxed nerd girl.
Physical Description
She rocks a black netrunner suit with a black/red repurposed militech corsair jacket with a long red scarf hanging over her shoulder that belonged to a very important somebody. She wears purple shades to mask her eyes at times. She’s a 5’10 human with minimal visible cyberwear with her face being slightly changed. Chrome / Implants Netunner Suit (Level 2) Cyberleg (mostly for jumps)
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Stealth, On the move network dismantling, parkour, biker!
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Militech pistol; 9mm. Advanced Crossbow w/ Dense armor piercing steel bolts.
Backstory
Quinn was born into a corpo connected family with militech. Her father was a branch supervisor within the Marketing wing. Her expenses were paid when she went to Night City’s Academy, scoring marks in Network Establishment and Creation. She was on a straight shot to earning a somewhat normal quiet life until a rival company had sent a merc to her family, it was a very quiet job, all it took was a couple hours for her to come back home to see her father, fatally shot in the chest. Taking matters into her own hands, she swears that before the city swallows her whole, she uses her learned skills to dismantle and destroy any network until she finds the killer responsible for her fathers death. The mother is currently missing as well, ever since the night. Okay a few questions Why would a rival corp kill a marketing supervisor? Why would they care? What happened to their mother? Does she have any leads? Does quinn have any hopes and dreams outside finding her fathers killer? What is she gonna do if she finds his killer? Do you have any idea who is actually going to be the killer? Any plans with other players by chance? When did the death of her father happen? How many years has it been? <@266134413153140737> | Quinn Chromia | Quinn — 3/4/2026 6:07 AM Oki! I’ll try to answer these questions as best as possible. Marketing supervisors tend to be the face of a lot of sales trades and even on media, if militech was selling millions of eddies worth of product one way to significantly stain an image is to show fragility, hence the assassination put the father on a fast path to being zero’d The mother is currently off grid even to Quinn’s knowledge. I haven’t really made up my mind as to where but I’d like for the RP to develop it naturally where I could potentially interlink it with another persons backstory or have a fixer make a point around it. Very up in the air but the one solid bit of evidence is that the mother is still alive, no body found. Her only lead as of the moment is that arasaka could be involved in the decision but don’t have solid evidence to back it up. The only thing she got from the scene was the caliber round that did the job, and it was highly distributed between gangs. Her hopes and desires are to try to get some semblance of normalcy after her job is done, and have hopefully enough eddies to live a quiet life she really wants. But more than anything she doesn’t want to die alone. She.. actually doesn’t know. I know she’d go for the kill obviously but realistically if she actually caught him she’d freeze up, and it would have to be decided through her connection of friends she would make to help her along. I haven’t made plans as to who the killer is, I’m probably gonna talk to a fixer about that or collab with another PC to determine it. Alike to what one of my other answers are, it’s very open ended. 5 years ago!

Joytoy and Joytoy Guardian

Physical Description
Very tall and curvy. May be seen wearing futuretech clothing but heavy augmentation allows her to walk around in her "plates" as she calls them without worry of public nudity (not that it ever stopped her before) when out and about. 🦾 Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: Phantom Limbs Hands & Feet: Cybernetic Claws Integumentary System: Nanostitch Skin Neural: Neurofilter Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Reactive Muscle Fibers Miscellaneous: Orphaned Dollchip.

The voices sure sound real today. You want to hire her? Great. The job's Babysitting? That costs triple.

Lycoris Maxim - dilandian

Parsed: Lycoris Maxim — username dilandian
Resolved: Dilandian (id: 107568898089459712)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1479866016660979792 • archived
Name
Lycoris Maxim
Age
32
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
Failed Mascot/Model for NCPD public relations program turned to making an independent magazine.
Psychological Profile
Likes to control when she draws attention to herself and from whom. Dislikes the idea of A.I. and reads far too many books/theories on the subject, like some kind of doomsday prepper. Avoids people with blue eye cosmetics as a result of reading about A.I. body-snatchers resulting in people having a permanent blue glow to their ocular implants. Refuses to use automated driving systems such as Delemain cabs or self driving car modes.
Physical Description
considered a “Skull Dog” due to partially exposed facial chrome. 🔧Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear): Motorcycle, Claws 🦾 Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: Subdermal Display Auditory System: Enhanced Ears Circulatory & Immune Systems: Hands & Feet: Cybernetic Claws Integumentary System: Legs & Mobility: Neural: Ocular System: Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Miscellaneous: Tail Mount, VoiceWeaver
Total Cyberware Points
6
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Claws for protection, relies more on being away from trouble to keep herself safe than weapons or armored clothing.
Backstory
Early life brought Lycoris to the city trying to make it big, jobs ranging from fast food sign twirling to small commercial spots positioned her to "make it big" in media by working with NCPD as a living character model. Due to a lawsuit targeting NCPD over intellectual property and expenses exceeding allowable measures the program was discontinued forcing her to move into private employment or head into JoyToy territory. An accident on-set caused the at the time canid to lose a large portion of their facial chrome and embrace a “Skull Dog” appearance. Lives in a small apartment in (B)eastside near the bridge at south Kabuki.
Known Affiliations
Previously employed by the NCPD using a modeling program to gain access to exotic implants. Debt collectors receive regular payments.
Reference Images
VRChat_2026-02-25_20-34-45.535_2160x3840.png
RP Hooks
Might be recognized as an NCPD PR story from a few years back, now modeling and paying off exotic enhancements to a small-yet-dedicated independent media following.
Additional Notes
Characters' goals are to move away from living hand-to-mouth with large amounts of debt, to climbing the social ladder. Inspiration for this character was taken from Gigolo Joe from the movie A.I. Artificial Intelligence aimed towards being a support for other characters. Despite the inspirational character she has entirely human/organic origins and is actually phobic of Artificial Intelligence refusing to use the Delemain cab system or automated driving systems.

Siren - auroranova

Parsed: Siren — username auroranova
Resolved: Aurora Nova 💖 (id: 525863279877423106)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1479864992827310280 • archived
Name
Siren
Age
28
Pronouns
She/Her Sexuality: Pansexual
Occupation
Joytoy/Bartender/Information Broker
Psychological Profile
Calm, Level headed, opportunistic antagonizer
Physical Description
Shark/Reptilian Exotic. Grey Skin, Yellow marking spots, Prosthetic Tail. Most commonly in a latex one piece. Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear): Lighter, Pocket knife if needed. Chrome / Implants Hands & Feet: Cyberfingers Integumentary System: Chameleon Skin Ocular System: Smart eyes Miscellaneous: Internal Storage
Total Cyberware Points
6
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Extreme finger dexterity/ Sleight of hand. Good Verbal skills around haggling or information gathering. Excellent lockpicking skills Siren is known to Carry small pouches of Powdered Scopolamine (Angel Dust) In her lip that she can release as a last ditch effort to disable attackers or lull targets into a state of disasociative disagreement. The drug is blown on targets as a pink powder. Because of how small the dose is, and her over-exposure to it, Siren feels no ill effects other than a headache the next day.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
advanced lockpick set. Prosthetic tail can be used as a mass trauma blunt weapon if needed.
Backstory
Siren is a new implant to Night city, originally from the northern section of America. While siren was American born, she was abandoned in Columbia by her birth parents around age 17. She became very familiar to the brothel houses and redlight districts; many ladies of the night saw her as a little sister figure, they taught her how to manage on her own - eventually picking up her "Angel Dust" trick that leaves targets stunned and in a tranced state of complacency. Siren managed to make her way back to the US after she turned 26, and a year long journey north to try and reconnect with her family where she was born, she found naught but an abandoned house. She realized that, having no skills that apply to that region of the country, she was better suited to city life, so off to Night City she went, having heard the litany of rumors about it from dozens of people while on her journey. Taking advantage of the 0 affiliations and nothing following her from her upbringing, Siren hopes to have an open ear into all of the Cities juiciest details and rumors. Taking on a Shark exotic frame shortly after ariving, realizing just how much allure a slick skinned woman is to the city. Not afraid to use her attractions to get herself into places and near very influenial people - Passing rumors and information that could very well end a life, demolish a gang, or rebuild an entire sector of night city. Siren is very friendly, charming, and very smooth with her words. Always happy to have a new conversation, and eager to make new connections.
Known Affiliations
None
Reference Images
RP Hooks
Additional Notes

Sienna Morris - anyaroseyt

Parsed: Sienna Morris — username anyaroseyt
Resolved: Anya Rose (id: 493934269257744405)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1479862507970756741 • archived
Name
Sienna Morris
Age
31
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
mercenary
Psychological Profile
N/A
Physical Description
5’8.3 Long blonde hair, greyish-blue eyes, scar covering half of her left side of her body, including her face. Known to wear darker colors like reds and black. Shes kinda stand-offish if she doesn't know you
Chrome / Implants
None
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Hand-to-hand combat, combat in genral
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Metal bat, 45 caliber pistol, Knife, helmet, Wedding ring
Backstory
Sienna was born in LA to her fathers gang, a mid level gang built from strife and survival that LA causes. Around her late teens and early 20s she meets a girl named Katherine while on an assignment. The two spent some time together Katherine revealed she was more or less on her own and had a gift for tech and cybernetics. So Siennas father brought her into the gang and their ripperdoc, giving her a workplace/ lab to tend to the members of the gang that had cyber enhancements. About a year later sienna and Katherine got married. About 9 years after that one man changed everything, Spade, he had snuck into their hideout to find Katherine and was laying In wait. Sienna came home to find the hideout not empty but quiet, quieter than usual. Fast forward about an hour and she’s being held at gunpoint in a hostage situation by spade infront of Katherine. One moment they’re standing there the next the lab has been blown up, all three are injured but alive, spade standing over Katherine talking with her. After sometime recovering from their injuries they find themselves following spade to night city, why? Sienna doesn’t know but she assumes for a fresh start. To this day she has no idea why or who blew up her home. For further clarification Amdigrego, Bellsheeo and I have our characters intertwined by lore, so it’s all generally the same night for all three of them
Known Affiliations
Katherine Morris, Spade
Reference Images
RP Hooks
She is blind in one eye and refuses to get any cybernetic wears

Mellow Ainsley - smolredfox

Parsed: Mellow Ainsley — username smolredfox
Resolved: smolredfox (id: 646118328103862332)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1479857507525726390 • archived
Name
Mellow Ainsley
Age
28
Pronouns
She/They
Occupation
High-End Casino Host / Dice Runner at Ace Casino --- Psychological Profile Mellow is composed to the point of being unsettling. She rarely raises her voice. When others escalate, she slows down. When someone rages, she softens. That calm is not entirely natural. Years of corporate behavioral conditioning shaped her into a stabilization asset. She instinctively de-escalates conflict and absorbs tension in a room. However, prolonged emotional suppression has left her somewhat detached from her own feelings. She struggles with intense emotional attachment and often processes danger intellectually before emotionally. She avoids violence whenever possible. If tension rises, she redirects it. If someone becomes aggressive, she stabilizes the room rather than overpowering it. Her greatest fear is losing autonomy and being reclaimed as corporate property. --- Physical Description Height: 5’9” Build: Lean, athletic Exotic Type: Bio-sculpted human (Monarch aesthetic) Mellow is biologically human but underwent full-body cosmetic gene tailoring and dermal restructuring. Her skin carries subtle purple undertones with warmer gradients across her torso and limbs. Bioluminescent patterning across her back and shoulders resembles monarch markings when activated, though it is purely integumentary. When her system activates, small bioluminescent micro-drones deploy from concealed dermal housings, hovering near her body in the shape of drifting butterflies. Her presence feels warm, controlled, and strangely grounding in low light. --- Chrome / Implants Integumentary System: • Bio-Sculpted Exotic Frame Full-body cosmetic modification and dermal restructuring. Includes bioluminescent monarch patterning. Tradeoff: High maintenance costs, immune flare-ups without regular treatment. • Monarch Swarm Micro-Emitter (Custom – Approval Required) Deploys micro-drones disguised as bioluminescent butterflies. Emits localized short-range signal interference. Causes temporary instability in unshielded personal cyberware within close proximity. Disrupts illegal cheatware, probability analyzers, and certain targeting optics. Does not permanently disable implants. Limited radius and duration. Tradeoff: Significant neural strain, migraines, nausea, sensory dulling after extended use.

Baross "Iron Jaw" Mundy - waffies

Parsed: Baross "Iron Jaw" Mundy — username waffies
Resolved: waffies (id: 310504104407465984)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1479860863124111360 • archived
Name
Baross "Iron Jaw" Mundy
Age
25
Pronouns
He/Him/They/Them
Occupation
Bouncer/Muscle for Hire/Professional Street Fighter and Enforcer
Psychological Profile
Baross is a guarded man, intimidating in stature and frightening in his quiet demeanor, juxtaposed by outbursts of violence. He's level headed enough to know when to stay calm, but angry enough to be able to crush a mans skull with his fingers alone. Could this be from mild cyberpsychosis, too many brain injuries, or both, who knows? He struggles deeply with issues of abandonment and loss, having had to fight for everything he has ever had, and losing it often throughout his life. Continuing down this path for violence feels like his only way forward, and frankly, he is addicted to it, he craves the rush of a fight and the cheering of people betting on his win, but deep down he knows that someday, it will destroy him, chew him up and spit him out like so many before. Deep down, he is scared. Despite all this, if you're truly friends with him he can be very amicable and caring, he'll buy you a beer as quickly as he'll beat a man half to death for mugging you.
Physical Description
Height: 6’5” Build: Bulky, but athletic, Large amount of noticeable chrome Exotic Type: Biosculpted Exotic (hyena)
Chrome / Implants
(Maelstrom background, most Cyberwear is modified slightly) Bio-Sculpted Exotic frame Full-bodied biomodification, includes dermal restructuring an non-prehensile tail attachment to spinal base Maelstrom customized Gorilla Arms Increased Strength in general, harder blows in melee engagements, Lifetime of training provides stamina required to use normally. Customization removes unnatural bulkiness, for different downsides. Downsides: Some internal components have been fitted externally instead, has a piston like protrusion from scarred skin on lower arm. Looks freaky (unless you're a Maelstrom member) Tactile sense is muted, Cost: 2

Lena Hernandez - alysenpai2201

Parsed: Lena Hernandez — username alysenpai2201
Resolved: Aly-Senpai (id: 404485268234567681)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1477668829466464459 • archived
Name
Lena Hernandez
Age
32
Pronouns
she/her
Occupation
light scout/Merc
Psychological Profile
Cool and focused with a can-do attitude while on the clock. But in high tense situations, she can appear skittish and defensive.
Physical Description
Dark red, short hair, with twin metal buns that glow with her tattoos. A white tank top with a faded rose pattern, and worn down jean shorts. A padded shoulder holster with a painted zebra pattern. Skeleton tattoo pieces on her Full body Convert Detail.
Chrome / Implants
GorillaArms (2) Reinforced Tendons (2) Detoxifier (1) Sub-dermal Plating (2) UnderSkin Lightshow (1) Enhanced Tastebuds (1) FlashVisor (1)
Total Cyberware Points
10
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Melee Proficiency (She can wield the bat one-handed or two-handed for better speed and power. Not before knowing someone's weak points.) Speed and Agility (She's not the fastest around, but her small and thin size gives her a lower center of gravity.) Loyalty (Being used to being seen as backup, she's trusted with internal discipline and debt collection. Small package, big consequences.)
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Metal Baseball bat Weisklein 91 Dual pistols
Backstory
Lena worked as a bouncer for The Mox at Lizzie's Bar for three years. She handled debt collection, provided extra security, and kept trouble out of the club. Over time, the constant violence and chaos became too much. Causing loss of focus and a car accident, making her cover her scars with chrome. One night she finished her shift, deleted her contacts, and walked away. She completely cut ties with the Mox—no explanation, no goodbye. Now she keeps a low profile in Night City, trying to earn back her keep.
Known Affiliations
Valentinos Toro Choca
Reference Images
Additional Notes
Tyger Claw grudge — One of the gangers she roughed up (or helped flatline) during Mox days survived and wants payback. They start small—harassment, tagging her squat—but it forces her to take merc jobs to afford better guns. Toxic Contact — At some point during her time as a Mox, she had a run in with some Maelstrom gangsters. That small interaction gave her a questionable contact for emergencies, and a target on her back.

Name

Age
27
Pronouns
She/They/It Status: Active Butcher Boy Occupation in Night City: Korras ankle biter
Psychological Profile
Personality, trauma, behavior quirks, emotional tone. She's visibly soft and emotionally bright, smiling often, laughs easily even when she shouldn't, and speaks in a light, upbeat tone. She's very cuddly and kind but heavily enjoys causing others pain. She has no empathy behind it when the violence starts. She doesn't rage or lose control, she enjoys the process. Former Nomad, her first clan collapsed due to Corporate manipulation, she has survivors guilt and reacts horrifically to any type of betrayal
Physical Description
Height, build, notable features, species/exotic mods, general vibe. Short gray & White bunny Exotic with a pear shape build. Pastel pink eyes, plush fur, gentle silhouette, a soft vibe to her. She's like a pastel angel who can break your ribs.
Chrome / Implants
Name the mods, what they do, and note any tradeoffs. , Note: Customer chrome and implants are allowed, but they must be approved for use , Slots, 1 Cyberware Implant per slot EXCEPT Miscellaneous which is unlimited: Arms & Arm Attachments (2 slots): 2 Gorilla Arms (Lifts heavy shit, overpower people, physical domination. +50% strength) (looks bulky, doesn't increase stamina ) Auditory System: , Circulatory & Immune Systems: , Hands & Feet (2 slots): , Integumentary System: 2 Sub-dermal Plating (Resistant to blades, blunt trauma, Pistol Caliber) Legs & Mobility (2 slots): Neural: , Ocular System: Skeleton & Torso Musculature: 3 NeoFiber (Synthetic muscle fibers for increased strength. 30% strength gain, applied to Legs, Arms) (Occasional muscle stiffness and unnatural posture) Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): 1 Reactive Muscle Fibers (Short bursts of heightened strength. By blood, chemicals, Oil, ect ect) Modded Mandibles (Mm strong jaw owie owie) (Struggle with whistling) ,
Total Cyberware Points
10 MAX 10 at character creation Except NPC's which sit at the max of 15 on character creation. , , See our cyberware system here: https://shorturl.at/LdkiG ,

She/Her
Occupation

Psychological Profile
Personality, trauma, behavior quirks, emotional tone. Mesirah is playful and seductive, loves to tease people to get a sense of their interests. Trauma: She knows her work as joytoy is looked down upon but doing it for so long she became emotionless to the concept of love and sex. She just act like she cares for the satisfaction of her clients and friends or to get closer to her targets. Behavior Quirks: Acts adorable and cutesy to draw in her targets. She can be lazy in her downtime from the joytoy job. Emotional Tone: Seductive, cheerful but business-like in negotiations.
Physical Description
Height, build, notable features, species/exotic mods, general vibe. 1.58m Female curvy exotic build, Cosplay cosmetic demon looking cyberware (horns, wings and tail). Cosmetic Cyberware looking arms and torso (fitting for the Internal Storage cyberware).
Chrome / Implants
Name the mods, what they do, and note any tradeoffs. Note: Custom chrome and implants must be approved before use Slots, 1 Cyberware Implant per slot EXCEPT Miscellaneous which is unlimited: Love Potion - (Custom) (3 CWP) Creates a toxin in the uterus that makes juices give a short knockout effect. The toxin has to be used on skin context or oral intake. Drawback: Does not work on Cyberware penis, detoxifier, Supra-Dermal Weave. any detect toxins/chemical ware will detect the uses of the Toxin. Biomonitor will auto-alert their partners. See 📎 Additional Notes for planned usage. Love Suite - (Custom) (1 CWP) Both Mr Studd and Midnight Lady, interchangeable to suit clients desire, Boosted stamina, modular sensations, vibe modules. Drawback: Malfunctions in awkward moments. Buzzes audibly if overused. Internal Storage - Miscellaneous (1 CWP) Stash a weapon, chip, or vial inside your body. Have to dig into yourself to retrieve. Looks sketchy as hell. Biomonitor - Miscellaneous (1 CWP) Miscellaneous Tracks all vital signs. Can auto-alert partners when you're in danger. ICE Layer - Miscellaneous (1 CWP) Detects incoming hacks instantly—early warning. Emits weird static. Memory Bank - Neural (2 CWP) Store perfect audio/visual recall. Experiences brief confusion episodes if overloaded.
Total Cyberware Points
6 ( + Custom Love Potion) MAX 10 at character creation See our cyberware system here: https://shorturl.at/LdkiG
