From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1477657339237765120 • archived
Name
Tali
Age
24
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
Unemployed (Thief)
Psychological Profile
Impulsive and Curious, greedy.
Physical Description
Cat like and thin, Her skin is covered in fur colored to blend with the skin color of most people. 🔧Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear): N/A 🦾 Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: N/A Auditory System: Enhanced Ears Circulatory & Immune Systems: N/A Hands & Feet: Retractable Cybernetic claws Integumentary System: Sub-dermal Plating Legs & Mobility: Cyberlegs (Runner) Neural: N/A Ocular System: Targeting Optic Skeleton & Torso Musculature: N/A Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): N/A Miscellaneous: Scent Scanner
Total Cyberware Points
9
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Evasion / Acrobatics and movement / Stealth / Lockpicking / Silver Tongue / Tracking and detection / Low tier device hacking and repairs
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
N/A
Backstory
Tali was born in the lower tiers of Heywood. Her mother worked maintenance contracts for Corps, patching systems, she only got wages that barely fed them. Her father was never present, a common story in NC. While other kids chased cheap thrills and gang affiliations, Tali hunted for rare gleams and dismantled broken devices scavenged from alley dumpsters. Old optics. Damaged neural ports. Fried circuit boards. She wasn’t just curious she had an instinctive understanding of systems, patterns, and weaknesses. As an adult Tali is a curious thief drifting through Night City’s underbelly, a stealthy feline thief driven not by wealth or status but by an irresistible instinct to collect anything that shines. Rather than chasing eddies or power, she is drawn to polished chrome, rare jewelry, glowing data shards, and objects that shimmer beneath neon lights, moving with fluid, silent precision that feels more predatory than practiced. Those who cross her path rarely understand her motives, as stolen items almost never surface on the black market, giving rise to rumors of hidden caches where her treasures are meticulously arranged like prized trophies. Playful yet unsettling, harmless yet deeply frustrating to her victims, Tali is a collector who prowls the urban sprawl simply because to her the city is an endless playground of beautiful, glittering things too perfect to resist.
Known Affiliations
N/A
Reference Images
RP Hooks
N/A
Additional Notes
Notable weaknesses, Shiny gifts and snacks.

Ronan - pink_monstarrr

Parsed: Ronan — username pink_monstarrr
Resolved: Pink (id: 729932098722463795)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1477331084520722615 • archived
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
Ronan [REDACTED] was born July 16, 2049. Older brother to Rosa [REDACTED] when he was 6 (2055) lost his parents the same year, and they got placed into the system. They were lucky to be placed in the same home. The foster homes were a horrible place to grow up, especially with a sickly sister. So when he was 10 (2059), he started to take on old jobs that he could find some legal and others not so much.
Name
Ronan
Age
30
Pronouns
he/him
Occupation
surveillance with cyberware overload issues at Ace's Casino
Psychological Profile
Highly observant, tense, and calculating, struggling to remain in control. Enjoys the company of people who remind him of his sister. Insomnia has nightmares of his sister, so he avoids sleeping or being alone a lot .
Physical Description
medium height, super muscles, beastly, exotic, dark, and brooding Chrome / Implants, Auditory System: enhanced ears 2 Circulatory & Immune Systems:, detoxifier 1 Integumentary System: pressure sensor skin 1 Legs & Mobility (1 slot per leg): reinforced tendons 2 Neural: neurofiliter 2 Ocular System: targeting optic 2
Total Cyberware Points
10
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Backstory
Parents died when they were young, and he had to find work quickly to take care of his younger sister, who was just a baby at the time. Taking on any job that paid well enough to stay alive, he had to adapt and modify himself to be better, faster, and stronger just to keep them safe. After a job went wrong and he upset the wrong people, he came home to find his sister missing, tearing apart the city to find her, but it was too late. Seeing her broken and cold body, fracturing the last bit of humanity he had left. Years of changing and destroying his body, he couldn't protect the only person he was doing it for. He moves to Night City after her death, haunted by her ghost and the need to remove himself from all the places that remind him of her. Joined up with Ace because she reminds him of his sister
Known Affiliations
Ace, Trigger

Backstory
Katherine was born and raised in LA. Eventually married to Sienna Morris as the U.S nosedived into the state it is now. Over time she got involved with all kinds of the wrong people, Gangs, mafias, corporate insides and eventually ended up a ripperdoc. Doing cybernetic experiments on people that those she was under the thumb of wanted to disapear. All this caught the attention of someone she never wanted to, Sinclair, more specifically Spade. With her wife being held hostage by spade in her own workshop in an attempt to escape she blew up the lab she had in LA, causing sierra's injuries and her own. Thus being why she has all four limbs missing, she's now under spades watchful eyes and his thumb blackmailed by her past and trying to keep her wife alive and out of harms way from spade. She watched him fight for some time (around ten years) and started adopting parts of his fighting style and steathly prowess. Now in night city with both of them, who knows what his plans are.

Yuna AKA "Trunk Monkey" - cosmicdemechi

Parsed: Yuna AKA "Trunk Monkey" — username cosmicdemechi
Resolved: Demechi (id: 108392473096691712)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1477326345527627898 • archived
Name
Yuna AKA "Trunk Monkey"
Age
29
Pronouns
They/Them
Occupation
Scavenger/Scrapper
Psychological Profile
Relaxed, No trauma, monotone in regards to emotion (speaks very little to no words)
Physical Description
5'6, Average build, General punk rock look
Chrome / Implants
Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): Cybernetic Claws (Both Arms) Circulatory & Immune Systems: Cyberlungs Integumentary System: Sub-Dermal Plating Miscellaneous: Tail Mount, Biomonitor, GhostTag Ocular Systems: Retinal Projector
Total Cyberware Points
10
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Stealth, Basic Hand-to-Hand, Minor tech knowledge (moreso handling of parts)
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Basic pistol and a stolen katana
Backstory
Yuna doesn’t remember a single place they’d call *home*. They were born somewhere between dust-choked highways and half-dead rest stops, raised by a loose Nomad pack that never stayed long enough to grow roots. Their early life was defined by motion—convoys at dawn, engines humming through the night, and the quiet ritual of tearing apart broken tech to see what could still be saved. Yuna learned early that everything has value if you know how to strip it down. They were never the loud kid. Never the reckless one, either. While others in the pack chased thrills or clung to old stories, Yuna watched. Listened. Took things apart with patient hands and put them back together just well enough to keep rolling. When they spoke, it was usually because it mattered. The nickname “Trunk Monkey” came from those days. Yuna was the one you sent crawling into wrecked vehicles, sealed cargo pods, or collapsed engine compartments—silent, efficient, unfazed by tight spaces or sharp metal. If something was missing after a run, odds were it was already packed away in Yuna’s kit. As the years passed, the Nomad life started to thin out. Fewer convoys. More raids. More corporate drones watching the highways. Yuna didn’t leave because of conflict or tragedy—they left because the road was dying. Night City, on the other hand, was rotting loudly. That meant opportunity. Night City didn’t change Yuna; it simply gave them more to strip. They settled into the margins—abandoned megabuildings, half-flooded underpasses, forgotten scav zones that even Scavs thought were too risky. Yuna made their living pulling chrome from corpses, peeling armor off burned-out combat drones, and trading parts through quiet fixers who didn’t ask questions. Their tech knowledge isn’t academic—it’s practical. Yuna knows what still works, what can be patched, and what will explode if you’re careless. The chrome came gradually. Mantis Blades weren’t a statement; they were a tool. Defense first, intimidation second. Cyberlungs came after too many nights breathing chemical dust and smoke. Sub-dermal plating followed a job where a pistol round nearly ended everything. The tail mount? Practical. Extra balance, extra leverage, extra storage—Trevor never explains it, and nobody smart asks. Psychologically, Yuna is… steady. No visible trauma. No rage. No fear. Violence is a calculation, not an emotion. They speak rarely, and when they do, it’s short, flat, and final. Most people assume something is broken inside them. They’re wrong. Trevor simply doesn’t waste energy. After the events surrounding Dogtown and the collapse of several power structures, scav territory expanded. More dead zones. More wreckage. More ghosts. Trevor thrives in that silence, picking through the remains of other people’s ambitions. They don’t dream of glory, fame, or climbing Night City’s ladder. Yuna’s goal is simpler: Stay operational. Stay free. Keep moving. One day, maybe, they’ll leave again—back to the road, back to the open spaces where the city’s glow can’t reach. Until then, Night City is just another machine to dismantle.
Known Affiliations
Nomads

Name
Luka Von Lucien
Age
27
Pronouns
He/him
Occupation
NCPD | Beat patrol
Psychological Profile
Duality. Generally Luka is friendly and excitable, ready to make friends, have fun, and enjoy life to the fullest. When things get serious however, he shuts his emotions off completely.
Physical Description
Black hair, Cyan eyes, Fair skin, Athletic, 5'10"/1.65 meters-ish, 150 pounds.

Backstory
Luka Von Lucien was born to the wealthy Lucien family in Germany within the EEC. He was being set up to follow his father's career in politics when we decided to do something different. Luka joined up with the Bundeswehr, to protect the EEC like any good patriot, and served four years as an infantry man and another 4 as a designated marksman for the KSK. He expected to return home as a hero to his family. His father however locked him out at the door. No son of his would defy him. Luka, disheartened but pragmatic, packed up and left for "greener pastures" before finally settling on the NCPD.
Known Affiliations
EEC military, Bundeswehr, KSK, NCPD

(Idk as of current)

Name
Mars Logan
Age
22
Pronouns
He / Him
Occupation
Rockerboy / Solo
Psychological Profile
A consummate entertainer and showman, the public familiar with Mars sees a consummately flamboyant figure with an indomitable hunger for attention, action, and generally things that get the heart pumping. Those privy to his more vulnerable moments would see this picture to be true, but misleading; Mars is first and foremost image-conscious and ambitious, and desperately insecure in his self-image and his place in the world. He believes, whether through money, fame, enhancement, or all of the above, that the recognition of others will solidify him–but fundamentally he is insecure in who he is.
Physical Description
Standing at around 6’2”, Mars is an impeccably sculpted and exaggerated vulpine exotic with densely glittered, pink fur, purple eyes, and long, blue-dyed hair. He may typically be seen wearing all manners of cropped clothing, leather jackets, and denim–invariably in black with strong accents.
Chrome / Implants
Cyber Legs - 2 Gorilla Arms - 2 Smart Eyes - 2 Netrunner Suite (1) - 2 Sub-dermal Plating - 2 Biomonitor 1
Total Cyberware Points
10
Skills / Talents / Abilities

Equipment / Armor / Weapons

Psychological Profile
Cool and focused with a can-do attitude while on the clock. But in high tense situations, she can appear skittish and defensive.
Physical Description
Dark red, short hair, with twin metal buns that glow with her tattoos. A white tank top with a faded rose pattern, and worn down jean shorts. A padded shoulder holster with a painted zebra pattern. Skeleton tattoo pieces on her Full body Convert Detail.

Skills / Talents / Abilities

Speed and Agility (She's not the fastest around, but her small and thin size gives her a lower center of gravity.) Loyalty (Being used to being seen as backup, she's trusted with internal discipline and debt collection. Small package, big consequences.)

Metal Baseball bat Weisklein 91 Dual pistols
Backstory
Lena worked as a bouncer for The Mox at Lizzie's Bar for three years. She handled debt collection, provided extra security, and kept trouble out of the club. Over time, the constant violence and chaos became too much. Causing loss of focus and a car accident, making her cover her scars with chrome. One night she finished her shift, deleted her contacts, and walked away. She completely cut ties with the Mox—no explanation, no goodbye. Now she keeps a low profile in Night City, trying to earn back her keep.
Known Affiliations
Valentinos Contact: Toro

Name
"Old man" Ragnar
Age
71
Pronouns
He/Him

Psychological Profile
Happy and cheerful, Ptsd of war, intimidating but really nice
Physical Description
2 meters tall, wide build, have a fake non working eye on my left side, covered in body scars, A gentle giant.
Chrome / Implants
Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): none Auditory System: none Circulatory & Immune Systems: none Hands & Feet (2 slots): Gorilla arms Integumentary System: Dermal plating Legs & Mobility (1 slot per leg): none Neural: none Ocular System: none Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Dense marrow Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): none Miscellaneous: none

Skills / Talents / Abilities

Backstory
In the old days I've served in the military for a long time, over the years I meet a woman who I take care of and bare children, a son and a daughter, we were a happy family I retired from the military to work at a pizza place for the family, but my wife died from cancer leaving me and my children, my daughter passing away from a terrorist attack a few years after, and my son dying with his wife by a mugger, I lost almost all my family. All but my granddaughter, Alice, they are the only family I have so I will protect them but ill keep a big smile to help those people who live in dark times, also I'm not fond of exotics. And my weapon to defend myself with is my trusty hammer I have during the old war. May be retired but only in the city to keep an eye on Alice just in case, and because being a war vet, no longer wants to use a gun because of ptsd, so Ill stick with his old hammer to defend with. When I was captured by the enemies along time ago they injured one of my eyes and injured my bod , i've been in that prison of 6 months but one night while in a scrap yard in the prison, I had the idea to make a weapon, a hammer, using this hammer I escaped from the villains and finding my way back to my fellow soldiers, and over the years I kept this hammer and my eye as a memory, upgrading the hammer over the years to keep it strong and worthy of battle just in case if I ever need to use it again.​
Known Affiliations
Pizza Pit

Additional Notes
Family could be used as leverage if needed.

** Basic Military Training from Barghest Competent Netrunner Competent with technological machinery and electronics
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
** Weaponry: Tsunami Nue Machette Armor Standard Combat Armour Neurolink Helmet to assist with Decking / Quickhacks
Backstory
** Rhys was your fairly standard street kid, born in Dogtown, mother and father raised him while working in an electronics store, one that specialised in repairing and retrofitting corporate tech, focusing mainly on Tech Weapons… so Rhys has always been around advanced tech, weird devices and data. He picked up the family trade rather quickly, and began to manage the front on the net side of things when it came to business… and as he got better at surfing the net, the more bold steps he took to ensure security and profit for his family. It was here that Barghest gained a Until one day he took a step too far, a fraud payment here, a misdirection there, and Rhys ended up ripping off a set of Scavs out of a deal for some Tech Weapons they desired. 4000 Eddies didn’t seem like much for a set of lives, but it seemed the Scavs took personal offense at what Rhys and their family had done. By the time Rhys had realised what had occurred on the night when they came for vengeance, his parents were already left… and soon he would have been too, if not for Barghest catching the Scavs dead in their tracks. And after that day, Rhys had a new family… Coming to the current time, Rhys has been serving in Barghest for about six years now, becoming a fairly decent netrunner for them. Since he was Dogtown born and raised, nobody outside of Barghest really knew about him… and that was perfect for what they needed him to do to prove himself next… venture beyond the walls… and be the Barghest’s ears within the greater Night City.
Known Affiliations
** Barghest
Reference Images
**
RP Hooks
** * Optional -- What might draw others to interact with this character? Generally I think this character is going to be the one instigating conversation, but perhaps people might be interested on why he’s so nosy at times… or the fact he seems to always be trying to place himself to hear the right things at the right time.
Additional Notes
** I spoke to BinaryRogue about this character before making him. Chances are he’ll only be openly displaying Barghest iconography at certain times.

Falconi (The Rabbit) - falconirabbit

Parsed: Falconi (The Rabbit) — username falconirabbit
Resolved: Falconi Rabbit 🔜 DenFur (id: 1107456883096301691)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1475116975649853652 • archived
Name
Falconi (The Rabbit)
Age
46
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Informant/Middleman
Psychological Profile
Callous and borderline sociopathic with a distinct lack of empathy. Not because he IS a sociopath, but because life has taught him that empathy and compassion are characteristics of the weak to be exploited by the strong. He has a distinct need for an emotional connection that he's been deprived of for his entire life, but this emotional starvation has caused him to forget what that connection feels like. Feel pain long enough and consistently enough, and it just becomes your new baseline. That's where he is currently. Not because he chooses it or because he is incapable of anything else, but because he just doesn't know anything more.
Physical Description
Stands 4'7" (220cm) at the top of his head (5'10" with the ears) 110# (85kg) Very muscular and lean but not like a body builder. Soft, short, gray fur on most of his body with white palms, feet and tuxedo markings. Notable white 'freckles' on his back, shoulders and flank. His hair is styled and colored hit long front bangs but cut short in the back. He has naturally hazel green eyes but his right eye is blue and clearly cybernetic (See Chrome below). He is missing his left leg from the knee down and the shin is cybernetic. His foot however is a prosthetic replica of his missing foot so that he looks completely intact when wearing pants. He has a thick, short, fluffy rabbit tail.
Chrome / Implants
Enhanced Ear mods allow his incredible sensitive hearing but also noise suppression. His ears have clear trace lines and the openings are covered with an obvious speaker-like housing. (2) Sub-Dermal plating. The plating does protrude thinly above the skin - more akin to regular dermal plating but without the armor protection - leaving islands of plating visible on his body. (2) Smartlink (1) Retinal Projector in the right eye (1). This eye is colored differently than his natural eye and has a curious CRT-like flicker to it. Cybernetic left leg, but does not enhance any abilities. It's simply for mobility. The foot is a prosthetic replication of his natural feet allowing him to look normal while wearing long pants.
Total Cyberware Points
6
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Falconi is a schemer. He prides himself on his ability to cut a deal, negotiate with runners and think three steps ahead of anyone else. His intellect has been his key to survival since he really cannot compete physically. He prefers subterfuge and misdirection when dealing with foes. He does not fight fair when confronted with a conflict and will use what ever means he can - underhanded or not - to win and survive. He isn't overly technical and can't write code for example, but he understands it quite well and will often use the expertise of others when posed with a technical obstacle. He knows enough about a lot of topics to get into trouble so he avoids risking his own neck to solve problems. He prefers to use other people for more risky propositions. He is naturally fit but not inhumanly so and suffers from typical human limitations. He can brawl and scrap but he isn't a technical fighter by any means. He's a decent shot, but again would rather leave the gunfights to the gunfighters.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
a-22b Chao Smart Pistol (No ammunition currently) Smart business attire (trench coat, slacks, vest, shirt and tie) made from ballistic fabric (Level II) Archaic Zippo lighter Half-full box of imitation Cuban cigars (They're Nicaraguan). Aluminum drinking flask Data Pad tablet (IPad) Damaged roller suitcase containing an extra set of clothing (Jeans, shirt, toiletries) Pair of circular glasses with internal monitor - allows reading and minor control of my Data Pad tablet (Hands free QoL feature) (more)

Vianca "Taghmata" Locard - toasterbishop

Parsed: Vianca "Taghmata" Locard — username toasterbishop
Resolved: ToasterBishop (id: 194515769558564865)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1475107965584281800 • archived
Name
Vianca "Taghmata" Locard
Age
27
Pronouns
She/They
Occupation
Mobile Ripperdoc & Signal Archivist operating between the Badlands and Night City outskirts.
Psychological Profile
Controlled, measured, rarely raises their voice. Believes machinery accumulates behavioral imprint patterns from long-term users. Speaks in systems terminology, or bursts of binary static. Most individuals with cybernetic eyes and translators would be able to translate it. Emotionally detached in crisis — almost eerily calm during surgery or firefights. Trauma: Survived a convoy wipe caused by corrupted navigation firmware. Since then, obsessed with signal logging and anomaly detection. Behavior Quirk: Records ambient audio constantly. Claims silence hides data. Emotional Tone: Quiet intensity. Analytical. Unsettling eye contact (optics rarely dim).
Physical Description
Vianca stands at 6'2, rather lean, long-limbed build under layered chrome plating. Wears a hooded, EMI-shielded longcoat with red interior lining. Plague-style respirator mask with integrated filtration and signal dampeners. Dual green optic lenses with constant low-light diagnostic glow. Rib-like chest harness (reinforced interface spine mount + subdermal armor frame). General vibe: desert techno-ascetic. Intimidating but composed. Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear): Nokota D5 Sidewinder ( Assault Rifle ), Mechanic’s tool case (welding torch, portable power cell, diagnostic tablet), Reinforced Nomad riding jacket (light armor), Modified Thorton pickup truck (engine-tuned, hidden smuggling compartment, manual override ignition)
Chrome / Implants
Cyberarm (Dexterous) — 2 Precision surgery, firmware extraction, mechanical hacking. Tradeoff: Shakes under extreme stress. Weak to EMP. Phantom Limbs — 2 Extra set of controllable robotic arms for basic tasks. Tradeoff: Jerky movement; gets in the way. Auditory System (2 Points) Enhanced Ears — 2 Hear whispers through walls. Filter sound. Pinpoint origin. Tradeoff: Overwhelmed in loud environments. Circulatory & Immune (1 Point) Detoxifier — 1 Filters toxins effectively. Tradeoff: Constant thirst. Neural (1 Point) Netrunner Suite (Level 1) — 1 Basic Net access + quickhacks + interface jack. Tradeoff: You're always a little distracted--like you're only 95% in the room. Ocular (2 Points) SmartEyes — 2 Zoom, thermal, night vision, AR HUD, facial ID. Tradeoff: Eyes glow. Asynchronous blinking.

Physical Description

Equipment / Armor / Weapons
List all weapons, caliber, limitations, etc., Budget arms carnage Power shotgun | heavy weapon | shotgun ammo Trusty Large Wrench Melee weapon | heavy weapon
Backstory
Riven Knox grew up in the flooded outskirts of Jacksonville, Florida, learning to rebuild engines and repair failing tech before she ever trusted a corporation. She later moved to Night City and took a job with NightCorp as a maintenance technician, working on municipal systems, vehicle modification, and AV servicing after Arasaka’s decline. When irregularities began surfacing around one of her projects related to AV upkeep she found unimproved modifications to company AV that would have the company av fall out of the sky, when she brought it up to her management she received internal scrutiny. She realized she could easily be made the scapegoat if something went wrong. Riven left before the blame had a chance to land on her, choosing the streets over becoming corporate collateral. She resides currently in watson as a freelance repair technician

None as of right now

The Wanderer - vinnybot

Parsed: The Wanderer — username vinnybot
Resolved: VinnyBot (id: 172847414791766016)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1474762569486041098 • archived
Name
The Wanderer
Age
Unknown, presumed in his 30s
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Drifter
Psychological Profile
He's just here for a good time. Likes chatting with people and making friends, not a big fan of violence and tries to stay out of it as much as he can. Stoner. Those who are keenly observant though, may notice that there's a quiet awareness behind the haze. He notices more than he lets on. Tries his best to never lie, those days are behind him.
Physical Description
TBD Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: Auditory System: Circulatory & Immune Systems: Detoxifier (1) Hands & Feet: Shock Palms (2) Integumentary System: Legs & Mobility: Neural: Ocular System: FlashVisor (1) Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Miscellaneous: Enhanced Tastebuds (1) Internal Storage (1)
Total Cyberware Points
6
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Can roll a mean joint blindfolded Can hotwire vehicles Pretty skilled with his hands, whether for party tricks or other reasons Basic electronic repair, nothing crazy Good shot with a pistol Unintentional therapist
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Backpack Lexington Cheap lighter Synthweed stash
Known Affiliations
Knows some Nomads Friends (gotten high) with at least one person in every gang, yes even Maelstrom and Barghest FIA (previous)
Reference Images
TBD
RP Hooks
Old habits die hard, muscle memory doesn't fade If forced into violence, he becomes someone he doesn’t like being
Additional Notes
Connections with gangs can sometimes yield results Easy to talk to, always lends an ear
Backstory
There was a time when The Wanderer didn’t wander. When he was younger, he joined up with the FIA. They recruited him out of university and he accepted. He was young and it seemed like a good opportunity. At the time, he didn't have any strong feelings about the implications of what he'd be doing. His days were structured, deliberate, and accounted for. He worked intelligence contracts tied to government interests... the quiet kind. Infiltration. Surveillance. False names and patient conversations in dim rooms. He wasn’t a frontline soldier; most of his work happened before a trigger was ever pulled. He learned how to blend in, how to read people, how to move information without leaving fingerprints. Combat training came with the territory, but it was a contingency, not the mission. He didn’t leave because of some explosive betrayal or single disastrous op. It was slower than that. Assignment after assignment, he watched people get maneuvered like pieces on a board. Lives nudged off course for objectives that looked clean in reports. He followed orders. He did his job. And one day, after wrapping up a routine operation, he found himself staring out over the city and realizing he felt nothing about it. No pride, no anger, no justification. Just a bone-deep exhaustion. He was tired of being useful to something that never had to look at the aftermath. So he stopped answering calls. No dramatic exit, no confession, no blaze of defiance. He let himself fade into the noise of Night City, downgraded his chrome, kept a pistol for insurance, and chose a quieter life. Now he drifts. Takes odd jobs. Fixes what’s broken. Talks to strangers like they’re people, not assets. If someone notices the way he scans a room or how tension sharpens his posture for a split second, he just smiles. “That was another life, man.” And he means it.

Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Ex -trauma Security Specialist/Nomad
Psychological Profile
Subject presents as observant and reserved, demonstrating heightened situational awareness consistent with prior professional conditioning. Their background as a former Trauma Team security specialist has instilled a persistent alertness, suggesting ingrained threat assessment habits and a comfort operating under pressure. Communication patterns are typically minimal and deliberate, favoring listening and environmental monitoring over active engagement. Behavioral presentation varies significantly depending on neurofilter modulation. When regulated, the subject exhibits respectful and somewhat timid social conduct, indicating emotional dampening and impulse control that prioritize harmony and non-escalation. Without modulation, demeanor shifts notably toward extroversion — becoming outspoken, assertive, and socially forward. This contrast suggests underlying expressive tendencies that are normally suppressed rather than absent, pointing to adaptive behavioral masking rather than personality fragmentation. Overall, the subject demonstrates dual-mode social functioning shaped by both cybernetic intervention and occupational conditioning. Baseline psychological stability appears intact, though identity expression and interpersonal dynamics are strongly influenced by technological mediation. Personality, trauma, behavior quirks, emotional tone.
Physical Description

Riley 'Arachnid' Watts - Pizzakev

Parsed: Riley 'Arachnid' Watts — username Pizzakev

From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1421708136536084500 • archived
! Username "Pizzakev" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
Riley 'Spider' Watts
Age
23
Pronouns
they/them
Occupation
Net runner/tech repair/intel acquisitions Psych profile: An eccentric techie that is better at understanding hardware and breaking into systems then talking with people, often uses humor as a coping mechanism for anxiety and high tense situations
Physical Description
around 5'8 in height with a lean and almost skinny frame with blue eyes with black hair and some yellow highlights Chrome/implants Integumentary System: Chameleon Skin Miscellaneous: ICE layer Neural: Netrunner suit level 2
Total Cyberware Points
7 Skills/Talents/Abilities: stealth, hacking, repairs on high-tech equipment, marksmanship, and breaking into places they shouldn't be in
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
netrunning suit, Kyubi rifle, silenced unity pistol, modified and repainted trauma team helmet
Backstory
lived in Night city in the city center for most of their young life, raised by a single mom who was a member of trauma team then while on call she got killed by a cyberpsycho. After her death i moved in with my uncle who was also a trauma team member in the same squad as my mom. After a while, things were good, and I picked up on some tech-related and hacking skills quickly. My uncle also died on a call where he and his squad was trying to save a militech official who arasaka was trying to kill and he was caught in the crossfire. when my uncle died, i lived on the streets since he died and while living on the streets of night city i learned one thing....information is power....so i use my netrunning skills and other ways to gather intel and learn info i shouldnt know and sell to people who wants it using the helmet my uncle wore with some modifications, and i also repair any kind of tech weapon or gear given to me....doing my best to live in the city of legends RP hook: Players can come to me for my usual netrunning and hacking services like intel acquisition, if someone needs a location, plans and layouts on a secret facility that no one is supposed to know or find leverage or blackmail on someone someone else doesn't like, they can come to me. And of course, the other usual netrunning stuff like decoding an encryption, sabotaging systems, and stealing sensitive data ill even take care of it in person if needed to or by request. I some anger towards arasaka cause of my uncle and my overall goal is to do my best to live in this city......and screw over arasaka where i can

Korra Maddox - Medusa_Cascade

Parsed: Korra Maddox — username Medusa_Cascade
Resolved: MedusaCascade (id: 286338318076084226)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1472962645610074235 • archived
Name
Korra Maddox
Age
30
Pronouns
She / Her
Occupation
Senior Enforcer & Discipline Officer, Backstreet Butcher Boys (3rd in command) (Former primary enforcer before Corpse’s arrival)
Psychological Profile
Korra is calm, street-calculated, and rarely surprised. She reads rooms fast — posture, tone shifts, hesitation. She learned young that safety is conditional and usefulness keeps you alive. She jokes casually. Swears freely. Keeps things light until someone crosses a line. When that happens, her energy changes instantly, not louder, just colder. She doesn’t romanticize violence. To her, violence is maintenance. Correction. Boundary enforcement. She doesn’t care about softness, she cares about competence. If you’re trying and failing, she’ll help you up. If you’re coasting and putting the gang at risk, she will fix you. Loyal to Vinny because he proved himself. Respects Corpse’s efficiency but has little patience for emotional spirals mid-operation. Core belief: “If you’re here, you earn it.”
Physical Description
Tall, broad-shouldered exotic with a sharp, predatory silhouette. Black and purple fur with vivid neon accents. Heavy, reinforced tail with light defensive serrations, more heavy impact and control than slicing power. Bright purple mohawk, high-contrast cyberpunk aesthetic. Moves with relaxed confidence fills space without trying. Her body language shifts noticeably when serious: shoulders still, tail still, voice lower. 🔧 Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear): Reinforced spiked bat (primary melee) Carnage 4-gauge shotgun 🦾 Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: Gorilla Arms (+2 CWP) Auditory System: None Circulatory & Immune Systems: None Hands & Feet: None Integumentary System: Dermal Plating + 3 (Super visible on her knuckles, stomach, neck, and feet) Legs & Mobility: Reinforced Tendons + 2 Neural: None Ocular System: None Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Dense Marrow +2 Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): None Miscellaneous: GhostTag +1 Total CWP: 10
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Advanced situational awareness Debt collection & intimidation tactics Close-quarters combat Shotgun proficiency De-escalation through dominance Emotional & body-language reading Street negotiation Cross-border intimidation operations Not skilled in netrunning, hacking, or long-term strategy planning.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Spiked bat (signature weapon) 4-gauge shotgun Compact pistol

Bubbles - Sailor_bun

Parsed: Bubbles — username Sailor_bun
Resolved: 卂尺丂ㄖ几 (id: 658448164306812988)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1472570666258796728 • archived
Name
Bubbles Stage/Work Names:The Laugh Track, The Guide to Nowhere, The Smile,
Age
26
Pronouns
She/They/It
Occupation
Status: Independent Operators, tolerated by remaining Bozo splinter groups Circus Hosts / Black Market Facilitators Public Face: Entertainers, hype-girls, ringmasters, Aerial silk Dancer, silk Dancer True Role: Smugglers, Liaisons, Scavs, and Occasionally executioners
Psychological Profile
Personality, trauma, behavior quirks, emotional tone. What’s breaking in Bubbles: 1. She’s begun reusing lines, forgetting which ones worked on whom 2. She’s started luring people with lesser crimes to start feeling again 3. Occasionally, she hesitates not to spare them, but because she's unsure if the pull will be enough 4. She feels nothing during the kill anymore The rush comes before, not after 5. She’s begun escalating the intimacy of the lure to feel something again 6. Sometimes she lets them talk too long. 7. Sometimes she starts to resent them for trusting her. 8. She tells herself it’s just business. It’s not. Bubbles presents as gentle, warm, and disarmingly kind. Her affect is soft-spoken, patient, and reassuring engineered behavior reinforced by years of survival conditioning. She does not threaten, intimidate, or coerce. She selects. Her trauma stems from being raised as entertainment and weapon simultaneously. Affection, safety, and violence were always transactional. As a result, Bubbles equates intimacy with control and trust with vulnerability to be exploited. Core Traits: Soft-spoken, disarmingly polite, hyper-observant, controlling through reassurance. Trauma: Circus-born conditioning; fear of abandonment; learned indispensability as survival. Groomed to soothe violence rather than stop it. Behavioral Quirks: Reuses comforting phrases; smiles under stress; avoids raising her voice; plans exits compulsively. Disappointment used instead of anger. Emotional Tone: Gentle warmth overlaying constant vigilance. Panic suppressed beneath practiced kindness. Pathology Notes: Co-dependent attachment (Bomb); control masked as care; empathy weaponized rather than absent. Memorizing names, habits, and insecurities without conscious effort Repeating successful luring phrases when emotionally numb Hesitation driven not by empathy, but by fear that her influence is fading A growing resentment toward targets who trust her too easily Emotional tone is muted and hollow during violence; anticipation provides stimulation, not the act itself. She is aware something is breaking and weaponizes that awareness.

Travis “Barrage” Dunlap - Phoolery

Parsed: Travis “Barrage” Dunlap — username Phoolery
Resolved: Phoolery (id: 122199279447048192)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1472568763076444341 • archived
Name
Travis “Barrage” Dunlap
Age
30
Pronouns
He, Him
Occupation
Drummer, Singer, Rockerboy Merc
Psychological Profile
A wild-man, with a rockstar’s mentality.
Physical Description
A man with a Tiger Exotic Job done on him. A muscular build, with a mop of a haircut.
Chrome / Implants
Silent Step Soles - 2 Ice Layer - 1 Sub-Dermal Armor - 2
Total Cyberware Points
5
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Plays drums Trained Bass/Barritone Singer Trained in Tae-Kwon-Do Knows how to use handguns Knows how to fight with Tonfas
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
.45 ACP Pistol Pair of Tonfas Leather Jacket with Ballistic Weave Has a drum set (obviously can’t take it with him most places) Owns a very used Makigai Maimai P126
Backstory
The son of 2 Night Corp executives, and a Downtown Night City Native. Travis is the poster child of a spoiled corpo trust fund baby. Someone who’s never accomplished anything with his life and lives off his parents money. Rather than follow his parents into the Corpo lifestyle, he chose to be a musician. Ever since that moment he’s left a trail of single moms and kids in his wake of a reckless party boy, rockerboy lifestyle. Using his status as a NC citizen as a means to avoid any sort of child support. Travis isn’t a front man however. He’s had success as a drummer mainly, playing for a wide variety of solo artists. Touring on some occasions. He has managed to gather something of a cult following. Mostly thanks in part to maintaining his good looks, and mooching off groupies. Known widely by his stage name, “Barrage” he maintains a modicum of success as a C-tier celebrity and rocker. He has worked as a Merc in NC and other NUSA cities when needed. Picking up combat related skills over the years from various girlfriends who also happened to be Mercs. A dangerous play on his part, but hasn’t yet gotten him totally screwed. He’s no A-tier legend, he prefers to take more grounded jobs with little risk. Travis has been out of town for the past year, touring with the band “Bluff Lung,” after their drummer OD’ed in 2076. With the tour’s conclusion, Barrage has been cut loose, and has returned to NC to sleep on his parent’s couch and hit his old stomping grounds.
Known Affiliations
None
RP Hooks
Jaded ex-girlfriends, or his kids as NPC’s are more than welcome to be thrown his way by fixers looking to cause a scene. This man is a piece of shit.
Additional Notes

## 📝 **NCRP CHARACTER SHEET TEMPLATE** ### **Information we'll need:**
Name
** Vanessa "Cinder" Monroe
Age
** 37
Pronouns
** She/Her

** Dancer/Joytoy
Psychological Profile
** * Personality, trauma, behavior quirks, emotional tone. Vanessa is Playful and Seductive, loves to tease but always makes good on her promises she's always up for some fun. Trauma: Vanessa was violently assaulted by a "firm" (fat) build man. And as a result fears the more clubbier build individuals. Behavior Quirks: bites her lip or fingernail when deeply aroused. plays a lot with her Hair. Emotional Tone: Longing Seductive and friendly
Physical Description
** * Height, build, notable features, species/exotic mods, general vibe. 1.80m Female Curvy Build Exotic purple eyes, patches of blue scales on her body, black horns with blue flame like aura, blue scaly tail. multiple Ear rings on each ear, 2 piercings in bridge of the nose, nose ring, piercing in the bottom lip, long tongue. headpiece with blue gem inlayed. C-cup Breasts.
Chrome / Implants
** * Name the mods, what they do, and note any tradeoffs. * Note: Customer chrome and implants are allowed, but they must be approved for use * Slots, 1 Cyberware Implant per slot EXCEPT Miscellaneous which is unlimited: * Arms & Arm Attachments (2 slots): * Auditory System: * Circulatory & Immune Systems: * Hands & Feet (2 slots): Cybernetic Claws (1 CWP) Claws or stylized tools. Intimidation, fashion, or utility. Drawback: Metal click when tapping; never quite silent. * Integumentary System: Sub-dermal Display Plating Drako Tech (Custom) (4 CWP) Resistant to blades, blunt trauma, Pistol Caliber Project images or text from your body—RP IDs, tattoos. Drawback: Can be hijacked. May flash when you're emotional. * Legs & Mobility (2 slots): * Neural: * Ocular System: * Skeleton & Torso Musculature: * Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): * Miscellaneous: DollChip (2 CWP) Hardware-bonded collar with encrypted owner ID. Can be issued commands by chip owner. Does not remember anything in-session Drawback: If the owner is removed or dies, you're stuck in 'orphaned asset' mode—confused, depressed, glitchy. (to be Added Later potentially) Love Suite (Custom) (1 CWP) Both Mr Studd and Midnight Lady, interchangeable to suit clients desire, Boosted stamina, modular sensations, vibe modules. Drawback: Malfunctions in awkward moments. Buzzes audibly if overused. Tail Mount (1 CWP) Prehensile tail–style, weapon, or utility limb. Drawback: Sitting is awkward. It moves when you're nervous. Biomonitor (1 CWP) Tracks all vital signs. Can auto-alert partners when you're in danger. Drawback: Can trigger false alarms. You get “pinged” constantly when anxious.
Total Cyberware Points
**
Skills / Talents / Abilities

Equipment / Armor / Weapons

Michael Tullen - ironfatherminarus

Parsed: Michael Tullen — username ironfatherminarus
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1445629238140076218 • archived
! Username "ironfatherminarus" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
Michael Tullen
Age
38
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Edgerunner-Netrunner
Psychological Profile
Calm and friendly on the outside, manipulative and opportunistic on the inside
Physical Description
Height of 5'9, Causasian with clear signs of chromed-up skin, Black hair, Green eyes, Well dressed in business attire 🔧 Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear): Heavy calibre revolver, short barrelled for concealability 🦾 Chrome / Implants Subdermal Plating (2) Neural: Level 2 Netrunner Suite (3)
Total Cyberware Points
5
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Business/Bureaucracy knowledge, Hacking, Persuasion, Deception
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Heavy calibre revolver, short barrelled for concealability
Backstory
Originally working as a freelance Netrunner, Michael found himself in-demand during 4th Corpo. Now a man's gotta make a living and some extra eddies on the side is never a bad thing. Taking contracts in secret from both Militech and Arasaka, Michael used his knowledge of Netrunning and business to attack the financial assets of both sides before laundering a few extra eddies into his own account. Problem is, when you jump the fence too many times, you're at some point gonna get snagged. Both Militech and Arasaka eventually caught on to his deception and forced him on the run. Gathering what he could, he made his escape, changing his face and name with an unscrupulous Ripper-Doc, to whom Michael owes his life to this very day. Going on the run, Michael fell in with the Nomads. It was there he met the love of his life. For a time they were both happy but that was short-lived. Feeling slighted that he had played the game and was cheated out of his rewards by the Corpos, Michael left her behind one night, but kept a picture of her as a keepsake. Now returning to Night City, he seeks to reclaim what he has lost whilst also keeping his original identity a secret.
Known Affiliations
Militech/Arasaka - Enemies Nomads - Old allies/Friends
RP Hooks
Always looking for the next job in the hopes of building himself back up, Michael is always on the look out for work. Having a former Corpo to hand is always a useful thing for a fixer or a band of Edgrerunners to have in their pocket. When opportunity arises, it's to be exploited, even at the expense of those around him, but only when their usefulness has dried up. Never break up a lucrative business opportunity.
Reference Images

portrait

portrait

Alice - aqualiteva

Parsed: Alice — username aqualiteva
Resolved: AqualiteVA (id: 972754186380922910)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1472559247765012613 • archived
Name
Alice
Age
23
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
Club Security
Psychological Profile
She is forgetful can be violent under the right circumstances loves animals and operates without much fear of anything let alone death, she doesn't seem to care about much yet can be easy to fluster.
Physical Description
Petite with her implants being mostly hidden, she wears a old green jacket most of the time, eyes glow more from constant videos being played. 🔧Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear): A Backpack with the items in her backpack are, a box of 9mm ammo, her lunch, a medkit, a phone, a hacked laptop, and loose cigarettes 🦾 Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: 9mm hidden gun Auditory System: N/A Circulatory & Immune Systems: N/A Hands & Feet: N/A Integumentary System: N/A Legs & Mobility: N/A Neural: Netrunner Suite (Level 1) Ocular System: Smart Eyes Skeleton & Torso Musculature: N/A Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): N/A Miscellaneous: N/A
Total Cyberware Points
6
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Good with tech / able to fit into small spaces / can use words to calm things effectively
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Arasaka Tamayura Pistol 9mm / Switchblade / Old Flip Lighter
Backstory
Alice was born and raised in Night City, growing up in a small apartment with her parents. When she was around 17–18, her parents were killed in a routine mugging, leaving her to finish school alone and inherit the apartment. The loss pushed her into early independence and left her emotionally numb, pragmatic, and impatient with systems that promised help but moved too slowly. After graduating, she enrolled in a basic computer programming / IT program, relying on money her parents had saved without fully understanding how limited it was. She completed her first term successfully but ran out of funds soon after. Without corporate sponsorship, connections, or a safety net, she dropped out rather than take on long-term debt or beg for help. She left with real, practical tech skills, but no credentials to prove them. Needing fast, flexible income to keep her apartment, Alice took work as a stripper. It wasn’t a dream job, but it paid quickly and let her stay independent. Later, she had an illegal, low-profile cyberarm modification installed for personal protection. The implant was poorly vetted and never fully diagnosed. During a chaotic incident at a club, the weapon in her arm discharged and seriously injured a bouncer. The fallout was quiet but lasting: bans from multiple venues, medical debt, settlements, and whispers that followed her. She concealed the implant afterward and became paranoid about being caught unprepared again. Eventually, she shifted into club security work—not as a bouncer, but as back-of-house security. She monitors cameras, works access panels, runs quiet sweeps through maintenance spaces, and handles situations before they escalate. Her size works in her favor, letting her move through vents, corridors, and under-stage areas others can’t. Alice carries a small go-bag at all times—cash, phone, hacked laptop, basic first aid, and cheap food, because she learned the hard way how fast things can go wrong. She keeps to herself, appears fearless on the job, and can be unexpectedly violent under pressure, but is easily flustered by genuine kindness or attention. In a city where real animals are nearly extinct, Alice is fixated on them, old footage, braindances, robo-pets, and rumors of illegal exotic trades. It’s one of the few things that still feels innocent to her, and it reflects a longing for something real in a synthetic world. Her current goal is simple: rebuild stability. She wants to move up from her past, keep her apartment, pay off lingering debt, and prove she can survive Night City without falling through the cracks again.⁩
Known Affiliations
N/A
Reference Images
RP Hooks
N/A
Additional Notes
Rumors of manipulation, may be easy to throw.

Sedna - baronvondorf210

Parsed: Sedna — username baronvondorf210
Resolved: Baroness_Leina (id: 421257774492811264)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1472558367280074918 • archived
Name
Sedna
Age
25
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
gun for hire/merc/assassin
Psychological Profile
Calm in most situations, can be very social and talkative, but is also kind of a hothead and quick to anger.
Physical Description
194cm tall, curvy and has been surgically altered to look like a nardo (see reference sheet, ignore the shapeshifting part, thats not something she can do in RP)
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Militech Ajax Implants: Cybernetic Claws, Subdermal plating, smart eyes, Tail mount, Recoil dampeners. Total cost: 7 Skills/talents/abilities: Expert marksman, well trained in melee combat, social skills
Backstory
Sedna is the daughter of a CEO of a lesser known corporation which manufactured high quality weapons and ammo, which has long since been absorbed into Militech. She used to have a sister, Venera, who was kidnapped by Militech, to strongarm her father into selling the corporation. Instead of budging to the demands, he went after Mtech to try to save Venera, but the op went bad and they both died. Upon hearing this, Sedna swore vengeance. Sedna eventually did get it, after years of searching. Upon completion of her quest to avenge her family, she was lacking purpose, then after thinking for a while, she decided to hit the road once again. Thanks to her father taking her down to the shooting range since Sedna was little, she has good experience with guns, which she capitalizes on, offering her services as merc, though she also takes jobs such as rescues, asset retrieval, etc. Whatever brings in eddies. After hearing about Night City, and the opportunities that wait there, she decided to make her way there.
Known Affiliations
none

Cassian Knox - thecandybar

Parsed: Cassian Knox — username thecandybar
Resolved: Twix (id: 248593189408210945)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1472005062162387048 • archived
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
**General Information**
Name
* Cassian Knox *Nickname:* Hadal
Age
* 25
Pronouns
* He/They
Occupation
* Data & Tech Smuggler / Underwater Scavenger / Tech Salvager
Psychological Profile
* Upbeat, flirtatious, and casually funny in social settings; disarms people easily. The moment things turn serious, Cassian goes quiet. Breathing slows, body stills, eyes track everything. Under pressure, he becomes eerily focused and efficient, like his mind has shut down. Weaknesses: * Dry, enclosed spaces * Loud chaotic crowds without visual exits * Medical PTSD Strengths: * Thrives under physical and psychological pressure (slightly masochistic) * Multitasker * Rarely panics, even when he should NOTE: Has attacked Medical Personal before that attempt to give him first aid without his consent. * Triggers include restraints, surprise sedation, or multiple people touching him simultaneously.
Physical Description
* Partial Octopus Exotic. Dark purple skin with blue rings on shoulders, ears and cheeks. Orange cybernetic eyes. Four tentacles protruding from back. Height: 1.82 Meters Weight: 170-200 lbs NOTE: Tentacles will occasionally move and spaz out without his control. * Under stress or pain, tentacles may react defensively before conscious thought. *Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear):* * Modular Salvage Harness - anchors, retractable cables, hardpoints * Rebreather Mask - backup; usually ornamental * Encrypted Data Caches - waterproof, pressure-sealed * Compact Cutting Torch - locks, hulls, emergencies * Tracking Tokens x4 - waterproof, used to mark larger underwater hauls or caches *Chrome / Implants* * Circulatory & Immune Systems: *Cyberlungs* - 3 CP - Breathe underwater, through smoke, gas, or vacuum. | Breathing is off–slow and mechanical. You fog up rooms unnaturally. * Integumentary System: *Optical Camo* - 2 CP - Semi-Invisible when activated (50%) | You still shimmer and aren't anywhere near fully invisible. * Hands & Feet: *Subdermal Grip* - 1 CP - Lets you hold objects tighter than human limits—great for weapons or grappling. | Sometimes crushes fragile stuff by accident. * Neural: *Netrunner Suite (Level 1)* - 1 CP - Basic Net access. Ability to quickhack. Comes with Interface Jack to connect to Terminals/Vechicles/etc. | You're always a little distracted--like you're only 95% in the room. * Ocular System: *SmartEyes* - 2 CP - Zoom, thermal, night vision, facial ID, AR HUD. | Eyes glow. You sometimes blink asynchronously. **Total Cyberware Points**: 9 CP **Additional Information**
Skills / Talents / Abilities
* * Advanced underwater navigation & salvage * Data smuggling & encryption handling * Hardware Engineering (Tinkerer) * Silent takedowns & restraint using tentacles * High-pressure endurance & breath control * Double-Jointed * Good with his hands (Lock Picking/Pickpocket)
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
* * Diver Set - Armored Wet Suit, Bibbed Hood, Dive Gloves, Diver Mask * Electro-Harpoon Rifle * WASP Injection Knife * Secondary Handgun (W.I.P.)
Backstory
* Cassian grew up in Watson, near the water's edge and the Industrial line. Having witnessed corpos dump broken tech, bodies, and secrets into the bay like it was a forgetting machine, Cassian started to go diving for what he could scavenge and recover, but due to the toxicity of the water, he had to start swapping to chrome to function. The octopus bio modifications was originally meant for industrial deep-sea labor, but Cassian stole the prototype during a salvage op gone wrong and never gave it back. Going to the black market, he had the exotic procedure done, resulting in some mental fracturing in his mind due to improper after treatment.
Known Affiliations
* * Harbor gangs & dockside smugglers * Quiet corporate interest (unconfirmed) *RP Hooks?:* * A data cache he recovered contains live intel * Someone recognizes his exotic mods from a black-market operation * Body Recovery (for PD or Scavs?)

Mara Vale - nerdynightmare

Parsed: Mara Vale — username nerdynightmare
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1470165785560350782 • archived
! Username "nerdynightmare" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
Mara Vale
Age
25
Pronouns
She/her
Occupation
Trauma Team Member
Psychological Profile
Mara Vale is emotionally disarming without trying to be. She listens with the kind of attention that feels like kindness. Often, it is. Patients trust her. Coworkers confide in her. Strangers tell her things they didn’t mean to say. Empathy comes naturally to her and in Night City that is an expensive habit. She feels it when someone places their faith in her and suffers later for it; carries the weight of information learned “by accident,” knowledge that slips from conversation into consequence. She manipulates by being patient. By being kind. By being present. Panic rarely shows on her face but afterward it settles into her bones. She uses her influence on others sparingly and when she does, guilt follows close behind. Mara looks harmless and is often underestimated for it. They mistake her empathy for weakness. They neglect to realize that she knows far more than she lets on. She does not want to win at another’s expense. But she still does.
Physical Description
Mara stands at 5'4" with a soft yet steady build shaped by long Trauma Team shifts rather than aesthetics. She looks like someone easy to talk to, nice to lay on, and difficult to read all at once.
Chrome / Implants
Auditory System: Enhanced Ears: Higher chance to Hear whispers through walls, filter sound, pinpoint origin. (Overwhelmed in noisy spaces. Startles easily.) Arms & Arm Attachments: Cyberarm (Dexterous): Precision tool use. RP lockpicking, surgery, mechanical hacking. Weak to EMPs. Shakes when under pressure. Doesn't enhance Stamina. Miscellaneous: Biomonitor: Tracks all vital signs. Can auto-alert partners when you're in danger. (Can trigger false alarms. You get “pinged” constantly when anxious.)
Total Cyberware Points
5
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Crisis communication Trauma stabilization & triage Defensive combat Pattern recognition & Environmental awareness
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Cyberarm (Dexterous) with medports for specific medications and auto injection fingers. Performs dosage calculation and MAR cross referencing simultaneously. Indebted through Corpo contract. Tech Suit that moves like fabric but behaves like light armor. Cut and puncture resistant but certainly not proof. Eye Visor with vitals projection (self and patient). Often leaves it on while people watching. Augmented Cyber Spine programmed for postural stabilization, load redistribution and micro-adjustments to reduce fatigue on long shifts. Indebted through Corpo contract. Arcade token she keeps as a memento from her very first, very lonely night in Night City. When crowds get too loud or Night City feels too big, her fingers run the edge of it without thinking. Medical Bag full of….medical stuff. Duh.

Angel “Glass” Marinov - firecharge1

Parsed: Angel “Glass” Marinov — username firecharge1
Resolved: FireCharge (id: 1129945687761637377)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1447903673035259954 • archived
Name
Angel “Glass” Marinov
Age
23
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Netrunner, Info Courier for the Iron Hogs Nomad Clan Former Arasaka Net Architecture Recovery Program Researcher and Fixer Informant
Psychological Profile
Angel “Glass” Marinov is a study in controlled chaos - detached, loyal, and haunted by the constant hum of circuitry that keeps him alive. The screwdriver wound that cracked his skull and forced a glass replacement didn’t just scar him physically; it scrambled his ability to process social rhythm. He misses social cues - often speaking when he should listen and falling silent when words are expected. This leaves him awkward and quietly insecure around strangers, though he tries to compensate by mimicking others’ tone or humor. Around his nomad family and the few Night City friends he trusts, he’s relaxed, even energetic, regarding the topic or the job at hand. In work mode, Glass becomes someone else - cold, hyper-focused, and frighteningly calm. In downtime, he’s more like a cat: curious, quiet, and often lost in his own thoughts or buried in tech. He struggles to express warmth directly, but his loyalty is unwavering. Behavior Quirks: • Hand Gestures - Moves his fingers in quick, precise patterns midair, as if sorting data or organizing memory blocks: a habit left over from constant mental coding. • System Resets - Dazes off or freezes briefly when overstimulated: a subtle “system reboot” for his overloaded brain. • Mismatched Laughter - Occasionally laughs at the wrong moments, a misfire from damaged social timing that he’s learned to cover with a smirk. Emotional Tone: Detached and logical under pressure, but quietly insecure and gently curious when safe.
Physical Description
Height: 185 cm (6'1") Build: Strong but “mended” - muscle layered over scars and replacement work; built for survival, not aesthetics. Hair: Bald from trauma and stress. Eyes: Naturally blackish-brown, with ocular mods that change colour based on mood or neurological state. Skin: Pale with visible seam scars from reconstruction and cybernetic integration. Notable Features: Due to damage to the back half of his skull, he was fitted with a high-density polyglass cranial plate – transparent to the naked eye but reinforced with reactive lattice fibre. With a faint hum and pulses of lights emanating from the neural stabilizers beneath. Vibe: Controlled energy - the kind of person who seems half in another world yet grounded by necessity. Curious about machines, confident under fire, and comfortable in discomfort.
Chrome / Implants
Arms & Arm Attachments: • Cyberarm, 2 pts Auditory System: • None noted Circulatory & Immune Systems: • None noted Hands & Feet: • None listed Integumentary System: • None listed Legs & Mobility: • Knees rebuilt after scav torture, but no explicit cyberware listed Neural: • Netrunner Suite Level 2, 3 pts • Neural stabilizers beneath the cranial plate Ocular System: • Smart Eyes (color shifting), 2 pts Skeleton & Torso Musculature: • Reinforced cranial polyglass plate Universal Muscular: • None listed Miscellaneous: • Spasm Drone Port, 2 pts
Total Cyberware Points
9 points
Skills / Talents / Abilities
• Convoy & Route Coordination - Understands smuggling routes and tactical convoy defence intimately. • Field Engineering - Can repair or improvise electronics, vehicles, or comm systems under fire. • Social Engineering (Unorthodox) - His blunt honesty and lack of small talk can make people underestimate him or trust him too quickly. • Combat - Favors pistols and drone-assisted tactics; efficient, not flashy. • Quiet nature - Due to his nature, he can often be overlooked when enemies are looking for him in a crowd.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
• Malorian Revolver • Single swarm-based micro security robot (details pending)

Bayou - dustinn.com

Parsed: Bayou — username dustinn.com
Resolved: Bay! (id: 1058620824535445574)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1469969581216108741 • archived
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
**Name**: Bayou **Age**: 27 **Pronouns**: He/Him **Occupation / Role in Night City**: Former Pornstar, Paranoid CyberSec Intern **Psychological Profile**: TImid and tense to outsiders, more open to acquaintances/friends. A bit on the paranoid side, moves are well calculated with a strong sense of situational awareness**
Physical Description
** 5’9”, slim fit, illuminated blue accents, exotic type, canine/hyaenidae.
Chrome / Implants
** Slots, 1 Cyberware Implant per slot EXCEPT Miscellaneous which is unlimited: Auditory System: Enhanced Ears (2) Hands & Feet (2 slots): Cyberfingers (1) Neural: Spasm Drone Port (2) Ocular System: SmartEyes (2)
Total Cyberware Points
7
Skills / Talents / Abilities
High stealth during paranoia episodes, ethical and unethical hacking.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
** (still discovering cyberpunk weapons, would like some help here), basic hacking equipment.
Known Affiliations
** None at the moment of character creation.
Reference Images
** Art, screenshots, etc.
RP Hooks
** Attraction based on a former career in porn. Friendly inviting appearance. **Backstory**: Bayou’s roots started at age 21 with a start of a career as a pornstar after being approached by a talent scout who worded it as “low-risk, high-pay work”. At the beginning Bayou treated it like acting, following scripts, orders, and requests while disassociating when necessary. His shy demeanor translated well into certain scenes that made him appear helpless, his agencies quickly picked up on the “vulnerable” look and pushed him into scenes that violated professional boundaries. Oftentimes with scenes of no clear consent. This led to the start of his trauma and paranoia. To make matters worse, after a scene was filmed in Bayou’s personal apartment an obsessive stalker traced his location to show up at his door step, after reporting this situation Bayou would get blown off with excuses. “This is just the cost of visibility” among other generic responses. The trauma and paranoia got worse over time over little things, another actor touching him wrong, an awkward interaction at the bar, among other things. Bayou began to run background checks on people he worked with. He would memorize camera placements. Learned to read tone shifts, pauses and inconsistencies. It got to the point where the industry threw him in the bin, getting blacklisted under the table after agencies claimed him to be too “difficult” and “mentally unstable” These background checks led to his career in cybersecurity. Bayou started learning basic net skills to protect himself. Scrubbing leaked content, tracking doxxers,and monitoring forms for information about him. This eventually translated into a rather good resume for CyberSec contract work, keeping his work ethical for a while. From on the job training Bayou was able to further his CyberSec skills further, leading to under the table unethical work, primarily targeted at his previous agencies. Moving to Night City was a simple decision. Night City lets Bayou disappear in plain sight. No one asks why you know how to ghost a system. No one blinks at an exotic with glowing implants and nervous energy. Night City’s underside gives him access to information, favors, and leverage against others.

other

Kina Mazushī - Vexypu

Parsed: Kina Mazushī — username Vexypu
Resolved: Vexy (id: 480492827533377556)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1469968289013694631 • archived
Name
Kina Mazushī
Age
39
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Cleaner mostly for the Yakuza but will do some freelance if the gig is right
Psychological Profile
Physical Description
He is a short statured Exotic with the appearance of a black Shiba Inu. He dosent have a tail or beans on his hands. He has heavy bags under his eyes 🔧Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear): He uses a pistol chambered in 45. (Exact model for vr is the H&K MK23 Socom) 🦾 Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: GorillaArms Auditory System: None Circulatory & Immune Systems: None Hands & Feet: None Integumentary System: None Legs & Mobility: none Neural: None Ocular System: None Skeleton & Torso Musculature: None Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): None Miscellaneous: ICE Layer, Ghost Tag
Total Cyberware Points
5
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Hes a decent shot with his pistol. His main Talent is his efficiency when it comes to cleaning when hes doing a job for someone he makes sure to leave it like the person never existed at all. Resistant to alot of simple drugs due to high tolerance
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Latex Rubber gloves, Plate carrier, H&K MK23 Socom
Backstory
Kina was born into a rich corpo family in Japan. He never got the typical family experience. Instead he was groomed into success of taking over his familys corporation (Still working on the Corp). By age 8 he had taken his first life. He was handed a light caliber pistol and was told by his father. "In this life. There is no friends of family. Everyone will try to get one over on you. Like this man here. He tried to pull a fast one over on us and now this is the price. Never show weakness and never give anyone ammunition on you if you want to reach the top and be considered my son. Dont give anyone mercy." This message from Kina's father has been ingrained in him his whole life. Kina's childhood is mostly a blur. No friends or joyous moments just constantly working himself up the cooperate ladder. By his 20s he had been working in his family's corporation. Constantly chasing the goal of having a semblance of respect from his family he looked up to. To deal with the constant stress of corporate life every chance he would get he would spend money on high quality drugs of all kinds. This would increase his tolerance to plenty of drugs. During his mid 20s he was approached by someone a few steps up that ladder than he was. They expressed an interest in him romantically and sexually. Kina would agree to this person and they began sleeping with each other. Kina played into the part of a partnership with this man before he got enough information. Kina would take recordings that he got of previous conversations of personal life and of their sex life and blackmail his first partner. He held his power over his "boyfriend" to boost himself up the ranks. Eventually when he got all he could and stepped far enough their "boyfriend" wasnt useful to him anymore. He killed them cleaning up the evidence and making it look like they quit and headed out of the country. In his mid 30s he started to reach his goal. His hair had already started graying with the stress it all. That was until some new papers hit his desk. Straight from the top. He had to handle a job with Arasaka. Everything in it screamed like a red flag but he had no other choice. (I have not fully figured out what this was yet.) Everything went wrong as he guessed. Arasaka now wanted him dead and was forced to flee. He used his many connections to fake his death. It has seemingly convinced Arasaka for now. He got a new face as an exotic and a new Identity as Kina Mazushī and moved to night city with the Yakuza. Becoming a cleaner for them and using them to get to Night City with as little traceability as possible. He moved into beast side to lay low. Hes been there for a few years now Arasaka and the news still believe him to be dead. And his life of luxury gone to the winds.

Gabriel "Gabby" Torenti - hokucho

Parsed: Gabriel "Gabby" Torenti — username hokucho
Resolved: Hokucho (id: 314229341611622400)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1469967176722157772 • archived
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
NPC Application:
Name
Gabriel "Gabby" Torenti
Age
35
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
ButcherBoy "Face"/Diplomat/PR Rep
Psychological Profile
Fairly level-headed, tries to be as charming as they can be, offers to work on finding and delivering information for others.
Physical Description
5ft 10in, 151lbs. Exotic tailoring "Novabeast". White fur with pale lavender fluff. Augmentations give skin and eyes a stained glass look. 🦾 Chrome / Implants Auditory System: Enhanced Ears (2) Integumentary System: Luminescent Skin (1) Neural: Neurofilter (2) Ocular System: SmartEyes (2) Miscellaneous: GhostTag (1) and VoiceWeaver (1)
Total Cyberware Points
9
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Acts as a "Face" and representative of the Butcher Boys when one is specifically needed. Decently proficient at planning routes and noting potential throughfares in spur-of-the-moment situations. With their own skill and augmentations, they can read people extremely well and have been known to posess a silver-tongue because of it.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Ballistic-Weave Clothing, Plate Carrier, Reinforced Mask, Lever-Action Power Rifle (SOR-22 equivalent), M-10AF Lexington, Survival Knife
Backstory
Gabby grew up in a more rural part of NC, near the fringes between the outlands and the city proper as the kid to a family that supplied produce used in All Foods' Orgiatic brand of food. The thing that ended up driving Gabby away from it all was their abusive family. Mom couldn't stand up to dad, and dad was far too demanding and forced Gabby to do unreasonable amounts of labor on the farm to the point of illness in some situations. Eventually, Gabriel couldn't take it anymore and left. Trying to find a purpose or means of better life, they took one bad situation for another. Join a gang. At least that way they were treated better by their peers. At first it was just being an errand boy for them given how young he was when he joined. Turns out all the excess labor from his family did him some good, and he became a reliable courier and message deliverer between members. As time went on, members noticed how actually friendly and accomodating Gabriel tried to be in most circumstances, and seemed to be pretty charming when doing it! Eventually, Gabriel had to do dirty work, proving themselves with groups involving shakedowns and other less-friendly things. While unremarkable in this aspect, they were able to do what was asked of them. These things combined allowed higher-up-the-chain members of the BBs to notice his more specific skillset, and became known as someone who could work on relationships internally and externally for the gang. Their role was basically set now, functioning as a courier still (but for more risky or precious cargo and messages) as well as a go-between for members and unaffiliated sorts that wanted to do business with the Butcher Boys. Gabriel is a gang-lifer. Starting as young as they did, it is extremely unlikely that they will ever be "out of the game".
Known Affiliations
Butcher Boys
RP Hooks
Diplomat needed for deals or communications between factions or persons. Indirect contact as a "Middleman". Runner. Courier for precious or confidential items.
Additional Notes
Meant to function as a sort of mesh between PC and NPC. The character I played a month ago and continue to play as was just really fun to do and wanted to canonize them a bit ❤️

Lucas Shasta Walters - valincastor

Parsed: Lucas Shasta Walters — username valincastor
Resolved: Valin (id: 344284777257500673)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1469819986213343285 • archived
Name
Lucas Shasta Walters
Age
25
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
NCPD Officer.
Psychological Profile
Kind, Caring, Honest to a Fault.
Physical Description
Youthful, Muscular, Heterochromia (Blue left, Green Right), Moustache enjoyer, scars from abusive childhood
Chrome / Implants
Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): Auditory System: Circulatory & Immune Systems: Hands & Feet (2 slots): Integumentary System: Dermal Plating [3] Legs & Mobility (1 slot per leg): Neural:Netrunner Suite LV 2 [3] Ocular System:Smart Eyes [2] Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Miscellaneous:Ice Layer [2]
Total Cyberware Points
10
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Smooth but Honest- Walters is honest to a fault, but smooth with the way he talks. Observation- Walters has seen a lot, and will see a lot more. He can tell when something is amiss.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
NCPD gear, Personal Pistol, shotgun, tech rifle. APD Cruiser painted to NCPD colors.
Backstory
Lucas Walters was always a good person. He was born to a Black Lace addict mother, who left when he was too young to remember, and an abusive father, who beat him and his sister to the point of leaving permanent scars. Since they lived in a trailer park, they had no way to escape, until one day, at age 14, he grabbed up his 10 yr old sister, tossed her in their dads run down pickup, got in a fist fight with his dad, leaving the man in a pool of his own snot and blood, but alive, and drove. Lucas stopped driving in Atlanta, raising his sister up with him for 4 years, when he decided to join the APD. He stayed there, learning the ropes and helping get his sister on her feet. When he was sure she was fine, with a husband and son, he moved away from Atlanta, to night city, where he joined the Department to do good by the people. Now he makes it day by day, until one day an incident led to him chipping in.
Known Affiliations
Vanessa and the Sweethearts Cafe, NCPD, Tengu
Reference Images
RP Hooks
NCPD- Lucas is a cop, thats a pretty big thing in beast side. Good Heart- He may be a cop, but he's got a heart o gold. Attempted murder- This happens as soon as the sheet is approved. Lucas is sent on a call to investigate suspicious activity at the edge of beastside, only to be gunned down by Gangers. While he was recovering enough strength to crawl back towards the Beast Side district, he and his bodycam had heard the voices of officers working on behalf of the upper ranks of NCPD to kill a threat to their operations, to kill him. Lucas will try to find these corrupt officers and uproot the corruption that tried to take his life Hypervigilant- Lucas comes from fear and pain, so he is always on the lookout for anything that could cause it in himself or his people. Overprotective- After years of watching his sister be abused alongside him, he cannot stand to see a child or woman be abused. He will act calm at first, but if the pressure is put on for him to leave it be by anyone, the perpetrators may findthemselves under physical or digital attack. Honest to a Fault- Lucas can't lie. Even when he does, he is a horrendous liar. In interrogations, he either has to twll half truths, or not talk at all, leading to his punishments being far worse. If he tells the truth, and it gets someone hurt, it is absolutely devastating for him.
Additional Notes
This Sheet will not be implemented fully until Walters is shot to near death and revived by the people who care about him, as he will not have had the cyberware installed yet. His concept is based on the 2020 ttrpg class of Cop/Lawman. To clarify an in character event involved with the Attempted Murder Hook is what causes this sheet to be implemented.

RAID (Redundant Array of Independent Disks) - scottyboiv
