Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1469817094370623776 • archived
! Username "scottyboiv" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
RAID (Redundant Array of Independent Disks)
Age
27
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Merc, Action Hero Braindance Recorder side hustle
Psychological Profile
Aspergers, Bipolar, Schizophrenic, ADHD, very shy around anything sexual or sensual, gets overstimulated and paranoid easily even without cybernetics, very socially awkward
Physical Description
undetermined race due to heavy cybernetics and always wearing gear, has had is face, eyes, and jaw removed to fit his masks, wears either a steel human mask with cameras (social(still weirds people out)) or a steel snarling wolf mask with cameras (combat/braindance recording), the other mask will be resting at the shoulder. obvious cybernetic limbs terminate at a rublar body suit with a flak vest on top and a bomber jacket over that. on the neck is a plethora of USB Flash drives directly connected to the nervous system that make up his RAID Storage to copy and record a 'cool kill' multiple times to sell * Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm):, cyberarm (dexterous) 2 precision tool use, lockpicking, surgery, mechanical hacking weak to EMPs shakes under pressure, doesnt enhance stamina * Auditory System:, * Circulatory & Immune Systems: * Hands & Feet (2 slots):, cybernetic claws 1 intimidation and utility hands never silent * Integumentary System:, * Legs & Mobility (1 slot per leg):, Cyberleg (runner) , 2 enhanced jump, run, silent landing loud stomp at full speed, no staminal bonus, * Neural:, memory bank 2 store perfect audio/visual recall confusion episodes * Ocular System:, smart eyes 2 zoom, thermal, night vision, facial ID, AR HUD eyes glow, asynchronous blink * Skeleton & Torso Musculature:, * Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail):, * Miscellaneous: scent scanner 1 track people, chemicals overwhelmed and gags at smells, 10 CWP- maintenance, immunosuppresants, High risk precision tool use, lockpicking, surgery, mechanichal hacking, intimidation and utility (claws), enhanced jump, run, silent landing, store perfect audio/visual recall, zoom, thermal, night vision, facial ID, AR HUD, track people, chemicals weak to EMPs, shakes under pressure, hands never silent, loud stomp at full speed, confusion episodes, eyes glow, asynchronous blink, overwhelmed and gags at smells, no stamina bonuses,
Skills / Talents / Abilities
stealth and lockpicking, combat style is flashy action hero, autistic rizz?
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
bushmaster arm pistol .556 STANAG with top mount laser sight and supressor, gas station stainless steel bastard sword(super cheap), rublar flak suit, flak vest on top, steel face plate with built in smart eyes, lockpick kit
Backstory
RAID was a merc taking odd jobs and got into action hero braindances on the side to make extra cash, is extra flashy and action heroey in merc contracts, and sells his kills as braindances with his neck mounted flash drive RAID setup. after a while he realized he has no actual friends or close family to hang out with and not even a girfriend, so he decided to try and 'socialize' with people and step out of the shadows of night city, he remembers knowing some aquaintances on an anime forum and asked if he could live with them (little_demonic and knuckson's characters) and try and make some friends and settle down before he flatlines, he is also starting to feel incredibly guilty about recording murdering people for money and trying to figure out how to use his current cybernetics for good.
Known Affiliations
a random fixer, a guy on the black market he sells his kills to, anime forum 'friends' (little_demonic, knuckson)

Kissi - ceruleanserpent13

Parsed: Kissi — username ceruleanserpent13
Resolved: Azul (id: 561958898106368000)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1449763976979415174 • archived
Name
Kissi (means “only” in inuit)
Age
34
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Mercenary, Hunter, and Survivalist
Psychological Profile
PTSD [Sole Survivor] Insomnia [Night Terrors] Polite and kind with a friendly demeanor. In work mode he assumes a professional detachment demeanor.
Physical Description
Snow Leopard Exotic Very muscular build Dreadlocks Ice blue eyes
Chrome / Implants
Scent Scanner 1 Chameleon Skin 2 Targeting Optics 2 Neofiber [Universal Muscular] 3 Ghost Tags 1 Thermal Insulation [Custom cyberware intended to allow for survival in subzero temperatures, with the drawback that it is easy to overheat in hot environments.] 1
Total Cyberware Points
10
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Tracking Hunting Marksmanship Survival
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Survival Gear [rope, matches, tent, knife etc, Day to day gear [a cooling insulated jacket, (list of day to day gear will evolve) Armor: Ballistic Body Armor Weapons: Custom Lever Action Tech Rifle Trip Mines Survival Knife unity [45 cal hand gun]
Backstory
During the earlier half of the 21st century the polar regions went through massive climate change. The Alaskan local tribes of the Inuit allied themselves with the Nomad clans for protection and survival, marking the end of their traditional lifestyle in favor of a more modern one. Their ancestral familiarity with the region allowed them to barter their services as guides to the nomads, who were seeking to establish alternative trade routes between the continental US and eastern Asia. Trade routes were valuable for smuggling, which naturally attracted a certain kind of unsavory sort, and before long the tribes were embroiled in territorial disputes between their Snake Nation allies and a Raffen gang that wanted to secure the territory for their own means. Their dwindling numbers threatened the surviving members of the tribe with near extinction. In desperation they sought to make a deal with anyone who would aid them, and Biotechnica delivered. In exchange for their aid in securing the region for their Wildlife Conservation efforts, they would give them modifications and enhancements that would aid their survival in the extreme environment. Biotechnica saw this deal as a win-win, gaining both test subjects for their burgeoning exotics program, and territory for them to experiment on wildlife which would go un-observed by the masses. Kissi was a part of one such Inuit tribe, though at the time he used another name. He was 12 when the attack happened, and his entire clan was wiped out by the Raffen. His survival was only guaranteed when he was picked up by a Nomad convoy that was hauling materials back from the Russian exchange. He made himself useful by applying his skills as a hunter and gatherer until he was old enough to begin working for the Nomads. He made the eddies to travel to night city by working as a convoy guide and guard. By the time he got to night city he was 34. In Night City. He made eddies by doing odd jobs and was a worker for hire. He worked gigs till he ended up in Beast Side.
Known Affiliations
Snake Nation
RP Hooks
Optional – He likes to tell stories of his tribe and old stories that he knows from his elders. He will do any kind of work that it's not “illegal.” He hates Raffen, and Scavs. Character Notes: The unity was a parting gift from the Snake Nation caravan Kissi traveled with to Night City.

Grief “Sündermann” Weber - x3z8

Parsed: Grief “Sündermann” Weber — username x3z8
Resolved: x3z8 (id: 122919204654415872)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1425257433281859584 • archived
Name
Grief “Sündermann” Weber
Age
31
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Netrunner and infiltrator for hire.
Psychological Profile
Coolheaded but not emotionless. Shows tactical prowess but isn’t used to working in teams. Gets very impatient with people who make mistakes or don’t do things his way. Seems to have an undertone of paranoia that affects his day to day life.
Physical Description
Biomodded feline exotic with black and white fur in a tuxedo cat pattern with a ringtail, blue eyes and blue claws. Has white tattoos on his arms, back, and legs.
Chrome / Implants
Arms & Arm Attachments: N/A Auditory System: N/A Circulatory & Immune Systems: N/A Hands & Feet: N/A Integumentary System: N/A Legs & Mobility: N/A Neural: Netrunner Suite (Level 3) [5 points] Ocular System: N/A Skeleton & Torso Musculature: N/A Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): N/A Miscellaneous: N/A
Total Cyberware Points
5
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Netrunning, corporate espionage, social engineering, general infiltration
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Unity pistol
Backstory
Grief was involved with megacorps from the day he was born in Germany. Corporate contracted parents, corporate housing, corporate schooling, the works. If asked he will tell you his name is the result of his mother having “an extremely German sense of humour” If he grew up in Night City or the NUSA, perhaps he would have been tempted from this path as he hit his teenage years, but instead he simply excelled in his schooling and was fast tracked into his own contracted employment. He spent most of his early adulthood working in the corporate espionage department of EBM (Euro Business Machines) specializing in netrunning and social engineering, his soul signed away but his bank account comfortably padded. Unfortunately for him, a job that involved infiltrating IEC (International Electric Corporation) went terribly wrong two years ago. EBM of course disavowed him after the failure, so he fled the EEC entirely and has been doing merc work in Night City ever since. He had a full body feline biomod done to evade any potential corporate pursuit, but he still worries about EBM and IEC sending assassins after him. Between the biosculpting and paying the Eurotrasher gang to smuggle him into Night City, he used up most of his eddies that weren’t frozen in corporate tied accounts and had to start over with nothing but the cyberware in his body and the clothes on his back. The title Sündermann started as the Eurotrashers nickname for him, poking fun at his German origin and the fact he needed to smuggle himself out of the country, and eventually stuck as his working name in Night City.
Known Affiliations
Eurotrasher gang (Neutral), EBM (Hostile), IEC (Hostile)
RP Hooks
He’s practically broke and tired of slumming it for over a year now. Wants to regain his old quality of life back but is always worried if he sticks his head out too much his old employer will find him (or perhaps IEC held a grudge).
Additional Notes
❤️

Kentesu R. Yuno (Callsign "Specter 1-1") - ghost_11b

Parsed: Kentesu R. Yuno (Callsign "Specter 1-1") — username ghost_11b
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1459517455956181006 • archived
! Username "ghost_11b" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
Kentesu R. Yuno (Callsign "Specter 1-1")
Age
32
Pronouns
He/him
Occupation
Tracker / Gun for Hire (secondary and main job of Ex operator for a pmc group designated as Black Division)
Psychological Profile
Cold, not very welcoming to most and hostile to others, Heavy bouts of ptsd from classified operations, long term but low use of augments has tuned his body to what he sports
Physical Description
tall and somewhat stacked build, approximately 6'5", Sports pre Combat deployment shark based Biotechinca upgrades 🔧Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear): a wrist attached knife and magnatized hip mounted sword 🦾 Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: Gorilla Arms(2) Auditory System: none Circulatory & Immune Systems: cyberlungs (3) Hands & Feet: sub dermal grip (1) Integumentary System: sub-dermal plating (pre combat retirement with modern upgrades) (2) Legs & Mobility: reinforced tendons (2) Neural: none Ocular System: none Skeleton & Torso Musculature: none Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): none Miscellaneous: none
Total Cyberware Points
10
Skills / Talents / Abilities
devistating melee combat abillitys, heightened senses from Spec ops training
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Normally a BP plate under his shirt, and weapon would be a custom double barrel under and over revolver chambered in .454 named "Titania"
Backstory
a larger lad hailing from the frigid lands of Alaska, from a small village once untouched by corprate or goverment, this he was forced into service to sustain for his family who later in his training were killed in what was ruled as a corprate accident when a hidden pipe line that ran under their village detonated due to cheap building, reducing the entire village to rubble their death proceded to push him to the brink on insainity but he managed to push through Due to im realising that if he goes down then his team will be dragged down with him.....that and a good chunk of goverment issued drugs helped stint his dive into insainity after his basic training he accelled at combat encounters allowing him to be noticed by an Operative who recruited him into Militech After a combat accident in which he went MIA from military combat logs while he was brought into Militech as a "Liquidator" after being brought into Militech, he was equiped with shark based modifications, reason are unknown to most aside from those with autorization to view his files, but some outside of the Militech speculate his modifcations were used to quote "Cause mass Mental distress" in naval forces in the black sea From there most of his 10 years of service is classified or heavily redacted The only reason the shark still works for Militech is the fact they keep him from going over the edge with military grade suppressents and a payment plan that keeps him triving....as tehy say....they bought his silence....and they bought his skill now his employers have him in Night city on a so called "Standby" operation, once its over....hes done here, back to Alaska to live a life of calm....thats if this place doesnt kill him first Or Militech for that matter, due to recent actions and recent orders, the shark broke his chains, now hidden from the eyes of his previous employers, he's now being hunted like a dog*
Known Affiliations
Militech
Reference Images
RP Hooks
The operative is either always on a mission or may be spotted hiding in an alley waiting for gov dropped equipment sent to him, aside from that if you see him shaking and hiding, stay away from him
Additional Notes
Operator has a slower left hook than his right due to previous injuries, as well as a large crook in his right leg due to "Previous Combat injuries"

Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
99th
Name
Axe Dussault Handle: Blight
Age
27
Pronouns
she/they
Occupation
shadowrunner / gun for hire
Psychological Profile
Moody, and headstrong she can be a bit standoffish till spoken to. Not the best with new people. When more friendly, she is a lot more relaxed with said person, making more jokes, less harsh. Though it tends to take a bit of time before she’s willing to be open with a person. Often finding herself detached to relationships themselves. Axe finds herself addicted to inhibiting substances to numb chronic pain from past traumas to her nervous system. When it comes down to it though she can be obsessive when it comes to completing her mission or task, making risky decisions to finish them if necessary. Even enjoying the risk at the end of the day, to an unhealthy degree. “Nobody has your best intent in mind.” “NUSA is built with the blood of the people” “I miss my squad more than anything and regret failing to protect them.” “The only thrill I get in my living death is the fear of truly dying.”
Physical Description
Messy hair, augmented ears, eyes, tail, claws. Muscular build, heavily augmented legs, 🔧Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear): [Marijuana and other substances] [Lockpicking tools] [Dice set] [Pack of Cigarettes] [Military Pocket Knife] [Military Canteen] [Bloody NUSA dogtag] [Gas Mask]] Mask to hide identity and provide filtering of intense gases. [Holo Mask]] Mask to hide identity using a LCD display, mostly avoiding camera’s detection systems. 🦾 Chrome / Implants Circulatory & Immune Systems: [Optical Camo] 2 Semi-Invisible when activated (50%) You still shimmer and aren't anywhere near fully invisible. Hands & Feet: [Cybernetic Claws] 1 Claws \ stylized tools Metal click when tapping; never quite silent. She is often quite obsessive when cleaning her claws. Integumentary System: Legs & Mobility: [Cyberlegs (Runner)] 2 Jump farther, run faster, land silently. Parkour beast. Loud stomp at full speed. Doesn't enhance Stamina, often used to get into hidden spots. Occasionally causes chronic pain from leg loss. Neural: [Netrunner Suite (Level 1)] 1 Basic Net access. Ability to quickhack. Comes with Interface Jack to connect to Terminals/Vehicles/etc. She often utilizes it for door openings and pulling files. Always a little distracted--like you're only 95% in the room. Ocular System: [Smart Eyes] 2 Zoom, thermal, night vision, facial ID, AR HUD. Eyes glow. Sometimes when overwhelmed can cause painful migraines. Miscellaneous: [VoiceWeavert] 1 Real-time voice modulation—change pitch, mimic accents, disguise yourself. Gets stuck mid-shift. You glitch between voices during arguments. (I can and will swap between accents when angry)
Total Cyberware Points
9

Ace Tengamee - lucky_ace.

Parsed: Ace Tengamee — username lucky_ace.
Resolved: Lucky_Ace (id: 569745840147529728)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1467636857180262562 • archived
Name
**Ace Tengamee**
Age
**23**
Pronouns
**She/Her**
Occupation
**Casino Owner (Ace Casino)**
Psychological Profile
**Calm, observant, and unnervingly self-possessed. Ace rarely reacts immediately, preferring to let others reveal themselves first. She is patient to a fault, holding grudges quietly and repaying them with precision rather than impulse. Displays high emotional intelligence and an unusual tolerance for stress, hunger, and isolation. Values autonomy over power and refuses dependency—on people, systems, or technology. Deeply distrustful of corporations and anyone who tries to “improve” her.**
Physical Description
**Petite but solidly built, with a deliberately composed posture that draws attention without demanding it. Movements are slow, intentional, and economical—nothing wasted. Her appearance carries a polished, almost curated quality that contrasts sharply with Night City’s obsession with chrome. Horns curve smoothly from her head, often adorned or styled rather than concealed. Eyes reflect light strongly in low illumination, giving the impression she is always watching, always aware. Skin appears unnaturally pristine despite the city’s grime.** Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear): **-Scissors (concealed, high-quality steel; kept immaculately clean)** **-Tailored clothing reinforced for durability rather than protection** **-Personal analog accessories (cards, chips, lighters, tokens)**
Chrome / Implants
**None. Ace refuses cyberware of any kind. No ports, no internal hardware, no augmentation.**
Skills / Talents / Abilities
**-Keen Observation: Exceptional at reading micro-expressions, body language, and behavioral tells** **-Probability Intuition: Preternatural sense for when odds are shifting (no tech involved)** **-Psychological Pressure: Can unsettle others through silence, eye contact, and presence alone** **-Endurance: High tolerance for deprivation (sleep, food, pain)** **-Close-Range Precision: Deadly with small, intimate weapons** **-Casino Management: Expert in analog gambling systems, security through human oversight** **-Social Navigation: Comfortable across social strata—from corpo elites to street-level fixers**
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
**Scissors – Used with surgical precision; favors close proximity and control**
Backstory
**Born into the Tengamee family—an old Night City dynasty that valued preserved flesh over chrome—Ace was quietly deemed a liability. Her appearance and refusal to augment clashed with corporate optics, drawing attention the family couldn’t control. Betrayed internally and removed without public scandal, she vanished into the city’s underlayers.** **Years later, she resurfaced as the owner of Ace Casino, an analog gambling house operating beneath the city’s predictive systems. The casino quickly gained a reputation for strange odds, unsettling accuracy, and an owner who never touched the cards yet always seemed to know the outcome.** **Ace no longer seeks restoration of her family name. Night City is her table now—and she plays it on her own terms.**
Known Affiliations
**-Ace Casino (Founder / Proprietor)** **-Select fixers, gamblers, and undercity figures (unofficial, fluid alliances)**
Reference Images
*(Image provided)*
RP Hooks
**-A fixer wants to know how Ace Casino avoids surveillance** **-A corpo executive tries to pressure Ace into adopting “enhancements”** **-A high-stakes game where the outcome could shift a district’s power balance** **-Someone recognizes Ace from her past and shouldn’t have**
Additional Notes
**-Ace avoids prolonged physical contact** **-Refuses medical scanners or biometric checks** **-Never raises her voice** **-Night City tech fails to categorize her cleanly**

Reva “Letty” Del’rosa - isogod

Parsed: Reva “Letty” Del’rosa — username isogod
Resolved: Isogod (id: 221873649701879808)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1467631280505229562 • archived
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
## 📝 **NCRP CHARACTER SHEET TEMPLATE**
Name
Reva “Letty” Del’rosa:**
Age
25 **
Pronouns
She/Her**
Occupation
Ground First Responder (REO:Meat Wagon)**
Psychological Profile
Letty is typically an happy go lucky, extrovert who thrives off of feeling useful to others. They typically think about what's the best way to impress someone whilst making moves for themselves. ** * Personality, trauma, behavior quirks, emotional tone - Letty despite their happy go lucky nature feels like a wolf in sheep's clothing due to their affiliations and departure from Snake Nation and her sect of the Wraiths. Their personality often uses joy, self depreciation, and overall high energy as a coping mechanism to express who they are to others. They are your average gal with skeletons in the closet. As being an ex-member of a party of wraiths that was absorbed into Snake Nation, they feel as if they’ve got a long road ahead in the fact of redeeming themselves. They don’t really believe that they are worth their attempt as they’ve specialized in grave robbing and napping anything that was laying on the ground including bodies out in the badlands. When it comes to violence, they’re accustomed to it to a point where they could be drinking a can of soda while a scav is cutting out someone’s kidney right in front of them. Their mind is consistently in survival mode which means they’ve done nearly anything to keep the eddies going.
Physical Description
Tall and lean built exotic body with Kangaroo like features. Heterochorma eyes. Brown shaded fur and Brown claws. Hair style is kept short and often seen with a bun. They don’t seem to have any obvious notable features except for having mismatched eye colors and being a exotic. **
Chrome / Implants
** * Name the mods, what they do, and note any tradeoffs. * Note: Custom chrome and implants must be approved before use * Slots, 1 Cyberware Implant per slot EXCEPT Miscellaneous which is unlimited: * Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): * Auditory System: * Circulatory & Immune Systems: REO Detoxifier - Able to extend a syringe connected to a tube like device from the cyberware to filter toxins from a patient. - 1 * Hands & Feet (2 slots): Cyberfingers (Medical tools -1)// * Integumentary System: * Legs & Mobility (1 slot per leg): * Neural: Ice Layer - 2 * Ocular System: Kiroshi Hermes MK.1 - A set of smart eyes which combines information from different sources to enhance and generate medical overlay over a victim in order to quickly diagnose,stabilize, and treat an individual. -2 * Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Dermal plating - 3 * Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): * Miscellaneous: Biomon - 1
Total Cyberware Points
10** * MAX 10 at character creation * See our cyberware system here: https://shorturl.at/LdkiG
Skills / Talents / Abilities
REO Medical OS - Uses the Cyberware operating system built for EMT personal assisting in medical,surgical, and rescue based operations, The Cyberfingers they possess are for surgical and medical uses. They carry the REO Meat wagon field operation kit or the MMFO spray. This rapidly cleans out an area to prepare for emergency surgery. However the spray needs to be redone every few minutes to keep the area clean. Warning: spraying too much will poison people that are around.// **

Vamp - lupii

Parsed: Vamp — username lupii
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1439720057176457297 • archived
! Username "lupii" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
Vamp
Age
22
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
A Nomad solo/merc, doing what they can to learn more of their past.
Psychological Profile
Convinced himself he's perfectly fine (totallyyyy...) Never got over his past trauma Doesn't like being trapped/enclosed (reminds him of his kidnapping) Refuses to get Cyberware, his body's different enough Cautious around new people, very slow to trust Loyal when trust is earned Slightly uncomfortable around other exotics (at first) Prefers negotiating over fighting Does not like corpos Finds pride in his fangs
Physical Description
6'0 Exotic (Biological) Sabertooth-like fangs
Skills / Talents / Abilities
- Intimidation (only when necessary) Repairing and maintaining vehicles Immune to netrunner hacks (due to lack of chrome) Salvaging
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Malorian Overture (revolver)
Known Affiliations
- His Nomad family/clan
RP Hooks
An exotic A nomad, with the connections to boot
Backstory
Between 4 to 5, a young boy was kidnapped from their world. For near 6 months he was held captive by strangers, along with other children. One day he was take to a strange room and put under, and when he woke up, he was different. They made him an exotic, something he turned out to share with the other kids that shared his new cell. Someday they put him on a transport with 2 other kids, being taken to god knows where. Suddenly however, they stopped, and the children were found by a new group of strangers. They were Nomads, and after explaining so, they would be taken is as newfound members of the family. One of these Nomads would notice the sabertooth-like fangs the boy had, and gave him his name. Vamp barely remembered his life pre-kidnapping, not after all the traumatic shit they did to him. Later on he'd learn how the Nomads found them; some random line of text from a random terminal they found in a random facility they raided. The other exotic kids would leave on their own over the years, but not him. He may have looked very different, but they loved him as much as they loved anyone else. The Nomads were his new life, his new family, simple as that. What happened back then doesn't matter, the past didn't matter, that's what he believed. At least, he used to. One day, passing through a small town with the clan, Vamp would hear something that'd catch his ear. Someone at the bar was from Night City, and their niece there had gone missing lately. The circumstances of it specifically, though, felt oddly familiar to him. After a few hour's worth of thinking, he knew it was his turn to leave too. He told himself it's for the eddies, that it's to do good and an excuse to see more out there. Regardless, his family understood, and pointed where to start. Starting his search in Beastside, Vamp is determined to find her. But deep down, he wonders; Is this a coincidence? Or is this the past coming back to haunt him?

Sarah Lawn - mooserenity

Parsed: Sarah Lawn — username mooserenity
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1467280820573044915 • archived
! Username "mooserenity" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
Sarah Lawn
Age
25
Pronouns
She/her
Occupation
NetRunner
Psychological Profile
Intelligent but sheltered. Responds poorly to negative/traumatic stimuli and is likely to withdraw or shut down. Sympathetic but not naive, can be emotionally manipulated. Works well with others, but takes time to warm up to new people. Suffers from anxiety, prone to panic attacks if pushed too far.
Physical Description
Horns/ Tail/ Big tits mcgee Caucasian skin with a greyish tint, 6’2” tall. Bra size DDD46. Has purple succubi style horns and a tail and pointed ears. Frequently seen in revealing casual streetwear.
Chrome / Implants
Arms & Arm Attachments: N/A Auditory System: N/A Circulatory & Immune Systems: N/A Hands & Feet: N/A Integumentary System: N/A Legs & Mobility: N/A Neural: Netrunner Suite (Level 3) [5cwp] Ocular System: N/A Skeleton & Torso Musculature: N/A Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): N/A Miscellaneous: ICE Layer [2cwp] Scent Scanner [1cwp]
Total Cyberware Points
8
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Netrunning, Scent detection/tracking.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Street Clothes
Backstory
Born in the NUSA in North Carolina the only child of a corporate secretary and a construction worker, Sarah was always fascinated with the Net and naively dreamed of being a Netrunner like Spider Murphy or Rache Bartmoss. Her early life was happy, showing talent and dedication in her education. When she was a teenager her father was the victim of a worksite accident which the company blamed on him, leaving him unable to work and with crippling medical debt. After that things got bad, her parents becoming jaded and resenting having an extra mouth to feed. Right as she was about to come of age, her parents sold her to Biotechnica in exchange for clearing their debt and she became the subject of medical trials which included her chemskin, horns, tail, ears, and Scent Scanner. Sometime during this period her talent was recognized and they moved her from the trial program into their netrunning school, outfitting her with implants and training her to be a corporate Dweller. Finally getting to live her childhood dream, albeit in a twisted way, Sarah started to adapt to this new life and didn’t mind it for a few years. She even made a friend in the same program named Lucinda. This new “normal” was ruined when corporate execs pushed Lucinda too far on a project and she ended up comatose. The last straw was Sarah discovering Lucinda’s vegetative body being used for medical experiments. She ran away, joining up with a nomad caravan to get as far away from the east coast and NUSA as possible without being tracked down by the megacorp, exchanging her skills as a netrunner for the trip.
Known Affiliations
Biotechnica (Hostile, capture order) Lucinda (Condition unknown) Parents (Hostile?)
RP Hooks
Biotechnica would like their indentured employee back if they ever discover her location. Who knows what happened to her only friend (or her body)?
Additional Notes
I HATE SPIDERS IC & OOC

Sammantha Jackson - endevours

Parsed: Sammantha Jackson — username endevours
Resolved: (λ)Endevours(λ) (id: 128373878027321345)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1467279881183428608 • archived
Name
Sammantha Jackson
Age
27
Pronouns
she/her
Occupation
Netrunner, hired merc, joytoy
Psychological Profile
Cocky. Playful. Kind, always way over her head. Closed off. She thinks she is more skillful than she actually is
Physical Description
four feet five inches tall, Exotic with maelstrom based exotic parts on the outside.
Chrome / Implants
Luminescent Skin 1 Integumentary System Emit gentle illumination in darkness. You ARE the flashlight. Uncontrollable brightness changes with emotions. DollChip 2 Miscellaneous Hardware-bonded collar with encrypted owner ID. Can be issued commands by chip owner. Does not remember anything in-session If the owner is removed or dies, you're stuck in 'orphaned asset' mode—confused, depressed, glitchy. Mr. Studd™ / Midnight Lady™ 1 Miscellaneous Boosted stamina, modular sensations, vibe modules. Malfunctions in awkward moments. Buzzes audibly if overused. Netrunner Suite (Level 1) 1 Neural Basic Net access. Ability to quickhack. Comes with Interface Jack to connect to Terminals/Vechicles/etc. You're always a little distracted--like you're only 95% in the room. Cyberfingers 1 Hands & Feet Hidden tools in fingertips—USB, lockpick, small blade. Constant low-level clicking or twitching in fingers.
Total Cyberware Points
6
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Hacking, Flirting, Engineering,
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
M-10AF Lexington 9mm pistol
Backstory
Born in Watson, Sammantha was born into this world the oldest of 4 siblings. From a young age she was fascinated by the computers of the world, never managing to get her own until she managed to scrounge up an old broken cyberdeck, She repaired the old thing herself after 2 years at least and a few hundred eddies she spent herself. From then on she thought she was hot shit. Getting herself into netrunning and getting chromed up. She wound up working quite a few jobs for the maelstrom gang as a low level netrunner. She also managed to get herself into a small group of netrunners that are affiliated with the gang. Ultimately she became a merc, a solo, and took whatever jobs she could to help support her siblings and keep them fed. Even going as far as being a joytoy when funds were low enough. She was desperate but content to a degree. One day she took a contract from some corpo bigwig in Arasaka, he made her sign a contract, and she went along with it… the contract ended in disaster, it was way out of her skill range. As a stipulation of her contract she was given a doll chip under the control of the corpo bigwig. Now her will was not entirely her own and she hates it, a piece of eyecandy… an example to be made of what happens if you mess with the corp. She goes on whatever oddjobs her contractor requests of her nowadays, Clearly pushing some minor objectives for Arasaka. Whenever she is in control of herself she will be out acting as a joytoy. Giving herself just a taste of freedom through the one thing she chooses for herself. She dreams of being free of her debt and getting her freedom back. Where they’re from, key life events, how they ended up in Night City, goals, dreams, etc
Known Affiliations
Old Runner group, siblings she is still providing for. Her contractor an Arasaka corpo. Various regular clients when she acts as a joytoy, Various members of the maelstrom gang.

Escort 🧠 Psychological Profile Personality: Bubbly, happy, calm, can light up a room. The sad behind a mask kinda person Trauma: Physical Abuse from an abusive father she doesnt enjoy being grabbed and may become overly emotional if Triggered Behavior Quirks: • Naturally upbeat and warm. Smiles come easily, laughter. is soft and frequent. • A calming energy. People feel safe around her because she doesn’t rush, crowd, or escalate. • Tends to smooth over tension instinctively, sometimes before others even notice it. • Uses humor, lightness, or gentle affection to keep the emotional weather clear. Emotional tone: • Feels deeply, even when she looks calm. Emotions arrive. full volume, then fade just as. quickly. • Cries easily when overwhelmed, not because she’s fragile, but because her nervous system releases stress fast. • May apologize a lot, especially when she feels she has taken up “too much space.” • Struggles with feeling like her needs are an inconvenience, even while caring deeply for others. 🧍‍♀️ Physical Description Height: 5"4" Build: Thin Very Little Muscle Notable features: White Hair With Purple Eyes Species/exotic mods: N/A General vibe: Very kind and empathetic

Auditory System: • Enhanced Ears (2 CWP) Can hear whispers through walls, pinpoint sound sources. Side effect: Sensory overload in loud spaces, startles easily. • Noise Dampener (1 CWP) Filters harmful sonic frequencies. Side effect: Temporary deafness if overwhelmed. Ocular System: • SmartEyes (2 CWP) Zoom, night vision, thermal, AR HUD. Side effect: Eyes glow faintly; occasional asynchronous blinking. Miscellaneous: • VoiceWeaver (1 CWP) Real-time voice modulation, accents, tone shifts. Side effect: Voice glitches during emotional stress. • GhostTag (1 CWP) Face blurred in most security cameras. Side effect: Law enforcement finds this suspicious. • Biomonitor (1 CWP) Tracks vitals; can auto-alert trusted contacts. Side effect: False alerts when anxious. Equipment / Armor / Weapons

Backstory
Raised in Tokyo Bay Mimi had an abusive father but a very caring grandmother which caused alot of back n forth trauma, being shown love and hate. At university, Mimi found herself drawn to networks and infrastructure, to the hidden places where the city held itself together. She did work as a covert agent in Japan spying for networks for anomalies. Changes slowly happened over time and came gradually. Color bleeding where it shouldn’t. Purple settling into her vision like a bruise that never faded. Her hair lightened under stress until it turned pale, soft as ash.

"Lior London" - heliosstation

Parsed: "Lior London" — username heliosstation
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1464767093231587494 • archived
! Username "heliosstation" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
"Lior London"
Age
23
Pronouns
They/Them
Occupation
Joytoy
Psychological Profile
Lior is hyper-aware of power dynamics and control. They instinctively assess who holds leverage in any interaction and adjust their behavior accordingly. This makes them socially skilled but emotionally guarded; vulnerability feels dangerous, even when it’s wanted. They struggle with autonomy: craving independence while feeling safest within clearly defined boundaries. Lior has difficulty trusting kindness without contracts, and often assumes generosity is transactional. They are resilient, observant, and a tad bratty. Survival taught them patience over impulsiveness, but beneath that patience is a simmering anger they don’t fully know what to do with yet. Trauma: Prolonged loss of autonomy due to enforced DollChip use. Conditioned responses that sometimes trigger even when chips are inactive. Severe distrust of “benevolent” figure, fixers, handlers, or anyone offering protection with or without strings attached. Panic response to restraint. Behavior & Quirks: Automatically checks exits, cameras, and access points when entering new spaces. Keeps their cyberware meticulously updated and encrypted. Tends to ask clarifying questions even when they already understand, testing for inconsistencies or hidden terms. Uses humor and flirtation strategically, then abruptly drops it once control of a situation is established. Sleeps lightly and in short cycles. Keeps multiple backup IDs and burner agents, rotated obsessively. Emotional Tone: Lior is broken, they are angry, tired, and barely surviving. They want control more than comfort. Safety more than affection. When they do allow themselves to care, it’s quiet. Lior presents as calm, approachable, and professionally warm, but emotionally distant. There’s a practiced softness to them that never fully lets anyone in. When threatened or cornered, their affect flattens, voice steady, movements become more precise, emotions locked down. In moments of genuine safety, they become quietly affectionate, almost shy, revealing flashes of tenderness they quickly retreat from once noticed.

portrait

other

Cyrus "Cyr" Jacobs - trinidad_demon

Parsed: Cyrus "Cyr" Jacobs — username trinidad_demon
Resolved: Trinidad Demon (id: 174606587724300288)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1464763863206461692 • archived
Name
Cyrus "Cyr" Jacobs
Age
22
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Nomad Recon
Psychological Profile
risk taker with a hands on approch while providing street knowledge
Physical Description
Tall but slim and muscular build 🦾 Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: Cyber Arms (Dexterous) Auditory System: None Circulatory & Immune Systems: None Hands & Feet: Silent Step Soles Integumentary System: None Legs & Mobility: Cyberleg (Runner) Neural: None Ocular System: None Skeleton & Torso Musculature: None Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): None
Total Cyberware Points
6
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Light & Sound Discipline | Knowing how to move throughout the city or desert with the ambient sounds, Social Stealth | Not really one to cloak, but he does know how to blend in with a crowd in order to stay hidden with ghosting personnel in order to seem like another person trying to socialize in Night City, Endurance & Patience | With training from Barghest, he can stay in cramped or uncomfortable vantage points for hours. This helps for lying down or hiding, in wait for a target.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Constitutional Arms Unity Pistol, Old Barghest Armor and uniform
Known Affiliations
Barghest, Wraiths Nomad clan
Backstory
Cyrus "Cyr" Jacobs and his older brother Lionel grew up in Night City's shadows, two idealistic kids who joined the NCPD to make a difference. By their early twenties, Cyr was a street-smart patrol officer and Lionel an evidence clerk, but the department's corruption and poverty led them to a desperate choice: they accepted a covert offer from the mercenary powerhouse Barghest. Becoming double agents, they siphoned resources and manipulated cases, telling themselves they were playing a dangerous game for survival and future advantage within the city's ruthless power structure. This fragile double life shattered when Barghest command, unaware the brothers were their own inside source, assigned Cyr a critical mission: an NCPD insider had stolen a large sum of marked eddies to build a case against them. Cyr was ordered to hunt down the traitor. The irony was a gut-punch. He was being tasked to investigate his own crimes. Paralyzed by fear and paranoia, Cyr and Lionel scrambled to fabricate leads, their bond straining under the immense pressure as Barghest's scrutiny intensified. The operation culminated at a derelict industrial site near the Badlands. Cyr's squad located the target: a lone NCPD patrol car. With dread coiling in his stomach, Cyr approached and found his brother Lionel slumped in the driver’s seat, murdered by a single gunshot to the chest. The stolen money was gone, but the killer's signature was clear. A Barghest patch was prominently displayed on the windshield. This was no botched theft; it was a brutal message of betrayal and termination from the very organization he served. In that moment, Cyr's world collapsed. The guilt was suffocating; his complicity had delivered his brother to the slaughter. Without a word, he turned from the grim scene and fled into the night, deserting his squad and his old life. He plunged into the Badlands, a broken man with nothing but his sidearm and his trauma. For days, he was prey. Starving, dehydrated, and evading scavengers. Until he finally stumbled, more dead than alive, into the path of a Aldecaldos nomad convoy.

Pronouns

Psychological Profile
She is not quiet, curious and obedient. Outwardly compliant, and inwardly feral. She pokes systems just to see where they squeal, breaks in to explore but not steal. Rules are toys. Authority is a puzzle box she enjoys opening the wrong way. There is a constant hum of playful defiance in her, a gremlin energy that leaks out in small ways. Taking the long route just because. Standing too close. Smiling at the wrong moment. She delights in micro-chaos as long as it does not threaten the leash she knows is still there.

A 5’3 carnivorous deer.

NCRP CHARACTER SHEET TEMPLATE
Name
Melissa “Ember” Hensley

30

Psychological Profile
Honest, Blunt, level headed, workaholic
Physical Description
5’10” Muscular build
Chrome / Implants
* Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): * Auditory System: * Circulatory & Immune Systems: * Hands & Feet (2 slots): Subdermal Grip (1 CWP) * Integumentary System: * Legs & Mobility (1 slot per leg): * Neural: * Ocular System: * Skeleton & Torso Musculature: * Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Recoil Dampeners (1 CWP) * Miscellaneous:
Total Cyberware Points
2
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Sabotage, CQC, slight-of-hand,
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
# {BAWS Light Assisted Combat Personal Armor: Fenrir} A Light ACPA moderately increases the survivability and strength of a PA Trooper. A trooper can deadlift 50% of their suit's maximum weight capacity and carry up to 25% maximum weight capacity with no noticeable encumbrance Light ACPA are powered by a combined fuel cell/battery unit that lasts 48 hours and can be replaced in the field. All Light ACPA are considered watertight down to 30 meters, and have a filter/rebreather system that allows for 1 hour of sealed operation. The filter system also works on dry land. The Base Fenrir kit is a quick strike recon kit **Stats/equipment: ** Reinforced NanoCarbon exoskeleton supports armor made from a base of BAWS's SupraKevlarWeave suppemented by level 4 armored plates on various pieces of the suit. Gauntlets: Precision tool use. RP lockpicking, surgery, hacking./Zoom, thermal, night vision, facial ID, AR HUD. Helmet: Higher chance to Hear whispers through walls, filter sound, pinpoint origin. Lower exo: Shock-dampening foot mod. Complete silence when walking. / Jump farther, run faster, land silently. Parkour beast. Jumpkit: (See BAWS products doc) Long range secure radio: Allows Hoplite to communicate with TOC without utilizing the net **Weapons: ** C.A.S SMG: A 40 round recoil compensated SMG firing 6.19mm AP P2077 Pistol: .45 ACP automatic pistol Data knife: A data spike allowing for temp overrides of tech and doors through custom crafted deamons
Backstory
Born and raised in the smuggler city “Stateline”. Being a smuggling hub due to the city being the metaphorical bridge for both Northern California and Southern California. She fought for her and her family's survival against gangs, smugglers and for air to battle the toxic smog clouds that occasionally blew through the area from Southern California. But she still found a modicum of hope within the community that didn't try to sell each other out. As the states declared independence, Melissa felt compelled to keep what freedom they had and with a mix of smugglers, gangs and honest people. And at the age of 21 she joined the militia to protect the messed up home she grew up in. After showing a high aptitude to combat tests and sabotage, she was trained in a special operations unit. Her unit conducted various missions out east behind enemy lines and clashed with NUSA, Araska and Militech forces throughout the war. Once the war was completed and she returned to her home in Stateline, she returned to her normal life and picked up a job as a bouncer for one of the bars in town. A smuggler whom she befriended “Grave Dust” told her that he knows someone that is looking for someone with her set of skills and thus she was introduced to the syndicate. She saw what they offered; an escape from Stateline and something akin to true freedom.
Known Affiliations
Syndicate
Reference Images
* Art, screenshots, etc.
RP Hooks

Additional Notes

Ryder - rebskii

Parsed: Ryder — username rebskii
Resolved: ᓚᘏᗢ (id: 254757189405769729)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1464760159803805696 • archived
Name
Ryder
Age
21
Pronouns
He/him
Occupation
Solo
Psychological Profile
Deep trauma, keeps to himself, Resists attachment, wary of others
Physical Description
Fit/Lean, 6 ft, Turned himself exotic following his sister
Chrome / Implants
Arms & Arm Attachments: Auditory System: Enhanced ears Circulatory & Immune Systems: Hands & Feet: Integumentary System: Legs & Mobility: Neural: NeuroFilter Ocular System: Targeting Optics Skeleton & Torso Musculature: combat wired reflexes Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Miscellaneous:
Total Cyberware Points
10
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Gun skills, good reflex,
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Pistol, Trained hand to hand combat
Backstory
Ryder Pridemore was born in Heywood and lived most of his early life with his sister, Zoey Pridemore, and very sick mother, Pearla Pridemore. While Ryder’s sister was a Loudmouth hothead solo who always seemed to be causing issues for eddies, his mother was soft and sweet, always reaching a hand to his sister even when she would push away. Ryder never understood his mother, always asking why? Why help someone who has only caused issues and pain? His mother responded “Ryder, before you can judge someone you must try to understand their own issues and pains.” She explained that Zoey was forced into the Merc life to support their family once their father was killed by The Animals. Ryder, finally understanding all the weight placed upon his sister's shoulders, decided to help in any way he could. Starting with household chores and general maintenance, he eventually convinced his sister to let him work with her so they could pay for their mothers medication. After a few months of training, he was finally able to be of help to his family, taking some of the burden off his sister, but it couldn't last. Over time their duo gained them some fame, they were asked to take to their biggest job yet, Stealing Hightech Corpo Weaponry. Zoey told Ryder to stay back, but he insisted on going, stating that they are a team and whatever they do, they do together. After a long time of convincing, Ryder was successfully brought into the job. The job went suspiciously well, but Ryder's optimism kept Zoey’s mind off the dreaded feeling of a trap. When they went to complete the job, they were taken by The Animals. After they awoke, they found themselves disarmed, surrounded, and outnumbered. It was a trap from the start, the fixer got his weapon, while the gang got the chance to get rid of the duo. Using her skills as a solo, Zoey broke themselves free leading to a firefight. With their teamwork, they were able to hold the Animals back, but then a stray bullet hit a propane tank. Realizing her brother would be hit by the explosion, she took the dive, protecting her brother by any means necessary, even sacrificing her own life. Later wake up in a hospital, Ryder was all alone. asking a doc the situation, she explained that Ryder had a trauma team membership, leading him to be taken to the hospital, but only him. His sister sacrificed not only her pay to get him trauma team support, but also her life. After he was let out he returned home, his mother hugged him, crying in his arms for he was the only one to return back to her. A few weeks later, she passed, and left him a small amount of money from what should have been used for medication so he could start a new life somewhere far away. So with nothing left, he started his new life alone.
Known Affiliations
RP Hooks
Additional Notes

Backstory
Mom worked at a restaurant and met his dad who worked at militech and had Ayrn whos real name is Jacob Wren** dad diped out for an unknown reason leaving ayrn and his mom on thier own. his mom put him through catholic school for as long as she could with left over money in her acount from ayrns father till highschool. ayrn would met a girl around this time. they made a promise to save money to move out of night city while they were dating. ayrn dropped out of school to do gigs in the streets to make money faster. petty crime like boosting cars, stealing items here n there, BnE's. getting cught a few times along the way [criminal record under the name Jacob Wren] once he had enough money to move them both out his girlfriend took the money out of the account and snuck out while he was asleep, broke he went back to live with his mom for a bit who in his abasnce had turned to taking drugs to feel something. some months later she would OD and pass leaving Ayrn alone. Ayrn began to fight his own battle with body dysmorphia as well as the loss of his mom. a fixer by the name of Wallow [Wallie O'Donovan] took him in and offered to help with his body dysmorphia by offering to pay for exotic modifications. Ayrn took the money and undergone Bio modifications to make him an organic exotic. more expensive then regular exotic modifications but higher quality and allows the body to funcation as normal he would drop the name Jacob Wren at this time and go by Ayrn Rece after the procedue. however Wallow decided the money wasnt a gift anymore and now Ayrn owes him [Whatever the ammount the DM's decide he owes him for the organic exotic mods] and forces Ayrn to be a joytoy under him untill his debt is payed back to him.
Additional Notes
i intend to have Ayrn stuggle alot while playing him. not being able to aford much and be forced to do alot of things by Wallow or otherwise to bay him back Ayrn has never taken a life Ayrn has high walls up when it comes to a relationship and fears opening up agin to someone like that agin Works with other joytoys at the Nine Heavens (Wallows club in the meatrack map) ill roll with however this goes might have ayrn run his own gang Freakshow when/if he gets away and free from Wallow

From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1462557409917800713 • archived
Name
Amelia Hartgreaves
Age
35
Pronouns
She/Her/Doc
Occupation
Visitor
Psychological Profile
Balanced, for Cyberpunk anyway. Very concerned with her own wellbeing. Unheathy obsession with Biotechnica Medical Tech.
Physical Description
Heavily Augmented, styled like a human, some effort was put in to hiding the augmentations, but seams for tool deployment and maintenance panels aren't covered. 🔧Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear): 🦾 Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: Left Arm Replaced. It is a Biotechnica integrated toolset (Cyberarm) and on board surgical assist controller. Right arm, replaced, Millitech basic shell arm (The kind they gave you on discharge to replace the better one they gave you on enlistment,) modded, additional support struts installed so they're about as sturdy as a normal human arm now, contains Biotechnica sensors on the fingertips for limited vitals (Cyberfingers,) like pulse, if placed over an artery etc. It's core motor system was replaced with a Biotechnica system allowing the surgery controller to control this arm as a periphial, giving her two handed surgical assist. It's home brew and mostly works; it's fine as long as her right arm isn't trying to do anything too important during surgery. Auditory System: None Circulatory & Immune Systems: None Hands & Feet: For hands see arm. For feet see legs. Integumentary System: Her skin is whatever that almost skin like plastic is. It's sealed well against sand and dust. Luminescent Sub-dermal Plating. She spends time in the badlands Legs & Mobility: The motors are weaker than most human legs, especially for fast movements. These have been overdriven to let them act like normal human legs for a time, at the expense of increased maintenance. Neural: BiotechnicaOS. Loaded with packages useful to a Ripper. She pays a subscription to maintain access to those packages. Also gives her firmware updates for her arm. It's net capable, fully stock, no mods so it's basically just for net access. Has standard ICE. Ocular System: Biotechnica VitalsPro (Smart Eyes). Capable of performing most visual diagnosis automatically. Counting chest rises, pupil dialation etc. Linked to her arm's surgical suite, enabling some additional features. Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Skeleton and Musculature (Other than arms and legs) are still human. Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): None

Iris Calder - hyperextra

Parsed: Iris Calder — username hyperextra
Resolved: Account Disabled (id: 176060965756993536)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1462553207879503883 • archived
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
📝 NCRP CHARACTER SHEET 🪪 Name Iris Calder 🎂 Age 29 🏳️ Pronouns She / They
Occupation
Independent Braindance Editor & Memory Cleaner Beastside-based
Psychological Profile
Quiet, perceptive, and deeply empathetic, Iris has built her life around editing and preserving memories. Because of her Memory Bank implant, she struggles with emotional overload and occasional dissociation when processing too much sensory input. She avoids violence, prefershyperextra negotiation, and has a compulsive need to “fix” broken things especially people. Emotional tone: restrained empathy, quiet guilt, controlled melancholy.
Physical Description
Height: 5’6” Build: Slim, under-muscled, slightly hunched posture Notable Features: Blue Hair, Wears glasses, Subdermal Display along the collarbone; neural interface scarring behind the ears; faint ocular glow when active Species/Mods: Fully human General Vibe: Looks tired but kind like someone who’s seen too much and stayed gentle.
Chrome / Implants
Auditory System: Noise Dampener 1 CWP Filters harmful sonic frequencies Tradeoff: Temporary deafness if overwhelmed Integumentary System: Subdermal Display 1 CWP. Projects IDs or imagery from skin Tradeoff: Can be hijacked; flashes when emotional Neural: Memory Bank 2 CWP Perfect recall of visual/audio data Tradeoff: Occasional confusion when overloaded Ocular System: SmartEyes 2 CWP AR HUD, zoom, thermal, night vision, facial ID Tradeoff: Eyes glow; occasional asynchronous blinking
Total Cyberware Points
6 / 10
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Braindance editing & splicing Trauma filtering & emotional dampening (manual) Social de-escalation and negotiation Data hygiene & encryption Behavioral lie detection Streetwise networking & fixer communication
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Hold-Out Pistol (6mm) Concealable, unreliable under stress Light Reinforced Jacket Minimal ballistic protection Portable Braindance Editing Rig Encrypted Agent White Noise Generator Emergency stim patch
Backstory
Iris was once a junior braindance technician for a mid-tier medical corp that specialized in “memory therapy.” Over time, her work shifted from healing trauma to erasing inconvenient truths including deaths, accidents, and corporate misconduct. Unable to live with what she was asked to remove from the world, she fled and now operates independently in Beastside, offering illicit BD edits and emotional reconstruction for those desperate enough to pay. Her implants let her recall everything she’s ever seen, but that same clarity is slowly unraveling her ability to separate real memory from curated narrative. Iris now seeks one thing above all. The truth of her own past, and who might have rewritten it.
Known Affiliations
Beastside underground braindance community Local ripperdocs Low-to-mid-tier fixers Former contractor for Zetatech (unofficially blacklisted)
RP Hooks
Hired to clean or restore memories Holds dangerous secrets she doesn’t fully understand Being hunted quietly by a former corporate employer May uncover that another PC’s memories have been altered Provides emotional or informational leverage to fixers
Additional Notes
Strong integration potential for corporate espionage and investigation arcs Designed for emotional storytelling, fixer contracts, and long-term psychological arcs

Psychological Profile
Charismatic, calculating, calm. A man who despite his early life and namesake does not act out of anger or emotion. Every move is a well thought out Chess play. A gambit that he has thought through multiple times through multiple outcomes. Soft spoken, and highly empathetic but to the ends of manipulation typically. Rarely when his temper does boil over, it is a rage that is nearly uncontrollable. Only calmed when the realization that his well crafted facade has broken finally hits him through the fog of red.
Physical Description
A man done up in an exotic job to look like an Angus Bull. Built like a bodybuilder, and imposingly tall. Cyberware lines are gold plated, as well as his horns. His piercing blue and gold cyber eyes spin in clockwork rhythm, as if to accentuate his calculating nature.

Luna Bella Consorta - valincastor

Parsed: Luna Bella Consorta — username valincastor
Resolved: Valin (id: 344284777257500673)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1462272864198852792 • archived
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
[WIP]
Name
Luna Bella Consorta
Age
26
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
Civilian/Baker/Cook/Low Level Medic
Psychological Profile
Kind and Caring, Naive, Motherly
Physical Description
1.5 Meters Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear): Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments:N/A Auditory System:Enhanced Ears [2] Circulatory & Immune Systems: Oxygen Recycler [1] Hands & Feet: Integumentary System: Legs & Mobility: Enhanced Legs Neural: Ocular System: Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Reactive Muscle [1] Miscellaneous: Scent Scanner [1], Biomon [1] {autofeed to Biotechnica}
Total Cyberware Points
8
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Stealth, Cooking, Low End Medical,
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Insulated Backpack for carrying food
Backstory
Originally from the NUSA, Georgia to be specific, Luna left her home town to come to Night City to explore new possibilities. When she first arrived, she struggled to make ends meet, constantly breaking the bank with her charity in giving food to the homeless. However, one day, she was approached by a well dressed man who offered her a job. When she went in for the interview, she found herself in the Biotechnica builing, interviewing to be subjected to genetic testing. it paid extraordinarily well, and came with a lifetime allowance for visits to Biotechnica psychologists. Her Implants, however, even though they were organic, still required maintenance with immunosuppressants and ripperdoc visits. Now her regular income is from being observed by biotechnica scientists to ensure they understand how the implants are functioning with her body. otherwise, she is just living her life.
Known Affiliations
Biotechnica Research Division
Reference Images
RP Hooks
Biotechnica Test Subject, Charity Case, NUSA Past
Additional Notes

Jesse "Fawn" Snowmoon - jessestagdoe

Parsed: Jesse "Fawn" Snowmoon — username jessestagdoe
Resolved: Fawn (id: 1280442486153674753)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1460027657168359598 • archived
Name
** Jesse "Fawn" Snowmoon
Age
** Late 20's - They stopped keeping count a while ago, and aren't reminded often.
Pronouns
** any (they see themselves as fluid), they take any pronouns in stride, as a clue; it helps them understand how they are being perceived by others
Occupation
** Techie - Gear and Cyberware repair and design
Psychological Profile
** Very reserved and mousy, they are outwardly very quiet and prefer to go unnoticed; when approached, they are very friendly yet guarded. In the rare occasions where they find themselves around people they deem trustworthy (or when they are drunk) they explode into a bratty, playful and joking attitude. They prefer to keep to themselves and not inconvenience anyone, they are deeply apologetic and mindful when burdening others. They will always assume their company is undesired, and will give others' space unless explicitly requested otherwise. Fiercely independent in a very reserved way. They never assume others will come to their aid nor do they factor the help of another in their plans. Contradictively, they desperately long to be taken care of and protected, seen and understood. The loss of their Nomad tribe makes creating new bonds and attachments very difficult, due to fear of another loss. Their approach to bonding and relationships is from a place of hopelessness. They see all bonds as something that will be inevitably lost. They have little sense of belonging if at all, intentionally keeping themselves at the margin of everything and everyone; yet contradictively desire nothing more than to belong. At any given moment interacting with another, they will be assessing and analyzing their speech, microexpressions and body language to make a psychological profile of them. They seek to understand deeply, both for their own protection and the benefit of others. They usually have a very quick and easy grasp of any person's wants, needs, preferences and limits a few minutes into conversation. They see themselves as unimportant and expendable; if they could have given their own life for their tribe to have survived, they would have. They see themselves as sacrificial and wish for another opportunity to make a difference in someone else's life. They take themselves and everything VERY SERIOUSLY when acting from their outer shell; in confidence, and when intoxicated, they are VERY RELAXED about everything. Their gender identity shifts depending on occasion and company. As a techie, they are also a bit of a gun nerd and enjoy time at their braindance gun range. They like to remain a mystery, and enjoy keeping secrets and not being figured out... forever, if possible. Low pain tolerance and muscle mass, they are very easy to incapacitate.
Physical Description
** 1.71m, slightly unfit but able bodied, cervine, male yet remarkably missing their expected male deer antlers, they dress in a comfy manner. They often dye their hair and wear contact lenses. From an outsider's view, they seem "untainted" by Night City. The mystery lies in the possibility of this being simply an outward shell or a real character trait. Despite being male, their body is somewhat feminine. Their voice is naturally deep (much to their enjoyment when surprising others).
Chrome / Implants
** Fawn is VERY AFRAID of implants and body modification. They're somewhat purist regarding their own physical body; they do not judge other cyberwear users, though they do wince lightly when overanalyzing others' chrome.

Rougarou Wylde - stridertempxa

Parsed: Rougarou Wylde — username stridertempxa
Resolved: StriderTempxa (id: 171847467220860929)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1460025061452021883 • archived
Name
** Rougarou Wylde
Age
** 22
Pronouns
** he/him
Occupation
** - Alibi: NCPD Detective Officer. Answers to Arasaka as a NetRunner Hunter. - Arasaka Research Number is 4301812. - Callsign: *Clear_Eyes*.
Psychological Profile
** - Outwardly: Very polite; southern hospitality and suave. - Inwardly: Sadistic, stalker tendencies, narcissistic. - Trauma: Innate fear of Ripperdocs. Every single visit is akin to a kid at a dentist appointment. Must take Benzodiazepines for this. - Dislikes: Canine related insults in regards to his position/relationship with the Corpos. (Will result in near immediate aggro/possible physical confrontation)
Physical Description
** 6’3”, Gymnast Build, Exotic Canine Mods
Chrome / Implants
** - Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): **Gorilla Arms** Auditory System: N/A Circulatory & Immune Systems: N/A - Hands & Feet (2 slots): **SilentStep Soles** Integumentary System: N/A - Legs & Mobility (1 slot per leg): **Cyberleg (Runner)** Neural: N/A Ocular System: N/A Skeleton & Torso Musculature: N/A Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): N/A - Miscellaneous: **Scent Scanner**.
Skills / Talents / Abilities
** - Advanced Hand-to-Hand Combat to defend and apprehend high chromed targets. - Smooth Talker.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
** - Custom M1911 - Tonfa (if inspected: of Militech make) - Arasaka Tac Vest
Backstory
** - Grew up as a Watson slummer. Mother taught him how to use his hands to get what he wants, Father taught him how to use his mouth to get away with it. Around 16yrs, his slums were visited by Arasaka, who were recruiting for an “Experimental Initiate Program”; in which the people were pitched with: “Your chance to explore the world’s unknowns and have your name be known by the world.” His parents let him go after he begged to let him prove himself. - Cyberware Experiments were performed on him and his batch—most resulting in the subjects ending braindead or simply dead. Some grew extreme boons that were deemed “too volatile to nurture” and were disposed of. In his case, he was right in the middle. Stronger, faster, and most importantly, willing to prove himself useful, but with a hidden cost unbeknownst to him… - Arasaka rewards this by giving him a consistent job as an essential Bloodhound, to hunt Runners who oppose Arasaka. In exchange, his parents were given a letter of success and a small check of “Emotional Compensation”. They would see their son a whole lot let less now. His current alibi/cover job is part of the Night City Police Department as an Undercover Detective.
Known Affiliations
** - Jakob Don Myers (close friend/coworker)
RP Hooks
** - Charismatic, but almost too showy. - Willing to get into compromising positions to further his progress with a Target. - Seemingly a street dog turned Corpo Bloodhound, but with an innate desire to find a real family and no longer be treated as an Asset. - A possibility for him to betray Arasaka if other characters provide the means for a better gig so he can keep supporting his parents back - `I’m REALLY interested in the unique player to player interactions that can occur with a Hunter vs Hunted lens. The slower the burn the better. I want to help facilitate Netrunners’ stories by giving them a Player Cast Antagonist.`

disapproves of crimes but sometimes understands they are needed to prevent bigger syndicates from taking control and spreads information to prevent gentrification.
Physical Description
scrawny and a little muscle Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear): pistol, katana, and pointed cybernetic tail.  Chrome / Implants legs, arms, eyes, Arms & Arm Attachments: NA Auditory System: NA Circulatory & Immune Systems: Hands & Feet: shock palms 2 Integumentary System: Luminescent skin 1 Legs & Mobility: NA Neural: Memory bank 2 Impulse Splicer 2 Ocular System: retinal projector 1 Skeleton & Torso Musculature: NA Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): NA Miscellaneous: Tail Mount 1 Ghost tag 1  Total Cyberwear Points: 10

Backstory
as a kid he watched a lot of crime and decided he enjoyed gathering information on knowing what was up to stay out of crimes and other nepharious acts in doing so he got put into a lot of stressful situations that made him realize he's not good at being in those environment and instead sought out bars and other high gathering areas to get information so he could just survive. came to night city after hearing about some neat and interesting jobs and to feel somewhat safe. Crew up in rougher parts of town getting himself mugged at gunpoint not armed or anything., people would often fight him knowing he's not the strongest or greatest at hand to hand. Johns parents were often in debt to different people and gangs and those they were in debt to would often take him and beat information out of him or try to often leading to him feeling weak and exposed. Ophelia Everhart -ghosted_stoner.

Parsed: Ophelia Everhart — username ghosted_stoner.
Resolved: Ghost (id: 589945853364666379)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1460023839479038151 • archived
Name
Ophelia Everhart
Age
24
Pronouns
She/her
Occupation
therapist (“emotional support bunny”)
Psychological Profile
Very very mellow, suffers from Narcolepsy. Has hormone imbalances due to hormone modifications.
Physical Description
5’2, Black and white half exotic
Chrome / Implants
Circulatory & Immune Systems: Chemical Analyzer Hands & Feet: SilentStep Soles Neural: Memory Bank
Total Cyberware Points
5
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Oxytocin “musk”; she has built-in hormone glands, which can release a red haze when her heat (period) gets close. She smells like lemons and oranges with a hint of spice due to hormones changing her smell.
Backstory
When growing up, Ophelia was lucky, having political parents. She had a good home in Westbrook, a rich neighborhood. Growing up, she had the topline of everything, clothes, eddies, education but she didn’t know much about Night city itself. Her parents did not like when she went out alone. After graduating high school, she was getting ready to attend a university and planned to follow in her parents footsteps. To celebrate, a group of her friends dragged her out for a night in the city. They had been on Japan Street, a little buzzed and having a great time before chaos broke out ahead of them as a cyberpsycho was attacking. Ophelia was too scared to move, stunned in her spot as she witnessed this man kill at least six people, and two cops before finally being shot down by MaxTac. After that, she tried not to spiral from her own mental health, confused and traumatized from being so heavily sheltered. Her parents had to get her therapy when they realized she wasn’t getting better. It helped her get better over time, and even encouraged her to take on being a therapist to make a change in Night City. Her parents supported her fully, paying for college, program classes and her certificate. She decided to get bunny exotic modding done to be an “emotional support” person, along with small other modifications to be more mellow and friendly towards aggressive actions. She dreams of making Night City better, even if it's her parents' money.

Name
Frankie “Ar3gus” Miles
Age
28
Pronouns
They/He
Occupation
Netwatch investigator
Psychological Profile
“A mellow mind mets, a person who tortures themselves with puzzles” As long as they seem to have some source of “stimulation” or otherwise a tick, Frankie displays a strong tendency to string together oddities that nobody else seems to find. Yet when lacking a certain fire they seem to come off more so cold, or serious in many manners. A bored Frankie is a dangerous Frankie
Physical Description
Frankie shares both masc an fem features. Preferring to having to have changed their physical appearance to that of a woman. However they still respond to “He” or they. Frankie is lean built and well cut from the endurance of running through back allies and having to brush knuckles against skin when their guns and tech fail. However a freakish accident or what Frankie believes was a zero attempt occurred where most of their front face was blown off. With a combination of friends within NW and dumping their life savings they managed to get what is essentially a new head or rather…a helmet for a head. Within the clear glass surface of the helmet is a single yellowish glow which moves in accordance with what Frankie is looking at and can even display when they are drunk or hyped up on drugs. 🦾 Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: Auditory System: Circulatory & Immune Systems: Hands & Feet: Integumentary System: Legs & Mobility: Neural: Netrunner Suite (lvl 3 but unsure of rules on that) - 5 Ocular System: Smart eyes -2 Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Miscellaneous: Ice Layer - 2
Total Cyberware Points
9
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Netrunner reverse engineering/ ICE isolation /Personal Node carrier(has “blackbox” hardware connected to some of their cyberware in order to create a VM environment for their components allowing them to have extra protection from certain forms of ICE, or using themselves as bait for a hacking attempt.) Average marksmanship / Keen observer./
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Ar3gus(The helmet which now serves as there head,eyes,ears, and mouth./Leg plating(a gift from graduating into a full time NW operative. Only if momma Frankie could see them now…) Modular backpack./Ar3gus tablet(Their device which hooks into the PNC located on their person. Allows them to perform netrunning activities or find methods of sensory assistance.)//High caliber lever action Smart Rifle.

Carl “Stinger” Nemo - phoolery

Parsed: Carl “Stinger” Nemo — username phoolery
Resolved: Phoolery (id: 122199279447048192)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1459522249546797192 • archived
Name
Carl “Stinger” Nemo
Age
22
Pronouns
He, Him
Occupation
Solo-Merc/Maelstrom Ganger
Psychological Profile
A severely traumatized and deranged young man from a life spent in the ranks of Maelstrom. Kidnapped as a teenager, augmented against his will, and drugged up for months. He’s not all there.
Physical Description
Chromed to all hell. Like any member of Maelstrom it is all custom made or scavenged. His head’s not much more than a metal helmet, a brain bucket. A mouth like a bear trap, and no visible eyes. Like someone welded a full combat headset to his bonce and let him run wild.
Chrome / Implants
Note: All of Stinger’s Chrome is repo’ed or back alley jobs like most of all Maelstrom’s chrome. Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): Mantis Blades, real old models. Probably back from when they used to call them “Wolvers.” Not much more than sharpened spikes that shoot out from his wrists. At 18 inches in length, each, they’re very lethal in the right application. Activated by specific motions of the wrist, he doesn’t have total control. They’re a “reflex” more than anything at this point. Auditory System: Noise Dampener, part of the custom head case he’d been “gifted.” Prone to glitching, and bad quality as a result. Circulatory & Immune Systems: Hands & Feet (2 slots): Integumentary System: Sub-Dermal Plating, standard issue for a Maelstrom Pit Fighter. Under his palid synth-skin it don’t feel natural no more. Legs & Mobility (1 slot per leg): Neural: Ocular System: Flash Visor, part of the custom head case he’d been “gifted.” Sometimes can be triggered by bright lights inadvertently and blind him. Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Neo Fiber, arms and legs, the Maelstrom rippers really did a number on Stinger with this job. Sure he’s stronger, but the chop job has left him with a lack of feeling and tactile feedback. Often doesn’t know when that strength kicks in. Required the old Maelstrom “synth blood” special to keep cool enough for use in a human. He bleeds the milky off white synth blood of many Maelstrom gangers. Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Miscellaneous: CUSTOM - “Bear-Trap Jaw” - 1 Point - Part of the custom head case, Stinger’s mouth isn’t much more than a maw full of sharpened metal blades. His voice is projected by an old repurposed audio system. He sounds like an old radio that was scrapped and salvaged a few times over. Also, it required the old Maelstrom “synth blood” special.
Total Cyberware Points
9 without custom approval, 10 with custom approval.
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Stinger is a Maelstrom Pit fighter, so he knows how to fight hand to hand, but it’s not graceful. He’s something of an urban hunter/tracker from years running the north side alleyways. He’s got survival skills to match those years of running and living hard. He knows his way around a gun, but it’s the effectiveness of a veteran grunt. Don’t ask him to fix it beyond simple cleaning.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Since most of Stinger’s weaponry is built into him, he really only tends to carry a gat when needed. An old NUE he took a rattlecan of red paint too that he calls “Black Dog.” He’s partial to a fancy Machete he took off a Valentino he killed to earn his freedom, and wears it more as a trophy, but it makes a good weapon in a pinch. It’s just a machete though, nothing special. He keeps a few spare airhypos and inhalers for recreational use, and medications. Like most Maelstromers he packs and travels light. A spartan existence.
