From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1459521273871994975 • archived
Name
Geo Leman Handle: Hawthorn
Age
28
Pronouns
He/him Role/Occupation: Merc/Gun for hire, Smuggler. Psych Profile: Bitter and cold, yet masked with humor. Lacks social etiquette in sense, taking jokes too far without realizing that it’s past the point. Service related PTSD spikes and occasional derealization. Initially comes off as extroverted and egotistical, until barriers are taken down.
Physical Description
Height 6’2” Lean to muscular Long, somewhat messy hair Generally can be mistaken for a biker Chrome/Implants: Combat Wired Reflexes -Cyberware running across various muscle groups based around the Erector Spinae, the muscle group that runs parallel with the spine, assisting in standing and balance, allowing the body to support heightened reflexes on the trade off of always active, sleep is difficult, there is no such thing as relaxing, just waiting for things to happen. Smart Eyes Service related equipment, allowing for additional information intake during engagements. Smart eyes tied with heightened reflexes equates to lack of downtime for the body. Sub-dermal Plating Plating to assist in resistances to equipment used in smaller altercations, allowing for a lack of necessity to escalate responses. Subdermal Grip Cyberware located in the palms and fingers, allowing better grip in high stress situations, however due to the reflexes, leads to accidental breakage in what is expected to be downtime. Total: 9

Vike Stentton - jarren

Parsed: Vike Stentton — username jarren
Resolved: Jarren (id: 88126806967721984)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1459520031258972211 • archived
Name
Vike Stentton Media Name: DJ Malvour Gomorrah
Age
28
Pronouns
He / Him
Occupation
Pirating Radio waves for Late Night hosting, working as [media] to try and get some good scoops for the early morning broadcasting.
Psychological Profile
Data oriented, but second guessing themselves.. their friend was alive right? Hard facts prove the truth.
Physical Description
Tall and lanky with some lovely pale skin. A rather unique look in a world of color, at least, enough to stand out in their own right. 🔧Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear): (So far as i don't want to include thing's i wouldn't have ready by session 1) a nice mask to cover their face and a Saiga-12 shotgun. Working on currently a rather large hand-cannon, Along side some knives for close range defense.
Chrome / Implants
Auditory System: Enhanced Ears Circulatory & Immune Systems: Detoxifier Miscellaneous: Ghost Tag Internal Storage
Total Cyberware Points
5
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Enough Electrical and Mechanical knowledge to keep their equipment going. Lock picking and sleight of hand are tools of the trade. Planting bugs and grabbing data-shards
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Saiga-12 and a deagle on the side still working on the armor for the character! But wanting to at least get submission going 📜
Backstory
Drift nations are a fun time, get to learn plenty by being in right places in the right time as a child. You make a couple of friends and then one night in your teens, They just vanish, gone. The dude saved your life dragging you out of a firefight between some old poser gangs hoping to relive glory days. and by god you’re not going to let him just disappear. So you investigate, you find some ties to biotechnica doing sketchy things and now your doors getting knocked down by men in suits. So you stow away on a cargo ship. Working odd jobs as the radio man alongside mechanics repair. So what does a fresh off the boat investigator do? make enough friends to set up a radio station and now your spinning records on by night. Some post rock earned some credibility with Maelstrom and you get a couple of requests by gangers looking for the true news and not the paid for, cash fed slop the paparazzi spit out. the day though? During the day you’re scrounging around looking for more information on that corpo and hopefully… your friends still alive. And as a hobby? You’re finding old records and songs, wanting to make sure the corporations can’t stain the legacy of some of these bands.
Known Affiliations
Maelstrom chromie by the name of the stinger

Reference Images
She grew up on the streets, but lucky enough for her, her parents managed to get her into arasaka academy. While she learned a decent amount from there. But there was a programming course, so when she got off school, she would start to mess around with some programs and then after a while she began to write a weak program that would help her steal some money from some vending machines. After a while, she earned enough to get a surgery that allowed her to have fox ears and tail. but luckily during her recovery she would still practice her programming while improving. But while practicing, As soon as she got better, she went to do some work but she got into some run ins with the feds but because she was a minor she was charged with light crimes after that she stayed low and worked on her weapons training and slightly more programming. Once she was 21 she left Night city with the name “White Fox” to start a new life as a mercenary for hire in Chicago. While living there she picked up small gigs for a few years and when she was 26 she got hired on to do a big job But while in the middle of it a team member betrayed the group which resulted CPD swarming the site, luckily white fox managed to escape but now is on the run she manage to find someplace to hide after a few days Lazarus Team found out about white fox location and raided the place but instead of killing her they offered a job which the details were if she worked for them they would help her with her merc handle so during that year when she had to do lazarus sensitive mission she would use the name “Athena” and got a small rep as that name in Chicago underneath her white fox name but when she turned 27 she got orders to head back to night cities to help with the Fia incase they start anything cause they been gaining numbers as a relocation bonus she was allowed to keep the Nekomata she was assigned so later in the year she started to head to night city but on her way there she lost signal and once she gets told a fixer will meet her Social Equipment: 1x Knife 1x Sidearm 1x Cyberdeck 1x Normal Clothing 1x Sniper Rifle 1x Sidearm 1x Ballistic Rig

Blare - ghosted_stoner.

Parsed: Blare — username ghosted_stoner.
Resolved: Ghost (id: 589945853364666379)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1454706818700939345 • archived
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
“You miss 100% of the shots you don’t take.” -An Oceanic Whitetip
Name
Blare
Age
21
Pronouns
she/her/it
Occupation
Psychological Profile
Solitary, aggressive, but EXTREMELY curious. She has congenital analgesia (CIP) Congenital Insensitivity to Pain and Tetrachromacy. “It’s just a scratch”. Territorial, dislikes taller people/anything taller. Likes women more than men, has never actually had a full interaction with a female.
Physical Description
7 foot, oceanic whitetip shark. Covered in scars.
Chrome / Implants
Neural: Neurofilter Ocular System: targeting optics Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Combat wired reflexes Miscellaneous: scent scanner, enhanced tastebuds
Total Cyberware Points
10
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Backstory
Before Blair was even born, her father, James Murten was an ex-scientist at Biotechnica, one who was known to force exotic for sick reasons and was fired due to those reasons. Her mother was an unnamed victim to this experiment. The woman was impregnated, and 27 weeks later gave birth to a 13 pound premature baby, the woman passing not long after. Blares' beginning life was a blur, training, cages, pain. Everyday she was fed the same thing, a disgusting pink drink. Everyday. She hated it, but she had to get used to it, fighting the nausea and the sickness she suffered. She grew fast, and she grew really big and for years she listened and barely questioned her surroundings or situation. As she neared 21, she became curious, she wanted to leave, she wanted to see outside. Never having seen an exotic or people other than her father. So, she snuck into her fathers study to look for the keys, but instead of that, she ended up finding a file. The file went into morbid detail on what he was feeding her, on WHO he was feeding her. People. Exotics. Her body reacted first, making her start to puke involuntarily. Its pinks. She went into a heavy psychosis episode. She barely remembers, running, getting out of the lower level of the facility. She ran straight into her dad- and then there wasn’t much left of him when she came back to reality, she was covered in blood. She fled, being shot at by the turret system, and suffers heavy wounds before managing to escape. In a state of shock from blood loss and her reality and delirium, she managed to accidentally make it to Beast side.

Backstory
Born to a mom with an unknown father, Mother taught him tough love but he still loved her, Was a troubled student in school all the way to high school. One day he got home he found his mother dead and his house robbed, the burglar was still there so he decided to kill him, because of this he was given two options. Either go to jail or go to the military. He chose the military, started as a grunt but worked up the ranks until he joined the special forces, because of his trauma killing came easy. He eventually got to the rank of Lieutenant, he was asked to deploy to kill civilians so he retired on the spot. After the military he still had an itching to kill so he started training in MMA, people started calling him “Dodge” because he couldn’t be hit, heard of a fight tournament in b side so he traveled to fight.

Dodge loves fighting and his voices always keep him company. Might cause people to be concerned when he begins talking to the air.

Asha - sailor_bun

Parsed: Asha — username sailor_bun
Resolved: 卂尺丂ㄖ几 (id: 658448164306812988)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1457300239252983976 • archived
Name
Asha Merc names: Phantom, Hound, Zara, Tala, Scar, Sable, Calamity
Age
32
Pronouns
She/They
Occupation
Former Military Unit: NUSA 6th Urban Suppression Battalion. Currently: Solo Mercenary
Psychological Profile
Personality, trauma, behavior quirks, emotional tone. Ash learned early that the military doesn’t want people. It wants tools. She enlisted at eighteen, chasing structure and clawing her way out of Pacifica. The exotic conversion came two years afterwards, "voluntary" in the way orders are voluntary when refusal ends your career. The canid frame was designed for urban pacification: heightened hearing for crossfire zones, reinforced limbs for breach work, and a threat profile that made civilians comply before shots were fired. Pinned ears were part of the training. Instructors drilled it into them: ears back, posture tight, face hard. It cut sensory overload, kept them locked in combat mode, and projected dominance. Relaxed posture meant mistakes. Mistakes meant body bags. Ash never relaxed again. Her unit was deployed on internal actions. riot suppression, corporate protection, deniable raids where the targets were labeled “hostiles” and never mentioned again. She followed orders until the day command rerouted her squad to cover a withdrawal that never came. When extraction was called off, the message was simple: acceptable losses. After her crew was wiped on a botched extraction and Trauma Team stepped over her dying body, something settled into place and never moved again. So the anger stayed.

other

Casper - rebskii

Parsed: Casper — username rebskii
Resolved: ᓚᘏᗢ (id: 254757189405769729)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1457298088455700562 • archived
Name
Casper
Age
22
Pronouns
He/him
Occupation
Goal of being a NetRunner
Psychological Profile
Childish, Strong Minded, Sincere, wary of others, and a sense for adventure
Physical Description
5 foot 7 inch, fluffy and reflective to look like scales, albino and a small hood
Chrome / Implants
Arms & Arm Attachments: Auditory System: Circulatory & Immune Systems: Hands & Feet: Integumentary System: NanoStitch Skin Legs & Mobility: Reinforced Tendons Neural: Ocular System: Smart Eyes Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Combat Wired Reflexes Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Miscellaneous:
Total Cyberware Points
10
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Equipment / Armor / Weapons: Nimble, Fast Reflex, Heighten Scenes, MA37 Assault, Net runner hacks
Backstory
Orphans were selected to become exotic upon exotics, Promised a better life under Beatrice Collins. Extremely sheltered and heavily guarded and with only a Homeschool education. After getting fitted with new cybernetics, Beatrice informs him of his new life, sold to the highest bidder. Soon after guards came to get him ready to be transported but he refused. Pushing past the guards he ran and ran until he found one of the automated Vehicles, and with no time to lose, he jumped in and started the Autodrive systems. When the vehicle finally stopped he was in a new place he's never even dreamed of, Night City. With newfound curiosity and weariness from the long Journey, he sets out on his new life. Taking a look around he found people and exotics similar to himself, in all shapes and sizes, just like out of the stories he’s read! After asking around he learned about the world, learning that it is not unlike the stories he has read but much more gruesome and cruel. Seeing his weariness of Humans, an exotic tells him about the Eastside, a home to an abundance of Exotics Similar to himself. Thanking the kind exotic, he wandered some more until found himself at the Ripperdocs. They explained to him his cybernetics and how to use and maintain them. With all the new information he's acquired, he sets out to Eastside to start his new life on his own terms.
Known Affiliations
Beatrice Collins
RP Hooks
Additional Notes

A former assassin who is constantly on edge and too paranoid to trust people yet seeks connection and a place she can be safe. She’s been trained to handle stress, but that does not mean that it doesn’t eat away at her before and after the fact. It's nearly impossible for her to trust others, but is loyal to those she might, or those she owes favors to. Quirk: Will never consume food or drink that she didn’t make/open herself or that she didn’t at least watch the person making it to make sure it isn't poisoned.

Kayla - wufski

Parsed: Kayla — username wufski
Resolved: Wufski (id: 1154330938797473793)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1457294928299425863 • archived
Name
Kayla
Age
23
Pronouns
she/her
Occupation
Joytoy
Psychological Profile
Humor-masking, always joking or entertaining. Avoids serious subjects, sometimes joking at very inappropriate times to try and lighten the mood. She keeps a tight lock on the part of her brain that questions who she is, where she came from, why she’s here. When asked, she has canned responses. “I’m Kayla!” “I’ve always been here!” “This is where I’m meant to be!” Not easily flustered but knows how to fake it for prospective clients.
Physical Description
5’4, hour-glass build, mildly fit, pink medium length hair and pigtails, dog ear and tail biomods
Chrome / Implants
Internal Storage Allows for storage of small objects up to the size of a hot-swappable Mr. Studd™. Hot-swappable Midnight Lady™ and Mr. Studd™. Enhanced sensations due to custom internal texturing, vibrations, and increased stamina. Default in Midnight Lady™ mode.
Total Cyberware Points
3
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Basic hacking and lock picking - mainly used for petty theft.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Lockpick set
Backstory
Kayla was kidnapped while coming home from school in her adolescence by a sex-trafficking ring and DollChipped. She barely got to experience the innocence of youth before finding herself in strange rooms clothed one second, then naked or disheveled the next. She also found herself unable to speak, unsure if she physically couldn’t or was facing some mental block. Over time, and possibly due to a DollChip malfunction, her memories of before were lost. The only memory she has is a faceless figure, probably her mother, complimenting how pretty she looks in her new dress. Eventually Kayla met Eve, and was often paired with her. Eve became a caring hand to Kayla, helping her make sense of everything and slowly restoring her self-worth. Kayla never cared for what she wanted, never thought of hopes and dreams, never even had time between the endless cycle of strange rooms to even think of such things. Eve, having no DollChip, was able to make sense of the confusion for Kayla. By Eve’s lead, the two were able to escape the sex-trafficking ring and Kayla’s DollChip was removed. Now, with no memory of her past and little idea of how to even function in the world, Kayla finds herself in Night City. She was anxious at first, but now looks at the world with childlike-wonder. Having been kept in dark, dimly-lit rooms for most of her life, Night City feels like a beautifully fucked up paradise. She does what she has to survive and loves it, grateful to be living her life on her own terms. She learned basic hacking and lockpicking to get by on petty theft, but when she found out she could make money just having sex, she was all in.
Known Affiliations
Eve Starly (played by GooeyPancake) - Partner to Kayla, the two met while caught-up in a sex trafficking ring, were often requested for together as “twins”. They learned to look out for each other as a result, and now have an unbreakable bond between each other.

Terrance J. Scott - itsnolongeraboutcheese

Parsed: Terrance J. Scott — username itsnolongeraboutcheese
Resolved: JohnDarksouls (id: 1132365336071651378)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1454714150914625557 • archived
Name
Terrance J. Scott
Age
27
Pronouns
They/Them, Any
Occupation
Solo, Netrunner for Hire
Psychological Profile
Mostly there, though years in the net has left its mark.
Physical Description
A rather lanky exotic, with a screen where the face would usually be, not TOO offputting. 🔧Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear): The HIB-MK33 Heavy Revolver, and the Luger P-08 handgun. 🦾 Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: Auditory System: N/A Circulatory & Immune Systems: N/A Hands & Feet: N/A Integumentary System: N/A Legs & Mobility: N/A Neural: Netrunner Suite (Level 3) Ocular System: N/A Skeleton & Torso Musculature: N/A Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): N/A Miscellaneous: Tail Mount, ICE layer
Total Cyberware Points
8
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Experienced within the net, and not getting much outside time, T has about as much experience hacking as fish do swimming, though his social skills need work...
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
N/A
Backstory
Terrance wasn't always a runner, but he wanted to be. Studied in school, never acted out, once he was out of that wretched place, he got to experiment, slotted cyberdecks he had only dreamed of in school, saw parts of the net only textbooks had given him sight of, sooner rather than later he knew he wanted to do work with some of the biggest names out there... if they'd let him. His expertise was accessing corporate databases, personnel files, you name it, and yeah, sometimes it got him in trouble with the law, he had spent a combined 5 years in and out of prison for crimes the unauthorized access of corporate data, but he kept at it. Eventually he was finding odd jobs running where he could, breaking ICE, scraping the net to make ends meet. Something felt missing though, he now finds himself sitting in his home, hoping for a job that'll give him a purpose, something to thrust him into the big leauges, make a name for himself.
Known Affiliations
None at the current time, other than a few past work associates or runner contacts.
Reference Images
RP Hooks
Brother is a netrunner, he'd say the best, but not all agree. If you need quick, simple work done, let him know, He's always looking for a job!
Additional Notes
Be patient with the lad, he's a bit awkward.

From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1454714954195144765 • archived
Name
Gidgit Stitchwyre “Mama”
Age
22
Pronouns
She/Her (Intersex)
Occupation
Ripperdoc and Trauma Team
Psychological Profile
Confident in herself and her abilities to a fault. Altruistic but knows when a situation isn't worth the risk. Believes in volume over quality when it comes to things like "The Trolley Problem". Mama is always right. Doesn't stitch stupid. Doesn't have reservations about her body and flirts just for fun.
Physical Description
A "shortstack" Streetshark of a little over 3 feet and 150lbs. Usually keeps her hair tied up in a dreadlock ponytail. Her body is patterned after a leopard shark's and is purple in color. Has a singular golden tooth despite being able to easily regrow them. 🔧Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear): Working Kit: Trauma Team Encounter Protective Gear, Personal Hardlight Generator, Personal Cyberdeck, HA-7 Warden Submachinegun (BARGHEST variant, weapon was acquired without proper paperwork and deliberately tampered with to appear as a typical H7), Tsunami Kappa Pistol, Shock Baton, Various Non-Lethal Grenades (Primarily utilizes Recon grenades, but also has stun and flash when necessary), Bounce Back Injectors, Oxy Boosters, Combat Life Saving Surgical Kit, Advanced First Aid Kit "Casual"/Ripdoc Kit: Streetshark Adaptive Casual Swimwear, Personal Hardlight Generator, Personal Cyberdeck, Tsunami Kappa Pistol, Mini First Aid Kit, Survival Axe, Afterveil Motorcycle (Image below in chat log), Several Subscriptions to Various Cyberwear Providers, Synth Pot/Nova Jane 🦾 Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: X Auditory System: X Circulatory & Immune Systems: X Hands & Feet: X Integumentary System: Subdermal Display (1) Legs & Mobility: X Neural: Impulse Splicer (2) Ocular System: FlashVisor (1) Skeleton & Torso Musculature: X Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): X Miscellaneous: SmartLink (1), ICE Layer (2), Biomonitor (1)
Total Cyberware Points
8
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Hacking with proficiency when working with Bio-Organics, Combat Lifesaving, Surgery/Transplanting/Augmentation. Can "Frenzy" if overexposed to blood, but the amount has to be excessive (aka liquidation of an entire floor of organic persons for example) or, if brought to extremely emotional states (such as losing a loved one) which causes a rage-like state. Injuries persist as normal, but she becomes numb to most rational thought and may pass out from bloodloss or major injury without realising she's hurt.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
(See above?)
Known Affiliations
Trauma Team (Active Member), Biotechnica (Father's Employer)
Reference Images
(See Below)
RP Hooks
First Responder in regards to active policy holders or police requests. Reliable Ripperdoc with a low failure rate on her record for routine maintenance and augmentations. Has even worked with some Exotic/Custom installations. Need to make sure the Joytoys are alright? She can check them out. Can't afford a high-end netrunner or elite hacker? Gidgit can still get the job done at a slower rate, unless the job is a person, then she's an Ace. Slow day at the club? She knows she has assets. Maybe she can help fill a dancer roster if the eddies are good enough. She isn't afraid of getting her hands dirty. She can definitely do regular jobs where the job could use another gun and/or medic. https://docs.google.com/document/d/1HCenpf6ciT3Z4RziyuM7LZXm4h1iedH7Dd6xS7jliaA/edit?usp=drivesdk

Damion (Militech call sign: Deimos) - gamma148

Parsed: Damion (Militech call sign: Deimos) — username gamma148
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1454713373039132796 • archived
! Username "gamma148" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
Damion (Militech call sign: Deimos)
Age
*23
Pronouns
Occupation
Psychological Profile
Unstable personality, Psycho socio pathic tendencies (not cyber psycho) Jestful, taunting, plays with his food until serious, attempts to emulate emotions due to never having a family, Heavy PTSD due to being a slave and experimental unit at Militech, Has ODD, FASD, ADHD
Physical Description
5'11, Caucasian male, 23 years old, martial artist body build(like Bruce Lee), brown eyes, messy auburn hair, Is 23 looks like 18.
Chrome / Implants
Name the mods, what they do, and note any tradeoffs. Note: Customer chrome and implants are allowed, but they must be approved for use Slots, 1 Cyberware Implant per slot EXCEPT Miscellaneous which is unlimited: Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): Cyber arm(Dexterous) Auditory System: Enhanced ears Circulatory & Immune Systems: Hands & Feet (2 slots): Silent Step Soles Integumentary System: Legs & Mobility (1 slot per leg): Cyberleg Neural: Ocular System: Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Miscellaneous: Scent Scanner, Ghost Tag
Total Cyberware Points
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Non-cyber skills — Hacking, Stealth combat, Martial Artist(Trained in most martial arts, save for a select few) Gunslinger
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Weaponry listed below, no armour yet, Clothes on his back List all weapons, their usage, limitations: Two Pistols(duel wield) a knife, Experimental WIP non cyberware hidden wrist blades(hidden blades)[All of these have their natural limitations as you would assume]
Backstory
Damion was born in Ontario Canada, to a extremely poor family. He never got to know his family, because at birth he was sold by them to Militech where he was experimented on, turning him into a tool of combat, an operative paired with Slimon(not his name at the time) Together they completed every mission assigned, both were treated terribly by Militech... The lack of family, and being raised as nothing more than a slave for missions lead Damion to never learn proper emotions, causing him to have psychotic and sociopath tendencies... Eventually Damion and Slimon broke free of Militech when Damion brutally killed their overseer and the guards of the facility holding them... On the run they became Edge runners, performing various dangerous Jobs, Damion also delved into, eventually they had to split up to lay low, the heat had grown too hot, everyone wanted them, now Damion reunites with the only family and friend he knows, once again, ready to work night city for every Eddie it can offer.

"ThunderWolf" - thunderwolf721

Parsed: "ThunderWolf" — username thunderwolf721
Resolved: ThunderWolf (id: 356610708797915146)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1454711927073935586 • archived
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
# 🖥️ Profile
Name
** "ThunderWolf"
Age
** 24
Pronouns
** He/Him
Occupation
** Mercenary, Street Kid, Hustler, Biotechnica Reject
Psychological Profile
** Optimistic, Estatic, Cautious, and Hyper (Probably from the overload of batteries and caffine) - but underneath that face lies typical bits of arrogance and anxiouness within new environments. Typical for any aspiring Night City mercs. Lonliness strains his mental stability, which is why he needs to be in the constant presence of locals.
Physical Description
** An Exotic Wolf with various blue furred marking around his body in noticable lightning bolt patterns, noticable on his left forearm and back. **🔧Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear):** Mac-10 # 🦾 Chrome / Implants **Arms & Arm Attachments:** N/A. **Auditory System:** Enhanced Ears (2 pts.) **Circulatory & Immune Systems:** N/A. **Hands & Feet:** Shock Palms (2 pts.) **Integumentary System:** Luminescent Skin (1 pt.) **Legs & Mobility:** N/A. **Neural:** N/A. **Ocular System:** N/A. **Skeleton & Torso Musculature:** N/A. **Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail):** N/A. **Miscellaneous:** Tail Mount (1 pt.)
Total Cyberware Points
** 6 pts. # 📋 Misc Info
Skills / Talents / Abilities
** Has the capacity of consuming, storing, and expelling elements of electricity and energy, such as the consumption of batteries for example.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
** Mac-10, Standard Merc Clothing, Thigh Bag, Fingerless Gloves
Backstory
** Thunder runs from a troubling past, having moved to Night City recently, still holding an emotional grudge against Biotechnica for their unfinished work: himself, which they considered "incompatible" to Exotic standards. This is because of the fact that Thunder wasn't suitable for many of Biotechnica's high stakes cybernetics for full Exotic conversion, however Thunder himself believes that they were just siphoning him for eddies. Feeling ripped off that he didn't receive the full transformation treatment, Thunder demands Justice against an untouchable corporation. Now entering the mercenary game, Thunder is content on proving that even "rejects" can make it big in Night City, only taking gigs for those in need (or even those on his "good" side). Maybe Thunder *wants* the reputation to show them off, or maybe he has ulterior motives. In anyone's eyes, he's a vigilante wildcard. He ensures his "victory" is bad guys not receiving the satisfaction, regardless of the outcome.
Known Affiliations
** Biotechnica - (Hates/Is Disliked) Militech - (Likes) NCPD - (Likes) Trauma Team - (Idolizes)
Reference Images
**
RP Hooks
** This person is trying to survive in a city as a means to get what he wants, yet his main conflict is whether he wants to get absolute justice or when does it escalate to brutality?
Additional Notes
** N/A.

Eve Starly - gooeypancake

Parsed: Eve Starly — username gooeypancake
Resolved: GooeyPancake (id: 171737412135944192)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1454709481622732850 • archived
Name
Eve Starly
Age
24
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
Joytoy / Club worker at N1RVANA (new hire) Secondary role (informal): “floor first-aid” - de-escalation + stabilizing overdoses/minor injuries
Psychological Profile
Core drive: Independence + safety + “I’m not property.” Core want: Wants to earn her way onto Trauma Team someday - not just to escape, but to be recognized for saving people. She craves a real name, a real badge, and someone saying she mattered. Core contradiction: Loyal and sweet, gives too much - actively trying to become hard enough to survive. Emotional tone: Polite warmth on the surface; cautious hypervigilance underneath. Surface behavior: soft-spoken, attentive, apologizes too fast, reads rooms instantly. Under stress: Freezes for 1–2 seconds, then snaps into EMT mode: calm, directive, practical (“Breathe. Sit. Pressure here.”). Cannot convincingly lie to authority figures Trauma tells: Flinches at sudden hands / raised voices. Pet-conditioning phrases sometimes slip (“I’m good-good girl-” then she flinches and corrects herself). Loyalty: if someone protects her once, she remembers forever and will overextend herself to repay it. Current growth edge: learning to say “No” without explaining, negotiating boundaries like logistics. Behavior quirks: Counts exits every time she enters a space, disguising it as “admiring décor.” Always carries a tiny roll of medical tape as a grounding object/reminder of the life she wants (as an EMT).
Physical Description
Height: ~5'4" Build: lean/soft athletic Notable features: Exotic BioMods: animal ears + fluffy tail (BioMod, forced “pet” branding from captivity) Two small scars near the collarbone: marks from a tracker/shock patch implant removal General vibe: “gentle bedside manner” energy that turns razor-practical when someone’s hurt. Looks new to the club scene, but not naïve. more like someone trying to look normal.
Chrome / Implants
Note: Eve’s chrome is intentionally low-key and utility-focused, not combat. Slots / Systems (1 implant per slot unless noted) Miscellaneous (unlimited): Exotic BioMods: ears + tail (BioMod / aesthetic) Internal Storage Use: meds, burner, lockpick, emergency cash Tradeoff: maintenance cost; paranoia about being searched (Removed): tracker + shock patch implants (scars remain)
Total Cyberware Points
1
Skills / Talents / Abilities
EMT trainee fundamentals: airway/breathing positioning, bleeding control, shock recognition, overdose response, calm under pressure De-escalation: reads tone/body language, uses positioning and calm voice to prevent fights from escalating Street survival routines: exit scanning, threat assessment, keeping a “safe route” in mind Social tactics: polite deflection, redirecting predatory conversations Basic lock awareness: not a full infiltrator-just enough to survive (knowing where staff doors usually are, which locks stick, etc.)

From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1454705120578244608 • archived
! Username "blackmetalidiot" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
Jack “Ash” Vega
Age
26
Pronouns
She/They
Occupation
Hired muscle / aspiring mercenary
Psychological Profile
* Personality, trauma, behavior quirks, emotional tone. Cynical and selfish, willing to do anything for her own gain, social, sexual or financial. She has a bad habit of literally biting her tongue or lips when she’s annoyed or nervous, calming herself with the realization that she’s hurt herself. A sort of “calm down before you get too reckless” kind of subconscious action.
Physical Description
* Height, build, notable features, species/exotic mods, general vibe. 1.96m, muscular, runny eye makeup, cybernetic eyes with red rings, womb tattoo/body tattoos, a few body scars, fat girlcawk (with piercings mr squidward, with piercings), Raptor exotic species, punkish vibe
Chrome / Implants
* Name the mods, what they do, and note any tradeoffs. * Note: Customer chrome and implants are allowed, but they must be approved for use * Slots, 1 Cyberware Implant per slot EXCEPT Miscellaneous which is unlimited: * Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): 2 GorillaArms Description - Lift heavy shit. Overpower people. Physical domination. +50% strength Drawbacks - Always looks bulky or a bit too heavy. No fine tactile sense. Doesn't enhance Stamina * Auditory System: * Circulatory & Immune Systems: * Hands & Feet (2 slots): * Integumentary System: 2 Supra-Dermal Weave Description - Reinforced skin, minor resistance to injuries. Drawbacks - Skin feels unnaturally rigid and leathery. * Legs & Mobility (1 slot per leg): * Neural: * Ocular System: 2 SmartEyes Description - Zoom, thermal, night vision, facial ID, AR HUD. Drawbacks - Eyes glow. You sometimes blink asynchronously. * Skeleton & Torso Musculature: * Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): * Miscellaneous: 1 Mr. Studd™ (signalled by womb tattoo) Description - Boosted stamina, modular sensations, vibe modules. Drawbacks - Malfunctions in awkward moments. Buzzes audibly if overused.
Total Cyberware Points
7 * MAX 10 at character creation
Skills / Talents / Abilities
* Non-cyber skills — hacking, stealth, combat styles, social tactics, etc. Brawling, intimidation, seduction (rare), gun nut
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
* List all weapons, their usage, limitations, etc. Malorian Overture, kukri machete. Both large and unwieldy, having drawbacks, but good for intimidation and dealing a lot of damage.
Backstory
* Where they’re from, key life events, how they ended up in Night City, goals, dreams, etc Jack (given name being “Ashton” at the time, AMAB) was born in Heywood, living the early teenage years as a street rat. When she became of age, she went to work for Militech, being excited and motivated with the notions of “glory” and “seeing the world”. While working for Militech, she volunteered for an Exotic program to allow for soldiers more fitted to specific roles, hers being a scouting role. In this, she was transferred into having the body of a feminine humanoid Raptor to allow for quicker speeds. Ultimately, the project was a failure and while she is slightly quicker than Humans, it’s nothing notable. Pretty early on, she had experienced gender dysphoria before joining Militech, so the new feminine body actually helped her with that in the long run. She kept the body after her contract was terminated and now she works as hired muscle for clubs and gangs, not affiliating herself with them, but occasionally throwing in with the Animals as competition.
Known Affiliations
* e.g. Corps, gangs, fixers, or other PCs. Ex-Militech, Animals (loose)

Nyx Calder - heliosstation

Parsed: Nyx Calder — username heliosstation
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1452256853932118036 • archived
! Username "heliosstation" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
Nyx Calder
Age
22
Pronouns
They/Them/He/Him
Occupation
Freelance Artist Nyx creates small-scale art: mostly photography, mixed-media prints, hand-modified holo-posters, and short looping animations sold to bars, clubs, and private buyers. Sometimes commissioned. Art doesn’t pay well, but it pays better than nothing, it makes them happy.
Psychological Profile
Nyx is quiet, observant, and emotionally reserved. They’re not chasing fame or a following, art is how they live and thrive in the city without letting it break them down. They have a habit of seeing beauty in things most people ignore: broken signage, flickering ads, abandoned apartments. Trauma: Long-term instability growing up Watching friends burn out, disappear, or sell pieces of themselves to survive Constant anxiety about rent, relevance, and being erased Behavior & Quirks: Sleeps odd hours to avoid crowds and rush hours They tear down their own work if it gets too much attention Hates explaining their art, prefers people just feel it Emotional Tone: Muted, introspective, soft-spoken. Not hopeless, just realistic.
Physical Description
Height: 5'6" (168 cm) Build: Slim, lightly toned Hair: Short dark brown bob with teal-dyed underlayers Eyes: Bright cyan
Chrome / Implants
Slots, 1 Cyberware Implant per slot EXCEPT Miscellaneous which is unlimited: Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): N/A Auditory System: N/A Circulatory & Immune Systems: N/A Hands & Feet (2 slots): N/A Integumentary System: [1]UnderSkin Lightshow - Create glowing patterns or tattoos beneath skin. Occasionally glitches, displays unintended imagery. Legs & Mobility (1 slot per leg): N/A Neural: [1]Netrunner Suite (Level 1) - Basic Net access. Ability to quickhack. Comes with Interface Jack to connect to Terminals/Vechicles/etc. You're always a little distracted--like you're only 95% in the room. Ocular System: [2]SmartEyes - Zoom, thermal, night vision, facial ID, AR HUD. Eyes glow. You sometimes blink asynchronously. Skeleton & Torso Musculature: N/A Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): N/A Miscellaneous:
Total Cyberware Points
4
Skills / Talents / Abilities
[+2 Perception] Visual composition and urban photography [+3 Dexterity] Analog drawing and stencil work [+2 Computer] Photo and Video editing [+1 Stealth] Navigating abandoned or restricted spaces quietly
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Modified handheld camera (scratched lens, custom filters) Old tablet with cracked screen for editing Burner phone
Backstory
Nyx drifted into Night City with the idea that art could keep them afloat.They’ve lived in three districts, been evicted twice, and learned which walls stay untouched the longest. Their works appears briefly, gets photographed, then disappears. Sometimes that’s enough.They sell pieces quietly, take small commissions, and avoid corporate attention. Goals: Secure a stable workspace Have their own Photography Studio Finish a personal photo archive of Night City and every street.
Known Affiliations
N/A
Reference Images
RP Hooks
Nyx is a photographer by trade; perhaps people want to have their pictures professionally taken. Nyx will want their own studio to do things professionally- that's the dream anyway. And they'll do whatever it takes to achieve it.
Additional Notes
Lives in a tiny studio apartment that doubles as a workspace

Psychological Profile

Often disassociated with things around her until danger arises, allowing for more focus on given tasks or created ones - a coping mechanism for trauma and allowing for more focus on her work. This also often leads to her not listening when she’s in that state of mind.
Physical Description
* Height, build, notable features, species/exotic mods, general vibe. 5’2/1.58m, slimmer build, scarred hands and fingers from tinkering with things (not visible due to blackout tattoos), black hair with red accents, red cybernetic eyes, (lots of red bits), light skin, human, punk/goth-ish vibe.
Chrome / Implants
* Name the mods, what they do, and note any tradeoffs. * Note: Customer chrome and implants are allowed, but they must be approved for use * Slots, 1 Cyberware Implant per slot EXCEPT Miscellaneous which is unlimited: * Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): * Auditory System: * Circulatory & Immune Systems: * Hands & Feet (2 slots): 1 Cyberfingers - Description: Hidden tools in fingertips—USB, lockpick, small blade. Drawbacks: Constant low-level clicking or twitching in fingers. * Integumentary System: * Legs & Mobility (1 slot per leg): * Neural: * Ocular System: 2 SmartEyes - Description: Zoom, thermal, night vision, facial ID, AR HUD. Skills / Talents / Abilities

Equipment / Armor / Weapons
* List all weapons, their usage, limitations, etc. Unity pistol, welding helmet (has rebreather to avoid toxic fumes being inhaled as well as tinting cameras for the visor inside, drawbacks are it being heavy and not fun to wear, impractical as armor), no armor to speak of, has a welding gun capable of soldering and welding large items, but has a battery that must be maintained - carries several batteries in her side pouches.
Backstory
* Where they’re from, key life events, how they ended up in Night City, goals, dreams, etc Kazra was adopted by a man in a Corp named “Withered Rose Corps” and spent the most of her years being trained by said Corp to be a mechanic, living with other children that the Corp 'adopted', speaking to the others was forbidden and was punishable. This was while she was a teenager and was eventually kicked out due to being “perfect enough,” thus landing on the street and making a living as a scrap dealer and techie. Eventually, she perfected her skills and planned to turn it into a business, going as far as to work on security drones and tech weapons when she hit the odd gig here and there, wishing to expand her abilities in Beastside. Has no worries about Withered Rose Corps due to them tossing her out like trash, unlikely to come looking for her.
Known Affiliations
* e.g. Corps, gangs, fixers, or other PCs. Associated with Carnage and is an ex-member of “Withered Rose Corps.”
Reference Images
* Art, screenshots, etc.

Backstory
At the start of their lives born in pacifica along with her twin brother before the family moved to vista del rey. Once entering the working field and her brother going off to fight in the war trying to show their parents that they could fend for themselves. Osha tried her hand at college before flunking out and trying her hand in the NCPD academy and excelling in it reaching the rank of investigator after she was did a ride along with a sheriff finding a missing shipment taken by sacves. By the time her brother returned she was living in a small apartment in del rey. In her attempt to convince her brother to join the NCPD, he agreed, under one condition, to find a new place to live. And in his words... “u sleep on a couch and dont even have a bathroom.. We’re finding a better place to live now” so they moved into an apartment in between cropo plaza and downtown. After her brother joined the force, a task came up for her to

Olivia “Jinx” More - _voidchaos

Parsed: Olivia “Jinx” More — username _voidchaos
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1452250835613388893 • archived
! Username "_voidchaos" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
Olivia “Jinx” More
Age
28
Pronouns
She / Her
Occupation
Tea shop owner / Braindance specialist
Psychological Profile
Calm and collected with a naturally flirty edge. Jinx is attentive, empathetic, and prefers listening over speaking. She reads people well and tends to create a sense of comfort around herself, whether intentional or not.
Physical Description
Cosmetic exo-skeleton frame designed for aesthetic enhancement rather than combat or labor augmentation.
Chrome / Implants
Phantom Limbs: Replaced arms (2) Tail Mount: Cosmetic imp-like tail (1) SmartEyes (2) Dermal Plating: Primarily torso-based cosmetic texturing (3) Max Implant Points: 8
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Tech-oriented with a focus on physical hardware, braindance equipment, and cybernetic maintenance. Comfortable working hands-on with complex tech systems.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Simple Unity pistol
Backstory
Jinx grew up in Heywood, surrounded by parents desperate to claw their way into corporate favor. Disgusted by their constant attempts to appease corpos, she walked away early, determined to chase something that felt real to her. Braindances became that obsession. With her own struggles related to memory and perception, anything that altered the mind fascinated her. VR, shards, neural tech, anything that bent reality just enough to feel different drew her in deeper. Socially withdrawn for much of her early life, Jinx struggled to form meaningful connections until she met Ivy Walker. The two clicked effortlessly, and since then, they’ve been moving together toward Beastside in search of new opportunities and business growth, at least as far as Jinx knows.
Known Affiliations
Ivy Walker (Kirche’s character)
RP Hooks
N/A
Additional Notes
Currently working with Kirche and aiming to operate a combined tea shop and Zen garden, blending calm atmosphere with braindance culture.

Former: Corpo Interrogator/Spy | Current: BD Producer/Editor Psychological Traits: Mostly stable, sadistic(shows when making certain braindances or interrogating), impatient
Physical Description
She wears comfy clothing, a cutoff bralike top, sweatpants, sneakers, a jacket, and squared glasses. Occasionally a latex suit when she goes out on missions. Chrome: 7 Ocular systems: 2 Smart Eyes Hand & Feet: 2 Silent step soles Integumentary system: 2 Sub-dermal Plating Misc: 1 GhostTag Cosmetic: Smart eyes that shift colors. Skills/Talents/Abilities: Breaking and entering Producer/Editor of Brain dances Lockpicking Information gathering
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Lexington Semi Knife External recording device Braindance - First date BD & Calming rooftop view of a sunset BD for therapy purposes. Cyberdeck and BD Weave
Backstory
Ivy Walker grew up in Watson to a family well off for the area. Finding little interest in the local activities she spent most of her time on the net. Through forums and general browsing she learned of Brain dances, determined to save up enough for her own equipment to experience them first hand. Shortly into adulthood she realized that Watson is not the place to be and journeyed towards Heywood in search of making it big. With little effort she found a company willing to hire enthusiastic but novice brain dance editors/enjoyers. She spent 2 years learning everything she could and started making a small name for herself along with interesting contacts. Through some of these contacts she learned of the world of XBDs. Gaining morbid curiosity she used her contacts to get a job working for a low level corporation creating XBDs. At first it was simple stuff, recording and editing torture, murder, etc XBDs but it accelerated quickly into her performing the torturing herself. After several years of doing this she started to enjoy the job. Due to her continued dedication to her craft she was offered an addition to her line of work. She began actively spying and recording on other companies local to the area, direct competitors. She would work for the competing companies for a few months gaining an inside look and direct recording of their techniques and products, spending time after work infiltrating directly into locked down areas of these companies she worked in. Then editing BDs of what she witnessed along with her primary jobs XBDs into advantages for her company. After sometime it took a serious toll on her health both physically and mentally so she resigned. Wanting to give back for the damage she caused she decided that she would help people with BDs. While Heywood is nice it was very expensive to open up a proper shop, her old company that she was employed for may also not like her opening nearby. She was actively looking for opportunities to leave and check the net for locals who may be in a similar boat. She found someone named Olivia More, whom she hit it off with. Spending some time searching good areas they found Beast side, a potential good location to potentially open something up. With a new friend and some direction she felt more confident with moving over to a new location to open a business. Known Affiliates: Olivia More - Friend Former employer(Up to DMs who is the owner of said company) - Neutral

Physical Description
Height, build, notable features, species/exotic mods, general vibe. 5’9 with a muscular build, pink skin, two horns, a tail with fluff at the end and a very flowery vibe to her.
Chrome / Implants
Name the mods, what they do, and note any tradeoffs. , Note: Customer chrome and implants are allowed, but they must be approved for use , Slots, 1 Cyberware Implant per slot EXCEPT Miscellaneous which is unlimited: Arms & Arm Attachments (2 slots): , Auditory System: , Circulatory & Immune Systems: , Hands & Feet (2 slots): , Integumentary System: , Legs & Mobility (2 slots): , Neural: Netrunner Suite (Level 3) {Full cyberwarfare, backdoor exploitation.(Your body stutters. You speak to invisible things. You are a priority target for Corps.)} Ocular System: SmartEyes {Zoom, thermal, night vision, facial ID, AR HUD. (Eyes glow. Backstory
Where they’re from, key life events, how they ended up in Night City, goals, dreams, etc She grew up on the streets, later with life around 8 years old she was adopted by a man in W.R. Corps she was trained in finances and seducing, she's as of all the other children were trained heavily and punished if not good enough. She wasn't allowed to speak as a child and now finds comfort in speaking, feeling in more control when she does. Throughout her stay a biotech did bio work on her to fit the needs of clients. She's kept her looks from when she was 24 and has grown to like it. She has gone to night city to grow connections and find new entertainment.

e.g. Corps, gangs, fixers, or other PCs. Withered Rose Corps

Art, screenshots, etc. ,
RP Hooks

Ive made this character to grow lore and hopefully host get togethers at her onsens

Jackson - leonardofoxtron

Parsed: Jackson — username leonardofoxtron
Resolved: Leonardo🧡⚧ (id: 908408537842069516)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1449759054313558151 • archived
Name
Jackson
Age
23
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
None Psychological: Grew up in a tribal town so English is a little messed up. Ptsd from an attack on his tribal land. Schizophrenia (can be aod whenever wanted)
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
tablet and two revolvers (borrowing from Leo) Chrome: Exotic body Cyber points: 0
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Bartending
Backstory
Born and raised in a tribe. Ran the tribe as the leader for a while before giving it to Leo. Tends towards avoid violence after a great battle to protect their tribe against a corporation. Lost several friends and some family in the fight. Some of them died right next to him. Every time he touches a gun it brings him back to that fight. Jackson has schizophrenia so he sometimes sees stuff and hears things. (feel free to aod this as it would be funny) Jackson was always seen as a role model for Leo. Jack always took care of his brother and was the person who dragged Leo out of his car when his brother had the accident. After the accident Jack took some time investigating the wreckage. What he found is it was arasaka who cut Leo’s brakes. He decided to confront the agent Leo got the race deal from. After a small fight Jack learned the truth at a cost. Jackson now has a 1k bounty on his head only know to arasaka agents. Known Affiliation: Brother of Leonardo Hooks: Very family driven and loves talking about his home. He is very prideful about his tribe. Loves talking about his brother and sharing stories of their antics. They cut his brakes because he lost to Malstorm. Competor got first and Leo got second. Saka put 500k eddies on the line for this race and losing pissed them off. The bounty i understand. Lets label it as this instead “Due to him investigating into the accident and going public with his findings some executives are still a little salty” The exotic makes sense as Native Americans sometimes used animals as figures of gods. Giving Leo and Jack an animal body is a sign of high praise and respect.

Jabbles Katan - Jabbles

Parsed: Jabbles Katan — username Jabbles
Resolved: Jabbles (id: 176857342250450944)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1449756201125413140 • archived
Name
Jabbles Katan
Age
29
Pronouns
He/Him (Dumb/Dog)
Occupation
~~Unemployed~~ Self Employed (Scavenger/Scrapper/Handyman)
Psychological Profile
Slight emotional detachment through via Trauma Bonding from time in Service, often mistaken for stoicism. Generally unnoticed as he keeps things light hearted so the good times mask the bad. Used Disability Compensation to fund being an exotic. Now uses it for food and basic living. Overall, Jovial with mostly positive outlooks and chill. "Embrace the suck" and "It is what it is" with a smile. Acts Dumber than he is, uses this as a social manipulation rather than a defense mechanism. Specific Strengths: Cool Under Pressure - Same Shit, Different Day. Let's get to work. Compassionate Leadership - You've been working like a Dog, take a break. Silver Lining - Always see's the light in the dark Specific Flaws: Used to Brevity - Does not handle "Explaining every little bit of why something needs to be done" well. Shoulder Impingement Syndrome - Has full range of motion of arms, pain at end of range of motion. Emotional Detachment - Understands it's sad your Mom died but doesn't get why it's keeping you from functioning
Physical Description
6ft, "Himbo" build. "Less Chrome, more Fur". Looks closer to a Wolf than Human. Chrome/Implants: Enhanced Ears - 2 CWP Chemical Analyzer - 1 CWP Smart Eyes - 2 CWP Scent Scanner - 1 CWP Total Cyberware Points - 6/10
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Skilled with Electrical Work. Was trained during time in Service how to troubleshoot, repair, and replace components on various Aircraft relating to Electrical Generation and Distribution.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Proficient with Fire Arms through personal use and time in Service. Does not personally own any at this time.
Backstory
Growing up, Jabs always looked to the skies. Growing up in New York, he wanted to join NUSAF, but was forced into college. Studying in Cyber Security and Computer Forensics, which he found an interest in, he found he preferred a more hands on approach. Abandoning his studies and going against his own parents wishes, he enlisted into the NUSAF. He found himself with the hands on work he wanted, but also learned the muck and mire that came with being engrossed in politics. For over a decade, he worked on various Aircraft, specifically focused on Power Generation and Distribution before finally deciding to call it quits. The Political climate, a fresh start, and the want to find something new drove him West. Of course, Night City has its own form of politics that Jabs is sure to find may not be as glamourous as he hoped. As part of his own wants to start a new life, he made the decision to, essentially, reinvent himself from the ground up.
Known Affiliations
NUSAF - Honorable Discharge
Reference Images
Image Attached
RP Hooks
Veteran Enjoys making bits and bots Scavenges/Salvages
Additional Notes
Makes enough from Disability Compensation for basic Rent and Food. Uses it for food, and does best to bank the rest. Couch Surfs/Sleeps in Tent as needed. Used initial banked funds and payouts to finish Cosmetic Procedures. Emotional detachment to those not Trauma Bonded with. Gets along with prior Enlisted. Easily able to bond with "battle siblings". Knows he doesn't feel empathy. It's alongside his used to brevity. Doesn't care too much about it seeing as he keeps most people in good spirits. Easier to work with a happy team than try to deal with a depressed one. People like Dumb Funny guys. Not a defense mechanism, a social manipulation.

Riann (pronounced “Ryan”) “Rook” Myrvang - mellojello

Parsed: Riann (pronounced “Ryan”) “Rook” Myrvang — username mellojello
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1449754884357492787 • archived
! Username "mellojello" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Age
28
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
Ripperdoc
Psychological Profile
Rook keeps things short, sweet, and to the point. She prefers to keep most people at arm’s length, though it’s unknown to her if that’s because of her profession or because of her childhood. That’s not to say she’s cold and cruel, she does have a favorite client or two, but she prefers a solitary life. Despite the scrappy rock look she wears, Rook is detail-oriented. Each part of her appearance is intentional, from the choppy locks of pink hair on her head to the scuffs on her boots, she cares about the impression she gives. However, only those closest to her will ever know that. While she’s capable of locking into a task, she tends to fidget. Bouncing a leg, tapping her nails, cracking her knuckles… whatever it is she’s doing, she’s got a lot of energy and this is her way of expelling it. She speaks quickly, but with a dull voice.
Physical Description
Short and lithe, small bust and average hips. Her skin is pale from years spent indoors working on clients. Messily-cut and styled pink hair, usually tied back in some way to keep her workspace sterile. Black sclera and pale green eyes, glowing from her SmartEyes implant, but a bored expression most of the time. Usually seen wearing some sort of “Rockerboy” inspired ensemble, lots of black leather and silver jewelry. She prefers layered outfits, but she’ll wear minimal layers while working to keep things clean. She always carries minimal first-aid supplies in one of her belt-bags.
Chrome / Implants
Arms & Arm Attachments (1 slot per arm): Cyberarm (dexterous) - right arm, Precision tool use for ripperdoc services (surgeries, chrome installations, etc), Weak to EMPs, shakes under pressure, no stamina enhancement. (2) Auditory System: None Circulatory & Immune Systems: None Hands & Feet (2 slots): None Integumentary System: None Legs & Mobility (1 slot per leg): None Neural: Netrunner Suite (Level 1), Access to the Net, ability to quickhack, includes interface jack, Always slightly distracted. (1) Ocular System: SmartEyes, Zoom, thermal, night vision, facial ID and AR HUD, Eyes glow and sometimes blink asynchronously. (2) Skeleton & Torso Musculature: None Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): None Miscellaneous: None

Roselyn "Rose" - sheepesq

Parsed: Roselyn "Rose" — username sheepesq
Resolved: Rose (id: 271863268715397120)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1447902384738271254 • archived
Name
Roselyn "Rose"
Age
32
Pronouns
she/her
Occupation
NetResearcher/Consultant (Former Corporate Lawyer)
Psychological Profile
Grandiose sense of self, Need for stimulation, Cunning and manipulative, Poor behavioral controls, Impulsivity
Physical Description
5'7, frail, petite figure, exotics (altered with canine ears/tail/fur/maw, ect) 🔧Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear): 🦾Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: N/A Auditory System: N/A Circulatory & Immune Systems: N/A Hands & Feet: N/A Integumentary System: N/A Legs & Mobility: N/A Neural: Netrunner Suite (Level 1) & Memory Bank Ocular System: N/A Skeleton & Torso Musculature: N/A Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Tail Mount Miscellaneous: Modded Mandibles, Scent Scanner, Internal Storage
Total Cyberware Points
**6**
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Teamwork, Exec Knowledge
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Businesswear / Memory Chips, Cyberdeck, Bug Detector, Food Sticks/Kibble Pack, Airhypo, Notebook/Pen, Virtuality Goggles, Scrambler/ Descrambler, and a Carryall
Known Affiliations
Night Watch
Reference Images
https://imgur.com/a/eQLbGro
RP Hooks
Revenge against Corpo's/Protecting Night City with Night Watch
Additional Notes
N/A
Backstory
Roselyn “Rose” once operated in the upper tiers of Arasaka’s legal machine—an elegant predator in tailored suits, crafting arguments sharp enough to bury scandals and reshape public narratives. Her specialty wasn’t litigation; it was containment. She managed high-risk data leaks, silenced whistleblowers, and drafted contracts that kept entire divisions in line. She was valuable, feared, and—most importantly—trusted with secrets worth more than lives. But Rose had a flaw: she liked to know more than she was supposed to. Her need for stimulation and her grandiose self-image pushed her to dig deeper into sealed databases, side channels, and black archives “just because she could.” That’s how she stumbled onto the wrong file. Buried under encryption, she uncovered a series of internal memos tied to Project HOUND, an experimental augmentation program using unwilling test subjects—employees, street kids, migrant detainees. The canine exotics she now carries were born from that project. She recognized the procedures, the signatures, the timeline. She hadn’t volunteered. Her “executive wellness retreat,” billed as a corporate perk, had been a covert trial phase. She was supposed to forget it—neurologically scrubbed, memories chipped out—but something in the process failed. Her body changed, instincts sharpened, and fragments of what happened clawed back through the cracks. When Rose confronted her superiors, they didn’t deny it. They simply marked her as a risk. The first assassination attempt came the next morning. Rose escaped only by leveraging her nascent netrunner suite—half-installed, unstable, and not designed for someone under fire. She fled the corporate district bleeding, shaking, and laughing at the absurdity of being hunted by the very people she once defended. Night Watch found her collapsed in an alley. She expected them to kill her, or worse—send her back. Instead, they offered a deal: protection in exchange for expertise. A net-savvy ex-corpo lawyer who knew corporate procedure, black ops patterns, and internal architecture? She was a goldmine. She took the offer immediately. Now Rose serves as Night Watch’s resident consultant, twisting her exec knowledge against her former world. She tracks corporate abuse, exposes hidden experiments, hunts blackbag teams, and helps the Watch navigate the tangled legal and digital hellscapes of the megacorps. She says she wants justice. She claims she’s protecting Night City. But deep down, Rose is driven by something much more personal: She wants to make the corpos feel hunted. She wants them to know she remembers. And she wants revenge to feel earned.

Juno Kelner (Valkyrie) - thegamingfox807

Parsed: Juno Kelner (Valkyrie) — username thegamingfox807
Resolved: RuneFox807 (id: 404017476909924352)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1445630668855050322 • archived
! Only 0 labeled section(s) parsed
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
Juno Kelner (Valkyrie) 28 She/They Medtech (based on Cyberpunk red class although she came to night city to help people in the beginning, the years taught her that it's not a realistic goal to be doing that anymore. Now she is willing to help people for the right eddies, although her prices are fair and take advantage of her old Trauma Team contacts. Juno is a Vulpine exotic with a blade in her hands and a dream in her heart. She is cold and calcualted on missions but otherwise is fairly amicable. She is also quite the menace with a D8 Copperhead if she can get her mitts on one again. Fur as dark as the city and a toned body that really shows what she can do. She has Enhanced Ears, Biomonitor, internal storage, SmartEyes, and nano stitch skin total Cyberware points 8 skilled with a sword, general firearms knowledge, and especially good as a surgeon currently has a ballistic chest plate, and a two handed sword Juno Kelner hailed from the Denver region, coming to Night City to pay off her tuition with Trauma team. as soon as she was able to pay that off she quit the force and now works as a freelance medical professional for anyone with enough eddies...as long as they aren't a complete douchebag about it. She has known affiliations with Trauma Team Juno started her life in rural Colorado with her parents her mother from japan and her father who served overseas, eventually finding her calling in surgery and medical care. in order to pay for the schooling however she took a job up with trauma team. Her mother had ties to the corporate world in Arasoka and was able to suggest going with trauma team. She started working under the Codename of Valkyrie, which was given to her by her trauma team squad for her almost death wish tendencies. (because it seemed that she wanted to go to Valhalla very badly) after a good while with trauma team and working high paying contracts with Arasoka she was deployed to a call where she was to save an exectutive from the company that was in a AV Crash. Given that she was bound personally by the Hippocratic Oath she saw that the Man daughter was also in the car along with her. the coverage did not extend to the daughter and she was going to need surgery to have a shrapnel shard removed from her neck. the man was in much better shape and was able to make a full recovery, but when he screamed at Juno for not saving his daughter it snapped a final twig in Juno's mind. Hearing the cries of a man that was desperately clutching to the bloody cross around his daughters neck and begging for Juno to "keep the last reminder of his late wife alive" caused her to grow cold and distant from the people she operated on. which was a regret that she carried through her career.

**General Information**

Pronouns
* She/Her
Occupation
* Bottle Girl/Hostess/Bartender [Graffiti Artist/Vandalizer when Off the Clock]
Psychological Profile
* Charming, hyper-aware, and sharply intelligent. She hides her burnout behind practiced smiles. Fiercely empathetic, especially toward those exploited by corps, but cynical enough to know survival comes first. Struggles with: * Double life pressure * Fear of becoming “owned” again * Imposter syndrome regarding her medical skills
Physical Description
* Height: 1.6 Meters Tall Weight: 175–230 lbs (curvy + augmented muscle mass in legs) Anthropomorphic equine hybrid: digitigrade legs, tail, expressive ears, cybernetic horn (asthetic & removeable) *Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear):* * Spray Cans * Refillable Water bottle * (W.I.P) **Chrome / Implants** *Auditory System:* Enhanced Ears - Higher chance to Hear whispers through walls, filter sound, pinpoint origin. | Overwhelmed in noisy spaces. Startles easily. *Circulatory & Immune Systems:* Detoxifier - Higher chance to filters toxins from blood effectively. | Frequent thirst; constant hydration needed. *Hands & Feet:* SilentStep Soles - Shock-dampening foot mod. Complete silence when walking. | You can’t run loud even if you want to. No warning stomps. *Legs & Mobility:* Cyberleg (Runner) - Jump farther, run faster, land silently. Parkour beast. | Loud stomp at full speed. Doesn't enhance Stamina

Skills / Talents / Abilities

Equipment / Armor / Weapons

Backstory
* Monroe was born in Heywood, spending a lot of her younger years volunteering at centers with her parents. There she learned some basic medical aid, and with the young light of life still to her, she looked to become an actual doctor to help those in Heywood and Watson that may need it. Unfortunately, due to the sheer cost of going to medical school, Monroe had to take out multiple loans in order to finish her schooling. She also interned at a Biotechnica medical facility, witnessing the disgust of treatment towards those of lower class by corpos, along with her own levels of abuse she had to take in in order to complete her degree. Having graduated, she was unable to find a job willing to take her, either due to her lack of experience in the medical field, or where she's from with lower-class standing. This has resulted in her having to work a job always open to women: Escorting, in order to start paying off her debts. Though on the occasion, she does fall behind.
Known Affiliations
* * Biotechnica *RP Hooks?:* * Being stalked by a high-roller client * Corporate debt enforcers closing in
Additional Notes
* VERY OPEN TO EDITS AND ADAPTATION

Gary "Rooster" Mueller - voidchaos_

Parsed: Gary "Rooster" Mueller — username voidchaos_
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1443884318366629898 • archived
! Username "voidchaos_" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
Gary "Rooster" Mueller
Age
28
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Militech Logistics Officer Night City Rep/ Strategic Planner
Psychological Profile
Calculating and pragmatic, always ten moves ahead rather than relying on brute force. Obsessively detail-oriented, logging data and reviewing ops constantly — faith in precision is his weapon. Keeps tight emotional walls; only trusts Maverick and his men. Polite but distant with everyone else. Trauma: Grew up in Militech’s cutthroat corporate culture, ingraining a need to prove himself indispensable. Emotional tone: Controlled, clipped, disciplined. Rarely raises his voice, but when he does, it means something’s wrong.
Physical Description
Height: 5’11 Build: Lean, athletic; not physically imposing but sharp posture gives him presence. Features: Clean-cut, sharp jawline, dark blond hair, pale blue eyes. Style: Tailored corpo suits with subtle tactical modifications. General vibe: Corpo polish, but always scanning exits and counting heads.
Chrome / Implants
Enhanced Ears - 2 Cyber fingers - 1 Smart eyes - 2 Ice layer - 2 Memory Bank - 2 Total Points - 9
Skills / Talents / Abilities
* Tactical & Strategic Planning * Data Analysis & Logistics * Negotiation & Corporate Protocol * Situational Awareness * Basic Militech Combat Training
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
* Corpo-modified armored suit with concealed plating * Militech-issued smartpistol (sidearm, rarely drawn) * Encrypted Militech datapad with tactical overlays * Secure comms headset (redundant to internal comms)
Backstory
Gary Mueller wasn’t handed his place in Militech — he fought for it. Born in Dallas to corpo parents who worked themselves to death for the company, Gary swore he would never be another disposable cog. From a young age, he threw himself into Militech training programs, tactical sims, and wargames, always the last to leave, always pouring blood, sweat, and tears into rising above the rest. While his lack of raw aggression nearly derailed his career, he carved out a role as a planner — the one who ensured convoys weren’t stranded, units weren’t ambushed, and no detail slipped through the cracks. He earned the respect of Viktor “Maverick” Sterling during an assignment, the two forming a bond as a field-brains duo: Maverick leading in combat, Rooster ensuring the pieces never fell apart. By 2076, he earned his codename “Rooster” for being the first awake, the last to leave, and the one always triple-checking the plan. Now stationed in Night City, Gary is a die-hard Militech believer, seeing the corporation as humanity’s only true future. His dream is to rise high in the ranks not for wealth, but to cement his philosophy of precision and planning as the Militech standard.
Known Affiliations
* Militech International Armaments – Junior Logistics Officer, Night City branch * Viktor "Maverick" Sterling – Trusted ally and field partner
RP Hooks
* Corpo climber with ties to Militech operations in Night City * May contract mercs and fixers as “extra insurance” for ops * Rival, asset, or target for anyone crossing paths with Militech
Additional Notes
* Callsign: “Rooster” * Lives in a sparse Corpo Plaza apartment, practically residing at the office * Known for his meticulous checklists and being “the man who never sleeps”

Carnage - sailor_bun

Parsed: Carnage — username sailor_bun
Resolved: 卂尺丂ㄖ几 (id: 658448164306812988)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1421721001883861132 • archived
Name
Carnage
Age
21
Pronouns
She/They/It
Occupation
Joytoy
Psychological Profile
Personality, trauma, behavior quirks, emotional tone. She's very energetic and bubbly but awkward towards people she doesn't know, anything and everything that comes to mind she would just blurt out, it's gotten her in trouble often. She was without parents and grew up in and out the system, causing her to have trust issues with authority. She tried to always have an up keep tone but the more tired she is the less she'll talk. She tends to shut down in loud or crowded places. She gets uncomfortable and anxious around people who loom over her. She finds comfort in high places and tight spots. Emotionally, she's everywhere. If she's not actively entertaining someone she's on the verge of a breakdown. If she enjoys listening to someone talk or enjoys their time she WILL follow them around either silently or she'll yap while she does
Physical Description
Height, build, notable features, species/exotic mods, general vibe. 5’0 Short, blue eyes, with snow leopard mods. Often wearing all black to hide better in the background.
Chrome / Implants
Name the mods, what they do, and note any tradeoffs. , Note: Customer chrome and implants are allowed, but they must be approved for use , Slots, 1 Cyberware Implant per slot EXCEPT Miscellaneous which is unlimited: Arms & Arm Attachments (2 slots): , Auditory System: , Circulatory & Immune Systems: , Hands & Feet (2 slots): , Integumentary System: Thermal control skin {(Adjust body temperature at will. 80°F to 130°F [Cool to the touch to hot enough to feel unpleasant, burn with prolonged contact] Skin temperature fluctuations make physical contact uncomfortable.} Legs & Mobility (2 slots): Reinforced Tendon (No fall damage from < 20 feet, Reduced fall damage from < 30 feet) , Ocular System: Retinal projector {(Project images directly onto surfaces from eyes. [You can place stickers]) Eyes glow brightly, drawing attention.} Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): , Miscellaneous: Scent scanner {(Track people or chemicals by smell. Smell blood, oil, etc.) Overwhelmed in clubs, alleys, combat. Sometimes gags from sensory overload.} ,
Total Cyberware Points
6 MAX 10 at character creation Except NPC's which sit at the max of 15 on character creation. , , See our cyberware system here: https://shorturl.at/LdkiG ,
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Non-cyber skills — hacking, stealth, combat styles, social tactics, etc. She's extremely stealthy and good at seducing however outside of sex she has zero social skills.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Call out anything rare, modded, or notable. ,
Backstory
Where they’re from, key life events, how they ended up in Night City, goals, dreams, etc Born and raised in Watson, the Northside of Night City; her mother being killed in action and father becoming a violent inconsolable drunk, she was taken by her aunt only for her aunt to pass away in crossfire. Afterwards she was in and out of houses. Spending most of her life on the streets, she learned at 8 that the best way to survive is to cozy up to people with money. She spent the rest of years playing errand boy, golden child and cute pet. When she turned 18 someone paid her enough money to change her looks and she took it, changed and ran from that life. Taking her new identity to a new side of the cities. She began her life as a Joytoy, finding her life easier in Watson this way.
Known Affiliations
e.g. Corps, gangs, fixers, or other PCs. ,
Reference Images
Art, screenshots, etc. ,
RP Hooks
Optional -- What might draw others to interact with this character? She's a cute lil kitty
Additional Notes
she's very cat like, and will nap on literally anything

Murphy - murphi3s_law

Parsed: Murphy — username murphi3s_law
Resolved: Murphy's Law (id: 471246372243374081)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1439724252734423040 • archived
Name
Murphy
Age
26
Pronouns
She / Her
Occupation
Dancer (Night Club Performer / Entertainer) Occasional bartender and part-time freelance companion or guard for trusted clients
Psychological Profile
Personality & Trauma: Murphy grew up in a harsh military household in the Federal Republic of Australia, where affection was conditional and expectations absolute. Her parents wanted a son to follow her father’s path in service; instead, they treated her as a disappointment and cast her out when she was still a teenager. Years of surviving through abusive relationships taught her to forget in order to survive — her mind walls off memories that cut too deep. She carries no bag, no keepsakes; she travels light, like she’s ready to disappear at any time. Beneath the trauma, she’s kind-hearted, eager to help others, often putting their comfort above her own. Behavior Quirks: Forgetful, fidgety, sings softly when nervous, shakes her leg when overwhelmed, avoids prolonged eye contact, brutally honest, dark humor as a shield. Her memory lapses are selective — she forgets pain, but remembers kindness. Emotional Tone: Murphy lives moment-to-moment. Usually shy and cheerful, yet when threatened or reminded of her past, a colder, detached side emerges — the survivor who learned to lie, run, and fight.
Physical Description
Height: 148 cm Build: Hourglass, compact, agile Notable Features: Blue hair with luminescent strands under blacklight, glowing blue eyes (SmartEyes mod), butterfly tattoo over shoulder blade General Vibe: Energetic, expressive, but distant when alone. A balance of charm and quiet sadness — the type of person who makes others feel seen even when she can’t remember herself.
