Nuva - _s1las_

Parsed: Nuva — username _s1las_
Resolved: =𝔸𝕧𝕧𝕒𝕣= (id: 586683312844701699)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1439725462937931817 • archived
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
Nuva: Depth- a calmly collected person who's goal is to usually get what they need when possible. Tho procrastination is something she dwells in, they always remain steadily eager. Flaws- asides from the procrastination, they dont frow attached to many people easily. Only certain gems can get on their good side, and their distrust blinds them from objectives. This distrust also comes from the schizophrenia that the cyber ware that derains in them. Personal-theyre abit cold at first but warmth goes along with trust. They like their main "tool" passed down by their father and would do anything to keep it close. Hook- theyre involvement with things counters their cover, and they tend to question and involve themselves into things they have to part of. But almost any other time theyre silent and in a corner of the room.
Backstory
Nuva was a engineer at a electrical powerstation for a high end company of ZetaTech. The the core that the facility had been making had a collapse and nuva was one of the very VERY few that made it out. They had to have major reconstructive surgeries and some minor chrome to the brain to keep them alive. Tho after they refused to continue working for zetatech, after the incident. Zetatech had tried 'convincing' them to keep working for them. But inevitably failed, nuva wiped their name from the database, and with their father dead, they have almost no one. With nuva being their new name, niley now dead, they remain hidden from their past to try and make do for their future. They now run through as a hired merc, that will take a job from almost anyone. Aslong as the price is acceptable. Chrome- they have crome for their limbs, mi or strength, more for basic movement and agility. And intermediate to near advanced hacking tech as a bribe from zetatech. But it comes with paranoia schizophrenia, illusions, and heavy migraines and heart aches. N: nuva A: 2# (in their 20's) Occ: hired merc Personality: stated above. Physical: 5'9, athletic, riddled with visible smooth chrome. Chrome: high end hacking tech, and replaced limbs. -arms(cyber arms) -legs(cyber leg runner) -neural(bio monitor, net runner 3) Skills- tactician, mechanic/engineering, stealth, custom fighting style (claws) shown above.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
focused energy launcher(faulty rail gun, unfinished),AR-15, claws
Known Affiliations
n/a
RP Hooks
shown above.

Clive "Prick" Rose - wolfy_of_the_british

Parsed: Clive "Prick" Rose — username wolfy_of_the_british
Resolved: Wolfy (Seolfor) (id: 192265363180748800)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1439722293818294282 • archived
Name
Clive "Prick" Rose
Age
32
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
RipperDoc on Retainer
Psychological Profile
No-nonsense. Raised Military and thus is direct and blunt with his mannerisms. Being raised in this environment has led him being more numb to injury and harm whilst still retaining his concept of "This is fucked up".
Physical Description
6'1'', White, Human. Well-built from the years of military training. 🔧Equipment (Weapons and Other Gear): "Merlin" Multi-use Hand Cannon Buckshot Slug Short-range directed EMP Smoke Signal Flare Napalm M4 Rifle Surgical Assistance Gauntlet 🦾 Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: Auditory System: Hands & Feet: Subdermal Grip (1) Integumentary System: Sub-Dermal Plating (2) Neural: Netrunning Suite (Level 2) (3) Ocular System: Smart Eyes (Medical Upgrade - Allows for medical readings and detection on top of usual Smart Eye Benefits) (3),
Total Cyberware Points
9
Skills / Talents / Abilities
In-Field Surgical Experiencewolfy_of_the_british "You will survive" vs "It'll look clean" PMC Military Training Can handle self in FireFight
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Tactical "MedJet" ( Syndicate Perks - Will not be used in Session, is more background to character)
Backstory
Born on a PMC base out in the Free States, Clive was never really exposed to the world outside of it. This did not mean that he was starved of worldly experiences, however. The term "It takes a village" was never more true and most of the employees on the base took a shine to the young boy learning about the world he had been born into as they shared stories of their own homes, families, experiences and cultures. In time, Clive took an interest in the medical profession, helping treat the injured contractors that came back to base after particularly difficult assignments and was trained by the head nurse on base, lovingly nicknamed "Ferryman". Since his education was not formal by any means, he struggled with the basics such as injections and blood draws without causing undue pain or misses leading to the bestowment of the callsign "Prick", since he was never able to stick them enough times and would "Prick" them dry. Following an assignment where members of the Blue Dragon Syndicate wound up in the med bays at the base, Clive, now employed by the company he was born into, impressed one of their brass well enough that he had his contract bought out by them and now serves as one of their mobile RipperDoc "On Retainer", being granted direction over a small MedJet in their fleet, whilst free to otherwise practice as he wishes.
Known Affiliations
Origin PMC (Generic Mc Genericface) Blue Dragon Syndicate
Reference Images
RP Hooks
RipperDoc for hire, may take up a residency in the (B)Eastside clinic. Capable in a firefight - Mobile Combat Medic able to assist on missions.

"Birdie" Wren - rebskii

Parsed: "Birdie" Wren — username rebskii
Resolved: ᓚᘏᗢ (id: 254757189405769729)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1439720522538811392 • archived
Name
"Birdie" Wren
Age
24
Pronouns
He/She
Occupation
Netrunner
Psychological Profile
pacifist
Physical Description
Cyborg female body, height 5 ft, Mobile netrunner Chrome / Implants Integumentary System: Optical Camo Neural: Netrunner Suite (Level 2) Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Reactive Muscle Fibers
Total Cyberware Points
6
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Basic Combat training, Semi-Advance Netrunner skills, Stealthy, Negotiation skills
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Hoverboard, Two large connectable blades named "boxcutters" and a pistol, Comms in helmet connected to helmet
Backstory
Project SoulNet: Started 2063 in an effort to expand on Soulkiller and its possibilities. An undisclosed number of people were taken off the street of Japan, or brought from volunteering. The goal of this project was to see the limits of editing Soulkillers engrams, and to create “mobile” Netrunners. These prototype Netrunners bodies were made of durable synthetic materials, and lab-made platinum. Dr. [REDACTED] learned it was possible to take an engram from Soulkiller and essentially brainwash the subject, leaving us with a completely blank slate. Subject 427 transfer into the body was successful but when presented with the first task of using a basic hack on a living “participant.” The subject was exhibiting behaviors of locking up, and having almost a “Blank stare” as described by Dr.[REDACTED]. This subject was put down Due to defunding and lack of success; The subjects were terminated and disposed of. May, 2077; Scrouging the junkyard I ended up finding a layer of dead robots that had’ve been around here for at least twenty years, but most of them were weathered down. I ended up finding one that wasn’t exactly damaged, but had a bullet in its head. I didn’t get it back into working condition until 2078, but its chipware socket was too severely weathered, and it seems to have some kind of biochip inside that's unremovable. But, the cyborg still seems to be in functioning condition enough to boot up. -Reven Reed.
Known Affiliations
Netrunner, works with Reven Rp hook: Ghost stoner

She leans on it harder during professional/business conversations. -# *"Hello, User! e.g. Corps, gangs, fixers, or other PCs
RP Hooks
* Optional -- What might draw others to interact with this character?
Additional Notes
I need to flesh shit out more but the rough main hook/arc I want to do is a long burn double agent for a mega corp (thinking Zetatech or Militech) where family is decently high up and as punishment/ a hard lesson cuts her off from most funds and sends her out into the world to see why she needs to keep the corpo job and why its worth it to have “blood” on your hands/sell your soul to be part of the controlling side of power. (all would be a few years pre joining rp like 5/6 years) Rp wise, a netrunner that is doing what she can to survive but gets a little bonus if she fucks up or spreads some misinformation about her corpo during jobs. I want to do a slow burn of either, depending on interactions, deciding these new friends are worth whatever hell turning her back on family/blood or its was always about the credits and personal power - or what happens if someone puts the dots together that she is a corpo rat so main focus of themes Corporate Oppression vs. Street Survival Freedom vs. Control Moral Ambiguity

Ren "Echo/Batto" Makoto - reggieastra

Parsed: Ren "Echo/Batto" Makoto — username reggieastra
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1436973313049231411 • archived
! Username "reggieastra" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
Ren "Echo/Batto" Makoto
Age
Late-Twenties
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Mercenary/Edgerunner
Psychological Profile
Task-driven when on the job, but prone to losing his cool quickly when in crews with talkers. Has happened once while on a mission with a crew. Set up his ears and the gonk wouldn't shut up... "You know what?! Fine. If you can't stop running your gonk-ass mouth, then you can find out what's behind the door. . . boom" Otherwise, when he's not actively doing something that's very likely to get himself killed, he embraces the fact that he's a bat exotic, and acts like most any normal choom, though maybe a bit more distanced due to his specific line of work. His focus during his work and getting those results are what keeps him humane. Another job well done. Another paycheck. Time to upgrade, then time to party! He usually sticks to nicknames. Kang Tao corpos gave him the nicknames "Echo" and simply "Bat" or "Bats", but never "Batsy". People in Japantown called him "Batto" (just "bat" in Japanese), but never his real name unless they are his closest chooms.
Physical Description
Height: 5'4" (1.63 m) Small, yet quick and hard to find Bat Species Exotic
Chrome / Implants
Overall a minimalistic look, but with more internal chrome with the flashy stuff in his ears: Custom "バット" ("Bat" / Batto) Enhanced Ears | 3 slots | Allows for a toggle to listen in on people from long distances. (Would require AOD call) Downsides: Hard to hear in sound polluted areas (busy places like clubs, bars, cars/AV's nearby, etc.)
Total Cyberware Points
9 CWP
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Stealth, lockpicking, recon and espionage.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Light armor, if any can fit him and not impede his movement Weapons: Silenced Unity (or any other stealth-based weapons) Militech M-76e Omaha Nekomata (Has to plan to use it ahead of time, ie. Assassination gigs)
Backstory
Born in Japantown and yet anther young volunteer for the Biotechnica Exotics trials came a survivor from the Bat line, Ren Makoto would quickly put his newfound animal properties to use, running small-time espionage gigs- stealing files, recording high-profile conversations, even a couple of assassinations- until landing a contract with Kang Tao that lent him a contact that would create his custom ear mods (Pick only one RD for checkups on this specific piece of cyberware, Ren will have to do jobs with Kang Tao, if applicable)
Known Affiliations
Kang Tao, Tyger Claws (some good and bad run-in's, part of Japantown) some fixers, and maybe some unreliable corpo contacts from jobs in the past
RP Hooks
Optional -- What might draw others to interact with this character? Echo is a spy for a living. Most of his jobs include some form of recon, theivery, and/or assassination. He is very valuable in crews for being able to point out how an area/room is going to look before even opening the door, even with no cameras to look through- but that requires the crew to understand that you need to shut the fuck up when he is using his ears. Need a door open? Lock picked! Any traps on the door? The "Bat/バット" ears may be able to detect them if they have a subtle hum to them (ie. laser mines)
Additional Notes
Optional -- Custom ear mods will use a mix of blendshapes and IkeHud to give the appearance of being able to "look" through walls, with potential limitations

From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1436187249367846922 • archived
Name
Reven “holo” reed / formerly Hazel Asher
Age
27
Pronouns
she/her
Occupation
A solo merc
Psychological Profile
Not mentally stable, 100% a pessimist, possessive and mean
Physical Description
5’4 with a lean build, scarring on the face, tail only for aesthetic, hair kept up for convenience Chrome / Implants; Integumentary System: Sub-dermal Plating Legs: Cyberleg Ocular System: impulse Splicer Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Combat Wired Reflexes
Total Cyberware Points
10
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Best at missions that include killing everyone, good with guns and at taking orders when needed. Quick reflexes, and quick thinking, but will pull the trigger before asking questions. Sensitive awareness and senses; especially sound due to previous head trauma.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
walkie talkie, knife, goggles with night vision, automatic pistol. Cyber-woven fullbody suit with utility belt, shoes help with stability
Backstory
Hazel Asher, born from Elizabeth and Micah Asher. The daughter of the Asher clan Chief. When she was 22, the Clan refused to join Snake Nation, or give up their land and Snake Nation eradicated them. Hazel, having been run over and left for dead, miraculously managed to reach a road and was taken to the Night City Medical Center by a decent couple. After being treated and once she was able to walk, she escaped the hospital and lived on the streets of Night City. She changed her name and rebuilt her life on the goal of revenge. Moved back to the badlands at 25, but takes jobs in Night City.
Known Affiliations
Nomad (formerly), bodyguard, gun for hire Rp hook: Rebskii
Additional Notes
Redemption arc gonna be crazy ong

Lorenzo Harper - skaleyseto

Parsed: Lorenzo Harper — username skaleyseto
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1428522118403981403 • archived
! Username "skaleyseto" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
Lorenzo Harper
Age
25
Pronouns
He / Him
Occupation
Joytoy / Techie
Psychological Profile
Lorenzo is a bright spark in the grim slums of Night City — happy-go-lucky, caring, and creative. He thrives on bringing comfort and smiles to others, whether through tinkering with tech or offering warmth and affection. Beneath his playful nature, lies quiet trauma from being forced into choices he didn’t make for himself. Despite that, he embraces life with open arms, believing every body — chrome or flesh — deserves love. Naive at times, but genuine. A little crazy, but deeply kind.
Physical Description
Short, thick, sturdy, and curvy — Lorenzo carries himself with a natural confidence. His wool is soft and well-kept, often doubling as a pillow for clients who need comfort more than company. His bright eyes glow faintly with digital light, and his holograms project around him from those eyes. 🦾 Chrome / Implants (Normal = base level, not considered cyberware) Arms & Arm Attachments: • Integrated Hologram Emitter (projects visuals tied to emotions, pricing, or availability) Auditory System: • Normal Circulatory & Immune Systems: • Normal Hands & Feet: • Normal Integumentary System: • Normal Legs & Mobility: • Normal Neural: • Normal Ocular System: • Enhanced with holographic projection capability Skeleton & Torso Musculature: • Normal (slightly denser bones for durability maybe if suggested i should get it then ill upgrade it) Universal Muscular (Arms / Legs / Tail): • Normal (Slightly tougher organic muscle tissue; takes hits better than average flesh if suggested to then ill upgrade it) Miscellaneous:
Total Cyberware Points
1–3
Skills / Talents / Abilities
• Exceptionally creative; can craft gadgets, gizmos, and quick-fix devices from scrap. • Empathetic and nurturing — loves making people feel safe and cared for. • Skilled joytoy; emotionally and physically attentive. • Terrible flirt; always ends up being more cute than seductive. • Handy with cyberware repair — especially small malfunctions or system bugs. • Can weaponize scrap, tools, or junk into something deadly. • Surprisingly destructive when cornered.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
• Scrap Electro-Magnetic Machine Gun — a rapid-fire launcher built from junk. Requires constant scavenging for batteries and scrap or fuel to function.
Backstory
Lorenzo Harper was born into the Harper Nomad Clan, a family of mechanics, wanderers, and dreamers who traveled the highways between cities. His early years were filled with warmth, laughter, and the hum of engines — raised by his mother, father, and abuela, who taught him that kindness and craft go hand in hand. That peace shattered when a Biotechnica convoy intercepted their caravan. The Harpers were coerced into servitude — their skills exploited by a corporate branch running a project that turned select individuals into “designer companions.” Lorenzo was chosen as a prototype, modified against his will with advanced holographic tech meant to enhance emotional connection and advertisement. At first, he hated what he’d become — a product, a brand, a body sold under flashing lights. But over time, he realized that who he is cannot be taken by chrome. He learned to love himself in every form, choosing to bring warmth and joy to others, not because it’s his job, but because it’s his nature. Now free but still carrying the ghosts of that past, Lorenzo wanders Night City as a joytoy and techie, balancing softness with sharp tongue at times, metal with wool, and machine-made light with genuine human warmth.
Known Affiliations
• Harper Nomad Clan (his home and family)
Reference Images
(Will be retexturing the gattling gun to make it fit better)

[Constant low-level clicking or twitching in fingers.] Integumentary System: Dermal Plating(3) Resistant to blades, blunt trauma, Rifle Caliber (7.62 and below) [Feels cold to the touch. Looks synthetic. Scanners flag you.] Legs & Mobility:Cyberleg(2) Jump farther, run faster, land silently. Parkour beast. [Loud stomp at full speed. Doesn't enhance Stamina.] Neural: Ocular System: Smart Eyes(2) Zoom, thermal, night vision, facial ID, AR HUD. [Eyes glow. Absolute stability for small arms, less as the caliber increases. [Joints audibly click after sustained use.] Miscellaneous: Biomonitor(1) Tracks all vital signs. 10
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Is a singer, graffiti artist, skilled at picking locks, and has natural skills with firearms.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Fully cybernetic left arm, Suppressed Kyubi rifle, Ajax rifle, M9 Bayonet, Overture Revolver.
Backstory
Roland “Trapper” Grant is a street kid from the Burroughs of New York City. He grew up in Brooklyn getting in and out of trouble with a local gang called The 34th Street Rikers. Throughout his teens he worked for/with them selling weapons, drugs, and just about anything else the Rikers could get their hands on. Additionally he worked for them as an enforcer, intimidating or taking out the myriad of targets they gave him. Eventually the Rikers would draw NUSA’s wrath, getting hit hard from all sides by the FIA. A mentor of Trapper’s, would die ensuring he escaped. He’d spend the next few months on the run, slowly but surely making his way towards the Western Free States. Trapper saw this as an opportunity to get out of the gang life, joining up with the Blue Dragon Syndicate for access to their tech, opportunities to make money, and protection. He would also begin mercenary work on the side as a side hustle using the gear that the syndicate gave him.
Known Affiliations
Blue Dragon Syndicate 34th Street Rikers(Forcefully disbanded) .
Reference Images
Art, screenshots, etc.
RP Hooks
Always handy in a gun fight, if you need a reliable gunman hit their line.

Name
Stella Watson
Age
24
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
Backstreet Butcher Boys/ Former Mox
Psychological Profile
* Protective over close friends and family due to past trauma, was in Mox early in life
Physical Description
* 5’10”, Novabeast girl exotic with piercings. Looks fairly organic otherwise.
Chrome / Implants
Misc: Miss Midnight (1pt) Integumentary System: Subdermal Plating (3pts) Neural: ICE Layer (2pts) Ocular System: SmartEyes (2pts) Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): N/A Miscellaneous: N/A
Total Cyberware Points
(7pts)
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Skilled with handcannons, baseball bats and dirty fighting. Persuasive and charming.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
* Malorian Arms .45 Long Colt Revolver * Constitutional Arms M2038 Tactician Shotgun * Baseball Bat
Backstory
Stella was born in Northern California but moved to Night City as a young child. In her early years, she was exposed to the sex work in the city early, due to her parents living in Japantown, near Jig-Jig Street. Over time, she became uncomfortable in her own body, causing her to seek out and transform herself into an exotic. Seeing the abuse of these girls and boys growing up caused her to grow a sort of estranged attachment to protecting them. Eventually, this caused her to join the Mox as soon as she turned 18, leaving her mother. She became a JoyToy in the Mox and recorded BDs for them. All things come to an end, however, and eventually she became exhausted with her work. Stella started to become more interested in contract work, eventually landing herself a few gigs as a Solo for fixers around Night City. During a job gone wrong, the Backstreet Butcher Boys zeroed the gang that assaulted her and invited her to join up with them. She still keeps a passive eye out for other JoyToys, and will help out if they are being mistreated.
Known Affiliations
Former Mox and JoyToy, but is in the Backstreet Butcher Boys now.

After moving to NC at 19 he spent the next half decade scraping by, making a name and face for himself. Now more heavily modded, he fills in as a vocalist for local bands and sells himself as a Joytoy.

Leonardo - starroxen

Parsed: Leonardo — username starroxen
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1425289331026825248 • archived
! Username "starroxen" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
Leonardo
Age
27
Pronouns
He/him Jobs: publicly: Hobby shop Secretly: illegal car modification service Psychology: Ptsd from car crash Physical: Short mildly buff lion fox hybrid Chrome: Reinforced Tendons GorillaArms Cyberware points: 4 Talents: Background in professional racing and degree in mechanics Weapons: budget arms shotgun and Smith & Wesson lever action rifle shooting .45-70 Government
Backstory
race car driver who was getting good enough in the league he got a sponsorship deal from Arasaka. When he took the deal it was amazing for awhile until one day he lost a big race to a rival competitor. The next race he’s on the big straight pushing 200 mph when suddenly his brakes stopped working. The accident which followed left him in critical condition but luckily he lived. Now he has mechanical arms and legs with 6 mechanical vertebra in his upper spine. It’s nothing special but just enough to keep living. He now works in a hobby shop he started and enjoys running a secret business in the back where he illegally modifies cars for criminals so they can escape the law easier. Because of the accident he has formed a deep hatred towards Arasaka. He also gets shaky when driving higher than 100 mph from the PTSD. Hooks: He actively drives a modified Nissan Sentra from 2016 and loves showing it off. (Can modify year if an issue) Loves working on cars With happily race you but prefers keeping it to the track.
Additional Notes
Prefers to not go do anything too dangerous anymore. His car business makes him most his money. Prefers to not kill but will if necessary

Adazae Oreste - khepri2992

Parsed: Adazae Oreste — username khepri2992
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1404202678845964320 • archived
! Username "khepri2992" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
Adazae Oreste
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
Hustle / Gangster / Industrial worker
Psychological Profile
Moody, Angry, and rebellious. In turmoil at the death of her family, and friends. She is willing to pick a fight with anyone if provoked. Copious user of alcohol. Believes herself to be blessed by the Rada Lwa Ogun. As such she will not betray you, or lie to you. However she will certainly punch you in your face. Tersely Quiet, unless addressed. Think of a woman who has lost home, family, and has not much going on in life other than being forced into an industrial job to get by. She gets sloppily drunk, and is moody. Often she cries when alone, and was a black sheep amongst her now basically dead community for being far to head strong.
Physical Description
2.1m tall at the ears, 160 kg., angry exotic feline lioness, religious tattoos, and scars on her body. Notable scar on her left rib cage from a near death experience. Cyberware: Dense Bones (2) Neo fibers (3) Gorilla arms (2) Dermal plating (3) Effects: 20% Heavier, Increased Striking power with weapons, and fists. 30% Muscle strength increase 50% strength increase, can man-handle people. Resistant to small arms, knives, blunt trauma. Full list: 10 points
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Her combat style is simple. Run at the enemy, screaming bloody murder, and generally being a massive problem. Think a DND barbarian tank, meant to soak up damage for her team. In the thick of it she will rip the foe apart in bloody melee combat with her hands or saws. She is a weight lifter, and gym junkie. Industrial worker, Skilled Blacksmith, and maker of tools. Can drink way too much alcohol to the point it's almost fatal for the average person.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Twin custom Cut-o-matics, Combat stims, combat vest, crusher. (Combat load out)

Moose - Darius9077

Parsed: Moose — username Darius9077
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1380172283720503316 • archived
! Username "Darius9077" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
🦌 Moose
Age
23
Pronouns
He/Him Role: Joytoy Cyberware Points: 3
Psychological Profile
Moose is a product of betrayal, exploitation, and resilience. Taken at 18 by a gango he owed debts to, Moose was sold to an unlicensed ripperdoc specializing in fetishistic biomechanical mods. Against his will, Moose was reshaped into a hybrid — a stylized anthropomorphic persona — and implanted with joytoy cyberware. Treated like a possession, he endured months of degradation until his “owner” tossed him aside for a newer experiment. Scarred but not broken, Moose now works in the shadows of Night City’s pleasure district, using his role as cover while gathering eddies and intel. His goal is singular: track down the underground ripper rumored to reverse cyberware transformations — and reclaim his original self.
Physical Description
Anthropomorphic, wolf-hybrid appearance with vivid, neon-swirled fur patterns. Lean but athletic build, striking cyan-blue eyes with synthetic pupils. Tattoos on arms and shoulders — a mix of biomech designs and roses. Wears tight suspenders over dark slacks, often shirtless to maximize client appeal. Expressive body language, calculated poses for allure and control. ⚙️ Chrome/Implants: Mr. Studd™ – Male performance-enhancement implant. VoiceWeaver – Real-time vocal modulation for client preferences. DollChip – Behavioral override unit; partially disabled by Moose for autonomy. 🛠️ Skills/Abilities: Persuasion & Seduction – Trained to manipulate and disarm with voice and body. Urban Survival – Familiar with back alleys, black markets, and safehouses. Basic Ripperdoc Knowledge – Learned through necessity; understands cyberware risks and basic maintenance. Acting/Subterfuge – Can convincingly emulate emotions, roles, and personalities. 🧨 Weapons/Armor/Equipment: Hidden Switchblade in belt buckle. Knockout Inhaler (non-lethal, for escaping rough clients). Reinforced Clothing with limited anti-cut fibers. Datachip Bracelet – stores key client data and blackmail insurance. 📖 Backstory Moose was just 18 when the debt collectors came. Alone and vulnerable, he was taken from his apartment by a local gango boss and handed over to an unlicensed ripperdoc experimenting with biomechanical modifications. He was transformed—without consent—into a furry, implanted with joytoy cyberware, and enslaved as a personal plaything. Months passed before he was tossed aside, discarded like broken chrome. Now working the backrooms of a Jig-Jig club, Moose hides in plain sight, serving customers while quietly gathering eddies and information. His dream? Finding the mythical ripperdoc “Switchback”—rumored to have the tech and skill to reverse bodymods and override cyber-behavior chips. Moose won’t stop until he reclaims the self that was stolen from him.
Additional Notes
Keeps a hidden journal under his mattress, filled with sketches of what he remembers of his old self. Has a growing contact list of rogue techs, NCPD turncoats, and disgraced medtechs. Secretly addicted to Braindance replays of pre-modified memories, though it makes the longing worse.

Ivana “Valkyrie” Kade - freebooze

Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1421840962518384721 • archived

Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
📝 NCRP Character Sheet 🪪 Name Ivana “Valkyrie” Kade 🎂 Age 28 🏳️ Pronouns She/Her 💼 Occupation / Role in Night City Umbra Solutions operative / Hyperion Dominion Systems asset. Functions as a sniper, covert exfiltration leader, and executive bodyguard. Her presence in Night City is part liaison, part deterrent: HDS sends her where subtle terror speaks louder than words. 🧠 Psychological Profile Overview: Mission-focused but fractured. Violence isn’t just a tool for Ivana, it’s a ritual performance she can’t live without. She believes herself to be a valkyrie of the modern age, choosing who dies and who lives, sometimes with eerie tenderness. Personality: Calculating, unnervingly calm until the switch flips. Finds humor in moments where no one else does. Smiles at corpses more often than at people. Trauma & Conditioning: Former Eastern Bloc special forces, later subjected to Dominion OS oversight AIs. Indoctrination left paranoia and the need to assert her autonomy through defiant, psychotic rituals. Behavioral Quirks: Collects small trinkets from kills (dog tags, teeth, jewelry), keeps them in a labeled case. Whispers faux “blessings” before executions. Hums when slipping into combat trance. Bites her palm before missions, leaving faint scars. Emotional Tone: Appears flat, detached; erupts suddenly with theatrical cruelty. Often whispers truths or confessions to targets before killing them. 🧍 Physical Description Height: 5’10” Build: Lean, wiry strength; built for precision over brute force. Features: Mods/Exotic Traits: General Vibe: Severe and statuesque. Commands silence when entering a room; presence feels like standing too close to a sniper scope. 🦾 Chrome / Implants (Slots left blank for you to fill with chosen cyberware & CWP totals.) Arms & Arm Attachments (2 slots): Auditory System: Circulatory & Immune Systems: Hands & Feet (2 slots): Integumentary System: Subdermal Plating (3 CWP), Chameleon Skin (2 CWP) Legs & Mobility (2 slots): Cyberlegs (2 CWP) Neural: Ocular System: SmartEyes (2 CWP) Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Miscellaneous:
Total Cyberware Points
9 🧰 Skills / Talents / Abilities Sniping / Marksmanship: Flawless precision in hostile conditions. Urban Infiltration: Mastery of rooftops, vertical insertion, and silent routes. Clandestine Demolitions: Effective use of micro-explosives and sabotage tools. Exfiltration Leadership: Controls evacuations and staging under fire. Psychological Warfare: Ritualized cruelty, intimidation, and manipulation. Interrogation Style: Gentle, coaxing questions punctuated by sudden violence. Social Tactics: Uses small kindnesses as bait; collects “debts” from those she spares. 🧱 Equipment / Armor / Weapons HX-9 “Oblivion Rifle” (custom variant, biometric lock, anti-forensic mod). Dual HX-8 sidearms. Dual Thermal Blades. Light tactical armor Custom helmet: Umbra VLK-7 Tactical Helmet - “Grimhilde” Helmet abilities: Voice Modulator, Encrypted Comms, Kinetic Dampener Masking Umbra Solutions exfil kit, encrypted comms, breaching charges.

Leon 'Watcher' Draeven - Sliss_

Parsed: Leon 'Watcher' Draeven — username Sliss_
Resolved: Sliss_ (id: 307358890117300225)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1404080545033621506 • archived
Name
Leon ||Draeven|| aka: Watcher
Age
24
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Vigilante Edgerunner, former Militech black ops liaison ⸻
Psychological Profile
Leon is a paradox — a towering, intimidating predator who moves with deliberate patience and restraint. On the street, he plays the role of a cold, gravel-voiced enforcer of his own brand of justice. Off the street, in rare moments of privacy, his tone softens, revealing a calm, almost soothing presence. He believes himself beyond redemption for the deaths he caused during his Militech years and the blood he spills as a vigilante. Instead of seeking forgiveness, he accepts the role of a necessary monster — killing those who prey on the innocent so others never have to. Trauma defines much of his emotional distance: betrayal by a girlfriend who used him to sabotage his father, sexual assault by a high-ranking corporate woman that was covered up, and the moral weight of civilian deaths on sanctioned ops. He has a deep mistrust of women and avoids intimacy entirely. His only private outlet is poetry — verses he writes in a battered notebook, sometimes bleak, sometimes yearning, never shared with anyone. ⸻
Physical Description
• Height: 6’10” • Build: Toned, athletic, imposing • Species / Exotic Mods: Wolf–Fox hybrid exotic — foxlike facial structure with canine musculature and bone build, black fox muzzle markings, icy blue eyes, dark grey fur with muted brown/orange streaks, dirty cream underbelly. • General Vibe: Towering and fearsome in public, quietly reflective in solitude. • Typical Attire: Bomber jacket, techwear pants, plain T-shirt, heavy boots. • Mask: Custom ballistic mask painted like a canine skull, ballistic lenses with LED color shift.
Skills / Talents / Abilities
• Advanced firearms handling • Close-quarters combat (short blade mastery) • Urban stealth & infiltration • Tactical coordination & target prioritization • Poetic writing — used to process trauma, occasionally serves as coded messaging • High intimidation factor (voice control, mask LED manipulation) ⸻
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
• 50.AE Auto Pistol — compact, high-caliber sidearm • .338 LMG — suppressive fire, heavy street intimidation • Titanium Short Sword — fast draw, high penetration, modern alloy design • Custom ballistic mask (LED lenses, intimidation factor) • Light ballistic underlayer (beneath jacket)
Known Affiliations
• Formerly Militech black ops liaison (ties severed) • Works alone; no formal gang ties • Shadow connections to street-level fixers for jobs and intel ⸻
RP Hooks
• Has intel and insider knowledge of Militech operations • Will intervene violently if he sees exploitation or predation • Keeps a mysterious, intimidating reputation on the street • May be found observing trouble from rooftops before striking • FIA file on him (not as watcher) from when he was in militech • Former Militech associates might remember him as “the coordinator who gave the order.” • Survivors or families of those killed at Red River could resurface. • 6th street might idolize the massacre • mother and father trying to find their son • Urban Legend: Some people in Night City believe Watcher is just a story. Others think he’s multiple people. • Corporate Retaliation: Militech might still have records of him. If he’s drawing too much attention, an exec could decide it’s time to “clean house.” • Media Angle: A reporter hunting for proof of the Watcher’s existence could either expose him or become an unlikely ally. ⸻
Additional Notes
• Will not seek romantic or sexual contact — severe trust issues and past trauma • Keeps a small notebook of poetry in his jacket pocket — guarded as closely as a weapon

Name
Ivo
Age
53
Pronouns
doesn't care
Occupation
just got here so none yet.
Psychological Profile
similar to irl me; social shut in, understanding, patient, heavy mood fluctuations.
Physical Description
tall exotic covered in painful reminders of the hard country/nomad life, she is built biologically how she looks. she has multiple damaged areas on her body one of the most prominent and biggest being her left breast. Whilst covered in tech her body also is covered in a copper&brass alloy. 🦾 Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: Monowire Right wrist Auditory System: Circulatory & Immune Systems: Hands & Feet: Integumentary System: Legs & Mobility: Neural: Ocular System: Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Miscellaneous:
Total Cyberware Points
2
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Skilled with rifles, melee weapons, and basic close quarters combat. She has a talent for picking up on strategies fairly easy. She has a very specific ability to sense metallic objects behind her only when they are near the right side of her neck where it connects to her shoulder (Based off of something my body does irl. makes hair cuts difficult, also no, I still have no clue why it happens.)
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
she has a set of strange heavy armor, a side arm, and a long arm
Backstory
Stuck home with her father after her mother had passed peacefully, she lived within the countryside for several years living off of very sparse farmable land she decided after months of thought she decided to leave her father and venture to the city with a want to see if it truly is just as bad as they say despite knowing she may not be able to consistently return, as the walk is an almost monumental task.
Known Affiliations
has history in The Jodes Nomad nation
Reference Images
RP Hooks
they always radiate a soft blue glow, their backstory is free of very traumatic events, she is meant to be somewhat innocent as well as unaware of sexual stuff, she is new new to city as it is her very first time out of the country side, she already in a worn condition but seems to be self-stabilizing for her cybernetics.
Additional Notes
(going to be basing what she can do by what irl me can do, piss her off, expect a drop kick.)

Hound - sailor_bun aka arson

Parsed: Hound — username sailor_bun aka arson
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1416781042509156452 • archived
! Username "sailor_bun aka arson" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
Hound
Age
26
Pronouns
He/They
Occupation
Private investigator
Psychological Profile
An extremely anxious person, and often paces if not in a conversation, you'll find him following people he finds interesting in order to emotionally regulate himself. In conversation he’ll do his best to come off as friendly but he often has a flat tone if hes not paying attention. He was physically and emotionally abused by his mother and has the scars to show it, he goes silent and scratches himself whenever something or someone is reminding him of his past or when he's anxious and can't pace. This man definitely hallucinates, oftentimes just whispers or figures standing, walking beside him, it doesn't bother him as much as he's grown used to it however he’s very skittish and sometimes struggles finding what's real and not. He's lost most feeling in his hands due to said abuse and has nerve damage. To shorten it he's deranged and stalks people out of pleasure.
Physical Description
A tall pale male with tattoos, long ruffled silver hair, blackened hands and forearms, dull eyes that glow. His jaw unhinges in three places, generally a very spooky looking individual.
Chrome / Implants
VoiceWeaver - Miscellaneous - 1 Real-time voice modulation—change pitch, mimic accents, disguise yourself. Modded Mandibles - Miscellaneous - 1 Jaws open wider than normal—voice amp, bite attack, or freak people out. Mr. Studd - Miscellaneous - 1 Boosted stamina, modular sensations, vibe modules. Scent Scanner - Miscellaneous - 1 Track people or chemicals by smell. Smell blood, oil, etc. Chemical analyzer - circulatory & immune system - 1 Higher chance to detect chemical traces in the air. SmartEyes - ocular system - 2 Zoom, thermal, night vision, facial ID, AR HUD.
Total Cyberware Points
7/10 After effects: Voice glitches in argument, he cant whistle anymore, body buzzes if over used, it can malfunction in awkward moments, overwhelmed by smells easily, will gag from extreme smells, sneeze fits in polluted areas, eyes glow, will frog blink.
Skills / Talents / Abilities
He's a very quick learner if he watches someone do something he can usually replicate it. He's surprisingly a good cook and enjoys cooking for others
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Only one dagger with a heart dented into the side
Backstory
A socially incapable man who was raised by an extremely emotional mother and a father who was never there which turned him to rely on others for emotional stability. His mother was very loving but was unstable emotionally and he found himself protecting his mother throughout his life especially throughout his development in childhood. He grew up northside of the city, his father working in the broken down factories.
Known Affiliations
N/A
Reference Images
RP Hooks
Cool mouth literally the only cool thing about this FREAK Additional Note:

Sierra - .raelyna

Parsed: Sierra — username .raelyna
Resolved: Raelyna The Red (id: 160705634394832897)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1416779503954296936 • archived
Name
** Sierra
Age
** 27
Pronouns
** She/Her
Occupation
** Merc
Psychological Profile
** ESFP -A. Communication is easy, talk is cheap, style over substance, adaptable and hands-on. Short sighted, easily distracted, averse to boredom, impulsive, prone to overreaching. Acute trauma and PTSD related to betrayal, chain smoker, adrenalin junkie, fearless, repeats what people say. Informal, Nihilistic, Assertive.
Physical Description
** Average height, dark hair, violet eyes and highlights, distinctive scars.
Chrome / Implants
** Enhanced Ears 2pts. Silent Step Soles 2pts. Nanostitch Skin 2pts. GhostTag 1pts. Netrunner Suite (Level 1) 1pts. Targeting Optics 2pts.
Total Cyberware Points
10
Skills / Talents / Abilities
** Stealth, CQC, Endurance, Precision Shooting.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
** Enhanced combat frame equipped with optical camouflage and a sensor array. Nekomata and Kanshin.
Backstory
Sierra was born on the east coast, spent her youth in Militech training program with the intent of molding her into grunt in the corpo army. When she excelled at stealth training and marksmanship she was transferred to a special forces career path and trained as a sniper. Equipped with a light combat frame, and a rifle, she was routinely dropped into enemy territory with one instruction, kill the target. Her talents were used to great effect during the unification wars, and after the treaty was signed, she maintained her combat presence in Texas until 2075. During an operation in Sherman, where she was tasked with eliminating an asset in the SDC, she had the distinct pleasure of watching through a rifle scope as her NCO sold her out to defect. As she sat in her sniper nest, Sergeant Major Ellis stepped out of the car where she was expected to paint the target in the yard for Sierra to eliminate some time later. Instead, the marker shone up the hill and directly into her nest, and a split second later a targeted drone strike dumped several rounds on Sierra’s position. What happened next, for Sierra, was a blur of confusion and chaos. With three bullets buried in her back she ran off into the desert, her cover blown and her Militech status burned she weas as good as dead, this must have been enough for the assailants, since once they saw her collapse on the sands they left her to rot. That would have been that, but for lady luck, as she was scooped up out of the sand by the Aldecaldos. The debate between leaving her for the sands and taking her gear, or helping her, was postponed long enough for her to recover. “Patch her up, if she lives, she can pay us back. If she dies, we keep her gear and leave her to the vultures.” Despite the severity of the damage done to her lungs she didn’t succumb to the fever that set in after the surgery, she recovered, slowly. The day she started walking again, she hobbled over to the community cooktop and sat at the table with the Nomad’s, silently. Quietly several handfuls of eddies changed hands as it became clear that some bets had just been settled. “What were my odds?” She asked the nearest winner. “Three to one against. I just made a hundred eddies thanks to you. Fortunes favor strikes again, if I hadn’t spotted you out on those dunes I’d have had to pay for this beer with my own money.” The nomad grinned, sliding a beer across the table and sitting down across from her. She had shoulder length pink hair, a great tan, and a synthetic leather racing suit emblazoned in the flaming horse skull that showed off all her curves. “The name’s Kit, but you can call me Lucky, all my friends do.” Sierra grinned at her laissez-faire attitude and winning smile. “Well, you ain’t wrong, you’re definitely lucky.” She says, clinking beers with her and grinning. “If you hadn’t spotted me out there, I’d be coyote crap by now.”

Because it's integrated into the arm itself it allows for better handling and stability reducing the overall recoil of said weapon. Down side - you can only attach one weapon at a time and can't be any larger than a hand cannon. Must also get in contact with a ripperdock to detach or switch out said weapon since they must be modified to fit - 2p) Auditory System: Circulatory & Immune Systems: Detoxifier: Function - Helps remove toxins from the body. Down Side - always thirsty - 1p Hands & Feet (2 slots): Silent Step Soles: Function - Shock-dampening foot mod. Complete silence when walking. Down Side - you can't make loud stomping, even when running. - 2p, Subdermal Grip: Function - Lets you hold objects tighter than the human limit. Down Side - Sometimes crush fragile things - 1p Integumentary System: Legs & Mobility (2 slots): Cyberleg (Runner): Function - Jump farther, run faster, land silently. Parkour beast. Down Side - Loud stomp at full speed. Doesn't enhance Stamina - 2p Neural: Ocular System: Smart Eyes: Function - Zoom, thermal, night vision, facial ID, AR HUD. Down Side - Eyes glow. You sometimes blink asynchronously. - 2p Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Miscellaneous:

Terrance Williams aka Trouble Terrance - oboro_

Parsed: Terrance Williams aka Trouble Terrance — username oboro_
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1415294528771850282 • archived
! Username "oboro_" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
Terrance Williams aka Trouble Terrance
Age
41
Pronouns
he/him
Occupation
Grapes Street Gang Leader
Psychological Profile
At first he seems to be an dumbass thug like any other, but he is a well educated and street smart man who has seen and experienced a lot.
Physical Description
Tall athletic afro american man with tattoos covering his arms, chest and face Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: Auditory System: Circulatory & Immune Systems: Hands & Feet: Integumentary System: Dermal Plating (3 CWP) Legs & Mobility: Neural: Ocular System: Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Reactive Muscle Fiber (1 CWP) Miscellaneous: Ghost Tag (1 CWP), Voice Weaver (1 CWP)
Total Cyberware Points
(6 CWP)
Skills / Talents / Abilities
charismatic, athletic, negotiator, techie (radio frequenzies), street smart
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Malorian Arms Overture, Modified AKM with Airburst Rounds
Backstory
Terrance was born in the summer of 2037 in Night City. Both his parents being part of a gang, Terrance grew up around the gang life. His parents did everything they could to avoid him becoming another lost soul in city. As a child his parents homeschooled him teaching him about the street and his family heritage. He was very fascinated with his great grandfather who co founded a infamous gang in Los Angeles during the 1970's. At the age of 16 he lost both his parents who were getting killed during a police raid. With nowhere to go he joined the 6th Street Gang in his neighbourhood of Rancho Coronado. At first he thought the gang is there to help the already impoverished neighbourhood. But the glory was just an facade of what was really going on in the gang. When Terrance turned 20 he left 6th Street behind with connections and knowledge. After he left the gang he tried to go legit as a construction site worker in Pacifica. In 2062 Terrance helped the incoming wave of Haitians in Pacifica and met Philippe Oreste. Terrance had it rough trying to be legit and he found himself in a life of crime again. For a few years he worked as a hitman operating out of Pacifica for various fixers in the city. In 2070 while on a job back in his old neighbourhood in Rancho Coronado he met old friends from back in the day in 6th Street. They told him about how worse the gang got over the years and how they left the gang with no oppertunities. Terrance at first tried to help them out but later on he and ex 6th Street members formed their own gang. At first they did gigs for various fixer but over a timespan of a few months they became indiepended. A new oppertunity opend in 2076 when he learned about the infighting within the Valentinos he took the chance. He went to Heywood with some of his people and recruited several members from the Valentinos to his own gang. On that day the Grapes Street Gang was founded.
Known Affiliations
6th Street (formerly), Vodoo Boys (the ones that still exist),
Reference Images
RP Hooks
Sells Radio Jammers, very forward, at war with 6th Street, the NCPD and some sets of the Valentinos
Additional Notes
Rumors say that he might have a family that he hides from the gang life

Name

Age
** 24
Pronouns

Occupation

Psychological Profile
** Distrusting of nearly everyone, often hostile when continuously bothered, usually on her own due to the stresses of keeping up with other people. This often leaves her entirely on her own and without help if something happens. At the same time, she can often be aggressive when caught by someone on her own, especially around multiple people. When entirely alone, she's often relaxed and calm. Has PTSD (wowie, nc classic)
Physical Description
** 5'8 (173cm), lean, facial scars and freckles, human, has an arm blade, often relaxed or flirty but can be quick to anger with rude remarks.
Chrome / Implants
** * Name the mods, what they do, and note any tradeoffs. * Note: Customer chrome and implants are allowed, but they must be approved for use * Slots, 1 Cyberware Implant per slot EXCEPT Miscellaneous which is unlimited: * Arms & Arm Attachments (2 slots): *Arm blade (just set it as mantis blades for convenience) Description - "Mantis Blades. sharp. scary. neato-o." (we all know what they do) Tradeoffs - "You have weird sharp arms." * Auditory System: N/A * Circulatory & Immune Systems: *Detoxifier Description - "Higher chance to filters toxins from blood effectively." Tradeoffs - "Frequent thirst; constant hydration needed." * Hands & Feet (2 slots): *Cybernetic claws Description - "Claws or stylized tools. Intimidation, fashion, or utility." Tradeoffs - "Metal click when tapping; never quite silent." *Silentstep soles Description - "Shock-dampening foot mod. Complete silence when walking." Tradeoffs - "You can’t run loud even if you want to. No warning stomps." * Integumentary System: *NanoStich skin Description - "Automatically seals minor wounds such as small knife wound. " Tradeoffs - "Skin occasionally ripples oddly, unsettling observers." * Legs & Mobility (2 slots): N/A * Neural: N/A * Ocular System: N/A * Skeleton & Torso Musculature: N/A * Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): N/A * Miscellaneous: *Midnight Lady™ *and* Mr. Studd™ (if both are applicable) ((avi has a wiener toggle)) Description - "Boosted stamina, modular sensations, vibe modules." Tradeoffs - "Malfunctions in awkward moments. Buzzes audibly if overused."
Total Cyberware Points
** 9 or 10 depending on the last one
Skills / Talents / Abilities
** Often manipulative, using lies and bribes to get her way through things, even using her body as a bribe. She has no hacking skills and her combat style is centered around stealth. She's no 007, but she refuses to let herself be seen on purpose when doing things she shouldn't. If spotted, she very swiftly becomes hostile or attempts to escape.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
** She has a custom-fitting combat and stealth suit and a mono mantis blade along with a Unity pistol.

Alexi "Northstar" Klar - nocturnalight

Parsed: Alexi "Northstar" Klar — username nocturnalight
Resolved: Nocturnalight (id: 307278222788132864)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1413852217147920455 • archived
! Only 0 labeled section(s) parsed
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
**>>NCRP CHARACTER SHEET<<** **[Name]** Alexi "Northstar" Klar **[Age]** 24 **[Pronouns]** He/Him **[Occupation]** Doll + Informant **[Role]** __Primary__ - Techie (BDs, Cyberware Mods, and Network Devices) __Secondary__ - Netrunner (Coding and Spyware) **[Psychological Profile]** *"The Dragon - A symbol of wealth, strength, and courage... Yet everything can be corrupted by the night."* - While on the streets, he tries to maintain a more open and inviting personality. He takes any opportunity he can to get more clients. -# *"Aw... Why such a lonely face this beautiful night? Could you use a little company~?"* - Compared to his doll work, he's meticulous with his technical work and often shows more care to his craft. -# *"Hmm... A millimeter off... Give me a second."* - Due to the nature of his job, he lies a lot, though it's really easy to tell what he is passionate about. -# *"I have no idea what you are talking about, officer."* -# *"The stars are so beautiful out tonight... Wow."* **[Physical Description]** __Exotic?__: Yes - Nardoragon __Height__: 5'11" __Weight__: 180 lbs __Build__: Slim + Muscular __Description__: Alexi has removed his humanity in place of a fluffy, slightly toned dragon-man. His fur coat and skin appear surprisingly biological despite its synthetic nature. There are noticeable markings across his body resembling the night sky. **[Chrome / Implants]** __Auditory System__: Enhanced Ears* [2] __Hands & Feet__: Cybernetic Claws [1] __Ocular System__: SmartEyes* [2] __Miscellaneous__: Dollchip* [2] __Miscellaneous__: Modded Mandibles [1] __Miscellaneous__: Mr. Studd [1] __Total Cyberware Points__: **9** *Two things: 1)The description for a Dollchip on the excel sheet seems incorrect: it does not make sense for a doll to have only one person to issue commands, as dolls will typically have multiple clients issue commands. I am following this for the Dollchip: Description: "Import data from systems, have clients steer your behavior in-session, and wipe your memory after each and every session." Side Effect: "You are completely unaware of what happens to you during the session, giving clients absolute freedom and discretion." 2) Alexi has modified his Smarteyes, Enhanced Ears, and Dollchip to automatically and subtly scroll sessions into a BD. This is transferred to an external storage bank via an encrypted link before the memory wipe. **[Skills/Talents/Abilities]** - Expert - Deception * Lying * Hiding Information - Proficient - BDs * Scrolling * Editing - Proficient - Hacking * Writing/Modifying Code * Creating/Using Spyware * Data Encryption - Proficient - Cyberware * Non-Standard Modifications - Ability - "The Fine Print" Spyware * Alexi spiked the Interface Port on his Mobile Doll Setup- As a user jacks in, the tracker slips in, well hidden within the messaging and documentation he gives his clients before a session. **[Equipment/Armor/Weapons]** - Equipment * Cyberdeck * External Storage Banks [Encrypted devices used to store BDs from his doll sessions and client data from his setup.] * Mind Scanner [Easiest way to explain this is a toned-down version of the scanner in Clouds during the "Automatic Love" Quest in 2077. It is used to gather data to make a much more suitable personality for a doll. Most, if not all, systems will flag this scan, and this device cannot function without the Mobile Doll Setup it is connected to.] * Mobile Doll Setup [A compact server setup disguised as a luggage bag with two external devices: A hand-held Interface Port and the Mind Scanner. It has all the necessary functions to create a personality and export the data to a dollchip and (secretly) an external storage device through an encrypted link. Data is deleted off the server after a session to conserve its limited storage space. It must be stationary and have a sufficient power source to function.] - Weapons * Silenced Unity

Asher Morin - jesmge

Parsed: Asher Morin — username jesmge
Resolved: Jesmge (id: 383489547108876290)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1410107804886237245 • archived
Name
Asher Morin
Age
27
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Former Warehouse worker / Occasional side jobs, Bouncer, Mover, merc if paid enough
Psychological Profile
Pragmatic Dreamer, Adaptive, Detached Compassion. He has ideals, but survives by being ruthlessly pragmatic in the moment. Not entirely moral, but not heartless either. He'll help someone if it resonates with him, but he doesn't attach deeply to people. In most cases he's either passive or aggressive and little between.
Physical Description
5'3, Muscular but soft, large focus on upper body mods, mouse exotic, he looks like he cares more about his body than his clothes. 🦾 Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: Auditory System: Circulatory & Immune Systems: Hands & Feet: Integumentary System: Legs & Mobility: Neural: Ocular System: Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Dense Marrow, Increases body weight and striking power. 20% Heavier. Heavy footsteps and slightly reduced agility. Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Recoil Dampers, Absorbs recoil for stable firing. Absolute stability for small arms, less as the caliber increases. Joints audibly click after sustained use. Miscellaneous:
Total Cyberware Points
3
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Great at sorting and stacking, good eye for patterns. Implants and experience make him great at carrying heavy equipment. Knows how to put on masks to manipulate people well. Good diplomat.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Unity pistol May carry Leon's LMG for him (Not use)
Backstory
Asher was born and raised in Watson, back when the district was still choking on the fallout of the 4th Corporate War. cramped apartments, gang violence in the alleys, and neon signs never intended for children. His family was desperate, his father a dockworker, his mother doing whatever side hustles paid the rent. From an early age, Asher developed a duality to survive: tough enough to keep the local gangs from seeing him as prey, but soft enough to keep him from standing out too much. When he was old enough to clock in, Asher took the first stable option available: Arasaka Waterfront warehouses. He was strong, reliable, and didn’t complain. That earned him steady work lifting crates, running inventory, and keeping shipments moving. Asher kept his head down, learned the rhythms of the place, and earned a quiet reputation as a worker who didn’t buckle or ask questions. He wasn’t ambitious enough to be noticed by Arasaka brass, but not sloppy enough to be cut loose. Now in his late 20s, Asher is getting frustrated with monotony. Living life in the middle felt a slow death. With the savings he has left it was time to move on and figure out something new.
Known Affiliations
Arasaka - Former Employer
Reference Images
RP Hooks
Worked well with Leon on a few gigs in the past.
Additional Notes

Physical Description
2 meters tall, skinny, long tail. long legs, no chrome.
Chrome / Implants
N/A
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Pretty high physical traits for her form. No real combat experience. Suprisingly strong grip.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Her wardrobe is bassicly all clothing. No weapons.
Backstory
Born with the inability for her synapsis to connect to any cybernetics she was orphanaged at a young age. Due to her strange looks she was adopted fairly quickly and taken in as a family memeber for 2 parents. She was average at school work and couldnt participate in a lot of the classes and such but one her key eliments started showing which was that she was pretty. Over the years she fell behind others in many ways. Driving a car was out of the window unless it was jailbroken or a very very old model. She had to pay stuff with cash and has been robbed many times due to this. Work's as a freelance model. Tries to live in the city by any means. Recantly she quit her job modeling at a place because they tried to solicit stuff from her.
Known Affiliations
n/a
Reference Images
attached.
RP Hooks
The friend you cant take with you.
Additional Notes
She has no chrome and as such has no combat ability. Guns are off limit as well.

Backstory
Homare Nishitani was born to Joytoy mother and a pimp dad in Night City. He grew up in Jig Jig Street around prostitution and violence. At the age of 5 he witnessed his dad shot and killed someone over a poker game. Watching him kill someone over a card game made him see the world completely obscure. 3 years later he started to do delivery jobs for the Kanzaki family. He always was impressed by their lifestyle. Expensive suits, money, cars and women is exactly what he wanted. At the age of 14 during a delivery job he was cornered by Tyger Claws trying to steal his contrabands he had. Homare Nishitani was beaten by several Tyger Claws and suffered a head trauma which made him behave really agressive from this day on. At the age 17 he already was an full fledged member of the family with a body count. In 2076 he was the main perputrator of the Maisonette 8 night club where he shot and killed 18 club goers.
Known Affiliations
Kanzaki Family

Even tho he is a Kanzaki member. He will do jobs for the right money. Also addicted to synth coke.

Might be a father to many children

From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1408200898726985779 • archived
! Username "chuggywrld" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
ethan myers
Age
28
Pronouns
he/him Occupation /ncpd officer
Psychological Profile
Personality: Impulsiveness sarcastic Anti-Heroic Nature ptsd
Physical Description
6'4 exotic dog mods
Chrome / Implants
Arms & Arm Attachments- gorilla arms/reactive muscle fibers Auditory System:,none Circulatory & Immune Systems:none Hands & Feet (2 slots):,none Integumentary System: supra-dermal weave Legs & Mobility (2 slots):none Neural:none Ocular System:none Skeleton & Torso Musculature:normal Universal Muscular:none Miscellaneous: smart link/scent scanner/BioDyne Berserk
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Ncpd training-provides an understanding of most weaponry. electric tongue-can be convincing through speech.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
smart pistol ncpd tac vest MK23 socom handgun
Backstory
A decorated night-A decorated night-shift police officer loses his son to random street violence. Once a believer in the justice system, he discovers that the city’s institutions are too weak, too compromised, and too slow to prevent tragedies like his. The courts dismiss cases, politicians cut deals, and the streets keep claiming victims. This realization transforms him. He understands that crime is not a disease that can be cured—it is the lifeblood of the city. Every gang, every hustler, every syndicate is part of its pulse. If you try to wipe it out, it resurfaces stronger somewhere else. But if you control it—if you decide where it flows and who it touches—you can shape the city’s heartbeat. So he begins to operate in the shadows, using his badge as a mask while pulling strings that keep order in his own way. To civilians, he is still a protector. To criminals, he becomes a force of fear—an arbiter who decides what is allowed to thrive and what is crushed. But as he dives deeper into this role, the lines blur. The more he controls crime, the more he becomes part of it. Allies begin to question his motives. Enemies see him as no different from the syndicates he manipulates. And at the heart of it all is his grief: is he honoring his son’s memory by sparing others his fate, or is he betraying everything his son believed in by turning justice into control?
Known Affiliations
corps a few gangs
Reference Images
RP Hooks
Pragmatic Morality/Moments of Humanity/Personal Tragedy Everyone Knows About/Aura of Authority

Psychological Profile
- Overall Disposition: - Highly personable, naturally inclined toward optimism, though this often masks a pragmatic survival instinct. He thrives in social settings, using humour and charm as both genuine connection and tactical tools. Appears easy-going, but reads situations quickly and adapts to avoid unnecessary conflict. A Sunshine character! - Core Traits: - Adaptive Social Operator: Years of performing and later gathering intel have honed his ability to adjust tone, body language, and speech depending on the audience. - Optimism as Armour: Maintains a sunny demeanour to protect himself and others from the underlying reality of danger. This outward cheer can make him underestimated. - Survivor’s Pragmatism: Understands when to push against authority and when to step back; not driven by ideology alone anymore, but still retains personal moral lines. - Loyal, Selectively: Bonds deeply with those who earn his trust, but rarely gives away his full truth — even to close friends — due to years of covert work. - Strengths: - Charismatic and disarming, making him an effective information gatherer. - Reads social dynamics quickly, able to defuse tension or redirect focus. - Creative thinker with a talent for improvisation in high-pressure situations. - Weaknesses / Vulnerabilities: - Struggles with feelings of compromised integrity from working for a corporation, leading to quiet self-doubt. - Tendency to avoid direct confrontation about his own emotions, preferring to distract or joke. - Occasionally underestimates the long-term consequences of small compromises.
Physical Description
A Grey Tabby Exotic male. Rather lanky and tall. Rough around the edges in terms of style and presence. (1)

6 CWP

- A persistent but cautious desire to “make it right” — whether that means returning to the UK one day to help rebuild, or finding some way to undermine the corps that now control his life. - Survival is his goal. Thus creating tension between his reality and his expectations.

Name
** Xiao Min
Age
** 37
Pronouns
** they/them
Occupation
** Private escort/joytoy (for singular person) who has lost their way.
Psychological Profile
** Xiao Min is a very kind person; it’s almost a miracle they’ve survived this long in this city, but given how insulated and sheltered they have been (in a way) it worked. They tend to not want to ask for help, as this always comes at a steep price in their world, but find it difficult to not lend a hand to others who genuinely seem in need. They dislike when they perceive others as taking ownership over them, except those contracted to do so. Xiao Min feels both excited to have this newfound amount of freedom, and also terrified to have to make their own decisions. They get lonely easily, and are unused to specific kinds of violence, like gunfights, but have plenty of experience with torture.
Physical Description
** A mildly modified exotic, Xiao Min’s ears and tail mirror that of a pine marten- a type of weasel. They are around 5’5”, with brown hair and pale skin, and carry themselves casually, if a tiny bit nervously, especially when not around people they explicitly know and trust.

Dr. Riva Kaelen - FreeBooze

Parsed: Dr. Riva Kaelen — username FreeBooze
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1404083483126796429 • archived
! Username "FreeBooze" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
Dr. Riva Kaelen (Alias: Circe)
Age
Apparent age: Early 30s (True age: 50+; heavily obfuscated)
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
Covert Fixer (Beastside) / CEO of Lazarus BioSystems (classified)
Psychological Profile
Analytical, coldly pragmatic, and manipulative when needed. Exhibits a haunting calm in tense situations. Displays subtle signs of retained human empathy, though deeply buried. May exhibit phantom guilt or echoes of past decisions in rare, vulnerable moments.
Physical Description
Sleek, exotic-coded frame. Subtle but distinct non-human traits: polished metallic skin, elegant synthetic musculature, eyes that shift between artificial warmth and cold diagnostic precision. Horn-like neural ports. Typically wears joytoy-coded attire or fixer-styled trench/pancho layers to blend in. 🦾 Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: Gorilla Arms (2 CWP) Auditory System: Hands & Feet: Integumentary System: Dermal Plating (3 CWP) Legs & Mobility: Neural: Netrunner Suite Lvl 1 (1 CWP) ICE Layer (2 CWP) Ocular System: SmartEyes (2 CWP) Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Miscellaneous: Ghostware Relay Node (Classified)
Total Cyberware Points
10
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Surgical Precision (former neuroscientist) Deception & Obfuscation Deal Brokering & Underworld Logistics Rapid Data Parsing / Command Relay Street Influence Tracking
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Concealed Smart SMG (auto-silenced) Laceweave Bodysuit (padded, stylish, flexible armor) Portable Micro-Terminal (custom Lazarus uplink)
Backstory
Publicly declared deceased in 2071 following a failed assassination attempt orchestrated by a Lazarus splinter faction, Dr. Riva Kaelen’s neural engram was extracted under extreme conditions and secured within Project Echo Alpha. However, Lazarus lacked the stable infrastructure to complete full mind-to-body integration at the time. Unlike the Relic Project pursued by Arasaka, Echo Alpha remained fragmented, dormant a contingency held in digital limbo. For seven years, Riva was not dead, but incomplete. Her influence continued subtly via encrypted ghostframe protocols and override systems used only by Lazarus' inner circle. She watched. She waited. In 2078, Spliced Rebirth reached operational viability: a top-tier exotic frame engineered specifically for cognitive stabilization and long-term autonomy. Riva’s return was swift, silent, and surgically deployed into Beastside a fractured district ripe for influence. She’s the quiet whisper behind high-value tech movement, organ procurement, and blackclinic referrals. Her ties to Eclipse are simple by surface claim: "I helped her get on her feet when she arrived." But the truth runs deeper, Eclipse is both a shadow and anchor, a tether to her past and a backup should Lazarus require something more. Only the highest-clearance Lazarus personnel know the truth: **Riva Kaelen never died.** ***She simply waited to be reborn.***
Known Affiliations
Lazarus BioSystems (CEO, blacklisted) Eclipse Diagnostics (Cover Support) Unnamed Embedded Operatives Possible Historic ties to Arasaka
Reference Images
RP Hooks
A fixer with resources nobody should have Knowledge of the old world, and the price of surviving it Can supply illegal biotech, memory scrubbers, and designer bodies
Additional Notes
Cannot be detected via standard biometric scans All signals rerouted through dummy nodes and relays If killed in Beastside, an Echo Transfer Node can reactivate a backup within 72 hours.

Psychological Profile
Severe PTSD from violent cyber psycho attack, Panicky around blades and sharp tools. Description: Short, highly cyberized, red/black hair and red eyes. Cyberwear: Cyberfingers, Cyberarms (Dexterous), Netrunner Suite (level 2), ICE Layer CWP total: 8 Cybernetics Points
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Unknown Weapons: Revolver
Backstory
Spent her youth learning the trade of the Ripperdoc at her father's side in his Clinic, and netrunning in her spare time. When she was old enough to get her official licensing she worked at the clinic with her dad until one day her dad was away on business. A Maelstrom gang broke in and forced her at gunpoint to operate on one of their members. She did as she was told, and for her trouble the patient carved her up and left her for dead, a long with the former members of the Maelstrom gang, the cyber psycho then fled into the streets. She does not know what happened to them, and she only survived because her father came home in time to save her, at great physical cost. Additional Note: Image(s):

Doesn't exactly have trauma unless you count his partner but that's something he deals with. Will become aggressive when provoked especially when attacked, won't let people slide unless Astrid tells him to or if it's a bystander.

Backstory
** Was recruited into the NUSA where Brian ranked through the infantry with his partner Astrid Falk who was usually the one taking charge. This was his downfall, always following behind her, loyal to no end, throughout their time in the infantry Astrid has let her mental state drift away. Brian was always watching her back, had her safe, made sure she got out alive, anything that would get her court martialled he would cover for her, succumbing to her psychotic ways. They were discovered, showing signs of mental unstability, relieved of duty, medically discharged due to mental instability and as such would be left without a job to support any kind of mental help nor 9-5 job he could seek while trying to keep an eye on Astrid. She suggested moving to Night City, better work and for him especially with keeping that warfare feeling, it'll give the two the same thrill they once had. Of course he agreed and readied himself for what's to come.

Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1400718146351923321 • archived
! Username "klumenbranz" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
** Klein "Klumen" Branz
Age
** 23
Pronouns
** He/Him
Occupation
** Arasaka Enforcer
Psychological Profile
** * Kind and curious when they can afford to be, but otherwise defensive and quiet.
Physical Description
** * 5'6 musclar build that's bottom heavy, hyenid exotic mods, legs, neck and hands are partially synthetic, strong outward posture. Gemini FBC under the hood.
Chrome / Implants
** * Arms & Arm Attachments (2 slots): Cyberarm (Dexterous) * Auditory System: N/A * Circulatory & Immune Systems: N/A * Hands & Feet (2 slots): Cybernetic Claws * Integumentary System: Dermal & Subdermal Plating (Mix) * Legs & Mobility (2 slots): Cyberleg (Runner) * Neural: Arasaka "SHORYU" Relic Chip (No CWP cost) * Ocular System: N/A * Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Dense Marrow * Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): * Miscellaneous: Arasaka Subdermal Tracker (No CWP cost)
Total Cyberware Points
** 10
Skills / Talents / Abilities
** * Business acumen, Friendly/Charismatic, Martial Arts combat-styles: Grappling, Taekwondo
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
** * Arasaka Kenshin, Combat Armor, Arasaka Visor
Backstory
** * "I hardly remember who I am anymore... I know at one point I had memories. Friends and family whom I always had around... but, if I try to recollect those thoughts... I just draw a blank. I feel like I'm a different person now. Every time I wake up on the street I'm met with the same haze, few memories, only gut feelings and the familiar sensation of my skin on my palms.. I've died, I think. More than once. Sometimes I'll walk by someone who stops me with an expression on their face like they've seen a ghost, they talk to me as if they know me, but when i say I have no memories of them they look upset and let me go. I think this must have happened a few times, at least. Each time I lose all my memories of Night City, but I remember the layout of these alleyways, back streets, roads. Some places give me a worse gut feeling than others. I think it's been a couple weeks now since my last awakening, and from what I'm putting together, I think I keep dying. Arasaka seems to keep bringing me back, but... why? I hardly understand it myself, but ever since the last assault on Arasaka Tower there's been this new technology advertised to preserve one's life so they could life forever, Relic or something like that. All I know is that I've been reassigned to something called Project SHORYU... but most of the files on the project are redacted. Above my paygrade. It's worrying... Am I still who I used to be?"
Known Affiliations
** * Arasaka, Maelstrom
Reference Images
** * Posted above.
RP Hooks
** * Part of Project SHORYU. Can work together with other Arasaka agents, as well as those affiliated with them, for work related to the project. Might be a great way to make some new friends... or potentially find some answers?
Additional Notes
** * Unbeknownst to Klumen, he's a test subject for Project SHORYU - not an Arasaka agent assigned to the project. Arasaka copied his engram to a relic chip around the time of V's raid on Arasaka Tower, as he had originally volunteered to have a copy of his brain stored as an engram for use in the project. He was never supposed to die before he had a chance to watch his engram be used in testing, but V's raid changed everything when a bullet to the brain zeroed the original Klumen. Now all that's left is his engram, a copy of a copy in a stranger's brain, taken and placed into a synthetic FBC body. Only a replica... but is his soul still in there?
