Melody “Mel” Rhineheart - _voidchaos

Parsed: Melody “Mel” Rhineheart — username _voidchaos
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1388638843221184562 • archived
! Username "_voidchaos" not found in guild (unclaimed)
! Only 0 labeled section(s) parsed
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
🌐 Night City Character Profile 🪪 Name Melody “Mel” Jackson 🎂 Age 21 🏳️ Pronouns She / Her 💼 Occupation / Role in Night City Groomer / Barber Training Bartender at Club N1rvana 🧠 Psychological Profile Personality: Happy-go-lucky, super talkative, charismatic, optimistic, and understanding Trauma Triggers: Excessive violence, family issues, isolation Behavioral Quirks: Leg bouncing, constant fidgeting, energetic bouncing Emotional Tone: Typically uplifting and joyful; becomes quiet and reserved when triggered 🧍 Physical Description Height: 1.60m (5'3") Build: Short and stout; fit but not toned Cyber Features: Exposed hardware around the eyes for quick access to cyber optics Species: Human 🦾 Chrome / Implants Each implant follows the one-per-slot rule, except for Miscellaneous. Smart Eyes – Slot: 2 Biomonitor – Slot: 1 Ice Layer – Slot: 2 Netrunner Suite (Level 1) – Slot: 1 Nanostitch Skin – Slot: 2 Total Slots Used: 8 🧰 Skills / Talents / Abilities Struggles to read the room but excels in conversation Naturally uplifting with a de-escalation mindset Energetic and socially disarming presence 🧱 Equipment / Armor / Weapons None 📜 Backstory Melody Jackson was born into the cold luxury of a Militech household—strict, pristine, and devoid of warmth. Her parents were high-ranking corporate operatives, obsessed with status and control. Childhood was structured, emotions were liabilities, and softness was weakness. Laughter was monitored, and vulnerability was punished. Mel learned early on that obedience was survival—but it suffocated her. At 18, she broke free. No plan. No backup. Just a stolen jacket, her father’s emergency cash, and the soft, unspoken hope that someone out there might actually see her. She wandered into the chaos of Night City like a spark in a storm—vibrant, but unprotected. Her only tools were what Militech gave her: survival knowledge, firearm familiarity, and tactical instinct. Tools she never wanted to use. When a turf war exploded between Maelstrom goons and a rival gang, Melody was caught in the crossfire—wrong place, wrong time. She hesitated to pull the trigger, and that moment of mercy nearly cost her everything. She remembers the blood pooling near her side more than the pain. The screams fading more than the bullets. And the worst part? The silence afterward. Dr. Raelyna Rhineheart found her in that silence. Not just bleeding out, but paralyzed by a guilt that hadn’t even fully formed. Rae didn’t just save her life—she gave Melody permission to feel again. To breathe. To laugh without consequence. To touch soft things. For the first time, Mel wasn’t punished for being gentle. She was embraced for it. Now, Melody grooms hair and fur not just as a job—but as a form of healing. Every snip, every brush stroke is a reclaiming of tenderness once denied to her. She's cheerful, talkative, and vibrant—not because life has been kind, but because she refuses to let it take anything more from her. Still, remnants of her past linger: the shaking leg, the fear of being alone, the silence that creeps in when the memories do. She keeps her chrome accessible—not flashy, not hidden. It’s a subtle rebellion against her past: practical, honest, and hers alone. Though she tries to avoid violence, the world around her won’t always let her. And deep down, there's still something unspoken left in the alley where she almost died—a memory, a hesitation, a truth she's not ready to face. But one day, she might have to. But not now. Rae gave her a new opportunity and at a Night Club out of all things? Score! 🏷️ Known Affiliations Dr. Raelyna Rhineheart Club N1rvana

Name
John Nolan
Age
41
Pronouns
He/ Him
Occupation
NCPD Rookie Psych profile: level headed, calm, Fatherly Chrome: None Total Cyber Points: 0
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Great at talking people down, great with handguns, very attentive to details, Borderline detective, The Rizzler Equipment/ Armor/ Weapons: NCPD standard body armor, NCPD standard sidearm, NCPD standard shotgun
Backstory
John Nolan was born in the great state of Pennsylvania and was raised by a mother who was a pathological liar who manipulated him and his father into thinking she was always the one who was the victim. His father walked out on them soon after. John was a pretty average student until all the way up to high school when he met his girlfriend. The eventually broke up and John found a new girlfriend who he was happy with until his previous girlfriend came back to tell him she was pregnant. John decided to raise the baby with his Ex and eventually got married. John started his own construction business to help with his new born son and realized that he a real passion for construction and fixing things. They lived simple happy lives until Hennery, Johns son, turned 18 and she divorced John. John was going to put his valuable items from his marriage in a lock box when the bank started getting robbed. John distracted the robbers long enough for the cops to arrive and arrest them. He knew at that moment that he wanted to be a cop. He moved to night city and became a rookie cop at the age of 41.

none RP Hook: None

Dr. Tequila Wolf - khepri2992

Parsed: Dr. Tequila Wolf — username khepri2992
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1395609246430658590 • archived
! Username "khepri2992" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
Dr. Tequila Wolf
Age
37, born April 7th, 2040
Pronouns
she/her
Occupation
FIA Intelligence, and Psyop Officer
Psychological Profile
Analytical, Intelligent, Professional, Posh, and Vengeful.
Physical Description
A 1.8 Meter pale skinned woman, D-cups, Blue eyes, white hair. Chrome: Netrunner suite-3 (5), Ghost Tag (1), Ice layer (2) Internal Storage (1)
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Psychological warfare combatant, and interrogator. Netrunner, expert pistoleer, experienced Spy, and well drilled in combat scenarios. Well read in history, culture, fine dining, and business formal culture.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Combat Knife, Pistol (Her majesty), Lighter, and cigarettes.
Backstory
Born in the corporate city of Norfolk Virginia. A young Tequila was the 7th daughter to the Wolf family household. A dedicated house to the Militech corporation, and the NUSA government. With Tequila herself attending an extensive Militech academy. In her schooling she showed great technological prowess. Excelling in most fields. Soon after she began college studies abroad with top grades in Germany. After completing her PHD in Psychology she began the trip home. However, sadly she returned in time for the beginning of the Unification wars. During the build up to the ensuing conflict, a fresh faced Tequila due to familial pressure signed on with the FIA receiving her first upgrade in true military grade cyberware, and training. Her tenure in training was arduous, and tedious. With her specialty soon growing in espionage, data retrieval, psychological warfare, and asymmetrical combat. Her first deployments as a field agent against free states, and the Texas Republic solidifyed her status as a top tier Netrunner, spy, and combatant. With years of experience Tequila has taken up assignments around the world, and NUSA. Adopting herself to multiple cultures, clans, gangs, and guises. Her loyalty to the NUSA is without question, and will follow all operations to the letter. Her only goal is to demolish the enemies of the NUSA, and finish her missions with relentless efficiency quietly, and without a mess.
Known Affiliations
NUSA, FIA, Militech, Snake Nation, Mexican Government, German government, Texan Republic, Southern California. RPHooks: Tequila is a prissy princess of a rich girl. Enjoying the fine things in life, and having a general disdain for most things not “Of pedigree”. Albeit despite her upbringing, she is ruthless, cold blooded, and prides herself on not failing her missions. Be ready for a woman who knows she's better than you, and will act like it.

Name
** Riley S. Watson
Age
** 24
Pronouns
** He/Him
Occupation
** Private Investigator | Solo | NUSA Operative
Psychological Profile
** * A private investigator working as a solo after-hours to keep the lights on and to protect his wife, struggling with his conflict between his deep drive to protect and help the innocent and his morally ambiguous deeds and killings as a mercenary and agent.
Physical Description
** * 5'11", Novabeast exotic conversion with an FBC Gemini Sculpt under the hood. Brown and white fur with blue and gold duotone eyes.
Chrome / Implants
** * Arms & Arm Attachments (2 slots): Gorilla Arms - Zetatech * Auditory System: N/A * Circulatory & Immune Systems: N/A * Hands & Feet (2 slots): * Integumentary System: Gradiated Subdermal Plating (Discreet, Militech) * Legs & Mobility (2 slots): N/A * Neural: N/A * Ocular System: Basic Kiroshi Cyberoptics (No Night Vision) * Skeleton & Torso Musculature: N/A * Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): N/A * Miscellaneous: Full Body Conversion - Gemini & Novabeast
Total Cyberware Points
** 6
Skills / Talents / Abilities
** * Proficient in CQC, espionage, assassination and intelligence gathering. * Proficient with small-arms and sniper rifles. * Excellent hand-to-hand fighter. * Crafty, uses information as a weapon. Brains over brawn. * Charismatic, prefers to win fights through words and charm over brutality.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
** * Dermal Plated Netrunner Suit * NUSA Helmet & Visor * Malorian Arms CS-1238 "Deckard" Heavy Tech Pistol * Tsunami Kyubi - Integrally Suppressed (Custom-fitted) * External Cyberdeck (Level 2)
Backstory
** * Riley grew up like any other relatively well-off kid in the NUSA. He dreamt of becoming some kind of hero, like the ones in the movies of the Fourth Corporate War. His parents had other plans. At age 17, he enrolled in college early, pressured and convinced by his parents that further education is what he needed. At age 22, he finally graduated with his bachelor's degree in hand. He started his career by attempting to join Militech's combat division as a contractor, but flunked out during basic due to "psychological issues". Dejected, he eventually wound up being hired by NUSA as an Intelligence Analyst. Hoping to finally make a difference, he put his all into his career, hoping to brighten the world even if his praises were never sung by the people he endeavored to save. * During this time, he met his now-wife, Kyuu, during a joint operation with Militech, and they fell in love. Soon after, the pair were reassigned to Night City, and Watson was formally let go by NUSA to pursue his deep cover operation as an independent operative within the city. Highly skilled, yet flawed in his empathy, Watson has been doing his best to provide for his wife and fulfil the orders given to him. He and his wife have been running the Nultide Detective Agency, a private investigation agency that the two of them formed a few months after they arrived. Watson is one of several active NUSA Agents within Night City, gathering intelligence on behalf of his government and doing odd jobs to appear to be "staying afloat" in the meantime, but he has doubts about the righteousness of his work. Zetatech have been contacting him recently, and he's starting to foster doubts about his true allegiances...

21
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
N1rvana Dancer, Freelancer Bartender
Psychological Profile
Sometimes forgetful, often quiet unless spoken to, clumsy at times, may crumble when stressed out, learning to control emotions, places trust and loyalty to her morals as the forefront of her ideals, attempts to be friendly when talking to strangers, though sometimes afraid, but also cheerful, optimistic, upbeat and curious, given the situation, still bracing her child-like innocence but trying her best to learn from the world that surrounds her.
Physical Description
6'6"/1.98m, vixen, slim, fit & athletic, notably large tail and long ears, nail-like claws.
Chrome / Implants
Arms & Arm Attachments (2 slots): None Auditory System: Enhanced Ears Circulatory & Immune Systems: None Hands & Feet (2 slots): None Integumentary System: Dermal Plating Legs & Mobility (2 slots): None Neural: None Ocular System: FlashVisor Skeleton & Torso Musculature: None Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): None Miscellaneous: None

6
Skills / Talents / Abilities

Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Cyber Katana, Glock 19, Visor & Breathing Mask.
Backstory
Born and raised in Scandinavia, Astrid was always protected from the harms of the outside world, but made the dangerous and bold decision to escape their previous life by slipping through the grasp of her family, getting her hands on an antique heirloom Glock 19 and a blue modified Katana from her relative's stash for protection as she purposefully missed the flight back to Europe when in a business trip to Night City, in search for a more meaningful path in life as part of the nightclub scene within what she believes to be the city of dreams, rather as a dancer, bartender or assistant, and she has called Club N1rvana her new home ever since, enjoying assisting the experience of patrons to the fullest and making connections along the way, though knowing she is far from the dangers of her place of origin, the nightmares of past memories still haunt her every night.
Known Affiliations
Officially bloodline-tied to significant figures in the European Economic Community, however rarely mentioned when in interactions after effectively cutting ties with European contacts and now living independently, hiding her past as best she can.
Reference Images
Media attached below this message.
RP Hooks
A friendly conversation and even a friendship is all Astrid can hope for when outside her shift, though serving club attendees with the best experience money can offer is not out of the table, even when outside N1rvana. Additionally, open to listening to bar patrons when serving drinks, and perhaps even ready to share advice with those who feel conflicted over dilemmas.
Additional Notes
Purrs when given affection. Loves listening to music when on her own.

Resolved: Washy_56 (id: 359112083884998666)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1394176960892112896 • archived
Name
Alice Martinez DOB: 12/19/2053
Age
25
Pronouns
She/Her ##💼 Occupation in Night City Trauma Team EMT / Paramedic ## 🧠 Psychological Profile Personality: Adaptable, genuine, sarcastic, caring. Fairly reliable and organized. Hypervigilant, calm under pressure but emotionally withdrawn. Rational. Trauma: Minor PTSD and lingering flashbacks from a mass casualty event in Watson involving a cyberpsycho attack during a patient recovery. ## 🧍 Physical Description 5'10", fairly toned. Maroon-red eyes and short, wavy maroon hair. Arctic cross fox exotic. A scar crosses her right eye. Often wears black or red makeup. Tattoos include a crescent moon with cherry blossoms on her neck, a koi fish with blossoms on her right forearm, and a Samurai on her left shoulder. Gives off a chill, approachable vibe—often lost in her own thoughts, music, or tunnel-vision focused on a task. ## 🦾 Chrome / Implants * Biomonitor (1) * Ghost Tag (1) * SmartEyes (2) * Dermal Plating (3) Total CWP: 7 ### 🧰 Skills / Talents / Abilities Field medical treatment, situational awareness, high stress tolerance, decent marksmanship, educated, skilled negotiator, physically strong, passable cook, functional weapons/vehicle knowledge, basic botany. ### 🧱 Equipment / Armor / Weapons * Kang Tao G-58 Dian * Militech M10AF Lexington (Pistol) * Combat Knife * Trauma Team Armor (on duty) ## 🏷️ Known Affiliations ## Trauma Team ### 🤝 RP Hooks * Trauma Team contact for med RP * Has history with Ayrn — unresolved emotional fallout * Wounded vet with trust issues — easy to befriend, hard to get close to 📜 History / Backstory Alice Martinez was born and raised in Japan Town, Westbrook, to a nurse and an NCPD officer. Her childhood was quiet and structured—decent grades, good behavior, and a clear path toward a medical career. She enrolled at NCU to study emergency medicine, determined to follow in her mother’s footsteps. In 2073, just a month before graduation, her father was killed during a shootout with a group of armed suspects. Alice graduated top of her class that same year at age 20. Her mother, devastated, fell into alcoholism. Alice joined Trauma Team not only to pursue her career but to help cover her mother’s therapy and medical costs. In late 2075, her mother was killed in a fatal car crash while driving under the influence. Grief hardened into silence, and Alice buried herself in work. The chaos of the job was easier to face than the quiet of loss. Then came March 30th, 2078. A mass casualty incident in Watson called for two Trauma Teams to assist injured Militech agents in a firefight with Maelstrom. NCPD claimed the area was clear, but one gang member survived—and went cyberpsycho. Within seconds, multiple officers and Trauma Team personnel were killed. Maxtac was deployed and neutralized the threat, but only a few wounded officers, Alice, and one teammate made it out alive. During her mandatory leave, Alice met a joytoy named Ayrn. His presence was unexpectedly grounding. For the first time in years, she let someone in. They spent a night together. The next morning, he was gone. No note. No call. Just another disappearance in a life full of them. She returned to active duty soon after, assigned to a new unit in Beastside. These days, she stays focused on the job, emotions tightly sealed under trauma armor. Friendly, but distant. Capable, but guarded. She's not sure what she wants anymore. But for now, she survives.

portrait

Salem Relan - mutt._.3

Parsed: Salem Relan — username mutt._.3
Resolved: Mutty <3 (id: 684073045387903003)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1394055552178458665 • archived
Name
** Salem Relan
Age
** 22
Pronouns
** He/Him
Occupation
** Dancer at the club
Psychological Profile
**. Salem can be very to himself, it’s rare that he speaks but once he feels somewhat comfortable around that said person, he make speak. Body language is the main thing to look for with him. He has some harsh trauma due to him running away as a child. He was abused by both his parents causing him to go silent from the age of 14 to how old he is now.
Physical Description
** He is 5’9, decently small waisted but on the thicker build. He has one left cybernetic arm. Exoctic.
Chrome / Implants
** N/A
Skills / Talents / Abilities
** Heavy stealth, knows how to blend in and is quick. Very well with climbing
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
** Two small daggers, Cyber Mask
Backstory
** Salem grew up in a small town just a bit from nightcity. He had two parents like everyone usually does…. Both parents were very abusive. it was chaotic in the family almost every single night. Salem usually did not get to sleep, but he got a few hours if he tried his best to just close his eyes and forget what always happened. he was about 14 at the time when he decided to run away from home hence why he now has the name as runaway child a week before he left his home and decided to venture out his father did more than abuse that one night with the help of his mother him and his father, unfortunately took his left arm, leaving him to venture out and in pain his parents, then slowly throughout the entire week before that one day that he left decided to try and build him that one cyber arm, they found bits and pieces all over the road and alleyways and abandoned places and eventually built his cyber arm, so he would have an arm just like other people but not in the right way.. by the end of the week, Salem had to leave from his home he ventured out for a few days, eating what he could find drinking the water as close as healthy as he could he then came across of night city he snuck through one of the alleyways snuck his way onto a roof and looked over as he saw the night city there was lights people walking around he couldn’t believe what he had found. He kept quiet he kept hidden and kept to himself. say never told much about himself nor did he want to ever since that one day before he left his home or could he even call that home? he allowed to always keep quiet and never speak a word so none of that would ever happen outside of what that frightful nightmares place that he grew up in. Salem found his way dancing a few weeks in learning after this wonderful club that was within this night city he watched the dancers snuck way through and watched as they just danced around each one of their lovely men. He learned to be just like them. throughout a few weeks, Salem slowly settled in to this place called night city sleeping on the streets, sleeping in the alleyways keeping head and keeping away from people and keeping to himself like he always learned to. to be continued……
Known Affiliations
** N/A
Reference Images
** * Art, screenshots, etc.
RP Hooks
** N/A
Additional Notes
** N/A

Adam ‘snow’ Donovan - mobstupidity

Parsed: Adam ‘snow’ Donovan — username mobstupidity
Resolved: Mob (id: 133454028402196480)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1391168197876645961 • archived
Name
** Adam "Snow" Donovan
Age
** 25
Pronouns
** He/Him
Occupation
** Trauma Team Operative | Part-Time Club Security ---
Psychological Profile
** Adam generally presents as friendly and helpful. On duty, he becomes significantly more reserved and focused. He takes considerable pride in maintaining peak physical condition and being mostly unaugmented (he views his ears and tail implants as purely cosmetic). Interestingly, he harbors no prejudice against heavily augmented individuals—instead, he's fascinated by the artistic and design elements of their chrome. Adam isn't naive but firmly believes that life could—and should—be better for everyone. ---
Physical Description
** * Height: 6’2" * Build: Lean, muscular * Hair: Gray * Eyes: Green * Distinguishing Marks: Snow leopard pattern tattoos covering various parts of his body, including a full sleeve and back tattoo. --- **Chrome/Implants:** * Cosmetic ears and tail implants --- **Skills/Talents/Abilities:** * Natural athlete * Corporate education * Combat medic training * Close-quarters battle (CQB) * Melee combat --- **Equipment, Weapons, Armor:** *Under construction* ---
Known Affiliations
** * Trauma team * Friends and family in militech. (is not open about his family connections however any amount of digging would reveal that) ---
Backstory
** Born into a fairly successful corporate family with parents working in Militech middle management, Adam showed remarkable physical prowess from a young age, excelling in sports and outperforming many augmented peers. As corporate instability became evident near his graduation, his family encouraged him to seek opportunities beyond Militech. Adam quickly set his sights on joining Trauma Team but was repeatedly rejected due to a lack of experience and augmentations. Determined and unwilling to accrue debt for unnecessary chrome, Adam intensified his training and began taking mercenary contracts to build his resume. Eventually, after relocating to "Beastside," his perseverance paid off, and he was accepted into Trauma Team as a security specialist. He also works part-time security at the Ni1rvana club.

Kyuu 'Moonlight' Watson - arweendabean

Parsed: Kyuu 'Moonlight' Watson — username arweendabean
Resolved: Arween (id: 685259853014237185)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1393679037058121749 • archived
Name
** Kyuu Watson - Militech Field Operative MOONLIGHT
Age
** 21
Pronouns
** She/They
Occupation
** Detective for the Nultide Detective Agency; secretly working as an intelligence agent for Militech in order to ensure safety and shelter for her and her partner.
Psychological Profile
** * Outwardly bubbly and extroverted, while secretly selling information to survive and keep her family out of harm's reach. Morally conflicted but ultimately has no choice but to continue. Anxious, freezes up during firefights occasionally due to past trauma.
Physical Description
** * Snow leopard exotic, 5 feet tall. Green eyes with a slight glow.
Chrome / Implants
** * Arms & Arm Attachments (2 slots): N/A * Auditory System: Enhanced Ears * Circulatory & Immune Systems: N/A * Hands & Feet (2 slots): SilentStep Soles, Cybernetic Claws (Heated) * Integumentary System: Chameleon Skin * Legs & Mobility (2 slots): Cyberleg (Runner) * Neural: N/A * Ocular System: Kiroshi SmartEyes (Lower tier, no XRAY, just night vision). * Skeleton & Torso Musculature: N/A * Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): N/A * Miscellaneous: N/A
Total Cyberware Points
** 10
Skills / Talents / Abilities
** * Low-tier netrunning and hacking, stealth and firearms proficiency. Excellent marksman.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
** * External cyberdeck, Tsunami Nue - integrally suppressed, Nekomata tech sniper.
Backstory
** * Kyuu was born a traveler of the great wastelands of what humanity has chewed up and spat out. She lived a nomad upbringing within the walls of a van that was totally not stolen from someone at sometime that history forgot. She lived amongst the dust and decay of what the earth had become, but you can’t miss what you never knew. Her childhood was that of adventure, excitement and discovery. She had her family, but closeness was never valued between them. They survived, they stole, they cheated. They made deals that went rogue and took sanctuary in moral ambiguity. But it was not a time of grief or hardship. It was how life was. And Kyuu enjoyed the uncertainty and thrill of the life of a nomad. She grew up independent of the world. By the time she was a teen she had already seen most of the wastelands of America. But then something horribly tragic happened… she got bored. She got bored of the ruggedness and constant scrolling scenery. So she stuffed her pockets with 6th Street loan shark money and joined a Militech academy, and Night City became the first place she ever stayed still in. From there, she gained her position as an intelligence agent, transferring to Washington D.C. The stillness was a gradual change for them, but one that enabled her to have time to actually interact with another soul: a fellow Intelligence Analyst that she had been assigned to work with - an FIA asset known by the codename TWILIGHT. It occurred to her then that this was the other side of life. Not just the desire of self fulfillment, but the warmth of human connection. They’ve kept each other warm ever since, and eventually began working alongside one another. But then the sharks swarmed back to claim their catch, bleeding money in her wake. Repayment would never be enough. There was always more interest, pending favors, they kept biting but a shark can regrow their teeth as many times as it takes. So she disappeared. She was no longer, she became an exotic and adopted her new identity. Disappearing in the starlight of Night City. And hidden she remains.
Known Affiliations
** * FIA Agent Team, Militech, FIA Field Operator TWILIGHT (Riley Watson)
RP Hooks
** * As a known Private Investigator, Kyuu is heavily involved in the goings-on of Beastside. Bubbly and outgoing, she's always happy to chat. Like her husband, she's working with Militech and the FIA behind the scenes.
Additional Notes
** * Biggest goober in Night City. ❤️

Giovanni "Bandit" Romero - ussbigman

Parsed: Giovanni "Bandit" Romero — username ussbigman
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: NightCityBot • Thread id: 1366902752768430153 • archived
! Username "ussbigman" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
**MedusaCascade**: Name: Giovanni "Bandit" Romero
Age
24
Occupation
Racer/Street racer
Psychological Profile
Obsessive over anything with an engine, Racing and just driving in general is his passion, can be a bit cocky which has led to multiple fights. Physical Description: From head to toe he doesn't look like much. A frame of 6'0" 190LBS, Lean build. Has a few cosmetic implants on both cheeks and the bridge of the nose. One tattoo on his back in the form of a blackhole eating stars that traverse up to his forearms. Usually seen with a Baseball cap, compression shirt, heat resistant shinos, and a decent pair of sneakers/boots if he isn't in a racing suit. Chrome/Implants: In order to get ahead of the competition during races a decent list of chrome has been implanted into Bandit to improve his ability. Equipped with a Arasaka mk2 cyberdeck for research on the fly. Sporting a self ice in the frontal cortex to ward off any quickhacks mid race. Finishing off the head is a pair of Kiyoshi stalker optics for better general vision. His body is equipped with Titanium bones across his skeleton, Shock absorbers in the hands, and a set of Lynx paws to top off a peak performer's body. To finish of the full list in the sensitive areas Giovanni rocks a biomoniter in his circulatory system and a reflex tuner in his nervous system Skills/Abilities: Great Driver, Decent enough shot, can talk his way through most situations. [Self proclaimed cool guy] Weapons/Armor/Equipment: A hard hitting hand cannon he calls the [Negotiator], A suppressed precision rifle kept mostly in his stash unless needed for a job, A kukri kept on him at all times. In his stash are a few flash and emp grenades alongside a basic combat vest. Backstory: Giovanni was born in 2052 on August 12 in Little Italy. Not a whole lot happened in his early years nor after his graduation from Richard Night High School.

Hato - motokosusubo

Parsed: Hato — username motokosusubo
Resolved: MotokoSusubo (id: 446413802007953418)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1375199658841997494 • archived
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
NCRP CHARACTER SHEET
Name
終那 Hato (meaning "end that one")
Age
21
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
Assassin Affiliation: Arasaka
Psychological Profile
Cold. Calculating. Emotionless. Fearless. Hato is the model employee who never allows personal thoughts or emotions to cloud her judgment. She maintains no romantic attachments due to the nature of her work, possessing unwavering loyalty to Arasaka. She views aspects of her job involving assassination and torture purely professionally and takes pride in her ruthless efficiency. Both of Hato's parents are alive. Her father still works in the Bioweapon R&D section responsible for the dojo where she learned martial arts. Hato never discusses her true occupation, instead telling others she works in accounting. She loves classical music and often listens to it during combat to enhance her focus. Hato has a cat named Moochie that follows her around at home, whom she leaves with her parents while on missions.
Physical Description
Short at 153 cm (5’0") with a slender build, Hato has short, practical blackish-gray hair to avoid interference during missions. From a distance, she appears to be a typical Japanese woman in her early 20s, but up close, subtle signs of Arasaka augmentation become apparent. She wears basic black clothing, primarily bodysuits, shorts, skirts paired with jackets or tops. Her wardrobe is entirely provided by Arasaka, though she specifically requested fishnets. When questioned by her handler, she simply stated, "They'll help me blend in socially with people my age," although privately, she wanted them due to her father's previous prohibition. Chrome/Implants: Targeting Optics (Level 2) Enhanced Ears (Level 1) Cyberlegs (Level 2)
Total Cyberware Points
5

From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1375204397331648533 • archived

Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
[Name] Victor "Gears" Pierce [Age] 34 [Profession] Freelance gun-for-hire [Psychological Profile] Relatively level-headed [Physical Desc.] 181 cm tall, 77 kg, fit build [Cybernetics] Robotic right arm (some enhanced strength, rugged and reliable, built in deployable short blade in hand), right eye cybernetic replacement(night vision, hud, 35/20 vision clarity),both lungs enhanced, minor brain augmentations Gorilla Arms, Smart Eyes, Combat Wired Reflexes Total CWP 7 [Skills] Some hacking skill (primarily for opening locked doors as a first option before blowing them up), explosives handling, gunsmithing [Gear] Modified AK-70 (8x50mm), tactical axe, ballistic plating on shoulders torso and forearms, helmet with ballistic visor and filters, personal digital assistant, demolition charges (usually 3) [Background] Ex-militech mercenary, moved on to freelance after contract expired. [Additional Info] Being paranoid of hacking attempts on his chrome, Victor has any wireless connections to his cybernetics completely turned off unless absolutely needed, usually hacking and connecting to devices is delegated to his PDA.

Lilly Raptor - goodguypie

Parsed: Lilly Raptor — username goodguypie
Resolved: GoodGuyPie (id: 140054399211798528)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1367944745908703394 • archived
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
Name Lilly Raptor aka Lil Raptor
Age
29
Pronouns
They/Them
Occupation
Private Detective
Psychological Profile
An EX NCPD Detective, turned private eye Raptor having been inspired by their dad (a well known officer) to join the NCPD however their sense of justice is slipping as they try to survive in night city. To cope they built a hobby up of collecting and maintaining retro and old tech and cybernetics fantasizing that maybe night city wasn't always as bad as it now.
Physical Description
Raptor has a feminine build standing at around 5’8 their right arm is an almost antique cybernetic that has a mount to store a small single handed firearm. Their hair is straight maroon and long past that goes past their back. They are normally in some form of suit with an old but well maintained trench coat. They have a form fitting purple mask with a built -in respirator and a heads up display. Chrome/Implants: Most of Raptors chrome and implants are at least a generation old but have been kept and maintained to a surprise degree of skill. Their Subdermal Grip is built into their right arm and was intended to help with reducing recoil well firing as well as useful as a tool to crush things. The Cyber fingers are built into the end of their right arm normally used to open locks and quickly access computers. The Flashvisor is one of the few things not out of date having had to replace their organic eyes after a nasty flash bang incident well on the job as a patrol officer.
Total Cyberware Points
3 Skills/Abilities: With their time in the NCPD they picked up a number of skills which included Investigating and info gathering, basic firearm training and data gathering as well as lockpicking and forceful entry. They also are capable of some basic cybernetic maintenance but most of their knowledge is in older models. Weapons/Armor/Equipment: The weapon they carry is a Revolver tho the gun itself is new the design is fairly old. They tend to have some form of protective vest under their clothes mainly intended for stopping up to something such as a small rifle round. In their Mask is a in built respirator that can filter out commonly found hazardous gasses a heads up display that allows access to the net as well as file storage. In that storage is also some of their NCPD files and ID they were able to secure before being discharged.
Backstory
Lilly Raptor grew up on stories from their mum about how Raptors’ Dad time in the NCPD how he died in the line of duty and how he was a hero. This inspired them to join the NCPD at a young age trying to live up to what they believed their farther was like they attempt to be a hard working and dam good cop however as they rose through the ranks and spend more and more time working in and for night city it became clear that many of the stories they heard was nothing more then make believe. However they wanted to keep up holding a form of justice and try and protect those just trying to get by they gained a rep as an honest cop but this gained a lot of scorn from their peers going against the overall corrupt culture and social norms in the station they were assigned after a few transfers and a number of promotion they became a detective and was working on a case which involved 10 missing people who dissapered at roughly the same time and location. Raptor got close to finishing the case just as all signs pointed to a high standing Militech corpo they were discharged on misconduct and corruption charges. Since then they had to tech to the streets as a Private Eye and sometimes working as a merc in hopes to try and gain enough influence to finish up the case one way or another.

From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1391191691284840480 • archived
! Username "uss.bigman" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
Giovanni "Bandit" Romero
Age
24
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Racer Racer/Street racer
Psychological Profile
Obsessive over anything with an engine, Racing and just driving in general is his passion, can be a bit cocky which has led to multiple fights.
Physical Description
From head to toe he doesn't look like much. A frame of 6'0" 190LBS, Lean build. Has a few cosmetic implants on both cheeks and the bridge of the nose. One tattoo on his back in the form of a blackhole eating stars that traverse up to his forearms. Usually seen with a Baseball cap, compression shirt, heat resistant shinos, and a decent pair of sneakers/boots if he isn't in a racing suit. Chrome/Impants Hands: Subdermal Grip Misc: Internal Storage Neural: Netrunner Suite (lvl2) Ocular System: SmartEyes Universal Muscular: Recoil Dampeners Total Points: 8 Skills/Abilities: Great Driver, Decent enough shot, can talk his way through most situations. Weapons/Armor/Equipment: Nothin but his Quadra Turbo-R/V-Tech
Backstory
Born and raised in Central Night City. Giovanni grew up in a decently sized apartment in Little Italy with his mom. Giovanni lived a life around racing and cars for the early part of his life. Eventually graduating from Richard Night High School, Giovanni would be scouted by a team under the name of Sentinel Racing to work in their pit teams as a mechanic. As time went on Giovanni would work closely with the driver team, and eventually be placed on the backup roster. After getting tossed into a race due to one of the team members getting sick, Giovanni proved his skills to the admins of Sentinel and received a spot on the main team. Giovanni is still racing for Sentinel but likes to practice off the track in the streets of night city.
Known Affiliations
Sentinel Racing, Pirelli, Spinelli Autotech

Zion Kade - zehlolgamer

Parsed: Zion Kade — username zehlolgamer
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1391190473787572265 • archived
! Username "zehlolgamer" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
Zion Kade
Age
21
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Netrunner
Psychological Profile
Quick-witted, sarcastic, always with a crooked grin when he’s bragging about his hacks. Zehl0 enjoys baiting people with secrets, but trusts no one for long. Loyalty is expendable — secrets are currency.
Physical Description
Lean, wiry build, always in motion — eyes flicker with neon reflections,Distinct cybernetic ports and cables run like metallic veins across his face and the back of his neck. Height 1,80 m 🦾 Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: Cyberfingers Legs & Mobility: Cyberlegs Neural: Netrunner Suite Level 3 Miscellaneous: Smartlink
Total Cyberware Points
9
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Hacking, Stealth, Parkour; Ghost Step — A combination of unpredictable movement and signal disruption that makes tracking or targeting him a nightmare., Data Leech — Can drain data directly from an enemy’s cyberware through close proximity or physical touch — often leaving them clueless.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Ghostdeck Mk.IV — Custom-built, ultra-mobile cyberdeck. Blazing fast, heavily encrypted, built to be wiped or detonated if cornered., Signal Cloak — Cloak lined with nanofiber mesh that disrupts scans and tracking signals, rendering him a glitch in the system., Spider Drones — Tiny autonomous drones for bypassing locks, disabling cameras, or planting bugs. (Affected by EMP, low battery capacity), Smart Pistol (Silenced) — Compact, quiet, smart-linked to his neural-ware for pinpoint accuracy in tight spots., Mono-Edge Knife — Razor-thin blade with a mono-molecular edge, easily hidden on his forearm for quick, silent take downs.
Backstory
Zehl0 is, in truth, Zion Kade, the child of Zetatech scientist Charles Benicio and renowned netrunner Zoe Kade, known in the shadows as Zero-Ko. Both were part of Zetatech’s clandestine Black Night initiative — a rival to Arasaka’s notorious Blackwall project. Where Arasaka kidnapped orphans, Zetatech used their own employees’ children: born and raised to become Ghosts of the Net, these prodigies were trained from infancy to breach corporate fortresses, steal data, and vanish without a trace. But Zion’s parents grew sick of watching their son pushed past his limits — risk after risk, dive after dive. One brutal netrun left Zion’s mind fractured by a hostile Arasaka counter-hacker. Memory wiped, name lost, Zetatech deemed him broken and expendable. His parents had other plans. In a single desperate move, they rigged his escape — planting trails, forging clearances, and wiping logs. Zion fled into the neon abyss of Night City with nothing but the clothes on his back, his cyberdeck, and the voice of Zero-Ko — the mother he no longer remembers, guiding him from the dark net as a ghost of his past. 🎯 Goals & Motivation Once an experiment, now a ghost in the system — Zehl0 hunts secrets, manipulates the powerful, and bleeds corps dry for profit, leverage, and the rush. He lives to breach the unbreachable, push limits, and keep moving — always one step ahead of the corps that discarded him.
Known Affiliations
Zero-Ko — The ghost in his feed. An anonymous voice feeding him intel, tips, and digital lifelines — secretly his own mother, watching over him from the shadows he can’t remember.
Reference Images

Khatun - stolasplus

Parsed: Khatun — username stolasplus
Resolved: Possum (id: 893319728175673364)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1390474462142660668 • archived
Name
Khatun
Age
23
Pronouns
she/he
Occupation
looking to be a bartender
Psychological Profile
kind hearted can speaks Mongolian loss of family twitches a lot
Physical Description
1.43 slim cybernetic horns wolf 🦾 Chrome / Implants i only have the cyberpunk mod Arms & Arm Attachments: Auditory System: Circulatory & Immune Systems: Hands & Feet: Integumentary System: Chameleon Skin 3 Legs & Mobility: Neural: Netrunner Suite (Level 1) Ocular System: Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Miscellaneous:
Total Cyberware Points
Skills / Talents / Abilities
skills swordsmanship and hand to hand combat / a good tracker / able to stay calm under pressure
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
backpack / wolverine clauces and a sword
Backstory
Khatun – The Silent Horn of Night City ⸻ “I don’t bark. I bite. Quietly.” ⸻ No one saw Khatun arrive in Night City. She slipped in through the freight tunnels below Watson — alone, dirty, bleeding through her coat. No passport, no eddies, no friends. Just one name burning in her brain: SinoDyne Industries. The corp that called her family “collateral.” That signed off on the drone strike that leveled her clan’s camp in the Wastes. Her people were Nomads — herders, traders, off-grid ghosts who lived free. SinoDyne wanted the lithium beneath their land. So they erased the surface. She was sixteen. Out hunting when the sky turned to fire. By the time she made it back, there was nothing left to bury. ⸻ Now she walks the alleys of Night City with blood under her fingernails and purpose behind her eyes. She’s looking for work — bar work, quiet work. Something to keep her close to the streets. People talk when they’re drinking. And Khatun listens harder than most people scream. She’s short — just 1.43 meters — and moves like someone who’s learned to vanish. Chrome horns arc from her temples like twisted bone. Her Chameleon Skin mod glitches faintly under neon light, distorting her silhouette like smoke. Her voice, when she speaks, carries a raw Mongolian accent — sharp-edged, deliberate, unbroken by the city around her. ⸻ She doesn’t trust anyone. Except Andre. He found her half-conscious in an alley her first week in the city. Didn’t ask questions. Just patched her up, fed her, Andre is the only reason she’s not dead. The only person she trusts to watch her back. But she doesn’t call him friend. That word means too much to use lightly. ⸻ Strapped to her thigh is a hacked-up cyberdeck she scavenged off a dying netrunner in Pacifica. She doesn’t fully understand it — can barely boot it without frying the interface. But she’s learning. Slowly. Patiently. Whispering through old terminals, breaking into off-grid vending machines, watching how the Net pulses like a living thing. Because she knows the truth she wants is locked behind firewalls. The names. The logs. The files that prove who gave the kill order. Someone in SinoDyne signed that document. And she’s going to find them. ⸻ She’s not here for justice. Justice is slow. Justice is bought. She wants revenge. She wants to look them in the eye — and make them remember the faces they tried to erase. No gangs. No crew. Just her. A glitchy cyberdeck. A stolen blade. And a long memory. Khatun is small. But grief made her sharp. And now, she’s hunting. ⸻ “I used to chase stars. Now I chase silence.” “Pour your drink. Tell your story. Just don’t lie to me.”
Known Affiliations
only knows andre or swift
Reference Images
RP Hooks
Relaxed and calm and willing to listen can be a little goofy from times
Additional Notes
sorry that i did it wrong the first time if i mess up plz let me know

Ciren Xiangyu - videotv

Parsed: Ciren Xiangyu — username videotv
Resolved: VIDEO [C9TV] (id: 493072453204180992)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1390118498151305297 • archived
Name
** Ciren Xiangyu (aka The Puppeteer, The Golden Lady, Source)
Age
** 28 ### **🏳️ Pronouns:** Any/All
Occupation
** Street Ripperdoc, Netrunner, Former Doll, former Lazarus BioSystems Employee
Psychological Profile
Charming yet cold-eyed. Calculated kindness conceals trauma. Highly controlled, carefully managing interactions and loyalties. Trust and genuine connections are scarce commodities—smiles always come with hidden calculations. Operates protectively, almost parentally, within her community but rarely lets anyone get close.
Physical Description
* **Height:** 5'11" * **Appearance:** Cyber-sleek and surgically precise. Skin reminiscent of porcelain. Elegant, graceful, doll-like but haunted presence. * **Cyberware Features:** * SmartEyes (Blue, facial recognition, zoom, AR HUD) * Subdermal black alt-plating * Blade-like nails
Chrome / Implants
* **Neural:** Netrunner Suite (L1) – basic hacking, cyberdeck access * **Ocular System:** SmartEyes – enhanced visual functionality * **Miscellaneous:** Doll Chip (Lazarus Proprietary Control Chip) – originally believed to be a normal doll chip, secretly designed to remove bodily autonomy and enslave users.
Total Cyberware Points
5
Skills / Talents / Abilities
* Black-market surgical operations and cyberware installation * Netrunning (basic hacking, data tracking, and intel acquisition) * Social engineering (misinformation, manipulation, mind games)
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
* Medkit and portable cyberdeck * Shotgun and small handgun (personal defense) ## 📜 Consolidated Backstory: Ten years ago, Ciren Xiangyu was forced into sex work, implanted with a "Doll Chip" under the pretense of standard industry practice. Unbeknownst to her, this was actually an experimental control implant created by Lazarus BioSystems, stripping users of bodily autonomy and turning them into corporate puppets—aware yet helpless. Five years after escaping the Doll life, Ciren, desperate and needing resources, unknowingly joined Lazarus BioSystems to capitalize on her cyberware knowledge. In a grim twist, she found herself developing and refining the very control chips that enslaved her years earlier. Realizing the nature of her work, Ciren fled Lazarus and took refuge in Night City, seeking freedom, redemption, and a chance to reclaim autonomy. Now settled in Night City, Ciren operates as a street-level ripperdoc affiliated with The Mox, offering black-market medical aid, cyberware installations, and trauma support to those in need. Despite her escape, the Lazarus chip remains embedded in her body—impossible to remove without risking ego death or severe brain trauma. Officially, she is still legally bound to Lazarus via the exploitative Terms of Service hidden in the chip's activation clause. Though she has regained significant control of her daily life, the threat of Lazarus reclaiming her body lingers. Every interaction, every shadow, every digital whisper could mean her past catching up with her once more.
Known Affiliations
* **The Mox:** Joined at its founding. Offers ripperdoc services and supports victims of exploitation. * **Former Employee:** Lazarus BioSystems, specifically involved in Project Puppet (secret Lazarus initiative involving mind-control cyberware disguised as doll chips).

They prefer people not get killed for practicing their art. - **Rumor** to have performed a lot of work for the NUSA government, mostly unconfirmed. - **Rumor** to have undergone a full body conversion. - **Rumor** to be a part of an AI-overseen archival netrunning group, operating out of a host/node nicknamed "HAVEN".
Additional Notes

Verified username to be publicly considered as "highly knowledgeable" and well-versed in defensive netrunning. - **Of Location:** They are not currently on Earth! LOCK / UNLOCK - ninjamag

Parsed: LOCK / UNLOCK — username ninjamag
Resolved: ™ninjamag (id: 253947214030700544)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1385468232781140088 • archived
! Only 1 labeled section(s) parsed
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
# 🔒 LOCK (Message 1/2) “UNLOCK” (when things go sideways) Role: Solo (Combat Tech / Infiltration)
Age
28 | Pronouns: He/They | Height: 6’2” Faction Ties: Freelance (rumored Mox ties, ex-Despoilers) Street Rating: Clean-6 Status: Active Operator ##🧍‍♂️ Appearance Encased in a black reflective mask with pulsing orange data stripes. His frame is sleek—almost synthetic—with chain-wrapped limbs used for neurostabilization, not fashion. Pants are tagged “UNLOCK,” like a sealed weapon waiting for release. * A walking locked file—silent, secure, deadly. ## 🧠 Psych Profile Personality: Cold. Cryptic. Code-precise. Quirk: Tracks time down to the second mid-combat. Inner Conflict: Wants autonomy. Fears it. Still bound by glitchy corpo code. Emotional State: Trained to delay emotion under pressure—but it always comes back, alone, later. ##🧬 Backstory LOCK was engineered in a Biotechnica blacksite (Rook Node) to test biometric obedience—human loyalty baked into brain chemistry. His obedience was reinforced by a neural implant: the Obedience Lockchain. Mid-mission, a memory broke through. The loop glitched. His handlers labeled him: UNRECOVERABLE. No team. No cleanup. Just ghosted. Now he works Night City freelance, proving one thing: “They made me a weapon. Now I choose the target.” ### 🗓️ It’s been 6 years since he broke. ## 🦾 Cyberware Loadout (CWP: 6.0 / 6.0) • Recoil Dampers – Steadies firearm recoil (→ joint clicking) • Thermal Control Skin – Erases heat sig (→ skin repels touch) • Biomonitor – Tracks vitals/stress (→ false alerts, hyper-aware) • GhostTag – Scrambles facial ID (→ hard to recognize) • Voice Modulator – Glitched voice masking (→ cracks under stress) • Cyberoptics (Low-Light) – Night vision (→ faint red glow) ### ⚠️ Psychosis Risk: Low – side effects narratively rich, not overpowering. ## 🔫 Weapons & Gear ### Primary: K-VECTOR Smart Gun • Smart/regular fire modes • Suppressor toggle + HUD scope swap • Matte black / orange trim (Training-only infinite ammo mode) ### Sidearms: Dual custom pistols • Semi/full auto toggle • 20-round mags, suppressors • LED-themed, ergonomic CQC tools# ### Utility Loadout: • EMP Ping Tool • Vibro-gloves (melee shock dampening) • Tactical harness + LED mags • Chain-wrapped limbs (support + lore) 🛠 Skills & Talents ### TECH // “Plugless Netrunner” • Hardjack Override – Manual probes/tools for security bypass • Basic Comms Scanner – Unsecured radio intercepts • Deadhand Hacking – Physical lock cracking (no net) ### INFILTRATION // “Ghost Walk Protocol” • Silent Ops Movement – No sound, no trace • Tactile Entry – Lockpicks, vents, breach tools • Field Recon – Reads exits, layouts instantly • Visual Suppression – Masters cover, darkness, and chaos

portrait

Lux “Deluxe” Deckard - .raelyna

Parsed: Lux “Deluxe” Deckard — username .raelyna
Resolved: Raelyna The Red (id: 160705634394832897)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1384305055817138328 • archived
Name
Lux “Deluxe” Deckard
Age
32
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
Fixer/Merc, Exotic Nomad
Psychological Profile
Fearless, Tolerant, Unstable, Sadistic.
Physical Description
Tall and thin, with light frame and heavy augmentation. Long dark hair, green eyes, long pointed ears and enlarged canine teeth.
Chrome / Implants
Chameleon Skin, Cyberleg (Runner), Netrunner Suite (Level 1), Targeting Optic, Modded Mandibles [Vampyre](https://cyberpunk.fandom.com/wiki/Vampyres)
Total Cyberware Points
8
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Dash, Airdash, Optical Camouflage, Stealth,
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Pistols, Adaptive Rifle, Vampyre. [The Vampyre](https://cyberpunk.fandom.com/wiki/Vampyres) is a mandible mod that effectively gives you fangs, and can be poisoned.
Backstory
Growing up she was exposed to the darker side of humanity when her family paid for passage across the NUSA, their convoy was ambushed by Raffen, and she watched as dozens of her fellow travelers, family, and friends were harvested for cybernetics and organs. When her sister was chosen to go next, she went feral, she ripped herself free of her bindings and mutilated her captors. Ever since, she has been slightly unhinged and talks with a cavalier attitude about horrible violence when she is challenged. She, her sister, and her older brother, were rescued from the Raffen camp by nomad family, the White Eyes clan of Snake Nation, who took them in and raised them. Her siblings remain with them now, but her cyberization after the attacks made it unsafe for her to stay in the badlands without access to decent facilities, so she became a static for the clans. When they stopped in Night city, she stayed and became a merc, doing all kinds of jobs for all kinds of people and occasionally providing information to her Snake nation contacts or procuring what they need from the city. Eventually she became their go to fixer for the needs of Snake Nation, and thus began building crews and assigning work for other mercs, recently she’s moved into Beast Town in search of the right crew for the job she has in mind next.
Known Affiliations
Snake Nation[The White Eyes], The Aldecaldos[Local Fixers and Mercs], Sixth Street[Dealers], The Animals[Biz relations].
RP Hooks
Specialized in Crew assembly and Acquisitions. Frequent contact with Nomads.

other

other

other

Thomas "Double T" Tchekov - alexykuzneatov

Parsed: Thomas "Double T" Tchekov — username alexykuzneatov
Resolved: Alexy Kuzneatov (id: 188879746245984256)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1384628821206110229 • archived
Name
Thomas "Double T" Tchekov
Age
33
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Underground Medic/First responder for hire
Psychological Profile
Jaded, Focused, He keeps his head down when not on the job, Shopping at all the local places, He's a good soul at heart, but has been burnt too many times for a trusting friendship to build quickly. Loyal to money otherwise, will always do his best to complete his job, and save lives. Unless they shoot at him first, then they bleed out for all he cares.
Physical Description
Tall, Well built, Slightly Asian descent, Possibly From northern Chinese descent, or Mongolian. Short shaggy Black hair, Barely maintained.
Chrome / Implants
-Smart eyes -Chemical Analyzer
Total Cyberware Points
3
Skills / Talents / Abilities
High First aid and Med-Tech knowledge, Basic Surgery Knowledge (Trauma Closure, Mostly) , High SMG skills and Unarmed combat (defencive, Using Armor for defections and Absorption.) Mid range Shotgunner skills.
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Heavy Trauma Team Armor (Trauma Team Insignia Roughly Removed) Including helmet, Med-tech Kit, Including Several Doses of common drugs and treatments, Including antidotes and Painkillers, Stabilizers and Quickseal bio foam. (No specialized stuff, like Immunosuppressants,) Smart SMG, Basic Pump action shotgun, Several Loaded Magazines for SMG, about 30 Shells of Buckshot for his Shotty
Backstory
A Young man travels to a big city, Enrolls in Med school, Wants to make a difference, After finishing his med-school, He grew impatient and Signed on for Trauma team, Worked for a few years elsewhere before being transferred to NC Division, got a lot of work, and built up a good rep in the company. Then He ended up going on a mission to save a big boss, long story short, Entire team but him dead, Boss over shoulder, AV Refused to land, Got blamed for the entire mess. Got fired, disgraced from the company, coat tail rider, All but a few, people who knew him, They are still in contact, and supply him with the tools of his trade for fair price, It is the gray market after all. Main contact is Dr. Ferdinand, (NPC) His goal is to either get Back in good graces with TT, or Make it on his own, and Become a big named Underground Medic. A Legend if you will
Known Affiliations
Dr. Ferdinand, Trauma team. Local ripperdocs, (Drop offs and Fixers),
Reference Images
See below
RP Hooks
"Hurt? Call Double T, He'll Fix you up, If you've got the Eddies." Need a bit of extra muscle, or anticipating a fight, Its always good to have Double T on your Side. That large guy at the bar nursing a whiskey with a thousand yard stare, He glances towards you and gives a sly smirk, He knows what you are, A paycheck eventually.
Additional Notes
Owns a townhouse on the outskirts of NC, and a basic four door sedan, The house also should contain a basic lab for creating simple medicines from what he can get a hold of.

portrait

Judith Steele - actuallystoked

Parsed: Judith Steele — username actuallystoked
Resolved: Actually Stoked (id: 300355633088167946)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1367947428292202607 • archived
Name
Judith Steele
Age
24
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
N/A
Psychological Profile
Judith varies in different situations with how she reacts to them. While any OBVIOUS threat would cause her to panic, and she would get intimidated by someone directly threatening her, a lot of the time she's too stupid to recognize things. This applies to things such as common sense, innuendos, and anything subtle. She has a kind enough heart to help someone who might need it, but is highly gullible. She isn't completely helpless though, as given the opportunity to defend herself or escape from a bad situation she will do so.
Physical Description
Judith is approximately 5'4 tall with a lean frame. Her hair is dark grey and her eyes are brown. She can usually be seen wearing comfortable clothing like hoodies, sweatpants, or just techwear overall. Chrome/Implants: Judith has the basic implants that one would expect of a civilian and can connect to any regular port, but doesn't have anything specialized.
Total Cyberware Points
N/A (starting amount?) Skills/Abilities: N/A Weapons/Armor/Equipment: SKULLCO. HIB MK33 Revolver: a revolver chambered in .500 Magnum with 6-round capacity, two barrels, and the ability to shoot single-shot or double-shot. Features internal electronic systems to dampen recoil. The gun is also trimmed/plated with EMI shielding to protect it from ElectroMagnetic Interference
Backstory
Judith was originally a shut-in who would do nothing but sit at home and play video games, and do BrainDances (BDs). Eventually, either via her parents getting sick of her shit or the landlord- she was kicked out. She is currently looking for work but has no idea where to start, and no life skills outside of video games or pop culture knowledge.
Additional Notes
Easily corruptible/influenced, and has room temperature IQ.

portrait

Joshua Woods - RainIncarnate

Parsed: Joshua Woods — username RainIncarnate
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: medusa_cascade • Thread id: 1367945991931695255 • archived
! Username "RainIncarnate" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
Joshua Woods
Age
23
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Solo / Edgerunner
Psychological Profile
Joshua Woods is an anarchist through and through. A follower of a cult and a genuine pyschopath. He maintains a cold, and stoic demeanor while silently judging the people around him who allow themselves to stagnate against the oppressive forces of the world.
Physical Description
Joshua is a thin, pale young man with messy dark brown hair. He dresses either professionally, or spiritually, favoring flowing robes and loose outfits in casual settings and professional rigid looks when with others. Chrome/Implants: Ghosttag Dermal Plating Netrunner Suite LVL 1 Subdermal Grip
Total Cyberware Points
5 Skills/Abilities: Competent Hand to Hand Resilient Mental Fortitude Tactical Mind Skilled in subterfuge and espionage. Weapons/Armor/Equipment: Folding spear.
Backstory
Joshua was raised in a religious household out in the outskirts of civilization, he grew to question, and eventual disavow his former faith in favor of pursuing his own form of enlightenment that teaches freedom from morality and societal expectations. Since then, he's grown to become a formidable force in the scene, and has somewhat of a reputation in Las Vegas
Additional Notes
None

**WheelNDeal**: [Name] Victor "Gears" Pierce [Age] 34 [Profession] Freelance gun-for-hire [Psychological Profile] Relatively level-headed [Physical Desc.] 181 cm tall, 77 kg, fit build [Cybernetics] Robotic right arm (some enhanced strength, rugged and reliable, built in deployable short blade in hand), right eye cybernetic replacement(night vision, hud, 35/20 vision clarity),both lungs enhanced, minor brain augmentations [Skills] Some hacking skill (primarily for opening locked doors as a first option before blowing them up), explosives handling, gunsmithing [Gear] Modified AK-70 (8x50mm), tactical axe, ballistic plating on shoulders torso and forearms, helmet with ballistic visor and filters, personal digital assistant, demolition charges (usually 3) [Background] Ex-militech mercenary, moved on to freelance after contract expired. [Additional Info] Being paranoid of hacking attempts on his chrome, Victor has any wireless connections to his cybernetics completely turned off unless absolutely needed, usually hacking and connecting to devices is delegated to his PDA.

Resolved: Jack (id: 378111099473756162)
From: #character-sheets • Posted by: NightCityBot • Thread id: 1366902128928358430 • archived
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
**MedusaCascade**: Kelly “Holly” Richards – NCRP Character Sheet
Name
Kelly Richards Street Name: “Holly” (Preferred alias, especially on the job)
Age
24
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
Freelance Companion, Entertainer, and Info Broker
Physical Description
Height: 5’10” Exotic Appearance: Full synthetic skin (glossy black) with neon tracing and subtle integrated lighting Interchangeable eye colors depending on mood or aesthetic Mechanical body (light armor) with flexible frame and alluring anthropomorphic curves Style: A blend of luxury and comfort—flowing silks, glossy synthetics, and playfully revealing cuts. Often mistaken for a dancer or escort before she speaks. Cyberware & CWP: Implant Type CP Notes Full Exotic Body Conversion Misc – 93% of body replaced (not CWP-tracked due to aesthetic-only conversion) ICE Layer Neural 2 Detects incoming quickhacks instantly. Emits weird static near devices. Internal Holophone Neural 1 Allows voice calls, music, and limited AR communication internally. Basic Chipslot (with chiplock) Neural 1 Can read datachips. Locked to prevent tampering. Total CWP: 4
Psychological Profile
Diagnosis: Insomniac, trauma-induced hypersexuality (self-described as “nymphomaniac”), compulsive validation-seeking Trigger Words (in reference to her): Toaster, Robot, Hollow, or any phrase implying she’s not a real person Behavioral Notes: Often appears confident and flirty in public, but is prone to sudden emotional shutdowns or withdrawal if emotionally wounded. Craves comfort, intimacy, and feeling “wanted” to counter the belief she’s more appliance than person. Deep down, she believes she should’ve died in the accident and grapples daily with feeling like a freak.

Name
Raven Zhenari
Age
36
Pronouns
He/Him
Occupation
Normal Job: NCCE-Corps ((C2 Journeyman Civil Engineer)) Limelight Job: Works on BDs and offers Emotional Surrealism + Romanticism services as a side JoyToy gig.
Psychological Profile
Generally kind at heart and gentle, though his PTSD and EPD make him prone to hyperagression in very specific situations. Despite this, he tries to avoid combat and does his best to keep off the police radar (After all, Cops love fucking with war veterans who still rock MilSpec Chrome). Abuses his NeuroFilter to try and lock out his emotions due to his psychosis issues, has a hard time with acceptance. Still in the greiving stage even 10 years later after wife died in combat. Despises XBD Snuffers.
Physical Description
Short, lean, busted up with a dash of cute whimsy. Fully Biosculpted (Leopard) with a SOF Logo on left hip, barcode under left "paw pad". 🦾 Chrome / Implants Arms & Arm Attachments: MonoWire ( 2 Points - A hyper-thin, retractable filament—stronger than steel, sharper than a scalpel.) Auditory System: Circulatory & Immune Systems: Hands & Feet: Cybernetic Fingers (1 point - Chosen tools: Micro-Screwdriver, Security Jack, Lockpick) Integumentary System: Chameleon Skin ( 2 Points- Passive invisibility from further than 5ft when still. Legs & Mobility: Neural: NeuroFilter (2 Points - Suppresses emotions. Perfect in combat, negotiations, torture.) Ocular System: Smart Eyes ( 2 Points - Zoom, thermal, night vision, facial ID, AR HUD.) Skeleton & Torso Musculature: Universal Muscular (Arms/Legs/Tail): Miscellaneous: SmartLink (1 Point - Allows the use of Smart Weapons)
Total Cyberware Points
10
Skills / Talents / Abilities
Primary Focus Skills: Electrical Systems, Air and Land Vehicle Systems, Demolitions, Security Systems. Talents: Resilient, Tough, Dad Vibes. Maker Role Ability - Fabrication Expertise + Field Tech
Equipment / Armor / Weapons
Bigass toolbox wit

Jasmin Mechanica - Snip06

Parsed: Jasmin Mechanica — username Snip06
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #retired-character-sheets • Posted by: NightCityBot • Thread id: 1393395548597522564 • archived
! Username "Snip06" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Pre-amble (unlabeled lines above first section)
**MedusaCascade**: Name: Jasmin Mechanica, Jaz for short
Age
27
Pronouns
She/Her
Occupation
Nomad, takes on gigs and small work
Psychological Profile
A very loyal dog to her clan and her Gramps. One who does not fear most things and will rush into danger just to have fun. Calm during most situations unless someone trys to take her gun
Physical Description
5.6 feet tall dog with brown fur and gold techwear. Chrome/Implants: Kiroshi Low-Lite eys and Militech Paraline cyber deck. Skills/Abilities: Best driver of her clan as well as a decent gunner. Very smart with cars and simple tech. Plus her talents in the bed. Didn't know if that was important so i blurred this Weapons/Armor/Equipment: Just her trust iron passed down by her Gramps. An old war style 44 magnum revolver
Backstory
Have fun reading this. So Gramps is one of the head chairmen to the clan and the head mechanic, he is the one I lived with all my life and learned from. My dad died fighting off a rival clan and my mom lives with the other side of the clan. The clan will be based out of 2 locations. One where I am and one where mom is, my clan primarily focuses on travel and trade work. Going from place to place picking up new equipment and doing odd jobs for people. Only a select few of the dogs could take on blood contracts. The blood hounds where not special, just those who knew what they where doing and already took a life, easier to take a life when ur hands are already bloody. I was never part of the blood hounds as my gramps forbid it, but I have taken life before. Mainly from a gunk who tried to snatch my ride. At the time it was a treasure to me, but I lost her due to a fire fight. Rouge missile was coming for Paws truck. Him and 3 other dogs where driving the Gun & Runner and I couldn't let them perish. So I lit some flares and drove Infront to grab it's heat signature and then delta'd out only to watch her get hit and be sent to the fires beyond......

Biella Brecken - yeenageddon

Parsed: Biella Brecken — username yeenageddon
Resolved: UNCLAIMED (id: —)
From: #retired-character-sheets • Posted by: NightCityBot • Thread id: 1393369160456868042 • archived
! Username "yeenageddon" not found in guild (unclaimed)
Name
Biella Brecken
Age
24
Pronouns
she/her
Occupation
Ex-military freelancer
Psychological Profile
struggles with emotional control, grieves for the loss of her student and a fellow squad mate, seeks atonement through righteous acts of reckless abandon and self sacrifice, breaks down at unnecessary loss of life and loses her control when someone gets zeroed for no reason, often butchering the perpetrator with her claw gauntlets
Physical Description
6'5, sleek but well built, toned, exotic Chrome/Implants: cybernetic claws, enhanced ears, subdermal grip, targeting optic, combat wired reflexes, mr.studd/midnight lady
Total Cyberware Points
9 Skills/Abilities: krav maga, jiu-jitsu, muay thai Weapons/Armor/Equipment: cyber claws that cover most of the hand and act as gauntlets, kevlar jacket and pants for light protection and flexibility
Backstory
Biella Brecken grew up in the streets with a rough life as a delinquent, struggling to survive day by day, once she came of age she signed up for the military, wanting to make a difference in the world so no-one had to go through the hell she did growing up, where she was augmented for combat and she was changed into an exotic, was taught the ways of martial arts for close quarters combat, after being dishonorably discharged for disobeying orders and getting a squad mate killed she attempted to open a martial arts dojo, but found her temper couldn't handle teaching after she accidentally killed one of her students, she sold the dojo and left, carrying the weight of her mistakes along with her, now finding herself in the streets of night city doing jobs here and there for whoever pays right, mostly body guard jobs for snobby rich assholes, once the job is done she distances and disassociates from people, afraid of hurting them like her long dead student and lost squad mate
Additional Notes
she was uncontrolled growing up and had to fight others for food and shelter, leading her to use her anger for survival, th
